quotes.quote: Fashion is only the attempt to realize art in living forms and social intercourse.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.quote: Whosoever desires constant success must change his conduct with the times.
quotes.author: Niccolo Machiavelli

quotes.quote: It has never been, and never will be easy work! But the road that is built in hope is more pleasant to the traveler than the road built in despair, even though they both lead to the same destination.
quotes.author: Marion Zimmer Bradley

quotes.quote: Art is the child of Nature; yes, her darling child, in whom we trace the features of the mother's face, her aspect and her attitude.
quotes.author: Beck

quotes.quote: Hope for the best, survive the worst, find humor wherever you can.
quotes.author: Claire Scovell LaZebnik

quotes.quote: Choose a job you love, and you will never have to work a day in your life.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Definiteness of purpose is the starting point of all achievement.
quotes.author: W. Clement Stone

quotes.quote: We're all human, aren't we? Every human life is worth the same, and worth saving.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: I have learned that success is to be measured not so much by the position that one has reached in life as by the obstacles which he has had to overcome while trying to succeed.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.quote: Life beats down and crushes the soul and art reminds you that you have one.
quotes.author: Stella Adler

quotes.quote: You will never be happy if you continue to search for what happiness consists of. You will never live if you are looking for the meaning of life.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: Failure is not an option. Everyone has to succeed.
quotes.author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

quotes.quote: If you wish to succeed in life, make perseverance your bosom friend, experience your wise counselor, caution your elder brother, and hope your guardian genius.
quotes.author: Joseph Addison

quotes.quote: Woe to the man whose heart has not learned while young to hope, to love - and to put its trust in life.

quotes.quote: Success is measured by your discipline and inner peace.

quotes.quote: First they ignore you, then they ridicule you, then they fight you, and then you win.

quotes.quote: It's all about quality of life and finding a happy balance between work and friends and family.

quotes.quote: What's meant to be will always find a way
quotes.author: Trisha Yearwood

quotes.quote: In life, there are those relationships where you really love someone, but they're just not right for you and there's a little bittersweet feel to it.

quotes.quote: Success soon palls. The joyous time is when the breeze first strikes your sails, and the waters rustle under your bows.

quotes.quote: Of all sad words of tongue or pen, the saddest are these, 'It might have been.

quotes.quote: I look back on my life like a good day's work, it was done and I am satisfied with it.

quotes.quote: My life is a monument to procrastination, to the art of putting things off until later, or much later, or possibly never.

quotes.quote: Success depends in a very large measure upon individual initiative and exertion, and cannot be achieved except by a dint of hard work.

quotes.quote: Real artists take the misery and sadness of life and translate it into art.

quotes.quote: You know those things that you throw the twigs into and it spits them out? That's what I do. The branches are like life, and I throw them into my head and some of it comes out as humor.

quotes.quote: Wild oats will get sown some time, and one of the arts of life is to sow them at the right time.

quotes.quote: When thou art above measure angry, bethink thee how momentary is man's life.

quotes.quote: A beautiful lady is an accident of nature. A beautiful old lady is a work of art.

quotes.quote: Life is like an onion. You peel it off one layer at a time, and sometimes you weep.

quotes.quote: When work is a pleasure, life is a joy! When work is a duty, life is slavery.

quotes.quote: Real success is not, like, materialistic. It's being where you want to be when you want to be; just living your life how you feel; having an ultimate goal and being able to accomplish it.

quotes.quote: Hope is the thing with feathers That perches in the soul And sings the tune without the words And never stops at all.

quotes.quote: Finding some quiet time in your life, I think, is hugely important.
quotes.author: Mariel Hemingway

quotes.quote: Each moment of a happy lover's hour is worth an age of dull and common life.

quotes.quote: If my life is going to mean anything, I have to live it myself.

quotes.quote: Every parent is at some time the father of the unreturned prodigal, with nothing to do but keep his house open to hope.

quotes.quote: Any time not spent on love is wasted.
quotes.author: Torquato Tasso

quotes.quote: Talent hits a target no one else can hit. Genius hits a target no one else can see.

quotes.quote: Success has nothing to do with what you gain in life or accomplish for yourself. It's what you do for others.
quotes.author: Danny Thomas

quotes.quote: In romance, we feel the need to zoom in and expound on our partner's foibles in intimate detail; in friendship, we tend to do the opposite, avoiding confrontation through fear, lethargy or both.
quotes.author: Mariella Frostrup

quotes.quote: Worry does not empty tomorrow of its sorrow, it empties today of its strength.
quotes.author: Corrie ten Boom

quotes.quote: Unbeing dead isn't being alive.
quotes.author: E.E. Cummings

quotes.quote: Success is about enjoying what you have and where you are, while pursuing achievable goals.
quotes.author: Bo Bennett

quotes.quote: Every failure is a step to success.
quotes.author: William Whewell

quotes.quote: Pain is temporary. Quitting lasts forever.
quotes.author: Lance Armstrong

quotes.quote: People think dreams aren't real just because they aren't made of matter, of particles. Dreams are real. But they are made of viewpoints, of images, of memories and puns and lost hopes.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: If you love somebody, let them go, for if they return, they were always yours. If they don't, they never were.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: The art of living well and the art of dying well are one.
quotes.author: Epicurus

quotes.quote: Bitterness imprisons life; love releases it.
quotes.author: Harry Emerson Fosdick

quotes.quote: Life is for the living. Death is for the dead. Let life be like music. And death a note unsaid.
quotes.author: Langston Hughes

quotes.quote: A woman has to live her life, or live to repent not having lived it.
quotes.author: D.H. Lawrence

quotes.quote: The more I see, the less I know for sure.
quotes.author: John Lennon

quotes.quote: Life is the art of being well deceived; and in order that the deception may succeed it must be habitual and uninterrupted.
quotes.author: William Hazlitt

quotes.quote: There is no force like success, and that is why the individual makes all effort to surround himself throughout life with the evidence of it; as of the individual, so should it be of the nation.
quotes.author: Marcus Garvey

quotes.quote: I've done it all. I'm thankful and proud of what I've accomplished in my life. I hope to keep doing it.
quotes.author: Ralph Stanley

quotes.quote: A work of art is a world in itself reflecting senses and emotions of the artist's world.
quotes.author: Hans Hofmann

quotes.quote: I think we dream so we don’t have to be apart for so long. If we’re in each other’s dreams, we can be together all the time.
quotes.author: A.A. Milne

quotes.quote: Those who educate children well are more to be honored than they who produce them; for these only gave them life, those the art of living well.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Those who have never known the deep intimacy and the intense companionship of mutual love have missed the best thing that life has to give.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russell

quotes.quote: Any authentic work of art must start an argument between the artist and his audience.
quotes.author: Rebecca West

quotes.quote: It's not the load that breaks you down, it's the way you carry it.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.quote: I was smiling yesterday, I am smiling today and I will smile tomorrow. Simply because life is too short to cry for anything.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: To burn always with this hard, gem-like flame, to maintain this ecstasy, is success in life.
quotes.author: Walter Pater

quotes.quote: A well-developed sense of humor is the pole that adds balance to your steps as you walk the tightrope of life.
quotes.author: William Arthur Ward

quotes.quote: If it is your time, love will track you down like a cruise missile.
quotes.author: Lynda Barry

quotes.quote: Sixth grade was a big time, in my childhood, of hoops and friendship, and coming up with funny things.
quotes.author: Adam Sandler

quotes.quote: No, there's nothing half so sweet in life as love's young dream.
quotes.author: Thomas Moore

quotes.quote: It's how you deal with failure that determines how you achieve success.
quotes.author: Charlotte Whitton

quotes.quote: You can't study comedy; it's within you. It's a personality. My humor is an attitude.
quotes.author: Don Rickles

quotes.quote: If you're bored with life - you don't get up every morning with a burning desire to do things - you don't have enough goals.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.quote: The things you do for yourself are gone when you are gone, but the things you do for others remain as your legacy.
quotes.author: Kalu Ndukwe Kalu

quotes.quote: Everywhere is within walking distance if you have the time.
quotes.author: Steven Wright

quotes.quote: I know not with what weapons World War III will be fought, but World War IV will be fought with sticks and stones.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: The greatest discovery of my generation is that a human being can alter his life by altering his attitudes.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: My biggest failure is 'Metal Gear.' It's my biggest failure and my biggest success.
quotes.author: Hideo Kojima

quotes.quote: If I can stop one heart from breaking, I shall not live in vain.
quotes.author: Emily Dickinson

quotes.quote: Marriage is the highest state of friendship. If happy, it lessens our cares by dividing them, at the same time that it doubles our pleasures by mutual participation.
quotes.author: Samuel Richardson

quotes.quote: To me, art's highest purpose is to entertain, to enlighten, to inspire, to evoke emotion and to change an audience in some way, big or small.
quotes.author: Charity Sunshine Tillemann-Dick

quotes.quote: Nobody likes being alone that much. I don't go out of my way to make friends, that's all. It just leads to disappointment.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: If you have love in your life, it can make up for a great many things that are missing. If you don't have love in your life, no matter what else there is, it's not enough.
quotes.author: Ann Landers

quotes.quote: Find a good teacher that will keep the game fun. Work hard and don't be afraid to have success or disappointment. That is what golf is all about.
quotes.author: Paula Creamer

quotes.quote: Why didn't I learn to treat everything like it was the last time. My greatest regret was how much I believed in the future.
quotes.author: Jonathan Safran Foer

quotes.quote: HopeSmiles from the threshold of the year to come, Whispering 'it will be happier'...
quotes.author: Alfred Lord Tennyson

quotes.quote: Success consists in being successful, not in having potential for success. Any wide piece of ground is the potential site of a palace, but there's no palace till it's built.
quotes.author: Fernando Pessoa

quotes.quote: We work in the dark - we do what we can - we give what we have. Our doubt is our passion and our passion is our task. The rest is the madness of art.
quotes.author: Henry James

quotes.quote: The truth is, unless you let go, unless you forgive yourself, unless you forgive the situation, unless you realize that the situation is over, you cannot move forward.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: One love, one heart, one destiny.
quotes.author: Bob Marley

quotes.quote: Friendship without self-interest is one of the rare and beautiful things of life.
quotes.author: James F. Byrnes

quotes.quote: I don't know. I have incredible amounts of hope that things can change. It takes people who believe.
quotes.author: Morgan Spurlock

quotes.quote: Let each man exercise the art he knows.
quotes.author: Aristophanes

quotes.quote: Once you do away with the idea of people as fixed, static entities, then you see that people can change, and there is hope.
quotes.author: bell hooks

quotes.quote: Life is the only art that we are required to practice without preparation, and without being allowed the preliminary trials, the failures and botches, that are essential for training.
quotes.author: Lewis Mumford

quotes.quote: Do I not destroy my enemies when I make them my friends?
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Humor is very interesting to me. My films are not comedies, but there's comedy in them from time to time, absurdities, just like in real life.
quotes.author: David Lynch

quotes.quote: Of all forms of caution, caution in love is perhaps the most fatal to true happiness.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russell

quotes.quote: You practice mindfulness, on the one hand, to be calm and peaceful. On the other hand, as you practice mindfulness and live a life of peace, you inspire hope for a future of peace.
quotes.author: Thich Nhat Hanh

quotes.quote: It's not the face, but the expressions on it. It's not the voice, but what you say. It's not how you look in that body, but the thing you do with it. You are beautiful.
quotes.author: Stephenie Meyer

quotes.quote: Personally, love is very important for me. There are lots of ordinary things in life, so love should be extraordinary. I hope I achieve that.
quotes.author: Ranbir Kapoor

quotes.quote: There is - I mean - I found early in life that righteous indignation is a little off-putting, and so I try to couch it with humor.
quotes.author: Al Franken

quotes.quote: It is good to love many things, for therein lies the true strength, and whosoever loves much performs much, and can accomplish much, and what is done in love is well done.
quotes.author: Vincent van Gogh

quotes.quote: I never feel any pressure about a film. What is meant to happen will happen. I have seen failure as well as success several times.
quotes.author: Akshay Kumar

quotes.quote: I'm single, footloose and fancy free, I have no responsibilities, no anchors. Work, friendship and self-improvement, that's me.
quotes.author: Joel Edgerton

quotes.quote: Wherever art appears, life disappears.
quotes.author: Robert Motherwell

quotes.quote: The true soldier fights not because he hates what is in front of him, but because he loves what is behind him.
quotes.author: G.K. Chesterton

quotes.quote: Everyone has talent. What's rare is the courage to follow it to the dark places where it leads.
quotes.author: Erica Jong

quotes.quote: Madam, I have been looking for a person who disliked gravy all my life; let us swear eternal friendship.
quotes.author: Sydney Smith

quotes.quote: The past explains how I got here, but the future is up to me - and I love to live life at full throttle.
quotes.author: Janice Dickinson

quotes.quote: Treat a work of art like a prince. Let it speak to you first.
quotes.author: Arthur Schopenhauer

quotes.quote: Sanity and happiness are an impossible combination.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: Do not fear to be eccentric in opinion, for every opinion now accepted was once eccentric.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russell

quotes.quote: I think... if it is true that there are as many minds as there are heads, then there are as many kinds of love as there are hearts.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: If a man does not make new acquaintances as he advances through life, he will soon find himself left alone. A man, sir, should keep his friendship in a constant repair.
quotes.author: Samuel Johnson

quotes.quote: I will not let anyone walk through my mind with their dirty feet.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: People say that life is the thing, but I prefer reading.
quotes.author: Logan Pearsall Smith

quotes.quote: One friend in a lifetime is much; two are many; three are hardly possible. Friendship needs a certain parallelism of life, a community of thought, a rivalry of aim.
quotes.author: Brooks Adams

quotes.quote: We can easily forgive a child who is afraid of the dark; the real tragedy of life is when men are afraid of the light.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: To see a World in a Grain of Sand And a Heaven in a Wild Flower, Hold Infinity in the palm of your hand And Eternity in an hour.
quotes.author: William Blake

quotes.quote: If I didn't try to eavesdrop on every bus ride I take or look for the humor when I go for a walk, I would just be depressed all the time.
quotes.author: Lynda Barry

quotes.quote: Life, he realize, was much like a song. In the beginning there is mystery, in the end there is confirmation, but it's in the middle where all the emotion resides to make the whole thing worthwhile.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: If a man has been his mother's undisputed darling he retains throughout life the triumphant feeling, the confidence in success, which not seldom brings actual success along with it.
quotes.author: Sigmund Freud

quotes.quote: In a decaying society, art, if it is truthful, must also reflect decay. And unless it wants to break faith with its social function, art must show the world as changeable. And help to change it.
quotes.author: Ernst Fischer

quotes.quote: Don't be afraid of your fears. They're not there to scare you. They're there to let you know that something is worth it.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: My philosophy in life is, Decide what you want to do. You have to have something to hope for.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.quote: I have moments of weakness, but mostly I brush the criticism off... Who cares if I'm not a size zero? I don't want to be. I love my body; I'm healthy, I work out.
quotes.author: Khloe Kardashian

quotes.quote: There are three things all wise men fear: the sea in storm, a night with no moon, and the anger of a gentle man.
quotes.author: Patrick Rothfuss

quotes.quote: Live to the point of tears.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: However things may seem, no evil thing is success and no good thing is failure.
quotes.author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quotes.quote: The rare few, who, early in life have rid themselves of the friendship of the many.
quotes.author: James Whistler

quotes.quote: The people of Liberia know what it means to be deprived of clean water, but we also know what it means to see our children to begin to smile again with a restoration of hope and faith in the future.
quotes.author: Ellen Johnson Sirleaf

quotes.quote: Nothing is so painful to the human mind as a great and sudden change.
quotes.author: Mary Shelley

quotes.quote: Success unshared is failure.
quotes.author: John Paul DeJoria

quotes.quote: Clouds come floating into my life, no longer to carry rain or usher storm, but to add color to my sunset sky.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: The hardest thing to find in life is balance - especially, the more success you have, the more you look to the other side of the gate.
quotes.author: Celine Dion

quotes.quote: Hope is the cordial that keeps life from stagnating.
quotes.author: Samuel Richardson

quotes.quote: To say that a work of art is good, but incomprehensible to the majority of men, is the same as saying of some kind of food that it is very good but that most people can't eat it.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: Any fool can be happy. It takes a man with real heart to make beauty out of the stuff that makes us weep.
quotes.author: Clive Barker

quotes.quote: Start writing, no matter what. The water does not flow until the faucet is turned on.
quotes.author: Louis L'Amour

quotes.quote: My hope is that countries like Morocco will have investment to create work, so people don't have to leave.
quotes.author: Tahar Ben Jelloun

quotes.quote: I've got nothing to do today but smile.
quotes.author: Paul Simon

quotes.quote: I hope to continue my friendship with France and its filmmakers for many years to come.
quotes.author: Harvey Weinstein

quotes.quote: One thing I would say is real cops have real gallows senses of humor and make incredibly funny and inappropriate jokes in the presence of dead people all the time.
quotes.author: Daniel J. Goor

quotes.quote: It is art that makes life, makes interest, makes importance and I know of no substitute whatever for the force and beauty of its process.
quotes.author: Max Eastman

quotes.quote: Art produces ugly things which frequently become more beautiful with time. Fashion, on the other hand, produces beautiful things which always become ugly with time.
quotes.author: Jean Cocteau

quotes.quote: I go to seek a Great Perhaps.
quotes.author: François Rabelais

quotes.quote: Remember that wherever your heart is, there you will find your treasure.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Don't let fear rule your life. Live one day at a time, and never be afraid.
quotes.author: Tammy Faye Bakker

quotes.quote: I hate to hear you talk about all women as if they were fine ladies instead of rational creatures. None of us want to be in calm waters all our lives.
quotes.author: Jane Austen

quotes.quote: I consider conversations with people to be mind exercises, but I don't want to pull a muscle, so I stretch a lot. That's why I'm constantly either rolling my eyes or yawning.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I've had my share of struggle. I believe, never take success to your head or failure to your heart.
quotes.author: Randeep Hooda

quotes.quote: Better to be strong than pretty and useless.
quotes.author: Lilith Saintcrow

quotes.quote: The poor prey on one another because their lives offer no hope and communicate the tragic message to these human beings that they have no possibility to attain a decent standard of living.
quotes.author: Thabo Mbeki

quotes.quote: Hope is the motivation that empowers the unemployed, enabling them to get out of bed every single morning with unbounded enthusiasm as they look for work.
quotes.author: Emanuel Cleaver

quotes.quote: You can never control who you fall in love with, even when you're in the most sad, confused time of your life. You don't fall in love with people because they're fun. It just happens.
quotes.author: Kirsten Dunst

quotes.quote: I don't happen to have a sense of humor personally, so I don't know what's funny about a character... This happens to be a feature of my life generally.
quotes.author: Wallace Shawn

quotes.quote: I will love the light for it shows me the way, yet I will endure the darkness because it shows me the stars.
quotes.author: Og Mandino

quotes.quote: A propensity to hope and joy is real riches; one to fear and sorrow real poverty.
quotes.author: David Hume

quotes.quote: I play- it's kind of like a slice-of-life, LA women in their forties, playing forty kind of what's their friendship like, and what's their life like and so I just play one of the four friends.
quotes.author: Joan Cusack

quotes.quote: You realize that our mistrust of the future makes it hard to give up the past.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: I've had great success and I've had catastrophic failure. It's really how you handle the rough stuff that defines you, I think.
quotes.author: Peter Berg

quotes.quote: I am aloof by nature. I mind my own business. I'm good with everyone, and I get along fine with people. But work is work, and friendship is friendship. I never mix the two.
quotes.author: Sonakshi Sinha

quotes.quote: Among the many signs of a lively faith and hope we have in eternal life, one of the surest is not being overly sad at the death of those whom we dearly love in our Lord.
quotes.author: Saint Ignatius

quotes.quote: Jealousy is just love and hate at the same time.
quotes.author: Drake

quotes.quote: Total absence of humor renders life impossible.
quotes.author: Sidonie Gabrielle Colette

quotes.quote: The true work of art is but a shadow of the divine perfection.
quotes.author: Michelangelo

quotes.quote: You might be poor, your shoes might be broken, but your mind is a palace.
quotes.author: Frank McCourt

quotes.quote: We are just an advanced breed of monkeys on a minor planet of a very average star. But we can understand the Universe. That makes us something very special.
quotes.author: Stephen Hawking

quotes.quote: The key to success is to focus our conscious mind on things we desire not things we fear.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: I regret that it takes a life to learn how to live.
quotes.author: Jonathan Safran Foer

quotes.quote: Failure is the condiment that gives success its flavor.
quotes.author: Truman Capote

quotes.quote: The world helps you to keep evolving and hope it's for better. You have to rise above all the tragedies in life. You have to grow, and if you stop growing, you are old.
quotes.author: Hrithik Roshan

quotes.quote: Life is short, the art long.
quotes.author: Hippocrates

quotes.quote: Failure is not our only punishment for laziness; there is also the success of others.
quotes.author: Jules Renard

quotes.quote: I love life in spite of all that mars it. I love friendship, jokes and laughter.
quotes.author: Tahar Ben Jelloun

quotes.quote: Photography takes an instant out of time, altering life by holding it still.
quotes.author: Dorothea Lange

quotes.quote: I hope that my story, I hope that my life is... an encouragement for people, especially in Brooklyn. I feel humbled and blessed.
quotes.author: Iyanla Vanzant

quotes.quote: We need 4 hugs a day for survival. We need 8 hugs a day for maintenance. We need 12 hugs a day for growth.
quotes.author: Virginia Satir

quotes.quote: Have enough courage to trust love one more time and always one more time.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: The success of the Rat Pack or the Clan was due to the camaraderie, the three guys who work together and kid each other and love each other.
quotes.author: Sammy Davis

quotes.quote: A ship is safe in harbor, but that's not what ships are for.
quotes.author: William G.T. Shedd

quotes.quote: ‎Though nobody can go back and make a new beginning... Anyone can start over and make a new ending.
quotes.author: Chico Xavier

quotes.quote: The path to success is to take massive, determined action.
quotes.author: Tony Robbins

quotes.quote: Confront the dark parts of yourself, and work to banish them with illumination and forgiveness. Your willingness to wrestle with your demons will cause your angels to sing.
quotes.author: August Wilson

quotes.quote: Maybe everyone can live beyond what they're capable of.
quotes.author: Markus Zusak

quotes.quote: They talk about the failure of socialism but where is the success of capitalism in Africa, Asia and Latin America?
quotes.author: Fidel Castro

quotes.quote: You couldn't relive your life, skipping the awful parts, without losing what made it worthwhile. You had to accept it as a whole--like the world, or the person you loved.
quotes.author: Stewart O'Nan

quotes.quote: To say goodbye is to die a little.
quotes.author: Raymond Chandler

quotes.quote: The measure of success is happiness and peace of mind.
quotes.author: Bobby Davro

quotes.quote: Being a mom is what life is about. I hope people realize what the priorities in life should be and know not everything has to be perfect.
quotes.author: Kourtney Kardashian

quotes.quote: If you could choose one characteristic that would get you through life, choose a sense of humor.
quotes.author: Jennifer Jones

quotes.quote: Biology gives you a brain. Life turns it into a mind.
quotes.author: Jeffrey Eugenides

quotes.quote: Do you want to know who you are? Don't ask. Act! Action will delineate and define you.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.quote: Life shrinks or expands in proportion to one's courage.
quotes.author: Anaïs Nin

quotes.quote: Thousands of candles can be lighted from a single candle, and the life of the candle will not be shortened. Happiness never decreases by being shared.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: I dream my painting and I paint my dream.
quotes.author: Vincent van Gogh

quotes.quote: You grow up a bit damaged or broken then you have some success but you don't know how to feel good about the work you're doing or the life you're leading.
quotes.author: Johnny Depp

quotes.quote: We are all serving a life sentence, and good behavior is our only hope for a pardon.
quotes.author: Douglas Horton

quotes.quote: Pregnancy is something that I always love. It's about hope and the future and a new baby.
quotes.author: Carine Roitfeld

quotes.quote: Liza, I love you more than any words can say. You have made me a complete person. You are everything to me. And I cannot think of living life without you. And I love you forever.
quotes.author: David Gest

quotes.quote: Don’t try to make life a mathematics problem with yourself in the center and everything coming out equal. When you’re good, bad things can still happen. And if you’re bad, you can still be lucky.
quotes.author: Barbara Kingsolver

quotes.quote: You've got to ask! Asking is, in my opinion, the world's most powerful - and neglected - secret to success and happiness.
quotes.author: Percy Ross

quotes.quote: I never read the life of any important person without discovering that he knew more and could do more than I could ever hope to know or do in half a dozen lifetimes.
quotes.author: J. B. Priestley

quotes.quote: Every day is a new opportunity. You can build on yesterday's success or put its failures behind and start over again. That's the way life is, with a new game every day, and that's the way baseball is.
quotes.author: Bob Feller

quotes.quote: It is not that I'm so smart. But I stay with the questions much longer.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: When one takes action for others, one's own suffering is transformed into the energy that can keep one moving forward; a light of hope illuminating a new tomorrow for oneself and others is kindled.
quotes.author: Daisaku Ikeda

quotes.quote: No one knows for certain how much impact they have on the lives of other people. Oftentimes, we have no clue. Yet we push it just the same.
quotes.author: Jay Asher

quotes.quote: The art of living is more like wrestling than dancing.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Reputation is what other people know about you. Honor is what you know about yourself.
quotes.author: Lois McMaster Bujold

quotes.quote: No persons are more frequently wrong, than those who will not admit they are wrong.
quotes.author: François de La Rochefoucauld

quotes.quote: A man's work is nothing but this slow trek to rediscover, through the detours of art, those two or three great and simple images in whose presence his heart first opened.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: You will find that it is necessary to let things go; simply for the reason that they are heavy. So let them go, let go of them. I tie no weights to my ankles.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: Understanding is the first step to acceptance, and only with acceptance can there be recovery.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: Happiness [is] only real when shared
quotes.author: Jon Krakauer

quotes.quote: I can imagine no more comfortable frame of mind for the conduct of life than a humorous resignation.
quotes.author: W. Somerset Maugham

quotes.quote: If you have no confidence in self, you are twice defeated in the race of life.
quotes.author: Marcus Garvey

quotes.quote: If you don't like me, life goes on, you know what I mean? But I hope you do like me. Because I think that in addition to being pushy, I'm nice.
quotes.author: Christine Quinn

quotes.quote: I'm sure the universe is full of intelligent life. It's just been too intelligent to come here.
quotes.author: Arthur C. Clarke

quotes.quote: The worst part of success is trying to find someone who is happy for you.
quotes.author: Bette Midler

quotes.quote: No matter how much suffering you went through, you never wanted to let go of those memories.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: I was close to getting married a long time ago. But it didn't happen, and since then it has not been happening. It is jinxed, and I am very happy. I hope this jinx continues.
quotes.author: Salman Khan

quotes.quote: Of all the things which wisdom provides to make us entirely happy, much the greatest is the possession of friendship.
quotes.author: Epicurus

quotes.quote: The cure for all the ills and wrongs, the cares, the sorrows, and the crimes of humanity, all lie in the one word 'love'. It is the divine vitality that everywhere produces and restores life.
quotes.author: Lydia M. Child

quotes.quote: You yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection
quotes.author: Gautama Buddha

quotes.quote: I meant what I said and I said what I meant. An elephant's faithful one-hundred percent!
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.quote: There was another life that I might have had, but I am having this one.
quotes.author: Kazuo Ishiguro

quotes.quote: We make a living by what we get, but we make a life by what we give.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.quote: The past has no power over the present moment.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle

quotes.quote: There is a stubbornness about me that never can bear to be frightened at the will of others. My courage always rises at every attempt to intimidate me.
quotes.author: Jane Austen

quotes.quote: Change can either challenge or threaten us. Your beliefs pave your way to success or block you.
quotes.author: Marsha Sinetar

quotes.quote: When I see myself on film it makes me smile, I mean making a good living doing what I enjoy is soo much fun. I just hope that everyone has the chance to enjoy life like I do.
quotes.author: Adrienne Barbeau

quotes.quote: No distance of place or lapse of time can lessen the friendship of those who are thoroughly persuaded of each other's worth.
quotes.author: Robert Southey

quotes.quote: To me, sadness and humor aren't disrelated and humor is the best tool I've had against the sadness in my life.
quotes.author: Mike Mills

quotes.quote: You can't stop the futureYou can't rewind the pastThe only way to learn the secret...is to press play.
quotes.author: Jay Asher

quotes.quote: There are so many opportunities in life, that the loss of two or three capabilities is not necessarily debilitating. A handicap can give you the opportunity to focus more on art, writing, or music.
quotes.author: Jim Davis

quotes.quote: When people don't express themselves, they die one piece at a time.
quotes.author: Laurie Halse Anderson

quotes.quote: I care for myself. The more solitary, the more friendless, the more unsustained I am, the more I will respect myself.
quotes.author: Charlotte Brontë

quotes.quote: In a time of destruction, create something.
quotes.author: Maxine Hong Kingston

quotes.quote: I like flaws. I think they make things interesting.
quotes.author: Sarah Dessen

quotes.quote: Success isn't permanent and failure isn't fatal.
quotes.author: Mike Ditka

quotes.quote: We must let go of the life we have planned, so as to accept the one that is waiting for us.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.quote: Yesterday is gone. Tomorrow has not yet come. We have only today. Let us begin.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Don't be satisfied with stories, how things have gone with others. Unfold your own myth.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: We are the music makers, and we are the dreamers of dreams.
quotes.author: Arthur O'Shaughnessy

quotes.quote: Happiness is holding someone in your arms and knowing you hold the whole world.
quotes.author: Orhan Pamuk

quotes.quote: A man with a silver spoon may get his share of supporters, but he can never be an inspiration for somebody! Patience and hard work are the key to every man's success.
quotes.author: Kailash Kher

quotes.quote: I think humor is used a lot of the time to keep people from getting too close. Humor side-steps and shifts the meaning.
quotes.author: Bruce Nauman

quotes.quote: I'm not ashamed to be me. More than anyone else I know, I love my life and accept myself. What's wrong with being unique? I am proud of everything that I am and will become.
quotes.author: Johnny Weir

quotes.quote: Learn to value yourself, which means: fight for your happiness.
quotes.author: Ayn Rand

quotes.quote: It is sound judgment to hope that in the not too distant future we shall be competent to understand so simple a thing as a star.
quotes.author: Arthur Eddington

quotes.quote: It's amazing how a little tomorrow can make up for a whole lot of yesterday.
quotes.author: John Guare

quotes.quote: When you find your path, you must not be afraid. You need to have sufficient courage to make mistakes. Disappointment, defeat, and despair are the tools God uses to show us the way.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Suffering has been stronger than all other teaching, and has taught me to understand what your heart used to be. I have been bent and broken, but - I hope - into a better shape.
quotes.author: Charles Dickens

quotes.quote: Tears shed for another person are not a sign of weakness. They are a sign of a pure heart.
quotes.author: José N. Harris

quotes.quote: The ideal of all Kosovo is membership in the E.U. and a permanent friendship with the United States. I believe and I am convinced our dreams will come true.
quotes.author: Atifete Jahjaga

quotes.quote: Laughter, and the broader category of humor, are key elements in helping us go on with our life after a loss.
quotes.author: Allen Klein

quotes.quote: Nothing in the world is ever completely wrong. Even a stopped clock is right twice a day.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Anyone can hide. Facing up to things, working through them, that's what makes you strong.
quotes.author: Sarah Dessen

quotes.quote: Expose yourself to your deepest fear; after that, fear has no power, and the fear of freedom shrinks and vanishes. You are free.
quotes.author: Jim Morrison

quotes.quote: Have no fear of perfection - you'll never reach it.
quotes.author: Salvador Dalí

quotes.quote: You can have it all. Just not all at once.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: Your beliefs become your thoughts, Your thoughts become your words, Your words become your actions, Your actions become your habits, Your habits become your values, Your values become your destiny.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: I'm not hungry for success. I am only hungry for good work, and that is how it is with most superstars. Every day I tell myself how fortunate I am to be where I am.
quotes.author: Akshay Kumar

quotes.quote: I find out a lot about myself by sleeping. Dreams, they are who I am when I’m too tired to be me.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If the real world were a book, it would never find a publisher. Overlong, detailed to the point of distraction-and ultimately, without a major resolution.
quotes.author: Jasper Fforde

quotes.quote: America stands as a beacon of hope and the possibility of a better life - but it is also a nation where nearly 1 in 4 children live in poverty.
quotes.author: Chris Van Hollen

quotes.quote: Death is a challenge. It tells us not to waste time... It tells us to tell each other right now that we love each other.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: The arts are not a way to make a living. They are a very human way of making life more bearable. Practicing an art, no matter how well or badly, is a way to make your soul grow, for heaven's sake.
quotes.author: Kurt Vonnegut

quotes.quote: A good traveler has no fixed plans and is not intent on arriving.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Success is stumbling from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
quotes.author: Winston S. Churchill

quotes.quote: Be happy for this moment. This moment is your life.
quotes.author: Omar Khayyam

quotes.quote: Richard Donner's friendship and guidance showed me that there's more to life than being an actor.
quotes.author: Jeff Cohen

quotes.quote: There's a certain type of character that you can't help but come in contact with growing up and living in Brooklyn and Long Island. A certain mixture of moxie, heart, and a wise guy sense of humor.
quotes.author: Steve Buscemi

quotes.quote: I love the confidence that makeup gives me.
quotes.author: Tyra Banks

quotes.quote: Emotion resulting from a work of art is only of value when it is not obtained by sentimental blackmail.
quotes.author: Jean Cocteau

quotes.quote: When I meet successful people I ask 100 questions as to what they attribute their success to. It is usually the same: persistence, hard work and hiring good people.
quotes.author: Kiana Tom

quotes.quote: I hated every minute of training, but I said, 'Don't quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.quote: Art and religion first; then philosophy; lastly science. That is the order of the great subjects of life, that's their order of importance.
quotes.author: Muriel Spark

quotes.quote: If you end up with a boring miserable life because you listened to your mom, your dad, your teacher, your priest, or some guy on television telling you how to do your shit, then you deserve it.
quotes.author: Frank Zappa

quotes.quote: Love can change a person the way a parent can change a baby- awkwardly, and often with a great deal of mess.
quotes.author: Lemony Snicket

quotes.quote: If there's a single lesson that life teaches us, it's that wishing doesn't make it so.
quotes.author: Lev Grossman

quotes.quote: Scared is what you're feeling. Brave is what you're doing.
quotes.author: Emma Donoghue

quotes.quote: Success is not built on success. It's built on failure. It's built on frustration. Sometimes its built on catastrophe.
quotes.author: Sumner Redstone

quotes.quote: He who has a why to live for can bear almost any how.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: Life is a series of natural and spontaneous changes. Don't resist them; that only creates sorrow. Let reality be reality. Let things flow naturally forward in whatever way they like.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: The making of friends who are real friends, is the best token we have of a man's success in life.
quotes.author: Edward Everett Hale

quotes.quote: I experience for the American officers and soldiers that friendship which arises from having shared with them for a length of time dangers, sufferings, and both good and evil fortune.
quotes.author: Marquis de Lafayette

quotes.quote: Confidence is ignorance. If you're feeling cocky, it's because there's something you don't know.
quotes.author: Eoin Colfer

quotes.quote: Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man's character, give him power.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: If you work just for money, you'll never make it, but if you love what you're doing and you always put the customer first, success will be yours.
quotes.author: Ray Kroc

quotes.quote: My goal is to be one with the music. I just dedicate my whole life to this art.
quotes.author: Jimi Hendrix

quotes.quote: Letting go means to come to the realization that some people are a part of your history, but not a part of your destiny.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I would hope my legacy would be bringing smiles to faces. Happiness with my music.
quotes.author: Janet Jackson

quotes.quote: A hero is someone who has given his or her life to something bigger than oneself.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.quote: I kept always two books in my pocket, one to read, one to write in.
quotes.author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quotes.quote: The purpose of life is not to be happy. It is to be useful, to be honorable, to be compassionate, to have it make some difference that you have lived and lived well.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Madness is the absolute break with the work of art; it forms the constitutive moment of abolition, which dissolves in time the truth of the work of art.
quotes.author: Michel Foucault

quotes.quote: Yesterday I was clever, so I wanted to change the world. Today I am wise, so I am changing myself.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: Change will not come if we wait for some other person, or if we wait for some other time. We are the ones we've been waiting for. We are the change that we seek.
quotes.author: Barack Obama

quotes.quote: It's not the size of the dog in the fight, it's the size of the fight in the dog.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: A purpose of human life, no matter who is controlling it, is to love whoever is around to be loved.
quotes.author: Kurt Vonnegut

quotes.quote: Kindness is a language which the deaf can hear and the blind can see.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: They say I'm old-fashioned, and live in the past, but sometimes I think progress progresses too fast!
quotes.author: Dr. Seuss

quotes.quote: Dwell on the beauty of life. Watch the stars, and see yourself running with them.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The trouble is if you don’t spend your life yourself, other people spend it for you.
quotes.author: Peter Shaffer

quotes.quote: We should always remember that sensitiveness and emotion constitute the real content of a work of art.
quotes.author: Maurice Ravel

quotes.quote: The love of learning, the sequestered nooks, And all the sweet serenity of books
quotes.author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quotes.quote: Bring love and peace and happiness and beautiful lives into the world in my honor. Thank you. Love you.
quotes.author: Aron Ralston

quotes.quote: The reasonable man adapts himself to the world: the unreasonable one persists in trying to adapt the world to himself. Therefore all progress depends on the unreasonable man.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.quote: You have to have a sense of humor about life to get through it.
quotes.author: Kesha

quotes.quote: My mother was the most beautiful woman I ever saw. All I am I owe to my mother. I attribute all my success in life to the moral, intellectual and physical education I received from her.
quotes.author: George Washington

quotes.quote: I love to bring humour into my work. Because comedy is not a huge part of the art world. And big-business film takes itself very seriously.
quotes.author: James Franco

quotes.quote: The purpose of life is to live it, to taste experience to the utmost, to reach out eagerly and without fear for newer and richer experience.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Don't spend time beating on a wall, hoping to transform it into a door.
quotes.author: Coco Chanel

quotes.quote: A sense of humor... is needed armor. Joy in one's heart and some laughter on one's lips is a sign that the person down deep has a pretty good grasp of life.
quotes.author: Hugh Sidey

quotes.quote: Difficult times always create opportunities for you to experience more love in your life.
quotes.author: Barbara de Angelis

quotes.quote: Trees that are slow to grow bear the best fruit.
quotes.author: Molière

quotes.quote: I think people just like seeing friendship. I think people like seeing people who just drive each other up the wall, but at same time, can't live without each other.
quotes.author: Martin Freeman

quotes.quote: There can be nothing exclusive about substantial art. It comes directly out of the heart of the experience of life and thinking about life and living life.
quotes.author: Charles Ives

quotes.quote: Better to die fighting for freedom then be a prisoner all the days of your life.
quotes.author: Bob Marley

quotes.quote: Humor has bailed me out of more tight situations than I can think of. If you go with your instincts and keep your humor, creativity follows. With luck, success comes, too.
quotes.author: Jimmy Buffett

quotes.quote: You will never change your life until you change something you do daily.
quotes.author: Mike Murdock

quotes.quote: Strange as it may seem, I still hope for the best, even though the best, like an interesting piece of mail, so rarely arrives, and even when it does it can be lost so easily.
quotes.author: Lemony Snicket

quotes.quote: Procrastination is one of the most common and deadliest of diseases and its toll on success and happiness is heavy.
quotes.author: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.quote: Failure at some point in your life is inevitable, but giving up is unforgivable.
quotes.author: Joe Biden

quotes.quote: If I had my life to live over again, I would have made a rule to read some poetry and listen to some music at least once every week.
quotes.author: Charles Darwin

quotes.quote: With enough courage, you can do without a reputation.
quotes.author: Margaret Mitchell

quotes.quote: We have to rise above bad fortune. We have to be in the good and enjoy the good, study and work and adventure and friendship and community and love.
quotes.author: Joshua Prager

quotes.quote: I'm living by example by continuing on with my career and having a full, rich life, and I am incidentally gay.
quotes.author: Portia de Rossi

quotes.quote: And I have exposed myself to art so that my work has something beyond just the usual potter.
quotes.author: Beatrice Wood

quotes.quote: Tell me and I forget, teach me and I may remember, involve me and I learn.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: The two most important requirements for major success are: first, being in the right place at the right time, and second, doing something about it.
quotes.author: Ray Kroc

quotes.quote: The greatest happiness of life is the conviction that we are loved; loved for ourselves, or rather, loved in spite of ourselves.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: It's like Tolstoy said. Happiness is an allegory, unhappiness a story.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: There are two means of refuge from the misery of life — music and cats.
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: They always say time changes things, but you actually have to change them yourself.
quotes.author: Andy Warhol

quotes.quote: Lack of direction, not lack of time, is the problem. We all have twenty-four hour days.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.quote: Never be bullied into silence. Never allow yourself to be made a victim. Accept no one's definition of your life, but define yourself.
quotes.author: Harvey Fierstein

quotes.quote: You may not be able to change a situation, but with humor you can change your attitude about it.
quotes.author: Allen Klein

quotes.quote: The educator must believe in the potential power of his pupil, and he must employ all his art in seeking to bring his pupil to experience this power.
quotes.author: Alfred Adler

quotes.quote: Don't waste your time with explanations: people only hear what they want to hear.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Time was passing like a hand waving from a train I wanted to be on. I hope you never have to think about anything as much as I think about you.
quotes.author: Jonathan Safran Foer

quotes.quote: Once you have read a book you care about, some part of it is always with you.
quotes.author: Louis L'Amour

quotes.quote: Success represents the 1% of your work which results from the 99% that is called failure.
quotes.author: Soichiro Honda

quotes.quote: To err is human, to forgive, divine.
quotes.author: Alexander Pope

quotes.quote: If you can get humor and seriousness at the same time, you've created a special little thing, and that's what I'm looking for, because if you get pompous, you lose everything.
quotes.author: Paul Simon

quotes.quote: Art is much less important than life, but what a poor life without it.
quotes.author: Robert Motherwell

quotes.quote: This is where it all begins. Everything starts here, today.
quotes.author: David Nicholls

quotes.quote: This is a new year. A new beginning. And things will change.
quotes.author: Taylor Swift

quotes.quote: I think that my biggest attribute to any success that I have had is hard work. There really is no substitute for working hard.
quotes.author: Maria Bartiromo

quotes.quote: You endure what is unbearable, and you bear it. That is all.
quotes.author: Cassandra Clare

quotes.quote: Knowing too much of your future is never a good thing.
quotes.author: Rick Riordan

quotes.quote: You can cut all the flowers but you cannot keep Spring from coming.
quotes.author: Pablo Neruda

quotes.quote: All happiness depends on courage and work.
quotes.author: Honoré de Balzac

quotes.quote: Having a sense of purpose is having a sense of self. A course to plot is a destination to hope for.
quotes.author: Bryant H. McGill

quotes.quote: Tears are words that need to be written.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: True success, true happiness lies in freedom and fulfillment.
quotes.author: Dada Vaswani

quotes.quote: For many people, myself included, the end of the world is happening all the time! It is a form of criticality that paradoxically gives us hope for change and improvement.
quotes.author: Douglas Coupland

quotes.quote: The mouth is made for communication, and nothing is more articulate than a kiss.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I could die for you. But I couldn't, and wouldn't, live for you.
quotes.author: Ayn Rand

quotes.quote: The future depends on what you do today.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Hope can be a powerful force. Maybe there's no actual magic in it, but when you know what you hope for most and hold it like a light within you, you can make things happen, almost like magic.
quotes.author: Laini Taylor

quotes.quote: People fear death even more than pain. It's strange that they fear death. Life hurts a lot more than death. At the point of death, the pain is over. Yeah, I guess it is a friend.
quotes.author: Jim Morrison

quotes.quote: Hope is a waking dream.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: To be capable of steady friendship or lasting love, are the two greatest proofs, not only of goodness of heart, but of strength of mind.
quotes.author: William Hazlitt

quotes.quote: I wonder how many people don't get the one they want, but end up with the one they're supposed to be with.
quotes.author: Fannie Flagg

quotes.quote: The snake which cannot cast its skin has to die. As well the minds which are prevented from changing their opinions; they cease to be mind.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: The past is always tense, the future perfect.
quotes.author: Zadie Smith

quotes.quote: Parents can only give good advice or put them on the right paths, but the final forming of a person's character lies in their own hands.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: Freedom lies in being bold.
quotes.author: Robert Frost

quotes.quote: Be thankful for what you have; you'll end up having more. If you concentrate on what you don't have, you will never, ever have enough
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: It is the time you have wasted for your rose that makes your rose so important.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: To good and true love fear is forever affixed.
quotes.author: Francois Rabelais

quotes.quote: I want to be in a relationship where you telling me you love me is just a ceremonious validation of what you already show me.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Every human is an artist. The dream of your life is to make beautiful art.
quotes.author: Don Miguel Ruiz

quotes.quote: I’ve been fighting to be who I am all my life. What’s the point of being who I am, if I can’t have the person who was worth all the fighting for?
quotes.author: Stephanie Lennox

quotes.quote: The two hardest tests on the spiritual road are the patience to wait for the right moment and the courage not to be disappointed with what we encounter.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: In order to succeed, your desire for success should be greater than your fear of failure.
quotes.author: Bill Cosby

quotes.quote: I learned that courage was not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it. The brave man is not he who does not feel afraid, but he who conquers that fear.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: I think and think and think, I‘ve thought myself out of happiness one million times, but never once into it.
quotes.author: Jonathan Safran Foer

quotes.quote: I figured something out. The future is unpredictable.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: Only the dead have seen the end of war.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: I am not proud, but I am happy; and happiness blinds, I think, more than pride.
quotes.author: Alexandre Dumas

quotes.quote: I don't think of all the misery, but of the beauty that still remains.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: It is practically impossible to teach good programming to students that have had a prior exposure to BASIC: as potential programmers they are mentally mutilated beyond hope of regeneration.
quotes.author: Edsger Dijkstra

quotes.quote: Nothing, Everything, Anything, Something: If you have nothing, then you have everything, because you have the freedom to do anything, without the fear of losing something.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The story of life is quicker than the blink of an eye, the story of love is hello, goodbye.
quotes.author: Jimi Hendrix

quotes.quote: It is good to have an end to journey toward; but it is the journey that matters, in the end.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.quote: It is a mistake for a sculptor or a painter to speak or write very often about his job. It releases tension needed for his work.
quotes.author: Henry Moore

quotes.quote: I’ve known people that the world has thrown everything at to discourage them...to break their spirit. And yet something about them retains a dignity. They face life and don’t ask quarters.
quotes.author: Horton Foote

quotes.quote: Think little goals and expect little achievements. Think big goals and win big success.
quotes.author: David Joseph Schwartz

quotes.quote: Be steady and well-ordered in your life so that you can be fierce and original in your work.
quotes.author: Gustave Flaubert

quotes.quote: What drew me towards team sport were the camaraderie and friendship. The chance to celebrate victory and success with a group of other people is something I have enjoyed doing.
quotes.author: Rahul Dravid

quotes.quote: The present changes the past. Looking back you do not find what you left behind.
quotes.author: Kiran Desai

quotes.quote: Even strength must bow to wisdom sometimes.
quotes.author: Rick Riordan

quotes.quote: Cry. Forgive. Learn. Move on. Let your tears water the seeds of your future happiness.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: To have long term success as a coach or in any position of leadership, you have to be obsessed in some way.
quotes.author: Pat Riley

quotes.quote: Life goes on, and I'm moving on to the next thing, but I hope the soaps that are still running will thrive. They have millions of loyal viewers.
quotes.author: Susan Lucci

quotes.quote: Anxiety is the dizziness of freedom.
quotes.author: Søren Kierkegaard

quotes.quote: Ordinary life is pretty complex stuff.
quotes.author: Harvey Pekar

quotes.quote: Men go to far greater lengths to avoid what they fear than to obtain what they desire.
quotes.author: Dan Brown

quotes.quote: A successful life is one that is lived through understanding and pursuing one's own path, not chasing after the dreams of others.
quotes.author: Chin-Ning Chu

quotes.quote: Creativity comes from trust. Trust your instincts. And never hope more than you work.
quotes.author: Rita Mae Brown

quotes.quote: Time extracts various values from a painter's work. When these values are exhausted the pictures are forgotten, and the more a picture has to give, the greater it is.
quotes.author: Henri Matisse

quotes.quote: Survival was my only hope, success my only revenge.
quotes.author: Patricia Cornwell

quotes.quote: Accept the things to which fate binds you, and love the people with whom fate brings you together, but do so with all your heart.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: Just like gold, which has to weather very high temperatures to achieve the sheen and shine it finally gets, so also every person has to go through struggles in his life to achieve success.
quotes.author: Kailash Kher

quotes.quote: The secret of a happy marriage is finding the right person. You know they're right if you love to be with them all the time.
quotes.author: Julia Child

quotes.quote: I am a part of all that I have met.
quotes.author: Alfred Lord Tennyson

quotes.quote: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: Sometimes it takes a good fall to really know where you stand
quotes.author: Hayley Williams

quotes.quote: Appear weak when you are strong, and strong when you are weak.
quotes.author: Sun Tzu

quotes.quote: You can't wait for inspiration. You have to go after it with a club.
quotes.author: Jack London

quotes.quote: I used to make up stuff in my bio all the time, that I used to be a professional ice-skater and stuff like that. I found it so inspirational. Why not make myself cooler than I am?
quotes.author: Stephen Colbert

quotes.quote: For a long time, music was hope. Now it seems music isn't enough to make me happy. It used to be that's all I needed to keep going. Now I need other things to take up the other parts of my life.
quotes.author: Juliana Hatfield

quotes.quote: Incredible change happens in your life when you decide to take control of what you do have power over instead of craving control over what you don't.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Your emotions are the slaves to your thoughts, and you are the slave to your emotions.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: We are addicted to our thoughts. We cannot change anything if we cannot change our thinking.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: The optimist proclaims that we live in the best of all possible worlds; and the pessimist fears this is true.
quotes.author: James Branch Cabell

quotes.quote: So we shall let the reader answer this question for himself: who is the happier man, he who has braved the storm of life and lived or he who has stayed securely on shore and merely existed?
quotes.author: Hunter S. Thompson

quotes.quote: Whoever is careless with the truth in small matters cannot be trusted with important matters
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: I keep my friends as misers do their treasure, because, of all the things granted us by wisdom, none is greater or better than friendship.
quotes.author: Pietro Aretino

quotes.quote: If you live through the initial stage of fame and get past it, and remember thats not who you are. If you live past that, then you have a hope of maybe learning how to spell the word artist.
quotes.author: Patrick Swayze

quotes.quote: And hand in hand, on the edge of the sand, They danced by the light of the moon.
quotes.author: Edward Lear

quotes.quote: Success is getting what you want. Happiness is liking what you get.
quotes.author: H. Jackson Brown

quotes.quote: You know, this is a war of ideology, a war of thoughts and of faith. And we need people to really stand for faith and trust, not hope and change.
quotes.author: Sharron Angle

quotes.quote: I don't feel any need to play the role of the clown. In my private life I take a break from humor.
quotes.author: Gad Elmaleh

quotes.quote: A concept is a brick. It can be used to build a courthouse of reason. Or it can be thrown through the window.
quotes.author: Gilles Deleuze

quotes.quote: Happiness quite unshared can scarcely be called happiness; it has no taste.
quotes.author: Charlotte Brontë

quotes.quote: There is a saying in Tibetan, 'Tragedy should be utilized as a source of strength.'No matter what sort of difficulties, how painful experience is, if we lose our hope, that's our real disaster.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama XIV

quotes.quote: Romance is the glamour which turns the dust of everyday life into a golden haze.
quotes.author: Elinor Glyn

quotes.quote: Even in the common affairs of life, in love, friendship, and marriage, how little security have we when we trust our happiness in the hands of others!
quotes.author: William Hazlitt

quotes.quote: That I survived the Holocaust and went on to love beautiful girls, to talk, to write, to have toast and tea and live my life - that is what is abnormal.
quotes.author: Elie Wiesel

quotes.quote: We are not trapped or locked up in these bones. No, no. We are free to change. And love changes us. And if we can love one another, we can break open the sky.
quotes.author: Walter Mosley

quotes.quote: When I look in the mirror, I know I’m looking at someone who isn’t sure she deserves to be loved at all.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: One of my main regrets in life is giving considerable thought to inconsiderate people.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I have accepted fear as part of life – specifically the fear of change... I have gone ahead despite the pounding in the heart that says: turn back....
quotes.author: Erica Jong

quotes.quote: One needs more than ambition and talent to make a success of anything, really. There must be love and a vocation.
quotes.author: Jessye Norman

quotes.quote: If we have no peace, it is because we have forgotten that we belong to each other.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Stepping onto a brand-new path is difficult, but not more difficult than remaining in a situation, which is not nurturing to the whole woman.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: What I've come to know is that in life, it's not always the questions we ask, but rather our ability to hear the answers that truly enriches our understanding. Never, never stop learning.
quotes.author: Lester Holt

quotes.quote: Real generosity towards the future lies in giving all to the present.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: Man only likes to count his troubles; he doesn't calculate his happiness.
quotes.author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

quotes.quote: My only advice is to stay aware, listen carefully, and yell for help if you need it.
quotes.author: Judy Blume

quotes.quote: My fault, my failure, is not in the passions I have, but in my lack of control of them.
quotes.author: Jack Kerouac

quotes.quote: Success is due to our stretching to the challenges of life. Failure comes when we shrink from them.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: I think it's important to find humor anywhere you can. In real life, with the darkest, scariest, most intense moments, if you can find something funny, that's good.
quotes.author: Katie Lowes

quotes.quote: I must be a mermaid, Rango. I have no fear of depths and a great fear of shallow living.
quotes.author: Anaïs Nin

quotes.quote: Courage isn't having the strength to go on - it is going on when you don't have strength.
quotes.author: Napoléon Bonaparte

quotes.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney Company

quotes.quote: Dreams are the touchstones of our characters.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: No one ever told me that grief felt so like fear.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.quote: Success in life comes not from holding a good hand, but in playing a poor hand well.
quotes.author: Denis Waitley

quotes.quote: The secular world looks to the church and to its chagrin, finds no love, no life, no laughter, no hope and no happiness.
quotes.author: Rod Parsley

quotes.quote: A tree is known by its fruit; a man by his deeds. A good deed is never lost; he who sows courtesy reaps friendship, and he who plants kindness gathers love.
quotes.author: Saint Basil

quotes.quote: I just want you to know that you’re very special… and the only reason I’m telling you is that I don’t know if anyone else ever has.
quotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

quotes.quote: The desire to reach for the stars is ambitious. The desire to reach hearts is wise.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: The advantage of a bad memory is that one enjoys several times the same good things for the first time.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: The unhappiest people in this world, are those who care the most about what other people think.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: I do have a lot of time for people in my life, and friendship is a very important subject for me. I think I'm unusual among the writers I know in that respect.
quotes.author: Salman Rushdie

quotes.quote: The most authentic thing about us is our capacity to create, to overcome, to endure, to transform, to love and to be greater than our suffering.
quotes.author: Ben Okri

quotes.quote: How one handles success or failure is determined by their early childhood.
quotes.author: Harold Ramis

quotes.quote: Some people see things that are and ask, Why? Some people dream of things that never were and ask, Why not? Some people have to go to work and don't have time for all that.
quotes.author: George Carlin

quotes.quote: About the only problem with success is that it does not teach you how to deal with failure.
quotes.author: Tommy Lasorda

quotes.quote: A happy life is one spent in learning, earning, and yearning.
quotes.author: Lillian Gish

quotes.quote: Success cannot come from standstill men. Methods change and men must change with them.
quotes.author: James Cash Penney

quotes.quote: Life is full of happiness and tears; be strong and have faith.
quotes.author: Kareena Kapoor Khan

quotes.quote: No matter how your heart is grieving, if you keep on believing, the dreams that you wish will come true.
quotes.author: Walt Disney Company

quotes.quote: One of the keys to happiness is a bad memory.
quotes.author: Rita Mae Brown

quotes.quote: People make mistakes in life through believing too much, but they have a damned dull time if they believe too little.
quotes.author: James Hilton

quotes.quote: I am incapable of conceiving infinity, and yet I do not accept finity. I want this adventure that is the context of my life to go on without end.
quotes.author: Simone de Beauvoir

quotes.quote: Never, never, never give in!
quotes.author: Winston S. Churchill

quotes.quote: Our dilemma is that we hate change and love it at the same time; what we really want is for things to remain the same but get better.
quotes.author: Sydney J. Harris

quotes.quote: There are times to stay put, and what you want will come to you, and there are times to go out into the world and find such a thing for yourself.
quotes.author: Lemony Snicket

quotes.quote: Never look back unless you are planning to go that way.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Love is when the other person's happiness is more important than your own.
quotes.author: H. Jackson Brown

quotes.quote: Keep your face always toward the sunshine - and shadows will fall behind you.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.quote: I’m not waiting until my hair turns white to become patient and wise. Nope, I’m dyeing my hair tonight.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I do think a key to success in any walk of life is having a short memory and a thick skin - I know it has served me well over the years.
quotes.author: Aubrey McClendon

quotes.quote: I hope you will go out and let stories happen to you, and that you will work them, water them with your blood and tears and you laughter till they bloom, till you yourself burst into bloom.
quotes.author: Clarissa Pinkola Estes

quotes.quote: I will never forget experiencing Venice for the first time. It feels like you are transported to another time - the art, music, food and pure romance in the air is like no other place.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Berkley

quotes.quote: The only thing standing between you and your goal is the bullshit story you keep telling yourself as to why you can't achieve it.
quotes.author: Jordan Belfort

quotes.quote: If you make a mistake and do not correct it, this is called a mistake.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: The very least you can do in your life is to figure out what you hope for. And the most you can do is live inside that hope. Not admire it from a distance but live right in it, under its roof.
quotes.author: Barbara Kingsolver

quotes.quote: Earth provides enough to satisfy every man's needs, but not every man's greed.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: I would say I'm an inspirational guidelines book. You can take my life story or scenarios or songs and relate to them and apply them to your everyday life.
quotes.author: Chris Brown

quotes.quote: If I could offer but one helpful hint to young Hoosiers hoping to better their odds for success in life, I would simply note the importance of thoughtful reading.
quotes.author: Richard Lugar

quotes.quote: I'd learned that some things are best kept secret.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: People come in and out of our lives, and the true test of friendship is whether you can pick back up right where you left off the last time you saw each other.
quotes.author: Lisa See

quotes.quote: No matter how long you train someone to be brave, you never know if they are or not until something real happens.
quotes.author: Veronica Roth

quotes.quote: I hate to be a failure. I hate and regret the failure of my marriages. I would gladly give all my millions for just one lasting marital success.
quotes.author: J. Paul Getty

quotes.quote: I meet people in my daily life, people who seem to experience some change and some growth on a personal level, and that gives me hope.
quotes.author: Tracy Chapman

quotes.quote: Keep love in your heart. A life without it is like a sunless garden when the flowers are dead.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: There is a crack in everything. That's how the light gets in.
quotes.author: Leonard Cohen

quotes.quote: Roosevelt's declaration that Americans had 'nothing to fear but fear itself' was a glorious piece of inspirational rhetoric and just as gloriously wrong.
quotes.author: Russell Baker

quotes.quote: Logic is one thing, the human animal another. You can quite easily propose a logical solution to something and at the same time hope in your heart of hearts it won't work out.
quotes.author: Luigi Pirandello

quotes.quote: The art of being wise is the art of knowing what to overlook.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: Now and then it's good to pause in our pursuit of happiness and just be happy.
quotes.author: Guillaume Apollinaire

quotes.quote: What a strange thing!to be alivebeneath cherry blossoms.
quotes.author: Kobayashi Issa

quotes.quote: True love is not so much a matter of romance as it is a matter of anxious concern for the well-being of one's companion.
quotes.author: Gordon B. Hinckley

quotes.quote: Any book that helps a child to form a habit of reading, to make reading one of his deep and continuing needs, is good for him.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: The best thing to hold onto in life is each other.
quotes.author: Audrey Hepburn

quotes.quote: My life is part humor, part roses, part thorns.
quotes.author: Bret Michaels

quotes.quote: When it was dark, you always carried the sun in your hand for me.
quotes.author: Seán O'Casey

quotes.quote: It's hard to beat a person who never gives up.
quotes.author: Babe Ruth

quotes.quote: I had hoped when my life was chronicled, it would be an inspirational story.
quotes.author: Om Puri

quotes.quote: Love is life. And if you miss love, you miss life.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: Yet each man kills the thing he lovesBy each let this be heardSome do it with a bitter lookSome with a flattering wordThe coward does it with a kissThe brave man with a sword
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: Most men lead lives of quiet desperation and go to the grave with the song still in them.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: I felt once more how simple and frugal a thing is happiness: a glass of wine, a roast chestnut, a wretched little brazier, the sound of the sea. Nothing else.
quotes.author: Nikos Kazantzakis

quotes.quote: Simplicity and repose are the qualities that measure the true value of any work of art.
quotes.author: Frank Lloyd Wright

quotes.quote: As long as there was coffee in the world, how bad could things be?
quotes.author: Cassandra Clare

quotes.quote: After all, tomorrow is another day!
quotes.author: Margaret Mitchell

quotes.quote: We learn from failure, not from success!
quotes.author: Bram Stoker

quotes.quote: Good humor is one of the best articles of dress one can wear in society.
quotes.author: William Makepeace Thackeray

quotes.quote: It was only a sunny smile, and little it cost in the giving, but like morning light it scattered the night and made the day worth living.
quotes.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: Do you not see how necessary a world of pains and troubles is to school an intelligence and make it a soul?
quotes.author: John Keats

quotes.quote: Have courage for the great sorrows of life and patience for the small ones; and when you have laboriously accomplished your daily task, go to sleep in peace. God is awake.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: The heart is the toughest part of the body. Tenderness is in the hands.
quotes.author: Carolyn Forché

quotes.quote: You will be a failure, until you impress the subconscious with the conviction you are a success. This is done by making an affirmation which 'clicks.
quotes.author: Florence Scovel Shinn

quotes.quote: I am not a teacher, but an awakener.
quotes.author: Robert Frost

quotes.quote: Write it on your heart that every day is the best day in the year.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: We can complain because rose bushes have thorns, or rejoice because thorn bushes have roses.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Success and failure are equally disastrous.
quotes.author: Tennessee Williams

quotes.quote: Because paper has more patience than people.
quotes.author: Anne Frank

quotes.quote: I'd far rather be happy than right any day.
quotes.author: Douglas Adams

quotes.quote: Children should be able to live a life free from bullying and harassment and it is time that we all took a stand against this.
quotes.author: Katherine Jenkins

quotes.quote: Well, we all make mistakes, dear, so just put it behind you. We should regret our mistakes and learn from them, but never carry them forward into the future with us.
quotes.author: L.M. Montgomery

quotes.quote: I have a 6-year-old niece who doesn't look like the majority of girls on the covers of magazines. I hope that by the time she's 16, the world will have changed.
quotes.author: Prabal Gurung

quotes.quote: There’s no such thing as ruining your life. Life’s a pretty resilient thing, it turns out.
quotes.author: Sophie Kinsella

quotes.quote: The more I read, the more I acquire, the more certain I am that I know nothing.
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.quote: We cannot change the cards we are dealt, just how we play the hand.
quotes.author: Randy Pausch

quotes.quote: Men are from Earth, women are from Earth. Deal with it.
quotes.author: George Carlin
