quotes.quote: Success is steady progress toward one's personal goals.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.quote: Solitude is not something you must hope for in the future. Rather, it is a deepening of the present, and unless you look for it in the present you will never find it.
quotes.author: Thomas Merton

quotes.quote: Sometimes you have to kind of die inside in order to rise from your own ashes and believe in yourself and love yourself to become a new person.
quotes.author: Gerard Way

quotes.quote: I think you can have 10,000 explanations for failure, but no good explanation for success.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Leadership is the art of getting someone else to do something you want done because he wants to do it.
quotes.author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quotes.quote: Happiness is like a butterfly which, when pursued, is always beyond our grasp, but, if you will sit down quietly, may alight upon you.
quotes.author: Nathaniel Hawthorne

quotes.quote: The single most important thing in a child's performance is the quality of the teacher. Making sure a child spends the maximum amount of time with inspirational teachers is the most important thing.
quotes.author: Michael Gove

quotes.quote: Friendship is a plant of slow growth and must undergo and withstand the shocks of adversity before it is entitled to the appellation.
quotes.author: George Washington

quotes.quote: It's hard being left behind. (...) It's hard to be the one who stays.
quotes.author: Audrey Niffenegger

quotes.quote: All changes, even the most longed for, have their melancholy; for what we leave behind us is a part of ourselves; we must die to one life before we can enter another.
quotes.author: Anatole France

quotes.quote: I think I've discovered the secret of life -- you just hang around until you get used to it.
quotes.author: Charles M. Schulz

quotes.quote: That's what people do who love you. They put their arms around you and love you when you're not so lovable.
quotes.author: Deb Caletti

quotes.quote: Life is divided into three terms - that which was, which is, and which will be. Let us learn from the past to profit by the present, and from the present, to live better in the future.
quotes.author: William Wordsworth

quotes.quote: I think it's a brilliant tool to have, not only to have a sense of humor, but to be able to use humor to help one navigate life, and I tend not to be that type of person. I wish I were.
quotes.author: Delroy Lindo

quotes.quote: Sometimes life knocks you on your ass... get up, get up, get up!!! Happiness is not the absence of problems, it's the ability to deal with them.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: What I know is, is that if you do work that you love, and the work fulfills you, the rest will come.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: The whole art of teaching is only the art of awakening the natural curiosity of young minds for the purpose of satisfying it afterwards.
quotes.author: Anatole France

quotes.quote: The trouble with being in the rat race is that even if you win, you're still a rat.
quotes.author: Lily Tomlin

quotes.quote: I think that the reason for my success is that I am really not aspirational. I am inspirational in that the people at home feel like they can really relate to me.
quotes.author: Rosie O'Donnell

quotes.quote: If fear is the great enemy of intimacy, love is its true friend.
quotes.author: Henri Nouwen

quotes.quote: Spoon feeding in the long run teaches us nothing but the shape of the spoon.
quotes.author: E.M. Forster

quotes.quote: Motivation is the art of getting people to do what you want them to do because they want to do it.
quotes.author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quotes.quote: [Kids] don't remember what you try to teach them. They remember what you are.
quotes.author: Jim Henson

quotes.quote: Only after disaster can we be resurrected. It's only after you've lost everything that you're free to do anything. Nothing is static, everything is evolving, everything is falling apart.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: There is not a particle of life which does not bear poetry within it
quotes.author: Gustave Flaubert

quotes.quote: Shoot for the moon, even if you fail, you'll land among the stars
quotes.author: Cecelia Ahern

quotes.quote: Lady Gaga is the present and the future. She is the most revolutionary and inspirational artist. She is fearless and daring.
quotes.author: Donatella Versace

quotes.quote: Life is the art of drawing without an eraser.
quotes.author: John W. Gardner

quotes.quote: One measure of your success will be the degree to which you build up others who work with you. While building up others, you will build up yourself.
quotes.author: James E. Casey

quotes.quote: Everything can be taken from a man but one thing: the last of the human freedoms—to choose one’s attitude in any given set of circumstances, to choose one’s own way.
quotes.author: Viktor E. Frankl

quotes.quote: Your positive action combined with positive thinking results in success.
quotes.author: Shiv Khera

quotes.quote: That's what literature is. It's the people who went before us, tapping out messages from the past, from beyond the grave, trying to tell us about life and death! Listen to them!
quotes.author: Connie Willis

quotes.quote: In the name of God, stop a moment, cease your work, look around you.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: You never know when some small thing will lead to a big idea. Travel is very inspirational - but it's in the ordinary that I find my themes of love and work and family.
quotes.author: Adriana Trigiani

quotes.quote: If you want to increase your success rate, double your failure rate.
quotes.author: Thomas J. Watson

quotes.quote: My turn shall also come:I sense the spreading of a wing.
quotes.author: Osip Mandelstam

quotes.quote: Tiger got to hunt, bird got to fly;Man got to sit and wonder 'why, why, why?'Tiger got to sleep, bird got to land;Man got to tell himself he understand.
quotes.author: Kurt Vonnegut

quotes.quote: If I told you I’ve worked hard to get where I’m at, I’d be lying, because I have no idea where I am right now.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: There is no good and evil, there is only power and those too weak to seek it.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: I'm not after fame and success and fortune and power. It's mostly that I want to have a good job and have good friends; that's the good stuff in life.
quotes.author: Drew Barrymore

quotes.quote: I wonder if fears ever really go away, or if they just lose their power over us.
quotes.author: Veronica Roth

quotes.quote: God allows us to experience the low points of life in order to teach us lessons that we could learn in no other way.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.quote: The mind is not a vessel to be filled, but a fire to be kindled.
quotes.author: Plutarch

quotes.quote: Happiness is not the absence of problems, it's the ability to deal with them.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Do not train a child to learn by force or harshness; but direct them to it by what amuses their minds, so that you may be better able to discover with accuracy the peculiar bent of the genius of each.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: The reason birds can fly and we can't is simply because they have perfect faith, for to have faith is to have wings.
quotes.author: J.M. Barrie

quotes.quote: I hope the millions of people I've touched have the optimism and desire to share their goals and hard work and persevere with a positive attitude.
quotes.author: Michael Jordan

quotes.quote: He that can have patience can have what he will.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: To acquire the habit of reading is to construct for yourself a refuge from almost all the miseries of life.
quotes.author: W. Somerset Maugham

quotes.quote: Forget about the consequences of failure. Failure is only a temporary change in direction to set you straight for your next success.
quotes.author: Denis Waitley

quotes.quote: A sense of humor saves your life, and being able to make friends wherever you go.
quotes.author: Jason O'Mara

quotes.quote: The soul is healed by being with children.
quotes.author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

quotes.quote: Death is no more than passing from one room into another. But there's a difference for me, you know. Because in that other room I shall be able to see.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: You'll never find a rainbow if you're looking down
quotes.author: Charlie Chaplin

quotes.quote: In friendship as well as love, ignorance very often contributes more to our happiness than knowledge.
quotes.author: Francois de La Rochefoucauld

quotes.quote: We should not moor a ship with one anchor, or our life with one hope.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: March on. Do not tarry. To go forward is to move toward perfection. March on, and fear not the thorns, or the sharp stones on life's path.
quotes.author: Khalil Gibran

quotes.quote: Youth is the gift of nature, but age is a work of art.
quotes.author: Stanislaw Jerzy Lec

quotes.quote: Face your life, its pain, its pleasure, leave no path untaken.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: I hope it is true that a man can die and yet not only live in others but give them life, and not only life, but that great consciousness of life.
quotes.author: Jack Kerouac

quotes.quote: Do not despise your own place and hour. Every place is under the stars, every place is the center of the world.
quotes.author: John Burroughs

quotes.quote: I manage through a sense of humor. We all work hard, and work has to be a really interesting, fun place. And that has to start at the top.
quotes.author: Carol Bartz

quotes.quote: It is hard to fail, but it is worse never to have tried to succeed.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: A pain stabbed my heart, as it did every time I saw a girl I loved who was going the opposite direction in this too-big world.
quotes.author: Jack Kerouac

quotes.quote: Risks must be taken because the greatest hazard in life is to risk nothing.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: In sports teams, apart from talk of sporting prowess and the imparting of inspirational thought, an extraordinary amount of time is spent discussing, and flaunting, material possessions.
quotes.author: Harsha Bhogle

quotes.quote: I believe that words are strong, that they can overwhelm what we fear when fear seems more awful than life is good.
quotes.author: Andrew Solomon

quotes.quote: The biggest adventure you can ever take is to live the life of your dreams.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: In motivating people, you've got to engage their minds and their hearts. I motivate people, I hope, by example - and perhaps by excitement, by having productive ideas to make others feel involved.
quotes.author: Rupert Murdoch

quotes.quote: Maybe the truth is, there's a little bit of loser in all of us. Being happy isn't having everything in your life be perfect. Maybe it's about stringing together all the little things.
quotes.author: Ann Brashares

quotes.quote: Don't be afraid of enemies who attack you. Be afraid of the friends who flatter you.
quotes.author: Dale Carnegie

quotes.quote: If you can find something you love, go for it everyday of your life, and it would be really good to you.
quotes.author: Jenifer Lewis

quotes.quote: It is our art that has an opportunity to leave a footprint in the sand. They don't wrap fish in our work.
quotes.author: Hugh Newell Jacobsen

quotes.quote: A man's mind is stretched by a new idea or sensation, and never shrinks back to its former dimensions.
quotes.author: Oliver Wendell Holmes Sr.

quotes.quote: I want to continue to do some great work. I'm nowhere close to where I want to be. I'm a diverse person who's trying to use his art to make the world better.
quotes.author: Michael Jai White

quotes.quote: A baby is God's opinion that the world should go on.
quotes.author: Carl Sandburg

quotes.quote: One lives in the hope of becoming a memory.
quotes.author: Antonio Porchia

quotes.quote: Life is pleasant. Death is peaceful. It's the transition that's troublesome.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.quote: No matter how dark the moment, love and hope are always possible.
quotes.author: George Chakiris

quotes.quote: There is some kind of a sweet innocence in being human- in not having to be just happy or just sad- in the nature of being able to be both broken and whole, at the same time.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: A Penny Saved is a Penny Earned
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: Women with low self-esteem love bad boys. Women who have work to do love bad boys. Women who love themselves love good men.
quotes.author: Tracy McMillan

quotes.quote: Aim higher in case you fall short.
quotes.author: Suzanne Collins

quotes.quote: If you can love someone with your whole heart, even one person, then there's salvation in life. Even if you can't get together with that person.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: Do I dare Disturb the universe? In a minute there is time For decisions and revisions which a minute will reverse.
quotes.author: T.S. Eliot

quotes.quote: In the end you should always do the right thing even if it's hard.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: I am not absentminded. It is the presence of mind that makes me unaware of everything else.
quotes.author: G.K. Chesterton

quotes.quote: One ChoiceOne Choice, decided your friends. One Choice, defines your beliefs. One Choice, determines your loyalties - Forever. ONCE CHOICE CAN TRANSFORM YOU
quotes.author: Veronica Roth

quotes.quote: It is unwise to be too sure of one's own wisdom. It is healthy to be reminded that the strongest might weaken and the wisest might err.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: You've got to get obsessed and stay obsessed.
quotes.author: John Irving

quotes.quote: When all is said and done, more is said than done.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.quote: The only person who can pull me down is myself, and I'm not going to let myself pull me down anymore.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: Discipline is the soul of an army. It makes small numbers formidable; procures success to the weak, and esteem to all.
quotes.author: George Washington

quotes.quote: Science is organized knowledge. Wisdom is organized life.
quotes.author: Immanuel Kant

quotes.quote: I think prime numbers are like life. They are very logical but you could never work out the rules, even if you spent all your time thinking about them
quotes.author: Mark Haddon

quotes.quote: Pull up a chair. Take a taste. Come join us. Life is so endlessly delicious.
quotes.author: Ruth Reichl

quotes.quote: I live my life in widening circles that reach out across the world.
quotes.author: Rainer Maria Rilke

quotes.quote: I would probably work with Drake as he is massively inspirational to me as a writer as well as an artist. If not him, then Susan Boyle!
quotes.author: Conor Maynard

quotes.quote: Marriage, for a woman at least, hampers the two things that made life to me glorious - friendship and learning.
quotes.author: Jane Harrison

quotes.quote: There's so much to appreciate about my life every single day, and I make a big point of taking time to smell the roses and noticing how lucky I am. I never want to take that for granted.
quotes.author: Josie Maran

quotes.quote: Sometimes the hardest part isn't letting go but rather learning to start over.
quotes.author: Nicole Sobon

quotes.quote: Do not seek the because - in love there is no because, no reason, no explanation, no solutions.
quotes.author: Anaïs Nin

quotes.quote: Accept what life offers you and try to drink from every cup. All wines should be tasted; some should only be sipped, but with others, drink the whole bottle.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Willpower is the key to success. Successful people strive no matter what they feel by applying their will to overcome apathy, doubt or fear.
quotes.author: Dan Millman

quotes.quote: Art is built on the deepest themes of human meaning: good and evil, beauty and ugliness, life and death, love and hate. No other story has incarnated those themes more than the story of Jesus.
quotes.author: John Ortberg

quotes.quote: The winner's edge is not in a gifted birth, a high IQ, or in talent. The winner's edge is all in the attitude, not aptitude. Attitude is the criterion for success.
quotes.author: Denis Waitley

quotes.quote: If only life could be a little more tender and art a little more robust.
quotes.author: Alan Rickman

quotes.quote: Wonder is the beginning of wisdom.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: It had long since come to my attention that people of accomplishment rarely sat back and let things happen to them. They went out and happened to things.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
quotes.author: Buddha

quotes.quote: [H]iding how you really feel and trying to make everyone happy doesn't make you nice, it just makes you a liar.
quotes.author: Jenny O'Connell

quotes.quote: Great art is the outward expression of an inner life in the artist, and this inner life will result in his personal vision of the world.
quotes.author: Edward Hopper

quotes.quote: A thinker sees his own actions as experiments and questions--as attempts to find out something. Success and failure are for him answers above all.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: My view of life is colored by humor and looking at the best in any situation.
quotes.author: Michael J. Fox

quotes.quote: This must be Thursday,' said Arthur to himself, sinking low over his beer. 'I never could get the hang of Thursdays.
quotes.author: Douglas Adams

quotes.quote: With mirth and laughter let old wrinkles come.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: Never complain, never explain. Resist the temptation to defend yourself or make excuses.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Nothing ever happens like you imagine it will
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: I am the happiest creature in the world. Perhaps other people have said so before, but not one with such justice. I am happier even than Jane; she only smiles, I laugh.
quotes.author: Jane Austen

quotes.quote: May the forces of evil become confused on the way to your house.
quotes.author: George Carlin

quotes.quote: Success is most often achieved by those who don't know that failure is inevitable.
quotes.author: Coco Chanel

quotes.quote: All you need is the plan, the road map, and the courage to press on to your destination.
quotes.author: Earl Nightingale

quotes.quote: Success is getting and achieving what you want. Happiness is wanting and being content with what you get.
quotes.author: Bernard Meltzer

quotes.quote: Happiness is the natural flower of duty.
quotes.author: Phillips Brooks

quotes.quote: Failure is only postponed success as long as courage 'coaches' ambition. The habit of persistence is the habit of victory.
quotes.author: Herbert Kaufman

quotes.quote: One thing I hope I'll never be is drunk with my own power. And anybody who says I am will never work in this town again.
quotes.author: Jim Carrey

quotes.quote: A dame that knows the ropes isn't likely to get tied up.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.quote: Aerodynamically, the bumble bee shouldn't be able to fly, but the bumble bee doesn't know it so it goes on flying anyway.
quotes.author: Mary Kay Ash

quotes.quote: I can tell if two people are in love by how they hold each other’s hands, and how thick their sanitation gloves are.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: For like a shaft, clear and cold, the thought pierced him that in the end the Shadow was only a small and passing thing: there was light and high beauty for ever beyond its reach.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: Time makes friendship stronger, but love weaker.
quotes.author: Jean de la Bruyere

quotes.quote: It's not the men in your life that matters, it's the life in your men.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.quote: For me, I am driven by two main philosophies: know more today about the world than I knew yesterday and lessen the suffering of others. You'd be surprised how far that gets you.
quotes.author: Neil deGrasse Tyson

quotes.quote: Change the way you look at things and the things you look at change.
quotes.author: Wayne W. Dyer

quotes.quote: What good is the warmth of summer, without the cold of winter to give it sweetness.
quotes.author: John Steinbeck

quotes.quote: Make the most of yourself....for that is all there is of you.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: This is love: to fly toward a secret sky, to cause a hundred veils to fall each moment. First to let go of life. Finally, to take a step without feet.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: Art imitates life and, sometimes, life imitates art. It's a weird combination of elements.
quotes.author: Bruce Willis

quotes.quote: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Life is not a problem to be solved, but a reality to be experienced.
quotes.author: Søren Kierkegaard

quotes.quote: Success always necessitates a degree of ruthlessness. Given the choice of friendship or success, I'd probably choose success.
quotes.author: Sting

quotes.quote: Despite your best efforts, people are going to be hurt when it's time for them to be hurt.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: We travel, some of us forever, to seek other states, other lives, other souls.
quotes.author: Anaïs Nin

quotes.quote: Enjoy your sweat because hard work doesn't guarantee success, but without it you don't have a chance.
quotes.author: Alex Rodriguez

quotes.quote: Every luxury must be paid for, and everything is a luxury, starting with being in this world.
quotes.author: Cesare Pavese

quotes.quote: There are two tragedies in life. One is to lose your heart's desire. The other is to gain it.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.quote: The best things in life make you sweaty.
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.quote: Scar tissue is stronger than regular tissue. Realize the strength, move on.
quotes.author: Henry Rollins

quotes.quote: Our wounds are often the openings into the best and most beautiful part of us.
quotes.author: David Richo

quotes.quote: Success is the only motivational factor that a boy with character needs.
quotes.author: Woody Hayes

quotes.quote: When I consider life, it is all a cheat. Yet fooled with hope, people favor this deceit.
quotes.author: John Dryden

quotes.quote: Life itself is offensive and certainly does not apologize - in fact, it hurts considerably and, as we all know, is often very rude and troublesome, just as nature or art can be.
quotes.author: Michael Leunig

quotes.quote: The secret of happiness is freedom, the secret of freedom is courage.
quotes.author: Carrie Jones

quotes.quote: Success breeds complacency. Complacency breeds failure. Only the paranoid survive.
quotes.author: Andy Grove

quotes.quote: In the central place of every heart, there is a recording chamber; so long as it receives messages of beauty, hope, cheer and courage, you are young.
quotes.author: Samuel Ullman

quotes.quote: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
quotes.author: Dalai Lama

quotes.quote: Fiction is art and art is the triumph over chaos… to celebrate a world that lies spread out around us like a bewildering and stupendous dream.
quotes.author: John Cheever

quotes.quote: A wise man will make more opportunities than he finds.
quotes.author: Francis Bacon

quotes.quote: It's fine to celebrate success but it is more important to heed the lessons of failure.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: Parents were the only ones obligated to love you; from the rest of the world you had to earn it.
quotes.author: Ann Brashares

quotes.quote: When in a relationship, a real man doesn't make his woman jealous of others, he makes others jealous of his woman.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: To fear love is to fear life, and those who fear life are already 3-parts dead.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russell

quotes.quote: The only place success comes before work is in the dictionary.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi

quotes.quote: The true secret of happiness lies in taking a genuine interest in all the details of daily life.
quotes.author: William Morris

quotes.quote: Every one of us is losing something precious to us. Lost opportunities, lost possibilities, feelings we can never get back again. That’s part of what it means to be alive.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: My heart is warm with the friends I make, And better friends I'll not be knowing, Yet there isn't a train I wouldn't take, No matter where it's going.
quotes.author: Edna St. Vincent Millay

quotes.quote: I shall look at you out of the corner of my eye, and you will say nothing. Words are the source of misunderstandings.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: Without fear there cannot be courage.
quotes.author: Christopher Paolini

quotes.quote: Fairy tales do not tell children the dragons exist. Children already know that dragons exist. Fairy tales tell children the dragons can be killed.
quotes.author: G.K. Chesterton

quotes.quote: How much I missed, simply because I was afraid of missing it.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Failure is the key to success; each mistake teaches us something.
quotes.author: Morihei Ueshiba

quotes.quote: One always has a better book in one's mind than one can manage to get onto paper.
quotes.author: Michael Cunningham

quotes.quote: Only those who dare to fail greatly can ever achieve greatly.
quotes.author: Robert F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: Who says life is fair, where is that written?
quotes.author: William Goldman

quotes.quote: It all goes away. Eventually, everything goes away.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: Be more concerned with your character than your reputation, because your character is what you really are, while your reputation is merely what others think you are.
quotes.author: John Wooden

quotes.quote: It will give them the opportunity to show themselves worthy of the respect and friendship of peace-loving nations, and in time, to take an honorable place among members of the United Nations.
quotes.author: James F. Byrnes

quotes.quote: Man is condemned to be free; because once thrown into the world, he is responsible for everything he does. It is up to you to give [life] a meaning.
quotes.author: Jean-Paul Sartre

quotes.quote: My body is my journal, and my tattoos are my story.
quotes.author: Johnny Depp

quotes.quote: We learned about honesty and integrity - that the truth matters... that you don't take shortcuts or play by your own set of rules... and success doesn't count unless you earn it fair and square.
quotes.author: Michelle Obama

quotes.quote: I know that the whole point—the only point—is tofind the things that matter, and hold on to them, and fight for them, and refuse tolet them go.
quotes.author: Lauren Oliver

quotes.quote: Writers fish for the right words like fishermen fish for, um, whatever those aquatic creatures with fins and gills are called.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: There is nothing more rare, nor more beautiful, than a woman being unapologetically herself; comfortable in her perfect imperfection. To me, that is the true essence of beauty.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Always dream and shoot higher than you know you can do. Do not bother just to be better than your contemporaries or predecessors. Try to be better than yourself.
quotes.author: William Faulkner

quotes.quote: When you do what you fear most, then you can do anything.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Everyone is flailing through this life without an owner's manual, with whatever modicum of grace and good humor we can manage.
quotes.author: Anne Lamott

quotes.quote: Learning to let go should be learned before learning to get. Life should be touched, not strangled. You’ve got to relax, let it happen at times, and at others move forward with it.
quotes.author: Ray Bradbury

quotes.quote: You'll never get ahead of anyone as long as you try to get even with him.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.quote: Those who are willing to be vulnerable move among mysteries.
quotes.author: Theodore Roethke

quotes.quote: One of the few good things about modern times: If you die horribly on television, you will not have died in vain. You will have entertained us.
quotes.author: Kurt Vonnegut

quotes.quote: I think if you show up and you work hard and you're straightforward, you can always create your own opportunities. I hope I'm right.
quotes.author: Cory Monteith

quotes.quote: You can defeat fear through humor, through pain, through honesty, bravery, intuition, and through love in the truest sense.
quotes.author: John Cassavetes

quotes.quote: We are products of our past, but we don't have to be prisoners of it.
quotes.author: Rick Warren

quotes.quote: If you try and lose then it isn't your fault. But if you don't try and we lose, then it's all your fault.
quotes.author: Orson Scott Card

quotes.quote: Life's as kind as you let it be.
quotes.author: Charles Bukowski

quotes.quote: Too often we underestimate the power of a touch, a smile, a kind word, a listening ear, an honest compliment, or the smallest act of caring, all of which have the potential to turn a life around.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: Many people die at twenty five and aren't buried until they are seventy five.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: I may not always be with you But when we're far apartRemember you will be with meRight inside my heart
quotes.author: Marc Wambolt

quotes.quote: Time is a game played beautifully by children.
quotes.author: Heraclitus

quotes.quote: A man with outward courage dares to die; a man with inner courage dares to live.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: The key to success is to keep growing in all areas of life - mental, emotional, spiritual, as well as physical.
quotes.author: Julius Erving

quotes.quote: I believe there is another world waiting for us. A better world. And I'll be waiting for you there.
quotes.author: David Mitchell

quotes.quote: We live and breathe words.
quotes.author: Cassandra Clare

quotes.quote: Paradoxically though it may seem, it is none the less true that life imitates art far more than art imitates life.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: When a girl says she wants to be friends with benefits, I always ask if that includes dental insurance.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When a woman becomes her own best friend life is easier.
quotes.author: Diane Von Furstenberg

quotes.quote: What would come, would come...and you would have to meet it, when it did.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: One day spent with someone you love can change everything.
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: I have been and still am a seeker, but I have ceased to question stars and books; I have begun to listen to the teaching my blood whispers to me.
quotes.author: Hermann Hesse

quotes.quote: How can I be reasonable? To me our love was everything and you were my whole life. It is not very pleasant to realize that to you it was only an episode.
quotes.author: W. Somerset Maugham

quotes.quote: We either make ourselves miserable, or we make ourselves strong. The amount of work is the same.
quotes.author: Carlos Castaneda

quotes.quote: Whether you live to be 50 or 100 makes no difference, if you made no difference in the world.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I'm choosing happiness over suffering, I know I am. I'm making space for the unknown future to fill up my life with yet-to-come surprises.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: I try to give people hope. Even though life is bleak, there's hope out there.
quotes.author: Danielle Steel

quotes.quote: He's not your prince charming if he doesn't make sure you know that you're his princess.
quotes.author: Demi Lovato

quotes.quote: As soon as you trust yourself, you will know how to live.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: The world is a tragedy to those who feel, but a comedy to those who think.
quotes.author: Horace Walpole

quotes.quote: There are two ways to get enough. One is to continue to accumulate more and more. The other is to desire less.
quotes.author: G.K. Chesterton

quotes.quote: I wonder why I don't go to bed and go to sleep. But then it would be tomorrow, so I decide that no matter how tired, no matter how incoherent I am, I can skip on hour more of sleep and live.
quotes.author: Sylvia Plath

quotes.quote: Drugs are the enemies of ambition and hope - and when we fight against drugs we are fighting for the future.
quotes.author: Bob Riley

quotes.quote: False friendship, like the ivy, decays and ruins the walls it embraces; but true friendship gives new life and animation to the object it supports.
quotes.author: Richard Burton

quotes.quote: Just don't give up trying to do what you really want to do. Where there is love and inspiration, I don't think you can go wrong.
quotes.author: Ella Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: Travel far enough, you meet yourself.
quotes.author: David Mitchell

quotes.quote: For myself I am an optimist - it does not seem to be much use to be anything else.
quotes.author: Winston S. Churchill

quotes.quote: But how could you live and have no story to tell?
quotes.author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

quotes.quote: Those who do not weep, do not see.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: The two most important days in your life are the day you are born and the day you find out why.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: You're on Earth. There's no cure for that.
quotes.author: Samuel Beckett

quotes.quote: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams. Live the life you've imagined.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: I told her I'd wait forever for her, but that was before I found somebody else who'd give me a ride home.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When you can live forever what do you live for?
quotes.author: Stephenie Meyer

quotes.quote: A mathematical formula for happiness:Reality divided by Expectations. There were two ways to be happy:improve your reality or lower your expectations.
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: The supreme quality for leadership is unquestionably integrity. Without it, no real success is possible, no matter whether it is on a section gang, a football field, in an army, or in an office.
quotes.author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quotes.quote: Since I was young, I have always known this: Life damages us, every one. We can’t escape that damage. But now, I am also learning this: We can be mended. We mend each other
quotes.author: Veronica Roth

quotes.quote: I ask not for any crownBut that which all may win;Nor try to conquer any worldExcept the one within.
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: Once we accept our limits, we go beyond them.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: Alone we can do so little; together we can do so much
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: Don't leave a piece of jewelry at his house so you can go back and get it later; he may be with his real girlfriend.
quotes.author: Amy Sedaris

quotes.quote: Often, it’s not about becoming a new person, but becoming the person you were meant to be, and already are, but don’t know how to be.
quotes.author: Heath L. Buckmaster

quotes.quote: Do not go gentle into that good night, Old age should burn and rave at close of day;Rage, rage against the dying of the light.
quotes.author: Dylan Thomas

quotes.quote: Getting something and having the wits to use it...those are two different things.
quotes.author: Rick Riordan

quotes.quote: Even if I knew that tomorrow the world would go to pieces, I would still plant my apple tree.
quotes.author: Martin Luther

quotes.quote: Desire is the key to motivation, but it's the determination and commitment to unrelenting pursuit of your goal - a commitment to excellence - that will enable you to attain the success you seek.
quotes.author: Mario Andretti

quotes.quote: You must learn to let go. Release the stress. You were never in control anyway.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I can't decide whether I'm a good girl wrapped up in a bad girl, or if I'm a bad girl wrapped up in a good girl. And that's how I know I'm a woman!
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: If I saw you hitchhiking, I’d smile and return your thumb’s up, just for you doing such a great job of being a positive roadside influence.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I've got a lot of dreams I want to achieve, and I hope someone can cheer me on as I'll cheer them on in their dreams.
quotes.author: Hunter Hayes

quotes.quote: With the new day comes new strength and new thoughts.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: At the end of the day, let there be no excuses, no explanations, no regrets.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: It is by no means an irrational fancy that, in a future existence, we shall look upon what we think our present existence, as a dream.
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.quote: My favorite things in life don't cost any money. It's really clear that the most precious resource we all have is time.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: You've a good heart. Sometimes that's enough to see you safe wherever you go. But mostly, it's not.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: So comes snow after fire, and even dragons have their endings.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: Our goals can only be reached through a vehicle of a plan, in which we must fervently believe, and upon which we must vigorously act. There is no other route to success.
quotes.author: Pablo Picasso

quotes.quote: A painter's tastes must grow out of what so obsesses him in life that he never has to ask himself what it is suitable for him to do in art.
quotes.author: Lucian Freud

quotes.quote: To perceive is to suffer.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Keep your best wishes, close to your heart and watch what happens
quotes.author: Tony DeLiso

quotes.quote: So it’s true, when all is said and done, grief is the price we pay for love.
quotes.author: E.A. Bucchianeri

quotes.quote: The American Dream is one of success, home ownership, college education for one's children, and have a secure job to provide these and other goals.
quotes.author: Leonard Boswell

quotes.quote: Happiness is a choice. You can choose to be happy. There's going to be stress in life, but it's your choice whether you let it affect you or not.
quotes.author: Valerie Bertinelli

quotes.quote: Man cannot discover new oceans unless he has the courage to lose sight of the shore.
quotes.author: André Gide

quotes.quote: The love that moves the sun and the other stars.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: Live not for Battles Won. Live not for The-End-of-the-Song. Live in the along.
quotes.author: Gwendolyn Brooks

quotes.quote: Your life is an occasion. Rise to it.
quotes.author: Suzanne Weyn

quotes.quote: With all its sham, drudgery, and broken dreams, it is still a beautiful world. Be cheerful. Strive to be happy.
quotes.author: Max Ehrmann

quotes.quote: Never dull your shine for somebody else.
quotes.author: Tyra Banks

quotes.quote: Society is like a large piece of frozen water; and skating well is the great art of social life.
quotes.author: Letitia Elizabeth Landon

quotes.quote: Books are finite, sexual encounters are finite, but the desire to read and to fuck is infinite; it surpasses our own deaths, our fears, our hopes for peace.
quotes.author: Roberto Bolaño

quotes.quote: I didn't fail the test, I just found 100 ways to do it wrong.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: Life isn't about waiting for the storm to pass...It's about learning to dance in the rain.
quotes.author: Vivian Greene

quotes.quote: I've been absolutely terrified every moment of my life - and I've never let it keep me from doing a single thing I wanted to do.
quotes.author: Georgia O'Keeffe

quotes.quote: Life was meant to be lived, and curiosity must be kept alive. One must never, for whatever reason, turn his back on life.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Your time is limited, so don't waste it living someone else's life.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: The greatest thing about where my life is right now is it's very relaxed and chill. I'm just hanging out, being myself and doing my work.
quotes.author: Lucas Grabeel

quotes.quote: I don't care what you say to me. I care what you share with me.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Education is the kindling of a flame, not the filling of a vessel.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: The greatest thing in the world is to know how to belong to oneself.
quotes.author: Michel de Montaigne

quotes.quote: I envy people that know love. That have someone who takes them as they are.
quotes.author: Jess C. Scott

quotes.quote: Government exists to protect us from each other. Where government has gone beyond its limits is in deciding to protect us from ourselves.
quotes.author: Ronald Reagan

quotes.quote: As people are walking all the time, in the same spot, a path appears.
quotes.author: John Locke

quotes.quote: Don't be too timid and squeamish about your actions. All life is an experiment. The more experiments you make the better.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: The only way to survive eternity is to be able to appreciate each moment.
quotes.author: Lauren Kate

quotes.quote: We are all the pieces of what we remember. We hold in ourselves the hopes and fears of those who love us. As long as there is love and memory, there is no true loss.
quotes.author: Cassandra Clare

quotes.quote: Hope is but the dream of those who wake.
quotes.author: Matthew Prior

quotes.quote: I'm quite detached from failure and success. Once a shooting is done, I kind of close that chapter in my life.
quotes.author: Ranbir Kapoor

quotes.quote: Do not wait for the last judgment. It comes every day.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: Do not stop thinking of life as an adventure. You have no security unless you can live bravely, excitingly, imaginatively; unless you can choose a challenge instead of competence.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: It is important that we forgive ourselves for making mistakes. We need to learn from our errors and move on.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Real courage is when you know you're licked before you begin, but you begin anyway and see it through no matter what.
quotes.author: Harper Lee

quotes.quote: Achieve success in any area of life by identifying the optimum strategies and repeating them until they become habits.
quotes.author: Charles J. Givens

quotes.quote: No matter who you are, no matter what you did, no matter where you've come from, you can always change, become a better version of yourself.
quotes.author: Madonna

quotes.quote: Sacrifice is a part of life. It's supposed to be. It's not something to regret. It's something to aspire to.
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: Self-education is, I firmly believe, the only kind of education there is.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.quote: Kids are our future, and we hope baseball has given them some idea of what it is to live together and how we can get along, whether you be black or white.
quotes.author: Larry Doby

quotes.quote: Fear makes strangers of people who would be friends.
quotes.author: Shirley MacLaine

quotes.quote: When you are missing someone, time seems to move slower, and when I'm falling in love with someone, time seems to be moving faster.
quotes.author: Taylor Swift

quotes.quote: I will not try to convince you to love me, to respect me, to commit to me. I deserve better than that; I AM BETTER THAN THAT...Goodbye.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Success is not how many zeroes your bank account has. It's about making the most of the life you have.
quotes.author: Suze Orman

quotes.quote: The life of the dead is placed in the memory of the living.
quotes.author: Marcus Tullius Cicero

quotes.quote: You're never as good as everyone tells you when you win, and you're never as bad as they say when you lose.
quotes.author: Lou Holtz

quotes.quote: No man ever steps in the same river twice, for it's not the same river and he's not the same man.
quotes.author: Heraclitus

quotes.quote: We’re here, and then we’re gone, and it’s not about the time we’re here, but what we do with the time.
quotes.author: Rick Yancey

quotes.quote: When you arise in the morning think of what a privilege it is to be alive, to think, to enjoy, to love ...
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: I have a dream that one day little black boys and girls will be holding hands with little white boys and girls.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Friends are the family you choose (~ Nin/Ithilnin, Elven rogue).
quotes.author: Jess C. Scott

quotes.quote: She was free in her wildness. She was a wanderess, a drop of free water. She belonged to no man and to no city
quotes.author: Roman Payne

quotes.quote: Which of us has not felt that the character we are reading in the printed page is more real than the person standing beside us?
quotes.author: Cornelia Funke

quotes.quote: Happiness is not a goal...it's a by-product of a life well lived.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: You cannot change what you are, only what you do.
quotes.author: Philip Pullman

quotes.quote: I have a dream that my four little children will one day live in a nation where they will not be judged by the color of their skin but by the content of their character.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: I cut an inch off of every straw I see, just to make the world suck a little less.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Growing up happens when you start having things you look back on and wish you could change -Clary Fray

quotes.quote: The meaning I picked, the one that changed my life: Overcome fear, behold wonder.

quotes.quote: Nothing good comes in life or athletics unless a lot of hard work has preceded the effort. Only temporary success is achieved by taking short cuts.

quotes.quote: A strong work of art really leaves people speechless. They feel a little angry because they don't understand it.

quotes.quote: If you're horrible to me, I'm going to write a song about it, and you won't like it. That's how I operate.

quotes.quote: You do not immortalize the lost by writing about them. Language buries, but does not resurrect.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: You never know what's around the corner. It could be everything. Or it could be nothing. You keep putting one foot in front of the other, and then one day you look back and you've climbed a mountain.

quotes.quote: There are only really a few stories to tell in the end, and betrayal and the failure of love is one of those good stories to tell.
quotes.author: Sean Lennon

quotes.quote: I mean, at the end of the day, what the hell does it matter who I end up with if it can't be you?

quotes.quote: A single day is enough to make us a little larger or, another time, a little smaller.
quotes.author: Paul Klee

quotes.quote: Time takes it all, whether you want it to or not.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: People don't realize how a man's whole life can be changed by one book.
quotes.author: Malcolm X

quotes.quote: Our lives are defined by opportunities, even the ones we miss.
quotes.author: Eric Roth

quotes.quote: Comedy was my sport. It taught me how to roll with the punches. Failure is the exact same as success when it comes to comedy because it just keeps coming. It never stops.
quotes.author: Emma Stone

quotes.quote: I begin my reign with profound emotion at the honour of accepting the Crown, aware of the responsibility it entails and with the greatest hope for the future of Spain.
quotes.author: King Felipe VI

quotes.quote: Any intelligent fool can make things bigger, more complex, and more violent. It takes a touch of genius — and a lot of courage to move in the opposite direction.
quotes.author: Ernst F. Schumacher

quotes.quote: No! Try not. Do, or do not. There is no try.
quotes.author: George Lucas

quotes.quote: The greater part of our happiness or misery depends upon our dispositions, and not upon our circumstances.
quotes.author: Martha Washington

quotes.quote: How would your life be different if…You walked away from gossip and verbal defamation? Let today be the day…You speak only the good you know of other people and encourage others to do the same.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The soul, fortunately, has an interpreter - often an unconscious but still a faithful interpreter - in the eye.
quotes.author: Charlotte Brontë

quotes.quote: I'm the one that has to die when it's time for me to die, so let me live my life, the way I want to.
quotes.author: Jimi Hendrix

quotes.quote: Who could refrain that had a heart to love and in that heart courage to make love known?
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: Don’t sacrifice yourself too much, because if you sacrifice too much there’s nothing else you can give and nobody will care for you.
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: Very occasionally, if you pay really close attention, life doesn't suck.
quotes.author: Joss Whedon

quotes.quote: The rights of every man are diminished when the rights of one man are threatened.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: Amateurs sit and wait for inspiration, the rest of us just get up and go to work.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: Action expresses priorities.
quotes.author: Mahatma Gandhi

quotes.quote: Don't think about making life better for other people who don't even deserve you, rather, focus on making your life the best, for yourself and those who love you.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: Oft hope is born when all is forlorn.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: By definition, intelligence deals with the unclear, the unknown, the deliberately hidden. What the enemies of the United States hope to deny we work to reveal.
quotes.author: George Tenet

quotes.quote: You don't have to disrespect and insult others simply to hold your own ground. If you do, that shows how shaky your own position is.
quotes.author: Red Haircrow

quotes.quote: But remember, boy, that a kind act can sometimes be as powerful as a sword.
quotes.author: Rick Riordan

quotes.quote: Perhaps naively I thought people understand what humor was, that it was invented by the human race to cope with the dark areas of life, problems and terrors.
quotes.author: Bill Forsyth

quotes.quote: Life imitates art far more than art imitates Life.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: A goal without a plan is just a wish.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: The future is something which everyone reaches at the rate of sixty minutes an hour, whatever he does, whoever he is.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.quote: The greatest sweetener of human life is Friendship. To raise this to the highest pitch of enjoyment, is a secret which but few discover.
quotes.author: Joseph Addison

quotes.quote: People grow through experience if they meet life honestly and courageously. This is how character is built.
quotes.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

quotes.quote: Disneyland is a work of love. We didn't go into Disneyland just with the idea of making money.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.quote: I like men who have goals, something that they are passionate about and work hard to achieve. A good sense of humor is important too. And I like tall guys!
quotes.author: Ana Ivanovic

quotes.quote: Laughter is poison to fear.
quotes.author: George R.R. Martin

quotes.quote: In all of living, have much fun and laughter. Life is to be enjoyed, not just endured.
quotes.author: Gordon B. Hinckley

quotes.quote: Remember that everyone you meet is afraid of something, loves something and has lost something.
quotes.author: H. Jackson Brown Jr.

quotes.quote: It is wise to direct your anger towards problems -- not people; to focus your energies on answers -- not excuses.
quotes.author: William Arthur Ward

quotes.quote: The person you became with her is worth being.
quotes.author: Veronica Roth

quotes.quote: Your conscience is the measure of the honesty of your selfishness. Listen to it carefully.
quotes.author: Richard Bach

quotes.quote: Far and away the best prize that life has to offer is the chance to work hard at work worth doing.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: You are, after all, what you think. Your emotions are the slaves to your thoughts, and you are the slave to your emotions.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: Just because you fall once, doesn't mean you're fall at everything. Keep trying, hold on, and always trust yourself, because if you don't then who will??
quotes.author: Marilyn Monroe

quotes.quote: A man's true character comes out when he's drunk.
quotes.author: Charlie Chaplin

quotes.quote: Don't ask for guarantees. And don't look to be saved in any one thing, person, machine, or library. Do your own bit of saving, and if you drown, at least die knowing you were heading for shore.
quotes.author: Ray Bradbury

quotes.quote: We must live together as brothers or perish together as fools.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: I just wanted to tell you that I understand if you go. It’s okay if you have to leave us. It’s okay if you want to stop fighting.
quotes.author: Gayle Forman

quotes.quote: The power of finding beauty in the humblest things makes home happy and life lovely.
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: Whatever the mind can conceive and believe, it can achieve.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: The easiest thing to be in the world is you. The most difficult thing to be is what other people want you to be. Don't let them put you in that position.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: I heard a definition once: Happiness is health and a short memory! I wish I'd invented it, because it is very true.
quotes.author: Audrey Hepburn

quotes.quote: Art is nothing but the expression of our dream; the more we surrender to it the closer we get to the inner truth of things, our dream-life, the true life that scorns questions and does not see them.
quotes.author: Franz Marc

quotes.quote: The story of life is quicker than the wink of an eye, the story of love is hello and goodbye...until we meet again
quotes.author: Jimi Hendrix

quotes.quote: If you dont have any shadows you're not in the light
quotes.author: Lady Gaga

quotes.quote: Man is a mystery. It needs to be unravelled, and if you spend your whole life unravelling it, don't say that you've wasted time. I am studying that mystery because I want to be a human being.

quotes.quote: Spend enough time around success and failure, and you learn a reverence for possibility.
quotes.author: Dale Dauten

quotes.quote: Art is not supposed to change the world, to change practical things, but to change perceptions. Art can change the way we see the world. Art can create an analogy.
quotes.author: JR

quotes.quote: Life is funny. Things change, people change, but you will always be you, so stay true to yourself and never sacrifice who you are for anyone.
quotes.author: Zayn Malik

quotes.quote: How far would you go to keep the hope of love alive?
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: I don't think that there are any limits to how excellent we could make life seem.
quotes.author: Jonathan Safran Foer

quotes.quote: Reading is to the mind what exercise is to the body.
quotes.author: Joseph Addison

quotes.quote: Learn the rules like a pro, so you can break them like an artist.
quotes.author: Pablo Picasso

quotes.quote: The difference between a successful person and others is not a lack of strength, not a lack of knowledge, but rather a lack in will.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi Jr.

quotes.quote: Live your truth. Express your love. Share your enthusiasm. Take action towards your dreams. Walk your talk. Dance and sing to your music. Embrace your blessings. Make today worth remembering.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Always remember, your focus determines your reality.
quotes.author: George Lucas

quotes.quote: Though the road's been rocky it sure feels good to me.
quotes.author: Bob Marley

quotes.quote: I am very happyBecause I have conquered myselfAnd not the world. I am very happyBecause I have loved the worldAnd not myself.
quotes.author: Sri Chinmoy

quotes.quote: The price of greatness is responsibility.
quotes.author: Winston S. Churchill

quotes.quote: Everyone here has the sense that right now is one of those moments when we are influencing the future.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: If you hang out with chickens, you're going to cluck and if you hang out with eagles, you're going to fly.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Forget yesterday - it has already forgotten you. Don't sweat tomorrow - you haven't even met. Instead, open your eyes and your heart to a truly precious gift - today.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Behind every trial and sorrow that He makes us shoulder, God has a reason.
quotes.author: Khaled Hosseini

quotes.quote: I have a million things to talk to you about. All I want in this world is you. I want to see you and talk. I want the two of us to begin everything from the beginning.

quotes.quote: I want my kids to have the things in life that I never had when I was growing up. Things like beards and chest hair.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.
quotes.author: R. Buckminster Fuller

quotes.quote: You must not ever stop being whimsical. And you must not, ever, give anyone else the responsibility for your life.
quotes.author: Mary Oliver

quotes.quote: Shallow men believe in luck or in circumstance. Strong men believe in cause and effect.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Life is a journey. Time is a river. The door is ajar
quotes.author: Jim Butcher

quotes.quote: Just keep moving forward and don't give a shit about what anybody thinks. Do what you have to do, for you.
quotes.author: Johnny Depp

quotes.quote: We don’t even ask happiness, just a little less pain.
quotes.author: Charles Bukowski

quotes.quote: Cynics are simply thwarted romantics.

quotes.quote: Silently, one by one, in the infinite meadows of heaven, Blossomed the lovely stars, the forget-me-nots of the angels.
quotes.author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quotes.quote: We are all failures- at least the best of us are.
quotes.author: J.M. Barrie

quotes.quote: It was always the becoming he dreamed of, never the being.
quotes.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: A thing of beauty is a joy forever.
quotes.author: John Keats

quotes.quote: Everyone wants to live on top of the mountain, but all the happiness and growth occurs while you're climbing it.

quotes.quote: True generosity is an offering; given freely and out of pure love. No strings attached. No expectations. Time and love are the most valuable possession you can share.

quotes.quote: The biggest challenge after success is shutting up about it.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: It's the children the world almost breaks who grow up to save it.
quotes.author: Frank Warren

quotes.quote: In learning you will teach, and in teaching you will learn.
quotes.author: Phil Collins

quotes.quote: Action may not always bring happiness, but there is no happiness without action.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.quote: It's not what you say out of your mouth that determines your life, it's what you whisper to yourself that has the most power!
quotes.author: Robert T. Kiyosaki

quotes.quote: There are ships sailing to many ports, but not a single one goes where life is not painful.
quotes.author: Fernando Pessoa

quotes.quote: In the end, you have to choose whether or not to trust someone.
quotes.author: Sophie Kinsella

quotes.quote: Happiness is a butterfly, which when pursued, is always just beyond your grasp, but which, if you will sit down quietly, may alight upon you.

quotes.quote: Only those who attempt the absurd can achieve the impossible.

quotes.quote: I've always thought people would find a lot more pleasure in their routines if they burst into song at significant moments.
quotes.author: John Barrowman

quotes.quote: Your purpose in life is to find your purpose and give your whole heart and soul to it
quotes.author: Gautama Buddha

quotes.quote: My task, which I am trying to achieve is, by the power of the written word, to make you hear, to make you feel--it is, before all, to make you see.

quotes.quote: If history remembers me at all, in any way, I hope it will be as a man who loved the Land of Israel and watched over it in every way he could, all his life.
quotes.author: Yitzhak Shamir

quotes.quote: I like to think my sense of humor is sort of smart and dumb at the same time. I like to work on multiple levels - smart and dumb, funny and sad, profound and mundane, cynical and hopeful.
quotes.author: Robert Lopez

quotes.quote: Of all creatures that breathe and move upon the earth, nothing is bred that is weaker than man.
quotes.author: Homer

quotes.quote: Most of the basic material a writer works with is acquired before the age of fifteen.
quotes.author: Willa Cather

quotes.quote: If you've never eaten while crying you don t know what life tastes like.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: There is nothing more frightful than ignorance in action.
quotes.author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe

quotes.quote: Letting go gives us freedom, and freedom is the only condition for happiness. If, in our heart, we still cling to anything - anger, anxiety, or possessions - we cannot be free.
quotes.author: Hanh Nhat Thich

quotes.quote: Nothing is as dangerous in architecture as dealing with separated problems. If we split life into separated problems we split the possibilities to make good building art.
quotes.author: Alvar Aalto

quotes.quote: To the world you may be one person but to one person you may be the world.
quotes.author: Bill Wilson

quotes.quote: Attitude is a little thing that makes a big difference.
quotes.author: Winston S. Churchill

quotes.quote: Patience and wisdom walk hand in hand, like two one-armed lovers.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: At some point we all look up and realize we are lost in a maze.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: People say that eyes are windows to the soul.
quotes.author: Khaled Hosseini

quotes.quote: But still, I find the need to remind myself of the temporariness of a day, to reassure myself that I got through yesterday, I'll get through today.
quotes.author: Gayle Forman

quotes.quote: You save yourself or you remain unsaved.
quotes.author: Alice Sebold

quotes.quote: I do not care so much what I am to others as I care what I am to myself.
quotes.author: Michel de Montaigne

quotes.quote: I have no idea what's awaiting me, or what will happen when this all ends. For the moment I know this: there are sick people and they need curing.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: Write it. Shoot it. Publish it. Crochet it, sauté it, whatever. MAKE.
quotes.author: Joss Whedon

quotes.quote: I'm not saying I'm gonna change the world, but I guarantee that I will spark the brain that will change the world.
quotes.author: Tupac Shakur

quotes.quote: You are the only you God made... God made you and broke the mold.
quotes.author: Max Lucado

quotes.quote: I write for the same reason I breathe - because if I didn't, I would die.
quotes.author: Isaac Asimov

quotes.quote: All that you touchYou Change. All that you ChangeChanges you. The only lasting truthis Change. Godis Change.
quotes.author: Octavia E. Butler

quotes.quote: There's more to life than success, and if you can try to be more well-rounded, you'll be able to enjoy your success more. It won't own you or control you.
quotes.author: Ricky Williams

quotes.quote: What thoughts are to the individual, art is to the community as a whole. That's where you reflect on who you are, who you hope to be, what you've gone through, and where you hope to go.
