quotes.quote: The true measure of success is how many times you can bounce back from failure.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Don't give up. Don't lose hope. Don't sell out.
quotes.author: Christopher Reeve

quotes.quote: The terrorists thought they would change my aims and stop my ambitions, but nothing changed in my life except this: weakness, fear and hopelessness died. Strength, power and courage were born.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: Copy, art, and typography should be seen as a living entity; each element integrally related, in harmony with the whole, and essential to the execution of an idea.
quotes.author: Paul Rand

quotes.quote: Love isn’t in a hurry like a flurry of flowery words on paper. It’s lush and slow to grow its aroma in the garden of time.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Let’s be romantic and dance in the rain. I’ll prove my feelings for you by bringing an umbrella, because I’m drowning in my love for you.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I don’t want my love with her to wither like grapes on a vine, so I’ll water it with romance to turn it into wine.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Me: On time. Love: Late. Death: Early. Seriously, why are you late?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To be stupid, and selfish, and to have good health are the three requirements for happiness - though if stupidity is lacking, the others are useless.
quotes.author: Julian Barnes

quotes.quote: Do you know what your problem is? You can't live with the idea that someone might leave.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: I’ll wear a maze on a necklace, dangling over my chest, because if you want to get at my heart, you have to be ready to lose yourself.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: God turns you from one feeling to another and teaches by means of opposites so that you will have two wings to fly, not one
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: I used to think how lucky she was to have me, but now I realize that’s backwards. A spirit of gratitude yields patience, love, and forgiveness.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I wonder if rooms in an insane asylum have Do Not Disturb signs for the doors. I should hope not, because knock or no knock, every occupant in those rooms is already disturbed.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To be invisible, paint yourself with the direct shade of zero. Leave nothing to chance, by taking nothing with you wherever you go.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Creo que todos tenemos un poco de esa bella locura que nos mantiene andando cuando todo alrededor es tan insanamente cuerdo.
quotes.author: Julio Cortázar

quotes.quote: The cosmos is within us. We are made of star-stuff. We are a way for the universe to know itself.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.quote: What would you do if you weren't afraid?
quotes.author: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.quote: Too much sanity may be madness — and maddest of all: to see life as it is, and not as it should be!
quotes.author: Dale Wasserman

quotes.quote: Because isn’t that the point of every relationship: to be known by someone else, to be understood? He gets me. She gets me. Isn’t that the simple magic phrase?
quotes.author: Gillian Flynn

quotes.quote: I hope you live a life you’re proud of. If you find that you’re not, I hope you have the strength to start all over again.
quotes.author: Eric Roth

quotes.quote: If you're not comfortable enough with yourself or with your own truth when entering a relationship, then you're not ready for that relationship.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I'm sure you think that I don't understand what you're going through, but I do. It's just that sometimes, our future is dictated by what we are, opposed to what we want.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: In times of stress, the best thing we can do for each other is to listen with our ears and our hearts and to be assured that our questions are just as important as our answers.
quotes.author: Fred Rogers

quotes.quote: We are all of us born with a letter inside us, and that only if we are true to ourselves, may we be allowed to read it before we die.
quotes.author: Douglas Coupland

quotes.quote: The goal of life is to make your heartbeat match the beat of the universe, to match your nature with Nature.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.quote: You have to, take a deep breath. and allow the music to flow through you. Revel in it, allow yourself to awe. When you play allow the music to break your heart with its beauty.
quotes.author: Kelly White

quotes.quote: Obstacles are things a person sees when he takes his eyes off his goal.
quotes.author: E. Joseph Cossman

quotes.quote: My life is a reading list.
quotes.author: John Irving

quotes.quote: I've come to believe that all my past failure and frustration were actually laying the foundation for the understandings that have created the new level of living I now enjoy.
quotes.author: Anthony Robbins

quotes.quote: Death, therefore, the most awful of evils, is nothing to us, seeing that, when we are, death is not come, and, when death is come, we are not.
quotes.author: Epicurus

quotes.quote: Happiness is always there. You just have to choose to see it. There's no point dwelling in the dark and ignoring the light of the stars.
quotes.author: Carrie Hope Fletcher

quotes.quote: Hide things everywhere. Forget about them. Find them randomly and feel surprised like a pirate finding buried treasure. Avoid scurvy. Love more.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You take away all the other luxuries in life, and if you can make someone smile and laugh, you have given the most special gift: happiness.
quotes.author: Brad Garrett

quotes.quote: The sunset faded and blended from pink to peach to mango in a smoothie in the sky. For as long as she doesn’t love me, I will love her.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: What’s the point of being the first to arrive? Nobody is there to witness your commitment.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The curve of her smile, the curve of the small of her back, the curve of her laugh, everything about her makes me want to be more well-rounded.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: As a fiction writer, let me make it up, and let me make it up to you. I’ll pen our love story, if you’ll be my co-author.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Awake, arise or be for ever fall’n.
quotes.author: John Milton

quotes.quote: What sunshine is to flowers, smiles are to humanity. These are but trifles, to be sure; but scattered along life's pathway, the good they do is inconceivable.
quotes.author: Joseph Addison

quotes.quote: Why are desire scales 1-10? They should be 1-12, like a clock, because I want her 1-12, I mean like all the time.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I scream for everything that has gone wrong. I scream for everything broken in our lives.
quotes.author: Marie Lu

quotes.quote: Nothing carries meaning. People carry meaning. We are the porters of importance.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Dinner was a riot, but the food was bland, so I doused it with pepper spray. The chef wanted to protest, but he didn’t, because I had the pepper spray.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Two things you will never have to chase: True friends & true love.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: Doing nothing for others is the undoing of ourselves.
quotes.author: Horace Mann

quotes.quote: You're better than this. Better than whatever it is you're going to do now.
quotes.author: Richelle Mead

quotes.quote: You have every right to a beautiful life.
quotes.author: Selena Gómez

quotes.quote: Love those you hate you.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: The sides of buildings should be like the tops of lakes. I’d fish through your window hoping to catch a smile.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Employ your time in improving yourself by other men's writings so that you shall come easily by what others have labored hard for.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: Happiness only real when shared.
quotes.author: Christopher McCandless

quotes.quote: Hopes are like hair ornaments. Girls want to wear too many of them. When they become old women they look silly wearing even one.
quotes.author: Arthur Golden

quotes.quote: The baby batScreamed out in fright,'Turn on the dark, I'm afraid of the light.
quotes.author: Shel Silverstein

quotes.quote: You change your life by changing your heart.
quotes.author: Max Lucado

quotes.quote: Be courteous to all, but intimate with few, and let those few be well tried before you give them your confidence.
quotes.author: George Washington

quotes.quote: I believe when life gives you lemons, you should make lemonade...and try to find someone whose life has given them vodka, and have a party.
quotes.author: Ron White

quotes.quote: I always had this idea that you should never give up a happy middle in the hopes of a happy ending, because there is no such thing as a happy ending. Do you know what I mean? There is so much to lose.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: It’s not uncommon for me to be early to meetings by as much as a half a gallon. I guess the reason I am so punctual is because I have a very fluid concept of time.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Wisdom.... comes not from age, but from education and learning.
quotes.author: Anton Chekhov

quotes.quote: What we do comes out of who we believe we are.
quotes.author: Rob Bell

quotes.quote: Your time is way too valuable to be wasting on people that can't accept who you are.
quotes.author: Turcois Ominek

quotes.quote: A flowing flurry of flowers fell to the floor when I fell in love, as if my heart were a garden that gushed forth and flooded her being with the fragrance of romance.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I want someone whose heart is big enough to hold me.
quotes.author: Rainbow Rowell

quotes.quote: I only want to write. And there's no college for that except life.
quotes.author: Dodie Smith

quotes.quote: I got a zero. That’s like a perfect ten—it’s only one away from being flawless. Remember this next time you think you have nothing.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Pulvis et umbra sumus. (We are but dust and shadow.)
quotes.author: Horace

quotes.quote: The middle finger is a great body language tool for letting people know you’re upset. Poetry isn’t quite as effective in a fit of road rage.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The only thing that makes life possible is permanent, intolerable uncertainty: not knowing what comes next.
quotes.author: Ursula K. Le Guin

quotes.quote: The invariable mark of wisdom is to see the miraculous in the common.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Look for the good in every person and every situation. You'll almost always find it.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: The greatest step towards a life of simplicity is to learn to let go.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: There’s no reason to not be humble, because as great as you may be, you can always be greater.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My cabinet was made by hand. My applause is also made by hand, and I stood there clapping the whole time the carpenter was making my cabinet.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The wisest are the most annoyed at the loss of time.
quotes.author: Dante Alighieri

quotes.quote: When I hear music, I fear no danger. I am invulnerable. I see no foe. I am related to the earliest times, and to the latest.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Talent is a wonderful thing, but it won't carry a quitter.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: If it's very painful for you to criticize your friends - you're safe in doing it. But if you take the slightest pleasure in it, that's the time to hold your tongue.
quotes.author: Alice Miller

quotes.quote: By the way, when Oprah Winfrey is suggesting you may have overextended yourself, you need to examine your fucking life.
quotes.author: Tina Fey

quotes.quote: For the things we have to learn before we can do them, we learn by doing them.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: I love letting her know how much she means to me. A love in secret is but a shadow that’s cold and lonely.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A window—it’s more entertaining than TV. Just ask a cat looking out, or a man looking in on a life he desires.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Never stop just because you feel defeated. The journey to the other side is attainable only after great suffering.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: It does not matter how slowly you go so long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Andy Warhol

quotes.quote: As an author, I like self-help, because clapping can be done by myself, for myself. I should buy gloves.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: We are born in one day. We die in one day. We can change in one day. And we can fall in love in one day. Anything can happen in just one day.
quotes.author: Gayle Forman

quotes.quote: Comparing penis sizes is a much more nuanced and sophisticated way to determine who’s right than something as clunky and uncouth as a debate.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: One child, one teacher, one book, one pen can change the world.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: He is terribly afraid of dying because he hasn’t yet lived.
quotes.author: Franz Kafka

quotes.quote: So I learned two things that night, and the next day, from him: the perfection of a moment, and the fleeting nature of it.
quotes.author: Margaret George

quotes.quote: Nothing's a better cure for writer's block than to eat ice cream right out of the carton.
quotes.author: Don Roff

quotes.quote: You take people, you put them on a journey, you give them peril, you find out who they really are.
quotes.author: Joss Whedon

quotes.quote: Success in life is founded upon attention to the small things rather than to the large things; to the every day things nearest to us rather than to the things that are remote and uncommon.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.quote: The best time to make friends is before you need them.
quotes.author: Ethel Barrymore

quotes.quote: I am a Mormon because I love the Lord Jesus Christ. And as I exercise faith in Him, I am blessed with the Holy Spirit in my life.
quotes.author: Jane Clayson

quotes.quote: It is life, I think, to watch the water. A man can learn so many things.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: Another world is not only possible, she is on her way. On a quiet day, I can hear her breathing.
quotes.author: Arundhati Roy

quotes.quote: Never lose faith in yourself, and never lose hope; remember, even when this world throws its worst and then turns its back, there is still always hope.
quotes.author: Pittacus Lore

quotes.quote: To become one who believes two become one, you need love in your life.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: She said she loved me, and I didn’t believe it for a minute. Maybe 59 seconds, but not a whole minute. I may be gullible, but I’m not without an accurate way to measure time.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: That's not a bad word...hate and war are bad words, but fuck isn't.
quotes.author: Judy Blume

quotes.quote: She doesn’t want me to leave, and she doesn’t want me to stay. That’s a double helping of Doesn’t Want Me, and one big I’m Not Hungry back at her.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Who would have guessed that four minutes could change everything?
quotes.author: Jennifer E. Smith

quotes.quote: Life is such a glorious trauma, is it not?
quotes.author: J.R. Ward

quotes.quote: 75% of my life is spent wasting time. The other 25% isn’t nearly as productive.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My ashtray is full, the carton of cigarettes is empty, and I just cremated grandpa. But I never inhaled—or told him I loved him.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Our sweetest songs are those of saddest thought.
quotes.author: Percy Bysshe Shelley

quotes.quote: Whoever loves becomes humble. Those who love have , so to speak , pawned a part of their narcissism.
quotes.author: Sigmund Freud

quotes.quote: Those who have never known the deep intimacy and the intense companionship of happy mutual love have missed the best thing that life has to give.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russell

quotes.quote: When I was young, I was 13 going on 31. Then when I was 30 going on 31, I was 30 going on 29. Now I’m in love and I’ve lost all sense of time—and all the rest of my sense.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Until you make peace with who you are, you'll never be content with what you have.
quotes.author: Doris Mortman

quotes.quote: True regret is knowing you missed your only opportunity to be simply a good friend to someone that was exactly like you.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: Sometimes when you lose your way, you find YOURSELF.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: Love is forgiving, accepting, moving on, embracing, and all encompassing. And if you’re not doing that for yourself, you cannot do that with anyone else.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The world may be running out of water, but it isn’t running low on music. Let the dancing flow!
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The Lord prefers common-looking people. That is why he made so many of them.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Her and I, we passed each other, and now she’s in my past. That’s one present I’d like to unwrap in the future.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The battle you are going through is not fueled by the words or actions of others; it is fueled by the mind that gives it importance.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: We must never stop dreaming. Dreams provide nourishment for the soul, just as a meal does for the body.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: When we're connected to others, we become better people.
quotes.author: Randy Pausch

quotes.quote: The more tranquil a man becomes, the greater is his success, his influence, his power for good. Calmness of mind is one of the beautiful jewels of wisdom.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.quote: The ninety and nine are with dreams, content but the hope of the world made new, is the hundredth man who is grimly bent on making those dreams come true.
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.quote: I like coffee tables. I’m into drinkable furniture.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Based on the questions we both answered, we’re a 0% love match. That means we’re 100% compatible, once I enlighten her to the correct perspective on life.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Our love will blend together like turquoise is blue and green. There’s no depression or envy when both blur into one.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Looking at beauty in the world, is the first step of purifying the mind.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: My heart, which is so full to overflowing, has often been solaced and refreshed by music when sick and weary.
quotes.author: Martin Luther

quotes.quote: The present moment is filled with joy and happiness. If you are attentive, you will see it. (21)
quotes.author: Hanh Nhat Thich

quotes.quote: Because horror on Earth is real and it is every day. It is like a flower or like the sun; it cannot be contained.
quotes.author: Alice Sebold

quotes.quote: It might be possible that the world itself is without meaning.
quotes.author: Virginia Woolf

quotes.quote: Love is the best gift because it’s free to give and priceless to receive.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Beauty is a whore, I like money better.
quotes.author: Michael Cunningham

quotes.quote: Besides, the world isn't split into good people and Death Eaters. We've all got both light and dark inside us. What matters is the part we choose to act on. That's who we really are.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: No, our science is no illusion. But an illusion it would be to suppose that what science cannot give us we can get elsewhere.
quotes.author: Sigmund Freud

quotes.quote: Re-examine all you have been told. Dismiss what insults your soul.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.quote: The discontent and frustration that you feel is entirely your own creation.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Life is infinitely stranger than anything which the mind of man could invent.
quotes.author: Arthur Conan Doyle

quotes.quote: I remember her words about remembering my words, and that’s when it hit me: the quickest way to scalpel open a heart is with a declaration of love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I think eulogies are wasted on the dead. It’s the living who need to hear kind words spoken about them.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: After you find out all the things that can go wrong, your life becomes less about living and more about waiting.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: Seize the moments of happiness, love and be loved! That is the only reality in the world, all else is folly. It is the one thing we are interested in here.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: I’m just going to keep plugging away until I find success—or an electrical socket that works. This is the secret to gaining worldly power.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Whenever you have taken up work in hand, you must see it to the finish. That is the ultimate secret of success. Never, never, never give up!
quotes.author: Dada Vaswani

quotes.quote: Change your life today. Don't gamble on the future, act now, without delay.
quotes.author: Simone de Beauvoir

quotes.quote: It's a black and white issue: gray is grey, and there's no two ways about it.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I’ve got a nice racket going. I make tennis ball swatters. My favorite score is love all. That’s also how I live my life.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: She had been given a wonderful gift: life. Sometimes it was cruelly taken away too soon, but it's what you did with it that counted, not how long it lasted.
quotes.author: Cecelia Ahern

quotes.quote: An attitude of positive expectation is the mark of the superior personality.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: I told the joke, but someone else got the high five. That’s like me drinking a cup of coffee and a guy in a coma waking up. Go back to bed, buddy.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: At first, they'll only dislike what you say, but the more correct you start sounding the more they'll dislike you.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: With all the money my uncle embezzled over the years, it's no surprise he lives in a gated community. But what is amazing, however, is that he somehow managed to get his own cell.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: We could never learn to be brave and patient if there were only joy in the world
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: The man who writes about himself and his own time is the only man who writes about all people and all time.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.quote: If we admit that human life can be ruled by reason, then all possibility of life is destroyed.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: You know how both life and porno movies end. The only difference is life starts with the orgasm.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: It is a happiness to wonder; -- it is a happiness to dream.
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.quote: I slept and I dreamed that life is all joy. I woke and I saw that life is all service. I served and I saw that service is joy.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: Remember how it was when we kissed? Armfuls and armfuls of light thrown right at us. A rope dropping down from the sky. How can the word love and the word life even fit in the mouth?
quotes.author: Jandy Nelson

quotes.quote: Love the trees until their leaves fall off, then encourage them to try again next year.
quotes.author: Chad Sugg

quotes.quote: Travel is never a matter of money but of courage
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: You know, the mind is a remarkable thing. Just because you can't see the wound doesn't mean it isn't hurting. It scars all the time, but it heals.
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: I have a tongue like a rose petal, and when I say I love you, it has the fragrance of truth. My words are my garden, and I’m planting our future.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Let there be no purpose in friendship save the deepening of the spirit.
quotes.author: Khalil Gibran

quotes.quote: In the 'Hurt Locker' there's a lot of me in there, a sense of humor, a man of few words and a lot of action.
quotes.author: Jeremy Renner

quotes.quote: He was afraid of defiling the love which filled his soul.
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: L'éternité, c'est long ... surtout vers la fin.
quotes.author: Franz Kafka

quotes.quote: Everything I’ve learned about handshakes is from hands-on experience. Due to hygiene, I only network with rubber glove manufacturers.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I’ll bet opening a store called Boobs and Books would increase literacy. I prefer a hands-on approach to learning.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I believe that every single event in life happens in an opportunity to choose love over fear.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: Wisdom is knowing I am nothing, Love is knowing I am everything, and between the two my life moves.
quotes.author: Nisargadatta Maharaj

quotes.quote: Strange, I thought, how you can be living your dreams and your nightmares at the very same time.
quotes.author: Ransom Riggs

quotes.quote: In fairy tales, the princesses kiss the frogs, and the frogs become princes. In real life, the pricesses kiss princes, and the princes turn into frogs.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: If you need me I’ll be sitting over there, on the ground, next to the empty chair. The emptiness always reminds me of your love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: We should live our lives as though Christ was coming this afternoon.
quotes.author: Jimmy Carter

quotes.quote: I morphed from a fly to a flower to a butterfly, which is like a combination flower and fly. I thought I was in love, but I was merely asleep.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My heartbeat is a pulse, and it pumps out sonic vibrations that resonate with her mind as she lays her head on my chest. Listen silently and you can hear the frequency of love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I went to a potluck. I brought my own pot—and luck. The pot was empty, just like my promise to bring food the next time.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Love will wreck your heart like a derailed train. So choo-choose your partner wisely.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When you connect to the silence within you, that is when you can make sense of the disturbance going on around you.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Success, after all, loves a witness, but failure can't exist without one.
quotes.author: Junot Díaz

quotes.quote: Life doesn't make any sense, and we all pretend it does. Comedy's job is to point out that it doesn't make sense, and that it doesn't make much difference anyway.
quotes.author: Eric Idle

quotes.quote: I count as blessings things I could have benefited from, even if I neglected to utilize them. A gift is still a gift, even if left wrapped and unopened.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Love art in yourself, and not yourself in art.
quotes.author: Konstantin Stanislavski

quotes.quote: I’m a master of encouragement. Why should I do work myself when the price of getting others to do it for me is as cheap as cheering them on?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Growing old is mandatory. Growing up is optional.
quotes.author: Carroll Bryant

quotes.quote: If you want me, you’d better hurry. Act now, supplies are limited.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: There were two ways to be happy: improve your reality, or lower your expectations
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: She wondered that hope was so much harder then despair.
quotes.author: Patricia Briggs

quotes.quote: It's not worth our while to let our imperfections disturb us always.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Can a person steal happiness? Or is just another internal, infernal human trick?
quotes.author: Markus Zusak

quotes.quote: I just bought a small condo overlooking the water. The water is in a cup, one floor below my unit.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I’ve changed, and she’s changed, but we haven’t changed together. We were in separate dressing rooms the whole time we dated.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: What we achieve inwardly will change outer reality.
quotes.author: Plutarch

quotes.quote: I can’t use my intellect to figure out how to bypass my intellect. Love lies through the spirit, not the mind, and love never lies.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A squeegee is a sponge on a stick, and if there is a tangible item that’s more romantic, I don’t know what it is. Never go on a first date without one.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Be a lamp, or a lifeboat, or a ladder. Help someone's soul heal. Walk out of your house like a shepherd.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: My ex-girlfriend was exquisite, while my current girlfriend is merely quisite. The ex always makes the past seem more excellent than the present.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: We fear men so much, because we fear God so little. One fear cures another. When man's terror scares you, turn your thoughts to the wrath of God.
quotes.author: G.K. Chesterton

quotes.quote: The harmonica has musical wind, and is the breath of soul. It’s like a sad, lonely I love you lost in the breeze.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Microwavable ice cream is the future. Don’t wait for love to melt all over your crotch. Scoop some Ice Cream Soup today.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: It was the moment I realized what music can do to people, how it can make you hurt and feel so good all at once.
quotes.author: Nina LaCour

quotes.quote: Health is the greatest possession. Contentment is the greatest treasure. Confidence is the greatest friend. Non-being is the greatest joy.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: People are the most difficult thing in the world to change
quotes.author: Gena Showalter

quotes.quote: I bleed ink for her, because her name is written on my heart. She’s the author of all the love I have to give.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Love changes what is probable and makes unlikely things possible.
quotes.author: Ally Condie

quotes.quote: Call him Voldemort, Harry. Always use the proper name for things. Fear of a name increases fear of the thing itself.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: I'm not a body with a soul, I'm a soul that has a visible part called the body.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: I don’t like my circle of friends, so I’m changing them to a square. Love shapes our lives, so why not shape who we love?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: It is hard work and great art to make life not so serious.
quotes.author: John Irving

quotes.quote: Forget injuries, never forget kindnesses.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: I leave my door locked and unlocked. You know, for stopportunities. As a lover, I’ve been known—and unknown—to be like Zeno.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You gotta run more than your mouth to escape the treadmill of mediocrity. A true hustler jogs during the day, and sleepwalks at night.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: What I want is so simple I almost can't say it: elementary kindness.
quotes.author: Barbara Kingsolver

quotes.quote: Anything disguised as anything is chameleon. A ghost disguised as an unobservable and invisible object is a great example. Still, that’s easier to see than the love my ex wife had for me.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Prophesies are dark and don’t need a flashlight to illuminate. I’m a bring my own lighthouse kind of lover.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: We never live; we are always in the expectation of living.
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.quote: Life is a comedy to those who think, a tragedy to those who feel.
quotes.author: Jean Racine

quotes.quote: Now that I’m 33.3 years old, the days of blue and green are behind me. I have left the earthy and entered into the purple phase of my life.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Some people grow cotton, while I have a t-shirt farm. The rainy season is when I get the most visitors.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Rise to the occassion which is life!
quotes.author: Virginia Euwer Wolff

quotes.quote: I love you, even if there isn’t any me, or any love, or even any life. I love you.
quotes.author: Zelda Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: If you try to change it, you will ruin it. Try to hold it, and you will lose it.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: He rose like heroes, and I rose like rows of red roses. Love grows wherever you plant it, so I try to farm it wherever I go.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I never loved another person the way I loved myself.
quotes.author: Mae West

quotes.quote: To conquer frustration, one must remain intensely focused on the outcome, not the obstacles.
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: The best use of life is love. The best expression of love is time. The best time to love is now.
quotes.author: Rick Warren

quotes.quote: I need to be gentler, I said definitively to myself, as I clenched my fist and shook it in the air. Love takes flight like two powerful wings, but hits like a collection of feathers.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Nostalgia is being blind to the bad and only remembering the good. Thinking about all the love I had for her is a positively Helen-Kelleresque experience.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Happiness does not come from without, it comes from within
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: If my legs get blown off in war, I’d like to have them replaced with a coffee table. Half man/half furniture, I’ll be in the living room if you need me.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The greatest day in your life and mine is when we take total responsibility for our attitudes. That's the day we truly grow up.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: The energy of the mind is the essence of life.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Without libraries what have we? We have no past and no future.
quotes.author: Ray Bradbury

quotes.quote: A bend in the road is not the end of the road…Unless you fail to make the turn.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: People die, I think, but your relationship with them doesn't. It continues and is ever-changing.
quotes.author: Jandy Nelson

quotes.quote: Everything changed the day she figured out there was exactly enough time for the important things in her life.
quotes.author: Brian Andreas

quotes.quote: Why are you trying so hard to fit in when you were born to stand out?
quotes.author: Ian Wallace

quotes.quote: I’m not courageous. In fact, when I shadow box I wear boxing gloves that are outfitted with flashlights.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I think I’m mouth blind and that’s why all food tastes bland. The only things that have any flavor are the words I love you.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The moment a little boy is concerned with which is a jay and which is a sparrow, he can no longer see the birds or hear them sing.
quotes.author: Eric Berne

quotes.quote: Behold, the number five is at hand. Grab it and shake and harness the power of networking.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Telephone pole wires get in the way of great photos. Communication always gets in the way of communication.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The purpose of life is not to be happy—but to matter, to be productive, to be useful, to have it make some difference that you lived at all.
quotes.author: Leo Rosten

quotes.quote: What difference do it make if the thing you scared of is real or not?
quotes.author: Toni Morrison

quotes.quote: It’s probably my job to tell you life isn’t fair, but I figure you already know that. So instead, I’ll tell you that hope is precious, and you’re right not to give up.
quotes.author: C.J. Redwine

quotes.quote: I slept through the award presentation for Napper of the Year. They had to wake me when I won. Winning was like a dream come true.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I'm wishing he could see that music lives. Forever. That it's stronger than death. Stronger than time. And that its strength holds you together when nothing else can.
quotes.author: Jennifer Donnelly

quotes.quote: Fear is inevitable, I have to accept that, but I cannot allow it to paralyze me.
quotes.author: Isabel Allende

quotes.quote: The moment we believe that success is determined by an ingrained level of ability as opposed to resilience and hard work, we will be brittle in the face of adversity.
quotes.author: Joshua Waitzkin

quotes.quote: Embryonic stem cell research will prolong life, improve life and give hope for life to millions of people.
quotes.author: Jim Ramstad

quotes.quote: Life would be unbearably dull if we had answers to all our questions.
quotes.author: Jim Butcher

quotes.quote: Go for it, while you can. I know you have it in you. And I can't promise you'll get everything you want, but I can promise nothing will change if you don't try.
quotes.author: J.M. Darhower

quotes.quote: Friendship is selfless love, care, respect, and honor not a profitable opportunity.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Why pay for an undesirable outcome with someone else? For the same money, you could have paid me to stay at home and do nothing.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Free yourself from the complexities and drama of your life. Simplify. Look within. Within ourselves we all have the gifts and talents we need to fulfill the purpose we've been blessed with.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Don't bite off more than you can chew because nobody looks attractive spitting it back out.
quotes.author: Carroll Bryant

quotes.quote: We promise according to our hopes and perform according to our fears.
quotes.author: François de La Rochefoucauld

quotes.quote: I am afraid. Not of life, or death, or nothingness, but of wasting it as if I had never been.
quotes.author: Daniel Keyes

quotes.quote: The world will give you that once in awhile, a brief timeout; the boxing bell rings and you go to your corner, where somebody dabs mercy on your beat-up life.
quotes.author: Sue Monk Kidd

quotes.quote: Nothing in life is worth, turning your back on, if you love it.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: If you have a goal, write it down. If you do not write it down, you do not have a goal - you have a wish.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Courage does not always roar. Sometimes courage is the quiet voice at the end of the day saying, 'I will try again tomorrow.
quotes.author: Mary Anne Radmacher

quotes.quote: Some people are so much sunshine to the square inch.
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.quote: It's such a shame to waste time. We always think we have so much of it.
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: I’ve only been in love one time, I said as I held up my pinky finger. I could have held up my index finger, but I wasn’t in love that long.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Trees shaped like deer should not be ridden like benches if they get stuck up in other trees. No hunting farming allowed. Fishing only.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To show you I love you, I bought you an antique watch. You can tell it's old because it doesn't even work. I got a great deal on it.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Some people grow vegetables by day, but I grow shadows by night. Right now my only customer is the US government, but the profit is unbelievable.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Be mindful and heartempty, because you've got no love left in it due to you having given it all away.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Don't Worry Be Happy
quotes.author: Meher Baba

quotes.quote: Hard at work? I’ll give you a hand—my right hand. It’s a handshake, for networking and encouragement purposes. Keep it up!
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When you are measuring life, you are not living it.
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: I just developed a gun that shoots mustaches. Sometimes a disguise can be deadly, especially if it’s your love you’re trying to camouflage.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When they say the sky's the limit to me that's really true
quotes.author: Michael Jackson

quotes.quote: Fear is a very explosive emotion, but it has a short life span. It's the sprint. The marathon is hope.
quotes.author: Mike Huckabee

quotes.quote: I love doing the action stuff. It's soooo much fun!
quotes.author: Paul Walker

quotes.quote: Tennis is the only sport with love in the score, and that makes it the most romantic. I would be a player, but I wisely use the net to go fishing instead.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: An empty ketchup bottle full of romantic quotes is just what I need to turn my cheeseburger into the perfect lover. Now you can get more romantic for an upcharge of just 69 cents.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Everything takes time. Bees have to move very fast to stay still.
quotes.author: David Foster Wallace

quotes.quote: During my darkest hour, life threw me some curves. Thankfully they were in the shape of a woman’s body.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The best part about being a writer is being able to communicate with people without moving my lips. The mouth is better used for kissing.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Never try to do anything that is outside of who you are. A forced smile is a sign of what feels wrong in your heart, so recognize it when it happens. Living a lie will reduce you to one.
quotes.author: Ashly Lorenzana

quotes.quote: The Book of Life, I’m still writing it—both literally and literarily. So far I’ve written the Table of Contents. Right now it’s more of a coffee table.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Done is better than perfect.
quotes.author: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.quote: The mind can go in a thousand directions, but on this beautiful path, I walk in peace. With each step, the wind blows. With each step, a flower blooms.
quotes.author: Hanh Nhat Thich

quotes.quote: I’m passionate about being compassionate. It takes a lot to give of yourself, and that’s why it’s such a gift—for both the recipient and the giver.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My reality is it’s nighttime. The truth is I’m just blindfolded. How many people live like me, in self-deluded darkness?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I’m a fake fact factory. The things I make are the things I make up. Also, as a side business, I make love. Actually, I just made that up.
quotes.author: Dora J. Arod

quotes.quote: In the long run, even a marathon looks like a sprint. This is how I can love with such Roger Bannisteresque intensity.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Entrepreneurs adopt the ways of the adept and adapt to a changing environment. Actually, entrepreneurs are more enterpreneurs, because they are forever entering into new territory.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: 33 old people went into a nursing home, and only 34 people came out alive. One old woman died while giving birth to twins.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Everything happens for a reason and, something better will come along for me!
quotes.author: Selena Gómez

quotes.quote: All my failures as a human being I blame on my father. Life is about accepting responsibility, and it’s time my father started being held accountable for my deficiencies.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Life—the way it really is—is a battle not between good and bad, but between bad and worse
quotes.author: Joseph Brodsky

quotes.quote: But the only way never to do the wrong thing is never to do anything.
quotes.author: Jim Butcher

quotes.quote: The most important relationship in your life is the relationship you have with yourself. Because no matter what happens, you will always be with yourself.
quotes.author: Diane Von Furstenberg

quotes.quote: Come friends, it's not too late to seek a newer world.
quotes.author: Alfred Lord Tennyson

quotes.quote: Even a fool recognizes that there is great sadness in a bucket of tears. But only a wise man thinks to conserve water and use that bucket to wash his car.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You couldn't erase the past. You couldn't even change it. But sometimes life offered you the opportunity to put it right.
quotes.author: Ann Brashares

quotes.quote: Our love was a two-person game. At least until one of us died, and the other became a murderer.
quotes.author: Dark Jar Tin Zoo

quotes.quote: Every morning I push through the pain—and force myself to keep sleeping, despite my aching body’s cries to quit. I am a champion.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: It is only with true love and compassion that we can begin to mend what is broken in the world. It is these two blessed things that can begin to heal all broken hearts.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Faith goes up the stairs that love has built and looks out the windows which hope has opened.
quotes.author: Charles Haddon Spurgeon

quotes.quote: It's not that some people have willpower and some don't... It's that some people are ready to change and others are not.
quotes.author: James Gordon

quotes.quote: You must take action now that will move you towards your goals. Develop a sense of urgency in your life.
quotes.author: H. Jackson Brown

quotes.quote: Everybody in the world is seeking happiness—and there is one sure way to find it. That is by controlling your thoughts. Happiness doesn't depend on outward conditions. It depends on inner conditions.
quotes.author: Dale Carnegie

quotes.quote: The laughter of the world is merely loneliness pathetically trying to reassure itself.
quotes.author: Neal A. Maxwell

quotes.quote: May you live as long as you wish and love as long as you live.
quotes.author: Robert A. Heinlein

quotes.quote: I’ll cut jewels in the shape of crumpled-up pieces of paper. Her wedding ring may look like my 33rd attempt at my marriage vows.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The absence of the will to live is, alas, not sufficient to make one want to die.
quotes.author: Michel Houellebecq

quotes.quote: I don’t chase after anyone, If you wanna walk out of my life, then I’ll hold the fucking door open for you.
quotes.author: Wiz Khalifa

quotes.quote: A beautiful thing happens when we start paying attention to each other. It is by participating more in your relationship that you breathe life into it.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I have lived with several Zen masters -- all of them cats.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle

quotes.quote: The ability to read awoke inside of me some long dormant craving to be mentally alive.
quotes.author: Malcolm X

quotes.quote: My advice to aspiring writers is to read more, write more, and network more. More, more, and more. Then, after you've done all that, do it some more.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: What a waste my life would be without all the beautiful mistakes I've made.
quotes.author: Alice Bag

quotes.quote: The deeds you do may be the only sermon some persons will hear today
quotes.author: Francis of Assisi

quotes.quote: In a strong relationship, you should love your companion more than you need them.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I was just shy of reaching my goal. My goal was to be more extroverted, so being just shy meant I completely failed.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Head up, heart open. To better days!
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: My own inclination is to skew towards humor. They say that some people view life as a comedy, others as a tragedy. Me? Comedy all the way.
quotes.author: Lauren Willig

quotes.quote: I was gardening when I saw this snail/slug thing disguised as a leaf. Ah, isn't fall a wonderful time to slowly fall in love?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Conquer the angry one by not getting angry; conquer the wicked by goodness; conquer the stingy by generosity, and the liar by speaking the truth.[Verse 223]
quotes.author: Gautama Buddha

quotes.quote: The foolish man seeks happiness in the distance. The wise grows it under his feet.
quotes.author: James Oppenheim

quotes.quote: Success is a little like wrestling a gorilla. You don't quit when you're tired. You quit when the gorilla is tired.
quotes.author: Robert Strauss

quotes.quote: Find the things that matter, and hold on to them, and fight for them, and refuse to let them go.
quotes.author: Lauren Oliver

quotes.quote: I've found that luck is quite predictable. If you want more luck, take more chances, Be more active, Show up more often.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: God save us from religion.
quotes.author: David Eddings

quotes.quote: Happiness cannot be pursued; it must ensue.
quotes.author: Viktor E. Frankl

quotes.quote: That's a misconception, Lennie. The sky is everywhere, it begins at your feet.
quotes.author: Jandy Nelson

quotes.quote: Make voyages. Attempt them. There's nothing else.
quotes.author: Tennessee Williams

quotes.quote: Ahhh. Bed, book, kitten, sandwich. All one needed in life, really.
quotes.author: Jacqueline Kelly

quotes.quote: I’d row a gondola like a column is not a row. My coffee may be cold, but my love is warm. When are you going to wake up and drink it?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Mutual caring relationships require kindness and patience, tolerance, optimism, joy in the other's achievements, confidence in oneself, and the ability to give without undue thought of gain.
quotes.author: Fred Rogers

quotes.quote: Midnight is Hellen-Kelleresque, so if you ask me if I’m seeing anybody, I’ll ask you what time it is. Answers are always between 12:01 AM to 11:59 PM.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Those who are happiest are those who do the most for others.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.quote: When tragedy hits close to home, like your neighbor’s house, it really makes you stop and think. And while you’re thinking, I’ll be speeding off in the getaway car.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I am a fisherman among farmers, and as a farmer what I grow is tired of waiting for her to love me.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When you come out of the storm, you won’t be the same person who walked in. That’s what this storm’s all about.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: Just when you thought you’d considered all the angles, life goes from a square to a cube. Love should also be 3D.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Your time may come. Do not be too sad, Sam. You cannot be always torn in two. You will have to be one and whole, for many years. You have so much to enjoy and to be, and to do.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: I need more frugality. I wonder where I can buy some.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My cat is ignorant of the law. But then so am I. That means I am not his master, because we are both slaves.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: What if the kid you bullied at school, grew up, and turned out to be the only surgeon who could save your life?
quotes.author: Lynette Mather

quotes.quote: A starving man asleep dreams of food, and even a crumb becomes a feast. When you’re hungry for affection even a no is better than being ignored.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I peddle my wares as fast as I pedal my bicycle and petal my flowers, and that’s why my sales growth seems so slow. But given time, my brand will be in full bloom.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If you want to build a ship, don’t drum up the men to gather wood, divide the work, and give orders. Instead, teach them to yearn for the vast and endless sea.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: Taking a break. Been working solid for the last few hours, as opposed to working liquid, which is more drinkable. Can I pour you a glass of productivity?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I want to do it because I want to do it. Women must try to do things as men have tried. When they fail, their failure must be but a challenge to others.
quotes.author: Amelia Earhart

quotes.quote: Cherish your visions and your dreams as they are the children of your soul, the blueprints of your ultimate achievements.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: Our forces saved the remnants of the Jewish people of Europe for a new life and a new hope in the reborn land of Israel. Along with all men of good will, I salute the young state and wish it well.
quotes.author: Dwight D. Eisenhower

quotes.quote: In the end, just three things matter:How well we have livedHow well we have lovedHow well we have learned to let go
quotes.author: Jack Kornfield

quotes.quote: Life’s greatest gift is the freedom it leaves you to step out of it whenever you choose.
quotes.author: André Breton

quotes.quote: So he tasted the deep pain that is reserved only for the strong, just as he had tasted for a little while the deep happiness.
quotes.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: The trick is to enjoy life. Don't wish away your days, waiting for better ones ahead.
quotes.author: Marjorie Pay Hinckley

quotes.quote: There is a kind of happiness and wonder that makes you serious. It is too good to waste on jokes.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.quote: Better than learning how to speak a foreign language, is to start speaking the truth. But few people will listen, because they just don’t understand.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I mean, I have the feeling that something in my mind is poisoning everything else.
quotes.author: Vladimir Nabokov

quotes.quote: Millions saw the apple fall, Newton was the only one who asked why?
quotes.author: Bernard M. Baruch

quotes.quote: The reason people find it so hard to be happy is that they always see the past better than it was, the present worse than it is, and the future less resolved than it will be.
quotes.author: Marcel Pagnol

quotes.quote: Self-consciousness is the enemy of all art, be it acting, writing, painting, or living itself, which is the greatest art of all.
quotes.author: Ray Bradbury

quotes.quote: To invent your own life's meaning is not easy, but it's still allowed, and I think you'll be happier for the trouble.
quotes.author: Bill Watterson

quotes.quote: To see what is in front of one’s nose needs a constant struggle.
quotes.author: George Orwell

quotes.quote: We need hope, or else we cannot endure.
quotes.author: Sarah J. Maas

quotes.quote: What strikes me is that there's a very fine line between success and failure. Just one ingredient can make the difference.
quotes.author: Andrew Lloyd Webber

quotes.quote: I arose like a rose, and this is how I knew I was in love. In the garden of life, I’m better off in your neighbor’s yard.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Life seems to go on without effort when I am filled with music.
quotes.author: George Eliot

quotes.quote: The sooner you make a mistake and learn to live with it, the better. You're not responsible for everything. You can't control the way things end up.
quotes.author: Courtney Summers

quotes.quote: One butterfly wing reflected wholly in a mirror won’t give flight. Let this be a lesson in love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The last 33 years of my life have been a blur, like a hummingbird’s beating wings. Time flies, but not backwards, like a hummingbird can.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Never forget:we walk on hell, gazing at flowers.
quotes.author: Kobayashi Issa

quotes.quote: There is no escape—we pay for the violence of our ancestors.
quotes.author: Frank Herbert

quotes.quote: Fortune sides with him who dares.
quotes.author: Virgil

quotes.quote: Early on I set out to write the next Great American Novel, and then later on I set out the silverware and enjoyed my dinner in silence.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: One can be very much in love with a woman without wishing to spend the rest of one's life with her.
quotes.author: W. Somerset Maugham

quotes.quote: Be happy with who you are and what you do, and you can do anything you want.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: When all is said and done, the life of faith is nothing if not an unending struggle of the spirit with every available weapon against the flesh.
quotes.author: Dietrich Bonhoeffer

quotes.quote: People without hope not only don't write novels, but what is more to the point, they don't read them.
quotes.author: Flannery O'Connor

quotes.quote: Most people believe the mind to be a mirror, more or less accurately reflecting the world outside them, not realizing on the contrary that the mind is itself the principal element of creation.
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: If there’s gold in it, then the mine is mine. And if there’s no coffee in it, then the cup is yours.

quotes.quote: 30% of the time I am successful 70% of the time. That’s 100% in my book—a book that happens to have a page count that’s 21% Reduced Fat.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If I waste all my charity, all I’ll wind up with in the end is the wind. Still, I think I want to be the Dandelion of Love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I wouldn’t feel great if you left me alone, but I wouldn’t feel bad either. I’d feel good, like I always do, which has nothing to do with you, even if you’ll have nothing to do with me.

quotes.quote: What strange phenomena we find in a great city, all we need do is stroll about with our eyes open. Life swarms with innocent monsters.
quotes.author: Charles Baudelaire

quotes.quote: A man travels the world over in search of what he needs and returns home to find it.
quotes.author: George Moore

quotes.quote: We do not remember days, we remember moments.
quotes.author: Cesare Pavese

quotes.quote: You don't know me. You know one me, just like I know one you. And you can't know every me, and I can't know every you.

quotes.quote: Love, like everything else in life, should be a discovery, an adventure, and like most adventures, you don’t know you’re having one until you’re right in the middle of it.
quotes.author: E.A. Bucchianeri

quotes.quote: The life where nothing was ever unexpected. Or inconvenient. Or unusual. The life without colour, pain or past.
quotes.author: Lois Lowry

quotes.quote: Who needs a large vocabulary when you can just make up any word at any time? It makes life a whole lot more emeaglibop.

quotes.quote: A thousand words leave not the same deep impression as does a single deed.
quotes.author: Henrik Ibsen

quotes.quote: Dieting is the only game where you win when you lose!
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: I’d rather have 100% of 5 than 50% of 10—especially with love.

quotes.quote: The deepest wounds aren't the ones we get from other people hurting us. They are the wounds we give ourselves when we hurt other people.

quotes.quote: I am Clap Man. It’s a reverse super power, because instead of me doing the heavy lifting, I just applaud and encourage and others do all the work.

quotes.quote: If you spend your life sparing people’s feelings and feeding their vanity, you get so you can’t distinguish what should be respected in them.

quotes.quote: If you cannot find peace within yourself, you will never find it anywhere else.

quotes.quote: Trying to remember a dream from a decade ago is like trying to catch fog in a coffee filter. I could subsist on morning mist.

quotes.quote: I kissed a mystery, and it tasted like a woman. Lips are always full of delicious secrets.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To love is easy, to be in a relationship is extremely difficult.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Dustfinger still clearly remembered the feeling of being in love for the first time. How vulnerable his heart had suddenly been! Such a trembling, quivering thing, happy and miserably unhappy at once.

quotes.quote: I don't want to do anything. I don't even want to start this day because then I'll just be expected to finish it.

quotes.quote: Run when you can, walk if you have to, crawl if you must; just never give up.

quotes.quote: Success means we go to sleep at night knowing that our talents and ablities were used in a way that served others.

quotes.quote: It is the power of the mind to be unconquerable.

quotes.quote: Real learning comes about when the competitive spirit has ceased.

quotes.quote: Silver is an investment. It’s like a second-place future. Makes me want to create Michael Phelps-flavored ice cream and eat a whole tub.

quotes.quote: There's nothing wrong with not understanding yourself.

quotes.quote: Be not angry that you cannot make others as you wish them to be, since you cannot make yourself as you wish to be.

quotes.quote: Relax. Just be. And be just.

quotes.quote: I knocked on her door twice. The second time was from the inside. That’s how love works. At first you want in, and then you want out.

quotes.quote: I'm beginning to think that maybe it's not just how much you love someone. Maybe what matters is who you are when you're with them.

quotes.quote: There is love of course. And then there's life, its enemy.

quotes.quote: Life is a drama full of tragedy and comedy. You should learn to enjoy the comic episodes a little more.

quotes.quote: Puritanism: The haunting fear that someone, somewhere, may be happy.

quotes.quote: I believe with all my heart that the cliches are true, that we are our own best friends and best company, and that if you're not right for yourself, it's impossible to be right for anyone.

quotes.quote: Once you can accept failure, you can have fun and success.

quotes.quote: Life is truly known only to those who suffer, lose, endure adversity and stumble from defeat to defeat.

quotes.quote: Art in the classroom not only spurs creativity, it also inspires learning.

quotes.quote: I don’t remember my birth. I guess I got dementia at a young age.

quotes.quote: Potential has a shelf life.

quotes.quote: To live is to be musical, starting with the blood dancing in your veins. Everything living has a rhythm. Do you feel your music?

quotes.quote: I feel sorry for anyone who is in a place where he feels strange and stupid.

quotes.quote: If you don't have time to do it right, when will you have the time to do it over?

quotes.quote: You must expect great things of yourself before you can do them.

quotes.quote: Life is partly what we make it, and partly what it is made by the friends we choose.

quotes.quote: The body grows slowly and steadily but the soul grows by leaps and bounds. It may come to its full stature in an hour.

quotes.quote: You can be young without money, but you can't be old without it.

quotes.quote: We live in a dark and romantic and quite tragic world.

quotes.quote: Envy, after all, comes from wanting something that isn't yours. But grief comes from losing something you've already had.

quotes.quote: If you give up what you want most for what you think you should want more, you'll end up miserable.

quotes.quote: The thing the sixties did was to show us the possibilities and the responsibility that we all had. It wasn't the answer. It just gave us a glimpse of the possibility.

quotes.quote: Letting go is the lesson. Letting go is always the lesson. Have you ever noticed how much of our agony is all tied up with craving and loss?

quotes.quote: I can't. You can't rewrite the past.

quotes.quote: Disappointment came to me, and booted me, and bruised and hurt me, but that's how people grow up.

quotes.quote: It’s easier to hide your smoking habit on a foggy day. Let that be a lesson for you and your secret lover.

quotes.quote: For those who are poor in happiness, each time is a first time; happiness never becomes a habit.

quotes.quote: Realize that if a door closed, it’s because what was behind it wasn’t meant for you.

quotes.quote: So many of our dreams at first seem impossible, then they seem improbable, and then, when we summon the will, they soon become inevitable.

quotes.quote: They had an ordinary life, full of ordinary things-if love can ever be called that.

quotes.quote: I’m an only child, and therefore I gave birth to my parents, because if it weren’t for me, they wouldn’t even be parents.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: No matter how hard life is, don't lose hope
quotes.author: Zayn Malik

quotes.quote: Everything that is done in this world is done by hope.

quotes.quote: How much time he gains who does not look to see what his neighbour says or does or thinks, but only at what he does himself, to make it just and holy.

quotes.quote: When the whole world is silent, even one voice becomes powerful.

quotes.quote: That's what I love about Aibileen, she can take the most complicated things in life and wrap them up so small and simple, they'll fit right in your pocket.

quotes.quote: Only a fool would say they’re not a fool. Well, I am not a fool, which is why I say I am a fool.

quotes.quote: My view is that if your philosophy is not unsettled daily then you are blind to all the universe has to offer.

quotes.quote: I have stolen ideas from every book I have ever read.

quotes.quote: There's more to life than love.
quotes.author: Ramon Bautista

quotes.quote: Whatever is going to happen will happen, whether we worry or not.
quotes.author: Ana Monnar

quotes.quote: I am not good at noticing when I'm happy, except in retrospect.

quotes.quote: A follow-up letter is best when not written on the back of a suicide note. Remember this next time you’re at a networking event, unless your new connection is a mortician.

quotes.quote: One must always be prepared for riotous and endless waves of transformation.

quotes.quote: When men are pure, laws are useless; when men are corrupt, laws are broken.

quotes.quote: Argue for your limitations and, sure enough, they're yours.

quotes.quote: Suspect each moment, for it is a thief, tiptoeing away with more than it brings.

quotes.quote: Do not give way to useless alarm; though it is right to be prepared for the worst, there is no occasion to look on it as certain.

quotes.quote: Never stop. Never stop fighting. Never stop dreaming.

quotes.quote: She was a beautiful dreamer. The kind of girl, who kept her head in the clouds, loved above the stars and left regret beneath the earth she walked on.

quotes.quote: You know that place between sleep and awake, that place where you still remember dreaming? That’s where I’ll always love you. That’s where I’ll be waiting.

quotes.quote: I meet people to know I’m not alone. I network like an astronaut on the moon.

quotes.quote: Two wrongs don't make a right, but don't three lefts make a right? Two wrongs don't make a right, but don't two negatives make a positive?

quotes.quote: Persistence. Perfection. Patience. Power. Prioritize your passion. It keeps you sane.

quotes.quote: If you want to be a doormat you have to lay yourself down first.

quotes.quote: A kiss may ruin a human life

quotes.quote: Sorrow looks back, Worry looks around, Faith looks up

quotes.quote: I do my best thinking at night when everyone else is sleeping. No interruptions. No noise. I like the feeling of being awake when no one else is.

quotes.quote: To live is to war with trolls.

quotes.quote: Tolerance of intolerance is cowardice.

quotes.quote: A bridge of silver wings stretches from the dead ashes of an unforgiving nightmareto the jeweled vision of a life started anew.

quotes.quote: Stay positive and happy. Work hard and don't give up hope. Be open to criticism and keep learning. Surround yourself with happy, warm and genuine people.

quotes.quote: Life is only precious because it ends, kid. Take it from a god. You mortals don't know how lucky you are

quotes.quote: Yoga is not a religion. It is a science, science of well-being, science of youthfulness, science of integrating body, mind and soul.

quotes.quote: Single is no longer a lack of options – but a choice. A choice to refuse to let your life be defined by your relationship status but to live every day Happily and let your Ever After work itself out.

quotes.quote: Fame you'll be famous, as famous as can be, with everyone watching you win on TV, Except when they don't because sometimes they won't..

quotes.quote: If you are not the hero of your own story, then you're missing the whole point of your humanity.

quotes.quote: You are not your body. You are the sum of all your actions, and they live on after your body dies. You may be mortal, but your brand is eternal.

quotes.quote: Personal branding is important to me as a person. It’s also important to me as a non-person. I am a rock.

quotes.quote: But you're so busy changing the worldJust one smile can change all of mine

quotes.quote: Most people go to networking events to gain visibility. But in a crowded room, I’m trying to figure out how to become invisible. I network like the ghost of a chameleon.

quotes.quote: Personal branding is sales, because you’re selling an image of yourself, a mirage, and you are the product.

quotes.quote: Death is unstoppable. One must face it as a fact of life

quotes.quote: I shall take the heart. For brains do not make one happy, and happiness is the best thing in the world.

quotes.quote: I want to make something of myself. I believe it’s called a statue.

quotes.quote: I really don't even know you, and yet, in my life, you are forever entangled; to my history, inextricably bound.

quotes.quote: Learned we may be with another man's learning: we can only be wise with wisdom of our own.

quotes.quote: Most men fear getting laughed at or humiliated by a romantic prospect while most women fear rape and death.

quotes.quote: Vision without execution is just hallucination.

quotes.quote: To know a man's library is, in some measure, to know a man's mind.

quotes.quote: You will suffer, son of Hades!’ What else is new? Nico thought.

quotes.quote: Lightning doesn’t thunder twice. Let that be a lesson in love.

quotes.quote: Right now, I had everything I could ask for. It wasn't a long list, but it was a very satisfying one, starting with the love of my life back in my arms.

quotes.quote: There is no failure except in no longer trying.

quotes.quote: If you want to steal my heart, you must realize it's not a one-time heist. This theft will take every minute of the rest of your life.

quotes.quote: I don’t mind waiting rooms. I’m waiting on the love of my life, so I may as well have a seat, right?

quotes.quote: My happiness grows in direct proportion to my acceptance, and in inverse proportion to my expectations.

quotes.quote: My aim in life isn't so much the pursuit of happiness as the happiness of pursuit.

quotes.quote: If people make fun of you, that probably means you're doing something right.

quotes.quote: Networking is like fishing. Just give some beer and a boat and I’ll be in business.

quotes.quote: I network like a salmon in a bear costume. Why swim upstream when the honeybee has all the flowers? Is anything more romantic than roses on a grave?

quotes.quote: I'm not crying because of you; you're not worth it. I'm crying because my delusion of who you were was shattered by the truth of who you are.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The act of taking the first step is what separates the winners from the losers.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Rise and rise again until lambs become lions
quotes.author: Robin Hood

quotes.quote: You don't know, oh, ohYou don't know you're beautiful.
quotes.author: One Direction

quotes.quote: Networking isn’t synonymous with partying. If you’re doing it right, partying seems libraryesque in comparison.

quotes.quote: I network like a Spanish Inquisitor. I am very good at extracting relevant information. And if you resist, you’ll only confirm your heresy.

quotes.quote: I made up my mind not to care so much about the destination, and simply enjoy the journey.

quotes.quote: But you cant shut everyone out. I mean you have to have someone to love. . .someone to hold on to. . . someone--
quotes.author: Hubert Selby Jr.

quotes.quote: Everything you do is triggered by an emotion of either desire or fear.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Don't try to fix me, I'm not broken...
quotes.author: Evanescence

quotes.quote: Gamble everything for love, if you're a true human being.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: It isn't what you have, or who you are, or where you are, or what you are doing that makes you happy or unhappy. It is what you think about.
quotes.author: Dale Carnegie

quotes.quote: You can have many great ideas in your head, but what makes the difference is the action. Without action upon an idea, there will be no manifestation, no results, and no reward
quotes.author: Miguel Ruiz

quotes.quote: If you can't fight and you can't flee, flow.
quotes.author: Robert Elias

quotes.quote: Man is solid, not liquid. But with the fluid nature of networking, my personal brand would grow faster if I would just go with the flow.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Life is a series of surprises and would not be worth taking or keeping if it were not.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: To regret one’s own experiences is to arrest one’s own development. To deny one’s own experiences is to put a lie into the lips of one’s own life. It is no less than a denial of the soul.

quotes.quote: Gamitin ang puso para alagaan ang taong malapit sayo. Gamitin ang utakpara alagaan ang sarili mo.
