quotes.quote: Your personal brand should be like water: not only clear, but transparent to the public. People thirst for that, and they will drink you up.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A tattoo is a true poetic creation, and is always more than meets the eye. As a tattoo is grounded on living skin, so its essence emotes a poignancy unique to the mortal human condition.
quotes.author: V. Vale

quotes.quote: Yes, I have a good sense of humor to sort of last a long time in show business, and I think to be able to find comedic value in who you are and the people that you work is always a good thing.
quotes.author: Jane Krakowski

quotes.quote: Man starts over again everyday, in spite of all he knows, against all he knows.
quotes.author: Emil Cioran

quotes.quote: To me, impulsive means foolish. But if a person’s not a little impulsive, they don’t have a pulse.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I simply regard romantic comedies as a subgenre of sci-fi, in which the world created therein has different rules than my regular human world.
quotes.author: Mindy Kaling

quotes.quote: Glue holds stuff together pretty well. But why not try using guitar music as an adhesive? After all, it’s held many bands together.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Myth is much more important and true than history. History is just journalism and you know how reliable that is.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.quote: The harder you fall, the heavier your heart; the heavier your heart, the stronger you climb; the stronger you climb, the higher your pedestal.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Focus on making yourself better, not on thinking that you are better.
quotes.author: Bohdi Sanders

quotes.quote: Happiness is part of who we are. Joy is the feeling
quotes.author: Tony DeLiso

quotes.quote: Losing your mind is preferable to losing your woman, because if you lose your woman you will also lose your mind, and then you’re left with nothing.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I spoke like a spoke on a wheel, as I went around and around without actually saying what I wanted to say. I was love flustered.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Love only grows by sharing. You can only have more for yourself by giving it away to others.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: People rarely bring flowers to a suicide.
quotes.author: Jennifer Niven

quotes.quote: Life is more fun if you play games.
quotes.author: Roald Dahl

quotes.quote: All paths are present, always... and we can but choose among them.
quotes.author: Jacqueline Carey

quotes.quote: A heart has problems which mind cannot understand.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: This work was strictly voluntary, but any animal who absented himself from it would have his rations reduced by half.
quotes.author: George Orwell

quotes.quote: How many seconds does it take to win second? As many as it takes to win first—if you don’t use them properly.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Every problem is a gift - without problems we would not grow.
quotes.author: Anthony Robbins

quotes.quote: Love me or hate me, i swear it won't make or break me.
quotes.author: Lil Wayne

quotes.quote: To leave, after all, was not the same as being left.
quotes.author: Anita Shreve

quotes.quote: Word of mouth—it's more powerful, more convincing, and more audible than word of hand. If you need me, I’ll be in the audience clapping.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Everyone is a salesman, and the product is each person. Personal branding is being conscious to the continual nature of selling yourself.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Leaders must be close enough to relate to others, but far enough ahead to motivate them.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: Change is not a destination, just as hope is not a strategy.
quotes.author: Rudy Giuliani

quotes.quote: There is a vitality, a life force, an energy, a quickening, that is translated through you into action, and because there is only one of you in all time, this expression is unique.
quotes.author: Martha Graham

quotes.quote: Do not become someone else just because you are hurt. Be who you are & smile, it may solve, all problems you have got.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Never stop smiling not even when you're sad, someone might fall in love with your smile.
quotes.author: Gabriel Garcí­a Márquez

quotes.quote: When I lost my sight, Werner, people said I was brave. When my father left, people said I was brave. But it is not bravery; I have no choice. I wake up and live my life. Don't you do the same?
quotes.author: Anthony Doerr

quotes.quote: Wisdom is knowing when you are being patient, and when you are wasting time by waiting.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I cannot compromise my respect for your love. You can keep your love, I will keep my respect.
quotes.author: Amit Kalantri

quotes.quote: My hope still is to leave the world a bit better than when I got here.
quotes.author: Jim Henson

quotes.quote: In order to write the book you want to write, in the end you have to become the person you need to become to write that book.
quotes.author: Junot Díaz

quotes.quote: There is nothing perfect...only life.
quotes.author: Sue Monk Kidd

quotes.quote: I don't judge people. It blurs out the center of my attention, my focus, myself.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: Do more than belong: participate. Do more than care: help. Do more than believe: practice. Do more than be fair: be kind. Do more than forgive: forget. Do more than dream: work.
quotes.author: William Arthur Ward

quotes.quote: I don't know, I don't want to talk as much. (...) It's nicer to think dear, pretty thoughts and keep them in one's heart, like treasures. I don't like to have them laughed at or wondered over.
quotes.author: L.M. Montgomery

quotes.quote: If you will practice being fictional for a while, you will understand that fictional characters are sometimes more real than people with bodies and heartbeats.
quotes.author: Richard Bach

quotes.quote: She plants love, and she grows roses. The fragrance of romance comes from the blossom that blooms in the heart.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The strands of DNA are like strings, and it’s as if I am a walking guitar, a musical being whose vibration can be heard as love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: One who makes himself a worm cannot complain afterwards if people step on him.
quotes.author: Immanuel Kant

quotes.quote: It’s strange how things can change back as suddenly as they changed originally. When one thing happens and suddenly, things are back to normal.
quotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

quotes.quote: In the end, the number of prayers we say may contribute to our happiness, but the number of prayers we answer may be of even greater importance.
quotes.author: Dieter F. Uchtdorf

quotes.quote: There is a loftier ambition than merely to stand high in the world. It is to stoop down and lift mankind a little higher.
quotes.author: Henry Van Dyke

quotes.quote: A minute's success pays the failure of years.
quotes.author: Robert Browning

quotes.quote: The human race is a remarkable creature, one with great potential, and I hope that 'Star Trek' has helped to show us what we can be if we believe in ourselves and our abilities.
quotes.author: Gene Roddenberry

quotes.quote: The roses of romance grow when you water your relationship with gratitude. Love will bloom and blossom when you recognize the awesome.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The word long is short, and so is the word short, but why is the word love as long as long? Shouldn’t it be longer?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: No matter where you are, you're always a bit on your own, always an outsider.
quotes.author: Banana Yoshimoto

quotes.quote: Perhaps it takes a purer faith to praise God for unrealized blessings than for those we once enjoyed or those we enjoy now.
quotes.author: A.W. Tozer

quotes.quote: Courage and perseverance have a magical talisman, before which difficulties disappear and obstacles vanish into air.
quotes.author: John Quincy Adams

quotes.quote: Don't give me songs, give me something to sing about!
quotes.author: Mutanat Enemy

quotes.quote: Do every act of your life as though it were the very last act of your life.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.quote: The going rate for love is going away. And the more you go away, the more expensive it gets.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I do not forget any good deed done to me & I do not carry a grudge for a bad one.
quotes.author: Viktor E. Frankl

quotes.quote: Each time we don't say what we wanna say, we're dying.
quotes.author: Yoko Ono

quotes.quote: I am a strong believer in the tyranny, the dictatorship, the absolute authority of the writer.
quotes.author: Philip Pullman

quotes.quote: Talent is a gift, but character is a choice.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: Accepting oneself does not preclude an attempt to become better.
quotes.author: Flannery O'Connor

quotes.quote: Its more fun to think of the future than dwell on the past.
quotes.author: Sara Shepard

quotes.quote: My heart is locked away in a cage surrounded by ribs. That’s to protect it, and to keep the world safe. It’s currently serving a life sentence.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I want to see beauty. In the ugly, in the sink, in the suffering, in the daily, in all the days before I die, the moments before I sleep.
quotes.author: Ann Voskamp

quotes.quote: She wants to teach me to dance, but how do you instruct water to flow? I'm so fluid all you can do is swim in my moves and drink my essence.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: How satisfying it is to leave a mark on a blank surface. To make a map of my movement - no matter how temporary.
quotes.author: Craig Thompson

quotes.quote: Smile at strangers and you just might change a life.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Don't waste your energy trying to change opinions ... Do your thing, and don't care if they like it.
quotes.author: Tina Fey

quotes.quote: It's up to you today to start making healthy choices. Not choices that are just healthy for your body, but healthy for your mind.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: You stay safe, You love. You survive. You laugh and cry and struggle and sometimes you fail and sometimes you succeed. You Push.
quotes.author: Carrie Ryan

quotes.quote: My love for you grows daily, and all it takes is exposure to your sunny disposition, coupled with watering it with coffee.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I sell soap. Buy two bars and get a FREE shower. (Water not included.) Act within the next 15 minutes and I’ll even throw in the towel. I quit!
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Older doesn't necessarily mean wiser. Some trees live to be hundreds of years old, and what the fuck do they know?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Sadness is but a wall between two gardens.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: Being brave enough to be alone frees you up to invite people into your life because you want them and not because you need them.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: You've never lived what you are thinking, and that isn't good. Only the ideas we actually live are of any value.
quotes.author: Hermann Hesse

quotes.quote: My life is but a firefly’s flicker, so I’d better use my brief moment to light up the darkness that covers her path.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To be angry is easy, but to forgive is hard. That's why to love is easy, and to love is hard. I try to be so hard that I'm soft, like a liquid rock, fluid and forgiving, but unmovable in my resolve.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Her love was too cold, like an anti-oven. That's called a freezer, and sometimes it burns food. She gave me heartburn, just like coffee, and it really woke me up to the reality of relationships.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Self-growth comes from being nurtured, not tortured. I had to learn this the hard way. On sale now: Iron Maiden. Only used once.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I think sometimes when we find love we pretend it away, or ignore it, or tell ourselves we’re imagining it. Because it is the most painful kind of hope there is.
quotes.author: Rae Carson

quotes.quote: Happiness is a choice that requires effort at times.
quotes.author: Aeschylus

quotes.quote: Nobody steals books but your friends.
quotes.author: Roger Zelazny

quotes.quote: If a bullet should enter my brain, let that bullet destroy every closet door.
quotes.author: Harvey Milk

quotes.quote: The motive behind criticism often determines its validity. Those who care criticize where necessary. Those who envy criticize the moment they think that they have found a weak spot.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: The truth was a mirror in the hands of God. It fell, and broke into pieces. Everybody took a piece of it, and they looked at it and thought they had the truth.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: Everything you need to know you have learned through your journey.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: What reading level is the word love? It’s a four-letter word everybody knows the meaning of, but nobody can define it.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Wisdom equals knowledge plus courage. You have to not only know what to do and when to do it, but you have to also be brave enough to follow through.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The desire to love someone always exceeds the desire to be loved by someone & that's exactly why we end up loving the person who doesn't deserve that LOVE.
quotes.author: Anirban Bose

quotes.quote: Wherever men and women are persecuted because of their race, religion, or political views, that place must — at that moment — become the center of the universe.
quotes.author: Elie Wiesel

quotes.quote: Time is what keeps things from happening all at once.
quotes.author: Ann Brashares

quotes.quote: Rock bottom became the solid foundation on which I rebuilt my life.
quotes.author: J.K. Rowling

quotes.quote: He made me feel unhinged . . . like he could take me apart and put me back together again and again.
quotes.author: Chelsie Shakespeare

quotes.quote: You can't dwell on what might have been...and it's not fair to condemn him for something he hasn't done.
quotes.author: Wendelin Van Draanen

quotes.quote: The fact that man knows right from wrong proves his intellectual superiority to the other creatures; but the fact that he can do wrong proves his moral inferiority to any creatures that cannot.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: When you are joyful, when you say yes to life and have fun and project positivity all around you, you become a sun in the center of every constellation, and people want to be near you.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: The past is made out of facts... I guess the future is just hope.
quotes.author: Isaac Marion

quotes.quote: Books... are like lobster shells, we surround ourselves with 'em, then we grow out of 'em and leave 'em behind, as evidence of our earlier stages of development.
quotes.author: Dorothy L. Sayers

quotes.quote: Hope is such a beautiful word, but it often seems very fragile. Life is still being needlessly hurt and destroyed.
quotes.author: Michael Jackson

quotes.quote: I do not love men: I love what devours them.
quotes.author: André Gide

quotes.quote: If a man is to live, he must be all alive, body, soul, mind, heart, spirit.
quotes.author: Thomas Merton

quotes.quote: Fourscore and seven years ago our fathers brought forth on this continent, a new nation, conceived in Liberty, and dedicated to the proposition that all men are created equal.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Mistakes are the growing pains of wisdom.
quotes.author: William Jordan

quotes.quote: And books, they offer one hope -- that a whole universe might open up from between the covers, and falling into that universe, one is saved.
quotes.author: Anne Rice

quotes.quote: That woman doesn't have the sense God gave a retarded flea.
quotes.author: Nora Roberts

quotes.quote: A raisin on the ground is full of hope that if it just keeps aging, it will turn into wine and get drunk on its wrinkly self.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Either I will love you, or I will love you if and only if you love me in return. I prefer the former.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: But I can hardly sit still. I keep fidgeting, crossing one leg and then the other. I feel like I could throw off sparks, or break a window--maybe rearrange all the furniture.
quotes.author: Raymond Carver

quotes.quote: It is not enough to be industrious; so are the ants. What are you industrious about?
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Her dancing inspires me to move. I used to be like a statue, and now I am more like a mannequin. So much more fashionable, you know?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Wisdom is the reward for surviving our own stupidity.
quotes.author: Brian Rathbone

quotes.quote: All problems are illusions of the mind.
quotes.author: Eckhart Tolle

quotes.quote: To succeed in life, you need three things: a wishbone, a backbone and a funnybone.
quotes.author: Reba McEntire

quotes.quote: I am afraid to show you who I really am, because if I show you who I really am, you might not like it--and that's all I got.
quotes.author: Sabrina Ward Harrison

quotes.quote: I know I love her, because when I see her my heart beats like a drum. If she played guitar and sang, we could start a band.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I have a doctorate degree from the School of Hard Knocks. I studied door-to-door salesmanship. This was before the doorbell was invented.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Trying to hide my feelings to avoid getting hurt just ends up hurting not only myself—but also the person I am hiding my feelings from.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Do not wait: the time will never be 'just right'. Start where you stand, and work whatever tools you may have at your command and better tools will be found as you go along.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: Having a low opinion of yourself is not 'modesty.' It's self-destruction. Holding your uniqueness in high regard is not 'egotism.' It's a necessary precondition to happiness and success.
quotes.author: Bobbe Sommer

quotes.quote: Don't let your luggage define your travels, each life unravels differently.
quotes.author: Shane Koyczan

quotes.quote: Our most significant opportunities will be found in times of greatest difficulty.
quotes.author: Thomas S. Monson

quotes.quote: When one door closes another door opens; but we so often look so long and so regretfully upon the closed door, that we do not see the ones which open for us.
quotes.author: Alexander Graham Bell

quotes.quote: A respectable appearance is sufficient to make people more interested in your soul
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: When a poet digs himself into a hole, he doesn't climb out. He digs deeper, enjoys the scenery, and comes out the other side enlightened.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Face reality as it is, not as it was or as you wish it to be.
quotes.author: Jack Welch

quotes.quote: Friendship! Mysterious cement of the soul, Sweet'ner of life, and solder of society.
quotes.author: Robert Blair

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night. The champagne was non-alcoholic. You didn't notice, and laughed at my jokes anyway.
quotes.author: Michael Summers

quotes.quote: Life is ours to be spent, not tobe saved.
quotes.author: D.H. Lawrence

quotes.quote: The only real limitation on your abilities is the level of your desires. If you want it badly enough, there are no limits on what you can achieve.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: White letters plus white paper equals invisibility. Just because you can’t see my love for you, doesn’t mean I didn’t write about it.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Do not pray for easy lives. Pray to be stronger men.[Quoting Reverend Phillips Brooks, during Remarks at Presidential Prayer Breakfast, February 7 1963]
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: He who takes offense when no offense is intended is a fool, and he who takes offense when offense is intended is a greater fool.
quotes.author: Brigham Young

quotes.quote: If winter comes, can spring be far behind?
quotes.author: Percy Bysshe Shelley

quotes.quote: When I am king they shall not have bread and shelter only, but also teachings out of books, for a full belly is little worth where the mind is starved.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.quote: Do not let another day go by where your dedication to other people's opinions is greater than your dedication to your own emotions!
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: If you believe you can, you might. If you know you can, you will.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: If we don't change the direction we are headed, we will end up where we are going.
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: Celebrate the people in your life who are there because they love you for no other reason than because you are YOU.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: My heart is afraid that it will have to suffer.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: A writer must teach himself that the basest of all things is to be afraid.
quotes.author: William Faulkner

quotes.quote: Music is the literature of the heart; it commences where speech ends.
quotes.author: Alphonse de Lamartine

quotes.quote: Happiness depends on being free, and freedom depends on being courageous.
quotes.author: Marie Rutkoski

quotes.quote: Love doesn't always come when you want it to. Sometimes it just happens, despite your will.
quotes.author: V.C. Andrews

quotes.quote: The fear of appearances is the first symptom of impotence.
quotes.author: Fyodor Dostoyevsky

quotes.quote: I love you, I thought. But I didn’t say it. It was not that I feared she would laugh in my face. She was far too kind for that. My fear was a greater one— that she won’t say it back.
quotes.author: Alex Flinn

quotes.quote: My goal is to be as forgiving as a man with amnesia, but love as if I remember and cherish all the things you do that make me smile.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You know, life fractures us all into little pieces. It harms us, but it's how we glue those fractures back together that make us stronger.
quotes.author: Carrie Jones

quotes.quote: Memory can make a thing seem to have been much more than it was.
quotes.author: Marilynne Robinson

quotes.quote: The function of freedom is to free someone else.
quotes.author: Toni Morrison

quotes.quote: I'm not sure if there's one right place I'm supposed to be, he said, but I know a couple of wrong places I'd give a second try in a heartbeat.
quotes.author: Brian Andreas

quotes.quote: Every time I close my eyes, it's like a dark paradise. No one compares to you, but there's no you, except in my dreams tonight
quotes.author: Lana Del Rey

quotes.quote: If a company won't hire you, why don't you start your own company? Steve Jobs created jobs, he didn't apply for them. #Startup your dreams.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: After soul searching, I found myself. Then I found myself giving of myself to a charity that finds missing children. It's great to be found.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A happy person is not a person in a certain set of circumstances, but rather a person with a certain set of attitudes.
quotes.author: Hugh Downs

quotes.quote: Mathematics expresses values that reflect the cosmos, including orderliness, balance, harmony, logic, and abstract beauty.
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.quote: I can chase you, and I can catch you, but there is nothing I can do to make you mine.
quotes.author: Morrissey

quotes.quote: If you fear rejection, you won’t embrace acceptance. But don’t push yourself onto others, because they won’t pull you close.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: She cuts me deep with her words, with her withholding of words, and with her knife. I’m not sure which is the most painful.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When the world is cold, use bridges for firewood. And for extra warmth, give off an aura of love, and you won't need a bridge, because the other side will come to you.-Amanda Mosher and Jarod Kintz
quotes.author: Amanda Mosher

quotes.quote: A man, though wise, should never be ashamed of learning more, and must unbend his mind.
quotes.author: Sophocles

quotes.quote: The universe is made of stories, not of atoms.
quotes.author: Muriel Rukeyser

quotes.quote: None of us will ever accomplish anything excellent or commanding except when he listens to this whisper which is heard by him alone.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: Do not think of knocking out another person's brains because he differs in opinion from you. It would be as rational to knock yourself on the head because you differ from yourself ten years ago.
quotes.author: Horace Mann

quotes.quote: The Sacred and The Scared. Which of these two categories does your love fall under? I should write a love poem on a rolled-up scroll so you’d know which one categorizes mine.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Silence is argument carried out by other means.
quotes.author: Ernesto Che Guevara

quotes.quote: The way I define happiness is being the creator of your experience, choosing to take pleasure in what you have, right now, regardless of the circumstances, while being the best you that you can be.
quotes.author: Leo Babauta

quotes.quote: To get people to notice you, you must be unique. If I were invisible, everybody would see me for who I am as a person.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Gold is liquid sunlight frozen in time, and that’s why I love the way ice melts in vodka. I also love the way ice melts in vodka. I’ll have another shot, if you’ll reload the revolver.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If you want the best the world has to offer, offer the world your best.
quotes.author: Neale Donald Walsch

quotes.quote: When we are most alone is when we embrace another's loneliness.
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: In these times I don't, in a manner of speaking, know what I want; perhaps I don't want what I know and want what I don't know.
quotes.author: Marsilio Ficino

quotes.quote: You are always free to change your mind and choose a different future, or a different past.
quotes.author: Richard Bach

quotes.quote: My greatest desire is that the hope that has overcome fear in my country will help vanquish it around the world.
quotes.author: Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva

quotes.quote: He said he wanted to trade lives with me, saying he wanted what I have. He must want for nothing, because that’s exactly what I have.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Be memorable. Say something unforgettable. Be silent.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I can sell you wine and I can sell you flowers, but I can't sell you romance, because that comes from your heart, and it's free.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If you don't think you need to develop your personal brand, my advice for you comes in the wisdom of two road signs: STOP; DEAD END.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A love story in six words: Hello. Goodbye. In between was marriage.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Patience is so valuable I'm willing to wait forever to achieve it. And while I wait, I may as well get busy being short-tempered.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Some men have actually died from laughing. That's so funny I fear for my own life.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Poor is the man who thinks money makes him wealthy. Love is the true treasure, and the more you give away, the more you have.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The true mystery of the world is the visible, not the invisible.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: I was lost yesterday, I am found today and I will be forgotten tomorrow.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: When she tried to seduce me, I got suspicious, thinking she was just after my massive fortune. Then I relaxed, when I remembered I'm poor.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Every day I’m growing as a man. I’m not growing in height, but rather I’m growing in love, which makes me seem taller than I really am.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The most powerful relationship you will ever have is the relationship with yourself.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Every day I type out my dream scribbles from the night before, looking for treasure buried deep in my subconscious.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If you don’t like the road you’re walking, start paving another one.
quotes.author: Dolly Parton

quotes.quote: I used to gorge on gorgeous women, but now I look for things that can’t be seen with the eyes, but are only detected by the heart. This is love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To wait on love is to tie a weight on your heart and slowly drown. Why sink when you can fly by freely giving love away?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: She’s ignoring my texts. Maybe she’s dead. Oh, I certainly hope so. I’d hate to think she’s being deliberately unresponsive.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: People don't care what I wear or don't wear, and even if I don't wear anything people will cover for me if they know that I care about them.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You can use your mouth to speak the words I love you, or you can use your mouth to kiss me and transport love from your mind to my heart.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I feel like a big faker because I've been putting my life back together, and nobody knows.
quotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

quotes.quote: Only a fool tells people that only fools buy gold. In the coming future, I’d rather have fool’s gold than dollar bills. Ask Zimbabwe.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My sole possession is my passion, for no one can rob me of it. More fiery than love, it does not depend on another to blaze.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Logos on designer clothes don't make me feel like I've got a strong personal brand. No clothes make the man. Even wearing no clothes I'm still me.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My coffee cup is empty. Why don't you pour your love in and wake up my soul?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Love is a process, either growing or shrinking, but never stagnant. My love for you was David, and now it is Goliath. Also, my love for you was Goliath, and now it is David.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When you find yourself in hot water, what else can you do but make a spot of tea? I still have a spot of tea on my shirt from yesterday.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Her love is more aww than awe, and even if were awesome, I want aweall, not merely some awe. I’m greedy for the amazing.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: If fate doesn't make you laugh, you just don't get the joke.
quotes.author: Gregory David Roberts

quotes.quote: Skies are crying, I am watching, Catching teardrops in my hands. Only silence, as it's ending, Like we never had a chance. Do you have to make me feelLike there's nothing left of me?
quotes.author: Demi Lovato

quotes.quote: The great secret of true success, of true happiness, is this: the man or woman who asks for no return, the perfectly unselfish person, is the most successful.
quotes.author: Swami Vivekananda

quotes.quote: No matter how much you love someone, you still want to have you own way.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: If people reach perfection they vanish, you know.

quotes.quote: Life is a moderately good play with a badly written third act.

quotes.quote: Keep a little fire burning; however small, however hidden.

quotes.quote: LearningTo believe you are magnificent. And gradually to discover that you are not magnificent. Enough labor for one human life.

quotes.quote: Don't look to the approval of others for your mental stability

quotes.quote: The behavior of a human being in sexual matters is often a prototype for the whole of his other modes of reaction in life.

quotes.quote: I have stitched life into me like a rare organ

quotes.quote: Argue not concerning God,…re-examine all that you have been told at church or school or in any book, dismiss whatever insults your soul…

quotes.quote: I don't know how I look, but I know how I feel: Young. Goofy. Infinite.

quotes.quote: I close my eyes and I can see a better day. I close my eyes and pray

quotes.quote: Hope is the last thing a person does before they are defeated.

quotes.quote: I sent my Soul through the Invisible, Some letter of that After-life to spell: And by and by my Soul return'd to me, And answer'd: 'I Myself am Heav'n and Hell

quotes.quote: Stand out from the crowd, be yourself.

quotes.quote: She's beautiful, but so what? If the University of Florida taught me anything, it's that beautiful women are everywhere. The trick is to find the diamond among all the glittering cubic zirconias.

quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: A photographer is like a cod, which produces a million eggs in order that one may reach maturity.

quotes.quote: A tiny change today brings a dramatically different tomorrow.
quotes.author: Richard Bach

quotes.quote: We are what we believe we are!
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.quote: Some say life is the thing, but I prefer reading.
quotes.author: Ruth Rendell

quotes.quote: How can I be substantial if I do not cast a shadow? I must have a dark side also If I am to be whole
quotes.author: C.G. Jung

quotes.quote: Your greatest self has been waiting your whole life; don't make it wait any longer.

quotes.quote: You rely too much on brain. The brain is the most overrated organ.

quotes.quote: Truth does not become more true by virtue of the fact that the entire world agrees with it, nor less so even if the whole world disagrees with it.

quotes.quote: Status quo, you know, is Latin for 'the mess we're in'.

quotes.quote: Begin, be bold, and venture to be wise.

quotes.quote: Chase your dreams until you catch them...and then dream, catch, and dream again!

quotes.quote: Happy people produce. Bored people consume.

quotes.quote: The life you have left is a gift. Cherish it. Enjoy it now, to the fullest. Do what matters, now.

quotes.quote: In wisdom gathered over time I have found that every experience is a form of exploration.

quotes.quote: Oh, for the years I have not lived, but only dreamed of living.
quotes.author: Nathaniel Hawthorne

quotes.quote: I want him to love me as much as I love him.
quotes.author: L.J. Smith

quotes.quote: Don't blow off another's candle for it won't make yours shine brighter.

quotes.quote: They say you fear what you don't understand. Maybe that's why every time I'm in South Florida, and I hear someone talking in Spanish, I always shit my pants.

quotes.quote: I never particularly thought of myself as great with girls. I can be awkward, and I have a strange sense of humor at times. But I've also been learning to try and embrace that.

quotes.quote: There are no second chances in life, except to feel remorse.

quotes.quote: I am a person who is unhappy with things as they stand. We cannot accept the world as it is. Each day we should wake up foaming at the mouth because of the injustice of things.
quotes.author: Hugo Claus

quotes.quote: That is the hardest thing of all. It is much harder to judge yourself than to judge others. If you succeed in judging yourself, it's because you're truly a wise man.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: Most people die with their music still locked up inside them.

quotes.quote: Learn everything you can, anytime you can, from anyone you can, there will always come a time when you will be grateful you did.

quotes.quote: It is harder to crack prejudice than an atom.

quotes.quote: Our way of thinking creates good or bad outcomes.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Bodily exercise, when compulsory, does no harm to the body; but knowledge which is acquired under compulsion obtains no hold on the mind.

quotes.quote: When you lost sight of your path, listen for the destination in your heart (Allen Walker, D-gray Man)

quotes.quote: The best way to become acquainted with a subject is to write about it.

quotes.quote: The world is wide, and I will not waste my life in friction when it could be turned into momentum.

quotes.quote: Whatever happens to your body, your soul will survive, untouched...

quotes.quote: Everything you want is on the other side of fear.
quotes.author: Jack Canfield

quotes.quote: I used to believe that people are only born once, but now I feel I have been reborn, like I was given a new life. I see myself as a child, full of energy and hope.

quotes.quote: What keeps life fascinating is the constant creativity of the soul.
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.quote: There is no such thing as a child who hates to read; there are only children who have not found the right book.

quotes.quote: What the mind can conceive and believe, and the heart desire, you can achieve.

quotes.quote: The temptation of the age is to look good without being good.
quotes.author: Brennan Manning

quotes.quote: If there be light, then there is darkness; if cold, heat; if height, depth; if solid, fluid; if hard, soft; if rough, smooth; if calm, tempest; if prosperity, adversity; if life, death.

quotes.quote: It's failure that gives you the proper perspective on success.

quotes.quote: All those who try to unveil the mysteries always have tragic lives. At the end they are always punished.

quotes.quote: It's amazing how quickly nature consumes human places after we turn our backs on them. Life is a hungry thing.

quotes.quote: What kind of life can you have in a house without books?

quotes.quote: You are a cosmic flower. Om chanting is the process of opening the psychic petals of that flower.

quotes.quote: I realized it for the first time in my life: there is nothing but mystery in the world, how it hides behind the fabric of our poor, browbeat days, shining brightly, and we don't even know it.

quotes.quote: Undisturbed calmness of mind is attained by cultivating friendliness toward the happy, compassion for the unhappy, delight in the virtuous, and indifference toward the wicked.

quotes.quote: Everything you'll ever need to know is within you; the secrets of the universe are imprinted on the cells of your body.

quotes.quote: You don't have to make something that people call art. Living is an artistic activity, there is an art to getting through the day.

quotes.quote: My eyes were glued on lifeand they were full of tears.

quotes.quote: Those who have failed to work toward the truth have missed the purpose of living.

quotes.quote: The spiritual life does not remove us from the world but leads us deeper into it
quotes.author: Henri J.M. Nouwen

quotes.quote: I want you. I want you so badly I can’t stand it. When you left, it felt like the world got darker. Like I couldn’t truly see anything. Couldn’t feel anything.

quotes.quote: Something amazing happens when you're in love and don't give a damn about what day it is anymore.
quotes.author: Chad Sugg

quotes.quote: The heart makes its choices without weighing the consequences. It doesn't look ahead to the lonely nights that follow.
quotes.author: Tess Gerritsen

quotes.quote: Action springs not from thought, but from a readiness for responsibility.

quotes.quote: Sometimes when you least expect it, the tables turn and that scary feeling that has taken hold of you for so long somehow turns into hope
quotes.author: David Archuleta

quotes.quote: Collect books, even if you don't plan on reading them right away. Nothing is more important than an unread library.
quotes.author: John Waters

quotes.quote: I can't change the direction of the wind, but I can adjust my sails to always reach my destination.

quotes.quote: When someone you love says goodbye you can stare long and hard at the door they closed and forget to see all the doors God has open in front of you.

quotes.quote: I want a tattoo over my heart that reads TRY HARDER YOU LAZY PARAMEDIC SHITBAG OR I WILL HAUNT YOUR BEDROOM FOREVER

quotes.quote: Beauty is the purest feeling of the soul. Beauty arises when soul is satisfied.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Even in the mud and scum of things, something always, always sings.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: If you’re in the luckiest one per cent of humanity, you owe it to the rest of humanity to think about the other 99 per cent.
quotes.author: Warren Buffett

quotes.quote: Everybody's damaged by something.
quotes.author: Emma Donoghue

quotes.quote: Nostalgia in reverse, the longing for yet another strange land, grew especially strong in spring.
quotes.author: Vladimir Nabokov

quotes.quote: It takes guts to love with gusto. Most people love as if they wish they were invisible, and then they wonder why their affections go unnoticed.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Besides the noble art of getting things done, there is the noble art of leaving things undone. The wisdom of life consists in the elimination of non-essentials.

quotes.quote: Every person has a right to risk their own life for the preservation of it.

quotes.quote: Nobody gets praised for the right reasons.
quotes.author: Diana Wynne Jones

quotes.quote: We have no right to express an opinion until we know all of the answers.
quotes.author: Kurt Cobain

quotes.quote: The biggest changes in a women's nature are brought by love; in man, by ambition
quotes.author: Rabindranath Tagore

quotes.quote: Pity me that the heart is slow to learnWhat the swift mind beholds at every turn.
quotes.author: Edna St. Vincent Millay

quotes.quote: If you want to be proud of yourself, then do things in which you can take pride
quotes.author: Karen Horney

quotes.quote: Everyone is lonely, we have to remember that life is to be lived one day at a time. You cannot worry about the past or future. Happiness is in the now.

quotes.quote: The heart may freeze, or it can burn. The pain will ease and I can learn. There is no future, there is no past. I live this moment as, my last.

quotes.quote: Sometimes it's the same moments that take your breath away that breathe purpose and love back into your life.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Apparently I’m transparent—with my feelings, not with my body. I’m an emotional ghost, and if you can’t see my love for you it’s because it’s dead.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Forgiveness is God's greatest gift
quotes.author: Dan Brown

quotes.quote: Heaven is comfort, but it's still not living.
quotes.author: Alice Sebold

quotes.quote: All should be laid open to you without reserve, for there is not a truth existing which I fear, or would wish unknown to the whole world.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.quote: Faith moves mountains, love transforms hearts.
quotes.author: John Paul Warren

quotes.quote: The face is a picture of the mind with the eyes as its interpreter.
quotes.author: Marcus Tullius Cicero

quotes.quote: What we like to think of ourselves and what we really are rarely have much in common....
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: It’s not so much the journey that’s important; as is the way that we treat those we encounter and those around us, along the way
quotes.author: Jeremy Aldana

quotes.quote: Find someone who has a life that you want and figure out how they got it. Read books, pick your role models wisely. Find out what they did and do it.
quotes.author: Lana Del Rey

quotes.quote: Never compromise your values.

quotes.quote: We have to pray with our eyes on God, not on the difficulties.

quotes.quote: Wherever you are, however you got there, if it's good, you're meant to be there either because you earned it or life led you there and you were smart enough to hold on.

quotes.quote: To serve is beautiful, but only if it is done with joy and a whole heart and a free mind.

quotes.quote: A man devoid of hope and conscious of being so has ceased to belong to the future.

quotes.quote: Unless there is a Good Friday in your life, there can be no Easter Sunday.

quotes.quote: Outer beauty pleases the EYE. Inner beauty captivates the HEART.

quotes.quote: Action and reaction, ebb and flow, trial and error, change - this is the rhythm of living. Out of our over-confidence, fear; out of our fear, clearer vision, fresh hope. And out of hope, progress.

quotes.quote: If you want small changes in your life, work on your attitude. But if you want big and primary changes, work on your paradigm.

quotes.quote: I argue thee that love is life. And life hath immortality.

quotes.quote: Whoever said that the past isn't dead had it backward. It's the future that's already dead, already played out.

quotes.quote: I began to understand that suffering and disappointments and melancholy are there not to vex us or cheapen us or deprive us of our dignity but to mature and transfigure us.

quotes.quote: Quietly endure, silently suffer and patiently wait.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Lottery: A tax on people who are bad at math.

quotes.quote: I cannot trust a man to control others who cannot control himself.

quotes.quote: No name-calling truly bites deep unless, in some dark part of us, we believe it. If we are confident enough then it is just noise.

quotes.quote: That's the secret to life... replace one worry with another....

quotes.quote: I am terrified by this dark thingThat sleeps in me;All day I feel its soft, feathery turnings, its malignity.

quotes.quote: Control Your Own Destiny or Someone Else Will
quotes.author: Jack Welch

quotes.quote: Why not just live in the moment, especially if it has a good beat?

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night... you were a giant slinky and I watched you fall down the stairs.

quotes.quote: Most don't deserve your tears... and the ones that do will never make you cry.

quotes.quote: Although I am a typical loner in my daily life, my awareness of belonging to the invisible community of those who strive for truth, beauty, and justice has prevented me from feelings of isolation.

quotes.quote: If you fuel your journey on the opinions of others, you are going to run out of gas.

quotes.quote: Got no checkbooks, got no banks. Still I'd like to express my thanks - I've got the sun in the mornin' and the moon at night.

quotes.quote: People don't always want to be with people. It gets tiring.

quotes.quote: But what is life if you don't live it?
quotes.author: James Patterson

quotes.quote: It was rather beautiful: the way he put her insecurities to sleep. The way he dove into her eyes and starved all the fears and tasted all the dreams she kept coiled beneath her bones.

quotes.quote: It's not always easy being her daughter.' I think,' she said, 'sometimes it's hard no matter whose daughter you are.

quotes.quote: The reason why the universe is eternal is that it does not live for itself; it gives life to others as it transforms.

quotes.quote: Avoid loud and aggressive persons, they are vexations to the spirit.
quotes.author: Max Ehrmann

quotes.quote: If it can be destroyed by the truth, it deserves to be destroyed by the truth.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.quote: We may have all come on different ships, but we're in the same boat now.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Ink runs from the corners of my mouth. There is no happiness like mine. I have been eating poetry.

quotes.quote: Only those who look with the eyes of children can lose themselves in the object of their wonder.

quotes.quote: Real life? Well, I just hope mine isn't investigated. They might find that I don't really exist - that I'm just a hologram.

quotes.quote: It doesn't matter who you are, or where you come from, or how much money you've got in your pocket. You have your own destiny and your own life ahead of you.

quotes.quote: Sometimes letting go is simply changing the labels you place on an event. Looking at the same event with fresh eyes.

quotes.quote: Each new day is a blank page in the diary of your life. The secret of success is in turning that diary into the best story you possibly can.

quotes.quote: Love yourself. Forgive yourself. Be true to yourself. How you treat yourself sets the standard for how others will treat you.

quotes.quote: Don't chase people. Be yourself, do your own thing and work hard. The right people - the ones who really belong in your life - will come to your. And stay.

quotes.quote: To wish was to hope, and to hope was to expect

quotes.quote: There is no thing as a single-issue struggle because we do not live single-issue lives.
quotes.author: Audre Lorde

quotes.quote: Tried living in the real world instead of a shell, but I was bored before I even began.

quotes.quote: Every adversity, every failure, every heartache carries with it the seed of an equal or greater benefit.

quotes.quote: Improvement makes strait roads, but the crooked roads without Improvement, are roads of Genius.

quotes.quote: I liked being a person. I wanted to keep at it.

quotes.quote: What would you attempt to do if you knew you could not fail?
quotes.author: Robert H. Schuller

quotes.quote: As the smoke clears, I awaken, And untangle you from me. Would it make you feel betterTo watch me, while I bleed?All my windows still are broken, But I'm standing on my feet.

quotes.quote: I'll never wake up in a good mood again. I'm tired of these stinky boots
quotes.author: Jim Morrison

quotes.quote: Ignorance is the parent of fear.

quotes.quote: A process cannot be understood by stopping it. Understanding must move with the flow of the process, must join it and flow with it.

quotes.quote: There are two typos of people in this world: those who can edit, and those who can't.

quotes.quote: Do nothing, and nothing happens. Life is about decisions. You either make them or they're made for you, but you can't avoid them.
