quotes.quote: Vital lives are about action. You can't feel warmth unless you create it, can't feel delight until you play, can't know serendipity unless you risk.
quotes.author: Joan Erickson

quotes.quote: I didnt pay atteniton to times or distance, instead focusing on how it felt just to be in motion, knowing it wasn't about the finish line but how I got there that mattered.
quotes.author: Sarah Dessen

quotes.quote: Next to trying and winning, the best thing is trying and failing.
quotes.author: L.M. Montgomery

quotes.quote: Anne was always glad in the happiness of her friends; but it is sometimes a little lonely to be surrounded everywhere by happiness that is not your own.
quotes.author: L.M. Montgomery

quotes.quote: Keep good company, read good books, love good things and cultivate soul and body as faithfully as you can
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: You know my name, not my story. You've heard what I've done, but not what I've been through.
quotes.author: Jonathan Anthony Burkett

quotes.quote: I love deeply. I love long. I love wide and high. That's right, my love is interdimensional, and my vortex will heal your body and soul.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Dance above the surface of the world. Let your thoughts lift you into creativity that is not hampered by opinion.
quotes.author: Red Haircrow

quotes.quote: I don’t see myself being special; I just see myself having more responsibilities than the next man. People look to me to do things for them, to have answers.
quotes.author: Tupac Shakur

quotes.quote: It is the useless things that make life worth living and that make life dangerous too: wine, love, art, beauty. Without them life is safe, but not worth bothering with.
quotes.author: Stephen Fry

quotes.quote: Whether we like it or not, the one justification for the existence of all religions is death, they need death as much as we need bread to eat.
quotes.author: José Saramago

quotes.quote: Learning is an ornament in prosperity, a refuge in adversity, and a provision in old age.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: You'll forget it when you're dead, and so will I. When I'm dead, I'm going to forget everything–and I advise you to do the same.
quotes.author: Kurt Vonnegut

quotes.quote: The treacherous are ever distrustful.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: There isa time to liveand a time to diebut never to reject the moment.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: Fear can only grow in darkness. Once you face fear with light, you win.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I don’t think man was meant to attain happiness so easily. Happiness is like those palaces in fairy tales whose gates are guarded by dragons: we must fight in order to conquer it.
quotes.author: Alexandre Dumas

quotes.quote: To live only for some future goal is shallow. It's the sides of the mountain that sustain life, not the top.
quotes.author: Robert M. Pirsig

quotes.quote: The only things you learn are the things you tame
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.quote: You will never gain anyone's approval by begging for it. When you stand confident in your own worth, respect follows.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: When I lost her I gained the future, because she was my past, and she freed me to become who I was born to be.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Spend the afternoon, you can't take it with you.
quotes.author: Annie Dillard

quotes.quote: The sunset sky fades from blue to orange over Gainesville, Florida, and what I lost is less than what I gained. I gained love, I lost love, and if could do it all again, I would.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: People who say that yesterday was better than today are ultimately devaluing their own existence.
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: I believe the way to master my destiny is to serve others. If I raise up others, am I not also raised up?
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: All the time you're saying to yourself, 'I could do that, but I won't,' — which is just another way of saying that you can't.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.quote: Meditation is a way for nourishing and blossoming the divinity within you.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: The future was one thing that could never be broken, because it had not yet had the chance to be anything.
quotes.author: Sarah Dessen

quotes.quote: The lesson will always repeat itself, unless you see yourself as the problem--not others.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: You'll never reach perfection because there's always room for improvement. Yet get along the way to perfection, you'll learn to get better.
quotes.author: Hlovate

quotes.quote: Why do I do anything?' she says. 'I'm educated enough to talk myself out of any plan. To deconstruct any fantasy. Explain away any goal. I'm so smart I can negate any dream.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: A man will be imprisoned in a room with a door that's unlocked and opens inwards; as long as it does not occur to him to pull rather than push.
quotes.author: Ludwig Wittgenstein

quotes.quote: There is no greater insight into the future than recognizing...when we save our children, we save ourselves
quotes.author: Margaret Mead

quotes.quote: One more dance along the razor's edge finished. Almost dead yesterday, maybe dead tomorrow, but alive, gloriously alive, today.
quotes.author: Robert Jordan

quotes.quote: If the stars should appear but one night every thousand years how man would marvel and adore.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: My only regrets are the moments when i doubted myself and took the safe route. Life is too short to waste time being unhappy.
quotes.author: Dan Howell

quotes.quote: Be happy in the moment, that's enough. Each moment is all we need, not more.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Do not sabotage your new relationship with your last relationship’s poison.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Bad times have a scientific value. These are occasions a good learner would not miss.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: What made me run away was doubtless not so much the fear of settling down, but of settling down permanently in something ugly.
quotes.author: Albert Camus

quotes.quote: There's a sorrow and pain in everyone's life, but every now and then there's a ray of light that melts the loneliness in your heart and brings comfort like hot soup and a soft bed.
quotes.author: Hubert Selby Jr.

quotes.quote: Ten long trips around the sun since I last saw that smile, but only joy and thankfulness that on a tiny world in the vastness, for a couple of moments in the immensity of time, we were one.
quotes.author: Ann Druyan

quotes.quote: Our lives were just beginning, our favorite moment was right now, our favorite songs were unwritten.
quotes.author: Rob Sheffield

quotes.quote: Laugh, and the world laughs with you;Weep, and you weep alone;For the sad old earth must borrow its mirth, But has trouble enough of its own.
quotes.author: Ella Wheeler Wilcox

quotes.quote: A true friend is one who overlooks your failures and tolerates your success!
quotes.author: Doug Larson

quotes.quote: I hope our wisdom will grow with our power, and teach us, that the less we use our power the greater it will be.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.quote: I haven't measured it, but I'll bet cat purrs vibrate at a healing frequency. Also, a whispered I love you almost certainly resonates with heart and DNA repair.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Life sucks, and then you die. Yeah, I should be so lucky.
quotes.author: Stephenie Meyer

quotes.quote: The ability to discipline yourself to delay gratification in the short term in order to enjoy greater rewards in the long term, is the indispensable prerequisite for success.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Freedom is the only worthy goal in life. It is won by disregarding things that lie beyond our control.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: I wanted to see the place where Margaret grew to what she is, even at the worst time of all, when I had no hope of ever calling her mine...
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gaskell

quotes.quote: Even a happy life cannot be without a measure of darkness, and the word happy would lose its meaning if it were not balanced by sadness.
quotes.author: C.G. Jung

quotes.quote: Before I can tell my life what I want to do with it, I must listen to my life telling me who I am.
quotes.author: Parker J. Palmer

quotes.quote: The road to enlightenment is long and difficult, and you should try not to forget snacks and magazines.
quotes.author: Anne Lamott

quotes.quote: Maybe it just means that love can be stronger than fear.
quotes.author: L.J. Smith

quotes.quote: The dictionary is the only place that success comes before work. work is the key to success, and hard work can help you accomplish anything.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi Jr.

quotes.quote: How you react emotionally is a choice in any situation.
quotes.author: Judith Orloff

quotes.quote: So since I'm still here livin', I guess I will live on. I could've died for love--But for livin' I was born.
quotes.author: Langston Hughes

quotes.quote: Love doesn't make the world go 'round; love is what makes the ride worthwhile.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: There are not enough days in forever to allow me to fully express the depth of my love for you.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: And all the lives we ever lived and all the lives to be are full of treesand changing leaves.
quotes.author: Virginia Woolf

quotes.quote: Come clean with a child heartLaugh as peaches in the summer windLet rain on a house roof be a songLet the writing on your facebe a smell of apple orchards on late June.
quotes.author: Carl Sandburg

quotes.quote: But what if Shakespeare― and Hamlet― were asking the wrong question? What if the real question is not whether to be, but how to be?
quotes.author: Gayle Forman

quotes.quote: It’s always about timing. If it’s too soon, no one understands. If it’s too late, everyone’s forgotten.
quotes.author: Anna Wintour

quotes.quote: She said she loved me, and I believed her, because she was looking directly at another man when she said it.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: When life doesn't meet your expectations, it was important to take it with grace.
quotes.author: Patricia Briggs

quotes.quote: Go on, get out! Last words are for fools who haven't said enough!
quotes.author: Karl Marx

quotes.quote: Sometimes a little discomfort in the beginning can save a whole lot of pain down the road.
quotes.author: Wendelin Van Draanen

quotes.quote: If a person holds no ambitions in this world, he suffers unknowingly. If a person holds ambitions, he suffers knowingly, but very slowly.
quotes.author: Alan Lightman

quotes.quote: I believe we can accelerate our acumen, performance and success by leveraging our associations and spending time with people better than us.
quotes.author: Robin S. Sharma

quotes.quote: It may be true that the law cannot make a man love me, but it can stop him from lynching me, and I think that's pretty important.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: But instead of spending our lives running towards our dreams, we are often running away from a fear of failure or a fear of criticism.
quotes.author: Eric Wright

quotes.quote: Be a true Heart, not a follower.
quotes.author: Ed Sheeran

quotes.quote: There had been times when he knew, somewhere in him, that he would get used to it, whatever it was, because he had learnt that some hard things became softer after a very little while.
quotes.author: Nick Hornby

quotes.quote: Don't wish it was easier wish you were better. Don't wish for less problems wish for more skills. Don't wish for less challenge wish for more wisdom
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.quote: I love classic beauty. It’s an idea of beauty with no standard.
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: Obligasyon kong maglayag, karapatan kong pumunta sa kung saan ko gusto, responsibilidad ko ang buhay ko.
quotes.author: Bob Ong

quotes.quote: For those who know the value of and exquisite taste of solitary freedom (for one is only free when alone), the act of leaving is the bravest and most beautiful of all.
quotes.author: Isabelle Eberhardt

quotes.quote: Yesterday I was sad, today I am happy! Yesterday I had a problem, today I still have the same problem! But today I changed the way I look at it!
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: When your back is to the wall and you are facing fear head on, the only way is forward and through it.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: To this day, I can never shake the connection between this boy, Peeta Mellark, and the bread that gave me hope, and the dandelion that reminded me that I was not doomed.
quotes.author: Suzanne Collins

quotes.quote: No matter whether you believe in luck or chance, the final decision is from yourself.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Poor creatures. What did we do to you? With all our schemes and plans?
quotes.author: Kazuo Ishiguro

quotes.quote: The future is meant for those who are willing to let go of the worst parts of the past. When you cannot take two steps without turning around to inspect your footsteps, you are getting nowhere fast.
quotes.author: Corey Taylor

quotes.quote: The people I distrust most are those who want to improve our lives but have only one course of action.
quotes.author: Frank Herbert

quotes.quote: No matter what your history has been, your destiny is what you create today. What are you going to create?
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: How would your life be different if…You stopped validating your victim mentality? Let today be the day…You shake off your self-defeating drama and embrace your innate ability to recover and achieve.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: In definitiv, cu cat vei ridica un zid mai inalt in jurul tau cu atat va fi mai bun cel care-l va sari.
quotes.author: Tudor Chirilă

quotes.quote: Of life's two chief prizes, beauty and truth, I found the first in a loving heart and the second in a laborer's hand.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: People have hope because they cannot see Death standing behind them.
quotes.author: Tite Kubo

quotes.quote: We yearned for the future. How did we learn it, that talent for insatiability?
quotes.author: Margaret Atwood

quotes.quote: The only thing that will ever make me fall in love is: if I fall in love.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: Doubt kills more dreams than failure ever will.
quotes.author: Suzy Kassem

quotes.quote: It's much easier to not know things sometimes. Things change and friends leave. And life doesn't stop for anybody.
quotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

quotes.quote: Life is at its best when everything has fallen out of place, and you decide that you're going to fight to get them right, not when everything is going your way and everyone is praising you.
quotes.author: Thisuri Wanniarachchi

quotes.quote: A lot of the conflict you have in your life exists simply because you're not living in alignment; you're not be being true to yourself.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Don't leave it all unsaid, somewhere in the wasteland of your head.
quotes.author: Morrissey

quotes.quote: The life of every man is a diary in which he means to write one story, and writes another; and his humblest hour is when he compares the volume as it is with what he vowed to make it.
quotes.author: J.M. Barrie

quotes.quote: Do not yearn to be popular; be exquisite. Do not desire to be famous; be loved. Do not take pride in being expected; be palpable, unmistakable.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: Nite Owl II: But the country's disintegrating. What's happened to America? What's happened to the American dream?The Comedian: It came true. You're lookin' at it.
quotes.author: Alan Moore

quotes.quote: Do not be afraid. Do not be satisfied with mediocrity. Put out into the deep and let down your nets for a catch.
quotes.author: Pope John Paul II

quotes.quote: Real courage is doing the right thing when nobody's looking. Doing the unpopular thing because it's what you believe, and the heck with everybody.
quotes.author: Justin Cronin

quotes.quote: If I had a shiny gun I could have a world of fun Speeding bullets through the brains Of the folks that cause me pains :)
quotes.author: Dorothy Parker

quotes.quote: Men are born to succeed, not to fail.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Put your heart, mind, and soul into even your smallest acts. This is the secret of success.
quotes.author: Swami Sivananda

quotes.quote: There's two kinds of women--those you write poems about and those you don't.
quotes.author: Jeffrey McDaniel

quotes.quote: You have the ability to choose your reactions.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Real life is messy, inconsistent, and it's seldom when anything ever really gets resolved. It's taken me a long time to realize that.
quotes.author: Alan Moore

quotes.quote: Until justice rolls down like water and righteousness like a mighty stream.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Let us never negotiate out of fear. But let us never fear to negotiate.[Inaugural Address, January 20 1961]
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: You are evidence of your mother's strength, especially if you are a rebellious knucklehead and regardless she has always maintained her sanity.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Love has no limitations. It cannot be measured. It has no boundaries. Although many have tried, love is indefinable.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: [I]t is well to have as many holds upon happiness as possible.
quotes.author: Jane Austen

quotes.quote: Being a leader is making the people you love hate you a little more each day.
quotes.author: Patrick Ness

quotes.quote: Don't wake me for the end of the world unless it has very good special effects.
quotes.author: Roger Zelazny

quotes.quote: Friendship is like peeing on yourself: everyone can see it, but only you get the warm feeling that it brings.
quotes.author: Robert Bloch

quotes.quote: The only way for you to keep your mind straight is to run from those who would confuse you.
quotes.author: Kristin Cashore

quotes.quote: It's nice to have things to look forward to.
quotes.author: Stephen Chbosky

quotes.quote: Many have died; you also will die. The drum of death is being beaten. The world has fallen in love with a dream. Only sayings of the wise will remain.
quotes.author: Kabir

quotes.quote: Judgment is a negative frequency.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: The way of success is the way of continuous pursuit of knowledge.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: Too late, I found you can't wait to become perfect, you got to go out and fall down and get up with everybody else.
quotes.author: Ray Bradbury

quotes.quote: She wanted to lose herself in him. To tie his arms around her like a tourniquet. If she showed him how much she needed him, he'd run away.
quotes.author: Rainbow Rowell

quotes.quote: Strange, what being forced to slow down could do to a person.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: Live life as though nobody is watching, and express yourself as though everyone is listening.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Thou shalt not be a victim, thou shalt not be a perpetrator, but, above all, thou shalt not be a bystander.
quotes.author: Yehuda Bauer

quotes.quote: The victim mindset dilutes the human potential. By not accepting personal responsibility for our circumstances, we greatly reduce our power to change them.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Books can truly change our lives: the lives of those who read them, the lives of those who write them. Readers and writers alike discover things they never knew about the world and about themselves.
quotes.author: Lloyd Alexander

quotes.quote: Love begins at home, and it is not how much we do... but how much love we put in that action.
quotes.author: Mother Teresa

quotes.quote: Your inner strength is your outer foundation
quotes.author: Allan Rufus

quotes.quote: Love cures people, both the ones who give it and the ones who receive it.
quotes.author: Karl A. Menninger

quotes.quote: We can't undo a single thing we have ever done, but we can make decisions today that propel us to the life we want and towards the healing we need.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: You are never alone. You are eternally connected with everyone.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: People will always have opinions about your decision because they're not courageous enough to take action on their opinion.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Many people say I'm the best women's soccer player in the world. I don't think so. And because of that, someday I just might be.
quotes.author: Mia Hamm

quotes.quote: Now you people have names. That's because you don't know who you are. We know who we are, so we don't need names.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: A bird is safe in its nest - but that is not what its wings are made for.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: When people see some things as beautiful, other things become ugly. When people see some things as good, other things become bad.
quotes.author: Lao Tzu

quotes.quote: What the society thinks is of no interest to me. All that's important is how I see myself. I know who who I am. I know the value of my work.
quotes.author: Robin S. Sharma

quotes.quote: Love was that way. You could not render it in black or white. It always came down to the strange, blended shades of grey.
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: Life is no brief candle to me. It is a sort of splendid torch which I have got a hold of for the moment, and I want to make it burn as brightly as possible before handing it on to future generations.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.quote: I wouldn't have missed a single minute of it, Not for the whole world.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: Regrets are about decisions that you know you should have done different.
quotes.author: Laurell K. Hamilton

quotes.quote: When I look at my old pictures, all I can see is what I used to be but am no longer. I think: What I can see is what I am not.
quotes.author: Aleksandar Hemon

quotes.quote: For your birthday I got you some batteries. They’re dead, just like you’ll soon be.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I'm as cruel as life. As cruel as love.
quotes.author: L.J. Smith

quotes.quote: Hang in there. It is astonishing how short a time it can take for very wonderful things to happen.
quotes.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett

quotes.quote: Nothing is miserable unless you think it so; and on the other hand, nothing brings happiness unless you are content with it.
quotes.author: Boethius

quotes.quote: Me and you, we got more yesterday than anybody. We need some kind of tomorrow.
quotes.author: Toni Morrison

quotes.quote: Every moment has its pleasures and its hope.
quotes.author: Jane Austen

quotes.quote: Live authentically. Why would you continue to compromise something that's beautiful to create something that is fake?
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Know who you are, and be it. Know what you want, and go out and get it!
quotes.author: Carroll Bryant

quotes.quote: I hate when people say 'I see'. It doesn't mean anything and I think it's hostile. Whenever anyone tells me 'I see' I think they're really saying 'Fuck you'.
quotes.author: Peter Cameron

quotes.quote: Courage is the price that life exacts for granting peace.
quotes.author: Amelia Earhart

quotes.quote: Life is boring. People are vengeful. Good things always end. We do so many things and we don’t know why, and if we do find out why, it’s decades later and knowing why doesn’t matter any more.
quotes.author: Douglas Coupland

quotes.quote: You never really know what's coming. A small wave, or maybe a big one. All you can really do is hope that when it comes, you can surf over it, instead of drown in its monstrosity.
quotes.author: Alysha Speer

quotes.quote: If you hear how wonderful you are often enough, you begin to believe it, no matter how you try to resist it.
quotes.author: Ben Carson

quotes.quote: Love is the only thing that we can carry with us when we go, and it makes the end so easy.
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: We're miserable because we think that we are mere individuals, alone with our fears and flaws and resentment and mortality.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: If happy I can be I will, if suffer I must I can.
quotes.author: William Faulkner

quotes.quote: The ‘Muse’ is not an artistic mystery, but a mathematical equation. The gift are those ideas you think of as you drift to sleep. The giver is that one you think of when you first awake.
quotes.author: Roman Payne

quotes.quote: Flowers and fear are a lot alike. For one, flowers and fear have a distinct smell, and two, I’m currently trying to grow both in my garden.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A teacher who loves learning earns the right and the ability to help others learn.
quotes.author: Ruth Beechick

quotes.quote: Single |sin•gle| (adjective) - Too fabulous to settle.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: He who is not everyday conquering some fear has not learned the secret of life.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.quote: You can't have living without dying. So you can't call it living, what we got. We just are, we just be, like rocks beside the road.
quotes.author: Natalie Babbitt

quotes.quote: I always knew, on some level, that I wouldn't live long. It's simply not written in my stars.
quotes.author: Marie Lu

quotes.quote: No matter what happened yesterday it is insignificant when compared to what lies within the core of your being today.
quotes.author: Sandy Brewer

quotes.quote: Capabilities are clearly manifested only when they have been realized.
quotes.author: Simone de Beauvoir

quotes.quote: Do not look for happiness outside yourself. The awakened seek happiness inside.
quotes.author: Peter Deunov

quotes.quote: I want an infinitely blank book and the rest of time......why didn't I learn to treat everything like it was the last time, my greatest regret is how much I believed in the future.
quotes.author: Jonathan Safran Foer

quotes.quote: A very wise man once told me that you can't look back-you just have to put the past behind you, and find something better in your future.
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: I was wasting my time, praying for love. For a love that never comes, from someone who does not exist.
quotes.author: Morrissey

quotes.quote: Success will be within your reach only when you start reaching out for it.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: I'm living a dream I never want to wake up from.
quotes.author: Cristiano Ronaldo

quotes.quote: You will evolve past certain people. Let yourself.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: All our knowledge has its origin in our perceptions
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: We started off trying to set up a small anarchist community, but people wouldn't obey the rules.
quotes.author: Alan Bennett

quotes.quote: All I know is I make sense to me- it's other people who seem complicated.
quotes.author: Tara Kelly

quotes.quote: The life of the enemy . Whoever lives for the sake of combating an enemy has an interest in the enemy's staying alive.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: You are beautiful. Know this. Anyone who tells you otherwise is simply lying. You are beautiful.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: In my deepest wound I saw your glory, and it dazzled me.
quotes.author: Augustine of Hippo

quotes.quote: Returning home is the most difficult part of long-distance hiking; You have grown outside the puzzle and your piece no longer fits.
quotes.author: Cindy Ross

quotes.quote: Sometimes I wish life was written pencil so we could erase it and write it all over again.
quotes.author: Thisuri Wanniarachchi

quotes.quote: The distance between insanity and genius is measured only by success.
quotes.author: Bruce Feirstein

quotes.quote: A man who is intimate with God is not intimidated by man.
quotes.author: Leonard Ravenhill

quotes.quote: People will walk in and walk out of your life, but the one whose footstep made a long lasting impression is the one you should never allow to walk out.
quotes.author: Michael Bassey Johnson

quotes.quote: The stars up close to the moon were pale; they got brighter and braver the farther they got out of the circle of light ruled by the giant moon
quotes.author: Ken Kesey

quotes.quote: Change your thoughts and you change your world.
quotes.author: Norman Vincent Peale

quotes.quote: Let the beauty of what you love be what you do.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: Humor's always been the problem of my work, hasn't it? When working, I feel satisfied when I surprise myself. And when I surprise myself, I wind up laughing.
quotes.author: Kara Walker

quotes.quote: The young always have the same problem - how to rebel and conform at the same time. They have now solved this by defying their parents and copying one another.
quotes.author: Quentin Crisp

quotes.quote: In life, there are no mistakes, only lessons.
quotes.author: Vic Johnson

quotes.quote: You can't just wish change; you have to live the change in order for it to become a reality.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: To be heroic is to be courageous enough to die for something; to be inspirational is to be crazy enough to live a little.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Even as your body betrays you, your mind denies it.
quotes.author: Sara Gruen

quotes.quote: To live greatly, we must develop the capacity to face trouble with courage, disappointment with cheerfulness, and triumph with humility.
quotes.author: Thomas S. Monson

quotes.quote: Believe me, It would be better if we didn't meet again. Go back to school. Go back to your life. And next time they ask you, say no. Killing is for grown-ups and you're still a child.
quotes.author: Anthony Horowitz

quotes.quote: If you feel far from God, guess who moved?
quotes.author: Robin Jones Gunn

quotes.quote: We all have same beginning (BIRTH), and we will have same ending (DEATH). So how different can we be?
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: Every beginning has an end and every end is a new beginning.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: To ugly ducklings everywhere, Don't worry about those fluffy yellow morons:They'll never get to be swans
quotes.author: Zoë Marriott

quotes.quote: Never knew what a friendship was, Never knew how to really love, You can't be what I need you to, & I don't know why I fuck with you
quotes.author: Erykah Badu

quotes.quote: I realized then that even though I was a tiny speck in an infinite cosmos, a blip on the timeline of eternity, I was not without purpose.
quotes.author: R.J. Anderson

quotes.quote: This is love, I think. A place where people who have been alone may lock together like hawks and spin in the air, dizzy with surprise at the connection. A place you go willingly, and with wonder
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: Decide what you want to be....Pay the Price ...And be what you want to be.
quotes.author: John Andreas Widtsoe

quotes.quote: Were knowledge all, what were our needTo thrill and faint and sweetly bleed?
quotes.author: Christopher Brennan

quotes.quote: I had spent my whole life feeling homesick. The only difference between the two of us was that I didn't know what or where home was.
quotes.author: Marian Keyes

quotes.quote: Stop giving your life away to other people.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: We all can be only who we are, no more, no less.
quotes.author: Terry Goodkind

quotes.quote: Happiness can only be achieved by looking inward & learning to enjoy whatever life has and this requires transforming greed into gratitude.
quotes.author: John Chrysostom

quotes.quote: I'm a happy person. If you want to be around me, you can either choose to be happy too, or follow the signs to the nearest exit!
quotes.author: Sharon Swan

quotes.quote: I plead with you--never, ever give up on hope, never doubt, never tire, and never become discouraged. Be not afraid.
quotes.author: Pope John Paul II

quotes.quote: Often romantic relationships fail because you are trying to get someone to fall in love with the YOU that you never discovered.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: Her happiness floated like waves of ocean along the coast of her life. She found lyrics of her life in his arms but she never sung her song.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Don’t worry if people think you’re crazy. You are crazy. You have that kind of intoxicating insanity that lets other people dream outside of the lines and become who they’re destined to be.
quotes.author: Jennifer Elisabeth

quotes.quote: This is the strangest life I have ever known.
quotes.author: Jim Morrison

quotes.quote: You can't go home again
quotes.author: Thomas Wolfe

quotes.quote: Friends can make you feel that the world is smaller and less sneaky than it really is, because you know people who have similar experiences.
quotes.author: Lemony Snicket

quotes.quote: Some of us walk around with a necklace of hope, an armour of sanity, but at the end of the day, they always come off. We reveal our naked, vulnerable, real selves.
quotes.author: Karen Quan

quotes.quote: We need not take refuge in supernatural gods to explain our saints and sages and heroes and statesmen, as if to explain our disbelief that mere unaided human beings could be that good or wise.
quotes.author: Abraham Maslow

quotes.quote: Death is the easy part, the hard part is living and knowing you could be so much more then you’re willing to be.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: When we fail to set boundaries and hold people accountable, we feel used and mistreated. This is why we sometimes attack who they are, which is far more hurtful than addressing a behavior or a choice.
quotes.author: Brené Brown

quotes.quote: Every single time you help somebody stand up you are helping humanity rise.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Don't give up! It's not over. The universe is balanced. Every set-back bears with it the seeds of a come-back.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: We shouldn't live as if [other worlds] mattered more than this life in this world, because where we are is always the most important place.
quotes.author: Philip Pullman

quotes.quote: Money is better than poverty, if only for financial reasons.
quotes.author: Woody Allen

quotes.quote: And now I am here, as alone as I've ever been. I am seventeen years old. This is not how it's suppose to be. This is not how my life is suppose to turn out.
quotes.author: Gayle Forman

quotes.quote: There is something incredibly nostalgic and significant about the annual cascade of autumn leaves.
quotes.author: Joe L. Wheeler

quotes.quote: Things don't always work out the way we hope. You just have to pick yourself up and find a new direction to go in.
quotes.author: Joelle Charbonneau

quotes.quote: God helps those who strut their stuff.
quotes.author: Dan Sofer

quotes.quote: Your life is a print-out of your thoughts.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Who but the mad would choose to keep on living? In the end, aren't we all just a little crazy?
quotes.author: Libba Bray

quotes.quote: We carry within us the wonders we seek without us.
quotes.author: Thomas Browne

quotes.quote: Life is a sexually transmitted disease and the mortality rate is one hundred percent.
quotes.author: R.D. Laing

quotes.quote: All paradises, all utopias are designed by who is not there, by the people who are not allowed in.[Conversation with Elizabeth Farnsworth, PBS NewsHour, March 9, 1998]
quotes.author: Toni Morrison

quotes.quote: Some beautiful paths can't be discovered without getting lost.
quotes.author: Erol Ozan

quotes.quote: I'm hanging on to her memory like Spanish moss on an ancient Florida oak, and unlike the sunset, my love won't fade.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I haven’t been very impressed lately. By people, or places, or the way someone said he loved me and then slowly changed his mind.
quotes.author: Charlotte Eriksson

quotes.quote: If you wish to achieve worthwhile things in your personal and career life, you must become a worthwhile person in your own self-development.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Always choose the future over the past. What do we do now?
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Feel your emotions, Live true your passions, Keep still your mind.
quotes.author: Geoffrey M. Gluckman

quotes.quote: 90% of the game is half mental.
quotes.author: Yogi Berra

quotes.quote: Go and get your things,' he said. 'Dreams mean work.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Pressure makes diamonds
quotes.author: George S. Patton Jr.

quotes.quote: Once the writer in every individual comes to life (and that time is not far off), we are in for an age of universal deafness and lack of understanding.
quotes.author: Milan Kundera

quotes.quote: It is beautiful, it is endless, it is full and yet seems empty. It hurts us.
quotes.author: Jackson Pearce

quotes.quote: What I am telling you, before you begin my story, is this -- two things: I crave truth. And I lie.
quotes.author: Tana French

quotes.quote: Some people insist that 'mediocre' is better than 'best.' They delight in clipping wings because they themselves can't fly. They despise brains because they have none.
quotes.author: Robert A. Heinlein

quotes.quote: People say I make strange choices, but they’re not strange for me. My sickness is that I’m fascinated by human behavior, by what’s underneath the surface, by the worlds inside people.
quotes.author: Johnny Depp

quotes.quote: There are only two forces at work in this world- black and white. Only people are grey.
quotes.author: Chris Heimerdinger

quotes.quote: It had never occurred to me that our lives, which had been so closely interwoven, could unravel with such speed.
quotes.author: Kazuo Ishiguro

quotes.quote: Strike the shepherd and the sheep will scatter

quotes.quote: Today is your special day, even if today might be tomorrow to an Australian. And even though you’re not Australian, it doesn’t negate the fact that today may or may not be tomorrow.

quotes.quote: My advice would be to follow your dream. Most of my life, I was in second place before I came in first place. I hope that inspired people to never give up.

quotes.quote: I don't understand a thing about this world: about people, and why they do the things they do. The more I find out, the more I uncover, the more I know, the less I understand.

quotes.quote: Muscles aching to work, minds aching to create - this is man.

quotes.quote: Love changes things; hope allows us to endure until the change arrives.

quotes.quote: Life is something that happens when you can't get to sleep.
quotes.author: Fran Lebowitz

quotes.quote: He who robs us of our dreams robs us of our life.

quotes.quote: A wind that blows aimlessly is no good to anyone.
quotes.author: Rick Riordan

quotes.quote: Wake up, Shake up, Make up and Break up; life is all about moving like ant in search of sugar not sand.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Life's pain. You just have to get over as much of it as you can.-Isabel Culpeper

quotes.quote: The purpose of literature is to turn blood into ink.

quotes.quote: So what? You're another person, so of course you look different. What do you need to be ashamed for?

quotes.quote: Obstacles are those frightening things you see when you take you eyes off your goal.

quotes.quote: We're on the same boat but in different cabin

quotes.quote: The supreme happiness of life is the conviction that we are loved; loved for ourselves—say rather, loved in spite of ourselves.

quotes.quote: It is said that power corrupts, but actually it's more true that power attracts the corruptible. The sane are usually attracted by other things than power.

quotes.quote: The true miracle lies in our eagerness to allow, appreciate, and honor the uniqueness, and freedom of each sentient being to sing the song of their heart.

quotes.quote: If you want to be a new man you have to stay in new places, and do new things, with people who never knew you before. If you go back to the same old ways, what else can you be but the same old person?

quotes.quote: As soon as you cross the county line into where all the wealthier people live, the weather is suddenly sunnier and warmer. Even at night.

quotes.quote: Take some cues from some Q’s. Quality and quantity lead to queues.

quotes.quote: Don't let what you cannot do interfere with what you can do.

quotes.quote: Aslan: You doubt your value. Don't run from who you are.

quotes.quote: Confidence is like a dragon where, for every head cut off, two more heads grow back.

quotes.quote: Those who travel to mountain-tops are half in love with themselves, and half in love with oblivion.

quotes.quote: You say freak, I say unique.

quotes.quote: You look up when you wish to be exalted. And I look down because I am exalted.

quotes.quote: Sentiment without action is the ruin of the soul.

quotes.quote: Now this might disturb you, but I find I'm OK by myself;and I don't need you or your benevolence to make sense.

quotes.quote: Anything was better than nothing. Half-full was better than empty. Ignorance was the lowest form of humiliation and suffering.

quotes.quote: My next breath may very well be in your lungs. Store it wisely, because my life depends on it.

quotes.quote: You must learn to forgive a man when he's in love. He's always a nuisance.

quotes.quote: Loneliness and the feeling of being unwanted is the most terrible poverty.

quotes.quote: If your life is worth thinking about, it is worth writing about.

quotes.quote: Don't turn over the rocks if you don't want to see the pale creatures who live under them.

quotes.quote: People who can change and change again are so much more reliable and happier than those who can’t

quotes.quote: Perfection of character is this: to live each day as if it were your last, without frenzy, without apathy, without pretence.

quotes.quote: Grace is what picks me up and lifts my wings high above and I fly! Grace always conquers! Be graceful in everything; in anger, in sadness, in joy, in kindness, in unkindness, retain grace with you!
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: You may be the only person left who believes in you, but it's enough. It takes just one star to pierce a universe of darkness. Never give up.
quotes.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

quotes.quote: Or, rather, let us be more simple and less vain.

quotes.quote: The longer we live, the more weight we carry in our hearts.

quotes.quote: It is a very natural human trait to destroy that which frightens us.

quotes.quote: After every storm, there is a rainbow. If you have eyes, you will find it. If you have wisdom, you will create it. If you have love for yourself and others, you won’t need it.

quotes.quote: We must do our work for its own sake, not for fortune or attention or applause.

quotes.quote: There is no such thing as work-life balance. Everything worth fighting for unbalances your life.

quotes.quote: Out, out brief candle, life is but a walking shadow...a tale told by an idiot, full of sound and fury, signifying nothing.

quotes.quote: Scars show us where we have been, they do not dictate where we are going.

quotes.quote: Don't go on discussing what a good person should be. Just be one.

quotes.quote: Somehow, we'll find it. The balance between whom we wish to be and whom we need to be. But for now, we simply have to be satisfied with who we are.

quotes.quote: A tamed woman will never leave her mark in the world.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: My sun sets to rise again.
quotes.author: Robert Browning

quotes.quote: I criticize by creation, not by finding fault.

quotes.quote: Do the best you can, and don't take life too serious.

quotes.quote: They say all marriages are made in heaven, but so are thunder and lightning.

quotes.quote: Learn to love someone when they least deserve it, because that is when they need your love most.
quotes.author: Rodolfo Costa

quotes.quote: Solid character will reflect itself in consistent behavior, while poor character will seek to hide behind deceptive words and actions.
quotes.author: Myles Munroe

quotes.quote: Learning without thought is labor lost; thought without learning is perilous.

quotes.quote: Make your work to be in keeping with your purpose
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.quote: The only guarantee for failure is to stop trying

quotes.quote: Experience has shown, and a true philosophy will always show, that a vast, perhaps the larger, portion of truth arises from the seemingly irrelevant.

quotes.quote: It's such a stupid question, in my opinion. I mean, how do you know what you're going to do till you do it? The answer is, you don't. I think I am, but how do I know? I swear it's a stupid question.

quotes.quote: Life is and will ever remain an equation incapable of solution, but it contains certain known factors.
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: Now I've gone for too longLiving like I'm not aliveSo I'm going to start over tonightBeginning with you and I
quotes.author: Hayley Williams

quotes.quote: Deep in my heart I'm concealing things that I'm longing to say. Scared to confess what I'm feeling - frightened you'll slip away.
quotes.author: Madonna

quotes.quote: Life is like a play: it's not the length, but the excellence of the acting that matters.

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night.. you were holding a pine cone and introducing him as Gerald.
quotes.author: Nicole McKay

quotes.quote: Distance sometimes lets you know who is worth keeping, and who is worth letting go.

quotes.quote: Life did not stop, and one had to live.

quotes.quote: Everything that had happened was shockingly beautiful, enough to make you crazy.

quotes.quote: It’s a lack of clarity that creates chaos and frustration. Those emotions are poison to any living goal.

quotes.quote: I've come to know that what we want in life is the greatest indication of who we really are.

quotes.quote: Idealisme adalah kemewahan terakhir yang hanya dimiliki oleh pemuda.

quotes.quote: Only he who attempts the absurd is capable of achieving the impossible.

quotes.quote: To save all we must risk all.

quotes.quote: How would your life be different if…You pretended those around you were deaf to your words? Let today be the day…You let your actions speak and communicate your feelings and intentions.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: In this country we have no place for hyphenated Americans.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.quote: A child fish asks mother fish, 'Mother, why cannot we live on the Earth?' Mother fish replied, 'Dear… it is not the place for fish, it is the place for selfish
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Love is the energy of life.
quotes.author: Robert Browning

quotes.quote: I want to be the best version of myself for anyone who is going to someday walk into my life and need someone to love them beyond reason.
quotes.author: Jennifer Elisabeth

quotes.quote: One cannot answer for his courage when he has never been in danger.

quotes.quote: You can play it safe, and I wouldn't blame you for it. You can continue as you've been doing, and you'll survive, but is that what you want? Is that enough?

quotes.quote: If you own this story you get to write the ending.

quotes.quote: You willed yourself to where you are today, so will yourself out of it.

quotes.quote: Thoughts Become Things... Choose The Good Ones!

quotes.quote: There are two ways to live a life either forget everything or, remember nothing.

quotes.quote: Dead, we are revealed in our true dimensions, and they are surprisingly modest.

quotes.quote: When you are living the best version of yourself, you inspire others to live the best versions of themselves.

quotes.quote: I'd rather die while I'm living than live while I'm dead.

quotes.quote: Hearts rebuilt from hope resurrect dreams killed by hate.

quotes.quote: Books fall open, you fall in

quotes.quote: I just want to do something that matters. Or be something that matters. I just want to matter.

quotes.quote: You can't regret the life you didn't lead.

quotes.quote: I don’t want anyone to hold back who they are. It’s not okay… it’s not a good thing

quotes.quote: Fly without wings; Dream with open eyes; See in darkness.

quotes.quote: An artist never really finishes his work, he merely abandons it.

quotes.quote: Sooner or later in life, we will all take our own turn being in the position we once had someone else in.

quotes.quote: Because, sometimes, things happen to people and they're not equipped to deal with them.

quotes.quote: Bring something incomprehensible into the world!
quotes.author: Gilles Deleuze

quotes.quote: Let yourself be open and life will be easier. A spoon of salt in a glass of water makes the water undrinkable. A spoon of salt in a lake is almost unnoticed.
quotes.author: Buddha Siddhartha Guatama Shakyamuni

quotes.quote: We cannot change what we are not aware of, and once we are aware, we cannot help but change.

quotes.quote: I don't think you should wait. I think you should speak now.

quotes.quote: We've got everything we need right here, and everything we need is enough.

quotes.quote: I don’t know what’s in the box, but I love it. Unopened gifts contain hope.

quotes.quote: Share your knowledge. It is a way to achieve immortality.

quotes.quote: I am struck by how sharing our weakness and difficulties is more nourishing to others than sharing our qualities and successes.

quotes.quote: No, I regret nothing, all I regret is having been born, dying is such a long tiresome business I always found.
quotes.author: Samuel Beckett

quotes.quote: Nobody sleeps at the Inn of Innovation. You don't wake up, but you do #startup.

quotes.quote: Skinny guys fight till they're burger.

quotes.quote: In life, more than in anything else, it isn’t easy to end up alive.

quotes.quote: People are not lazy, they simply have impotent goals..that is..goals that do not inspire them.

quotes.quote: It’s too bad if a heart lacks fire, and is deprived of the light of a heart ablaze. The day on which you arewithout passionate loveis the most wasted day of your life.

quotes.quote: All I have is all I need and all I need is all I have in this moment.
quotes.author: Byron Katie

quotes.quote: Don't let fear or insecurity stop you from trying new things. Believe in yourself. Do what you love. And most importantly, be kind to others, even if you don't like them.
quotes.author: Stacy London

quotes.quote: Life goes on. Get over it. You're still young. It'll get better. Blah, Blah, Blah

quotes.quote: Sometimes you need a little crisis to get your adrenaline flowing and help you realize your potential.
quotes.author: Jeannette Walls

quotes.quote: It shocks me how I wish for...what is lost and cannot come back.
quotes.author: Sue Monk Kidd

quotes.quote: Anymore, no one's mind is their own.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: This autumn-why am I growing old?bird disappearing among clouds.
quotes.author: Matsuo Bashō

quotes.quote: Here lies one whose name was writ on water.
quotes.author: John Keats

quotes.quote: You only get one life. Live it to the fullest. All your miseries will be forgiven when you will be dead.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: The day is ending. It's time for something that was beautiful to turn into something else that is beautiful. Now, Let go.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

quotes.quote: Mother is a verb. It's something you do. Not just who you are.
quotes.author: Cheryl Lacey Donovan

quotes.quote: Hard work beats talent when talent fails to work hard.
quotes.author: Kevin Durant

quotes.quote: Have love for your inner Self and everything else is done for you.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Whether we wound or are wounded, the blood that flows is red.
quotes.author: Eiichiro Oda

quotes.quote: A quitter never wins-and-a winner never quits.

quotes.quote: Having perfected our disguise, we spend our lives searching for someone we don’t fool.
quotes.author: Robert Brault

quotes.quote: She moves through my memory the way the gentle river waves turn the setting sun's rays into a nostalgic light show.

quotes.quote: In my memory her love shimmers, glimmers, and glitters the way light on black water reflects like diamonds, the treasure that was us.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: We do not need to eat animals, wear animals, or use animals for entertainment purposes, and our only defense of these uses is our pleasure, amusement, and convenience.
quotes.author: Gary L. Francione

quotes.quote: May the fleas of a thousand camels invade the crotch of the person that ruins your day. And may their arms be to short too scratch
quotes.author: Keisha Keenleyside

quotes.quote: I am not a victim. No matter what I have been through, I'm still here. I have a history of victory.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I want you to have big dreams, big goals. I want you to strive to achieve them. But I don't want to see you beating yourself up every time you make a mistake.
quotes.author: Kelley Armstrong

quotes.quote: Sometimes you can learn, even from a bad experience. By coping you become stronger. The pain does not go away, but it becomes manageable.
quotes.author: Somaly Mam

quotes.quote: For this feeling of wonder shows that you are a philosopher, since wonder is the only beginning of philosophy.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: We crave for new sensations but soon become indifferent to them. The wonders of yesterday are today common occurrences
quotes.author: Nikola Tesla

quotes.quote: Compassion is the signature of Higher Consciousness. Non-violence is the tool to evolve into the Higher Consciousness.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: The universe is big. It's vast and complicated and ridiculous. And sometimes—very rarely—impossible things just happen and we call them miracles.
quotes.author: Steven Moffat

quotes.quote: Don't doubt yourself, that's what haters are for.
quotes.author: Turcois Ominek

quotes.quote: As long as there's life, there's hope.
quotes.author: Tamora Pierce

quotes.quote: A clown on a throne is still a clown. A king in rags is still a king.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: When relationships fail it is usually because someone chooses not to show up for the battle.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: The potential of the average person is like a huge ocean unsailed, anew continent unexplored, a world of possibilities waiting to bereleased and channeled toward some great good.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: It is our wounds that create in us a desire to reach for miracles. The fulfillment of such miracles depends on whether we let our wounds pull us down or lift us up towards our dreams.
quotes.author: Jocelyn Soriano

quotes.quote: She who reconciles the ill-matched threadsOf her life, and weaves them gratefullyInto a single cloth – It’s she who drives the loudmouths from the hallAnd clears it for a different celebration.
quotes.author: Rainer Maria Rilke

quotes.quote: In one drop of water are found all the secrets of all the oceans; in one aspect of You are found all the aspects of existence.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: The way you give your name to others is a measure of how much you like and respect yourself.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: 77 degrees in the fall feels cold, and 77 degrees in the spring feels hot. That’s why I’m selling year-round-nudity for half-price.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Anything can happen in life, especially nothing.
quotes.author: Michel Houellebecq

quotes.quote: The six squares of our love didn’t add up to a cube. Still, I took the oddly-shaped box down to the post office and tried to mail it into the future, when I’d be more prepared to open it.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Her love used to be my lighthouse, and now it feels like I'm treading water in the dark. I’ll bet as soon as I start swimming, the sun will rise and color the sky with the romance of rose.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Before you can successfully make friends with others, first you have to become your own friend.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Even in Siberia there is happiness.
quotes.author: Anton Chekhov

quotes.quote: I could recognise his soul in mine as much as he could find me in his. Our sole existences seemed to have been for this very moment when nothing else mattered.
quotes.author: X. Williamson

quotes.quote: May your choices reflect your hopes, not your fears.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Your attachment to unhealthy people and bad habits, which offer you no real control, is why you’re spiritually dying and living a life out of balance.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: The real glory is being knocked to your knees and then coming back. That's real glory. Thats the essence of it.
quotes.author: Vince Lombardi Jr.

quotes.quote: Idris: Are all people like this?The Doctor: Like what?Idris: So much bigger on the inside.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: Work like you don't need the money. Love like you've never been hurt. Dance like nobody's watching.
quotes.author: Satchel Paige

quotes.quote: Every time a student walks past a really urgent, expressive piece of architecture that belongs to his college, it can help reassure him that he does have that mind, does have that soul.
quotes.author: Louis Kahn

quotes.quote: Thinking there is something better out there in the world, something worth more than you already have- of all my mistakes, that was my biggest.
quotes.author: Louise Candlish

quotes.quote: You will have to make up for the smallness of your size by your courage and selfless devotion to duty, for it is not life that matters, but the courage, fortitude and determination you bring to it.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali Jinnah

quotes.quote: Love is 60% water, because a human being, the essence of love, is 60% water. But that’s the other 40% made up of? Easy—mint green tea and honey.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I wish I could travel west nonstop chasing sunsets. And as the time zones move backwards, I could live forever if I just kept moving.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Be in love with your life, every detail of it.
quotes.author: Jack Kerouac

quotes.quote: I would rather be able to appreciate things I cannot have than to have things I am not able to appreciate.
quotes.author: Elbert Hubbard

quotes.quote: Talking about someone who makes you happy actually makes you happy.
quotes.author: Elizabeth Scott

quotes.quote: You see, there are some people that one loves, and others that perhaps one would rather be with.
quotes.author: Henrik Ibsen

quotes.quote: Why not seize the pleasure at once? -- How often is happiness destroyed by preparation, foolish preparation!
quotes.author: Jane Austen

quotes.quote: Some people are like thorns. But you have to let them be thorns, because thorns can't turn into petals. The trick is not letting them prick you; never let a thorn prick you!
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: The way to screw up somebody's life is to give them what they want.
quotes.author: Patrick Swayze

quotes.quote: À l'aurore, armés d'une ardente patience, nous entrerons aux splendides Villes. (In the dawn, armed with a burning patience, we shall enter the splendid Cities.)

quotes.quote: Kitty need's a tounge bath
quotes.author: Jeaniene Frost

quotes.quote: The most important thing about art is to work. Nothing else matters except sitting down every day and trying.
quotes.author: Steven Pressfield

quotes.quote: Do not sit still; start moving now. In the beginning, you may not go in the direction you want, but as long as you are moving, you are creating alternatives and possibilities.

quotes.quote: I wonder if that's how darkness wins, by convincing us to trap it inside ourselves, instead of emptying it out. I don't want it to win.

quotes.quote: Forget regret, or life is yours to miss. No other path, no other way, no day but today.

quotes.quote: Sure it could get rough sometimes, but life wasn't a Hollywood movie. Shit happened. You fought, you screamed, and somehow you worked like hell to get out the other side still intact.

quotes.quote: But if I don’t think about love, I will be nothing.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: Once your mindset changes, everything on the outside will change along with it.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: It is part of the human nature always to judge others very severely and, when the wind turns against us, always to find an excuse for our own misdeeds, or to blame someone else for our mistakes.

quotes.quote: Only when we give joyfully, without hesitation or thought of gain, can we truly know what love means.
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: Every mountain top is within reach if you just keep climbing.

quotes.quote: When I die, don't come, I wouldn't want a leafto turn away from the sun -- it loves it there. There's nothing so spiritual about being happybut you can't miss a day of it, because it doesn't last.

quotes.quote: Everybody has something, that one thing they must do to feel happy. I think this is yours, and I want you to be happy. You don’t have to do it, but it’s here if you choose to come back to it.

quotes.quote: You make the rest of the beautiful things in the world cry for even trying at all. You make it hard for me to breathe.

quotes.quote: When darkness is at its darkest, a star shines the brightest.
quotes.author: Louise Philippe

quotes.quote: You're only young once, but you can be immature forever

quotes.quote: Life isn't a book. There's no guarantee of a happy ending.
quotes.author: Kristin Cast

quotes.quote: It takes no more time to see the good side of life than to see the bad.

quotes.quote: Slowly, with many lost days, I come back to life.
quotes.author: Suzanne Collins

quotes.quote: I’ve never been in a yesterday quite like today. Seems like the perfect time to be in love.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I am a fashion person, and fashion is not only about clothes -- it's about all kinds of change
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: In your own life it's important to know how spectacular you are.

quotes.quote: Maybe 'Okay' will be our 'always'...

quotes.quote: Peace demands the most heroic labor and the most difficult sacrifice. It demands greater heroism than war. It demands greater fidelity to the truth and a much more perfect purity of conscience.

quotes.quote: When the world pushes you to your knees, you're in the perfect position to pray

quotes.quote: He who speaks without an attentive ear is mute.

quotes.quote: I’d rather be miserable loving you than happy with anyone else.

quotes.quote: The world’s greatest achievers have been those who have always stayed focussed on their goals and have been consistent in their efforts.
quotes.author: Roopleen

quotes.quote: Suicide sometimes proceeds from cowardice, but not always; for cowardice sometimes prevents it; since as many live because they are afraid to die, as die because they are afraid to live
quotes.author: Charles Caleb Colton

quotes.quote: So runs my dream, but what am I?An infant crying in the nightAn infant crying for the lightAnd with no language but a cry.

quotes.quote: Though we tremble before uncertain futuresmay we meet illness, death and adversity with strengthmay we dance in the face of our fears.
quotes.author: Gloria E. Anzaldúa

quotes.quote: IF YOU DON'T GO AFTER WHAT YOU WANT; YOU COULD SPEND YOUR ENTIRE LIFE SETTLING FOR WHAT YOU CAN GET

quotes.quote: She looked away. Her attitude seemed to suggest that she had finished with him, and would be obliged if somebody would come and sweep him up.

quotes.quote: Of what use were the arts if they were only the reproduction and the imitation of life?

quotes.quote: Timendi causa est nescire - Ignorance is the cause of fear.

quotes.quote: Life always begins with one step outside of your comfort zone.

quotes.quote: End? No, the journey doesn't end here. Death is just another path. One that we all must take.

quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Read. Read anything. Read the things they say are good for you, and the things they claim are junk. You'll find what you need to find. Just read.

quotes.quote: At every given moment we are absolutely perfect for what is required for our journey.

quotes.quote: Men have two greatest fears: the first fear is the fear of being needed, and the second fear is the fear of not being needed.

quotes.quote: Lucy: You learn more when you lose Charlie Brown: Well then I must be the smartest person in world!!!

quotes.quote: Where ignorance lurks, so too do the frontiers of discovery and imagination

quotes.quote: Fear is the glue that keeps you stuck. Faith is the solvent that sets you free.

quotes.quote: Keep a light, hopeful heart. But ­expect the worst.

quotes.quote: I must work harder to achieve my goal of not seeking approval from those whose approval I'm not even sure is important to me.

quotes.quote: The road to success is dotted with many tempting parking spaces.

quotes.quote: We can regard our life as a uselessly disturbing episode in the blissful repose of nothingness.

quotes.quote: The main facts in human life are five: birth, food, sleep, love and death.

quotes.quote: There are only a few notes. Just variations on a theme.

quotes.quote: Something that is yours forever is never precious

quotes.quote: I am still in the land of the dying; I shall be in the land of the living soon. (his last words)

quotes.quote: You are the only you ... You are the best you. You will always be the second best anyone else.

quotes.quote: Everyone you have ever loved in your life becomes a part of your soul. They never leave. They're always inside you, and you can bring them out whenever you want.

quotes.quote: Total paranoia is just total awareness.

quotes.quote: Knowledge is power is time is money.

quotes.quote: He who binds to himself a joyDoes the winged life destroy;But he who kisses the joy as it fliesLives in eternity's sun rise.

quotes.quote: A truth that no one knows is still the truth.

quotes.quote: Sometimes it's easy to lose faith in people. And sometimes one act of kindness is all it takes to give you hope again.

quotes.quote: I fell in love with her the moment she was late, though neither one of us knew it at the time because she hadn’t arrived yet.

quotes.quote: Don't be afraid of the shadows, that only means there's a light nearby.

quotes.quote: When mice run, cats give chase.

quotes.quote: I’ll make a swing so I can reach the places I can’t reach yet.

quotes.quote: They will only care when you're gone.

quotes.quote: I have a fear of palindromes. Maybe because the only person to ever beat the hell out of me was a man named Bob.

quotes.quote: Imagine no limitations; decide what's right and desirable before you decide what's possible.

quotes.quote: The night is just a part of the day

quotes.quote: If you think something is missing in your life, it is probably YOU...

quotes.quote: Imagine others complexly.

quotes.quote: No matter how much falls on us, we keep plowing ahead. That's the only way to keep the roads clear.

quotes.quote: The thing everyone should realize is that the key to happiness is being happy for yourself and yourself.
quotes.author: Ellen DeGeneres

quotes.quote: Mara, that's the life I want to give you. That's what I'm offering you. I want to fill you life with color and warmth. I want to fill it with light. Give me a chance

quotes.quote: It is a kind of spiritual snobbery that makes people think they can be happy without money.

quotes.quote: Friendship is thinking of the other person first.

quotes.quote: The purpose of life is the expansion of happiness.

quotes.quote: Become the leader of your life. Lead yourself to where you want to be. Breathe life back into your ambitions, your desires, your goals, your relationships.

quotes.quote: Live to learn to love. Learn to love to live. Love to live to learn so that you may live the life that you yearn.

quotes.quote: When you know what you want, and you want it bad enough, you'll find a way to get it.

quotes.quote: Don't set your goals by what other people deem important.

quotes.quote: Life's managed, not cured.

quotes.quote: Right now, we're living in an ugly chapter of our lives, but books always get better!

quotes.quote: We all give up great expectations along the way.

quotes.author: Michael Summers

quotes.quote: Living might mean taking chances, but they're worth taking. Loving might be a mistake. but its worth making

quotes.quote: This is not the end, this is not even the beginning of the end, this is just perhaps the end of the beginning.

quotes.quote: I was taught to strive not because there were any guarantees of success but because the act of striving is in itself the only way to keep faith with life.

quotes.quote: It is when things are at worst you will get the best.

quotes.quote: What is grander than a country and more valuable than gold? Strength of heart.

quotes.quote: She is delightfully chaotic; a beautiful mess. Loving her is a splendid adventure.

quotes.quote: Your success and happiness lie in you.

quotes.quote: A mistake isn’t a mistake unless it can’t be put right.

quotes.quote: Life is a gift. Don't forget to live it.

quotes.quote: No matter how many people believe or don’t believe in you, you must bethe ultimate believer in yourself!

quotes.quote: I want to love you down. I want to love you deep. I want to love you up. And I want to love you width all my heart. Now that is #4DFeeling.

quotes.quote: The pink sunset reminds me of her, and the calm water matches the calm that images of her bring to my heart.

quotes.quote: Each of us is a unique strand in the intricate web of life and here to make a contribution.

quotes.quote: You have been blessed with immeasurable power to make positive changes in your life.

quotes.quote: You do not have to sit outside in the dark. If, however, you want to look at the stars, you will find that darkness is necessary. But the stars neither require nor demand it.

quotes.quote: Happiness and confidence are the prettiest things you can wear

quotes.quote: What hurts so bad about youth isn't the actual butt whippings the world delivers. It's the stupid hopes playacting like certainties.

quotes.quote: Receive with simplicity everything that happens to you.

quotes.quote: Intelligence minus purpose equals stupidity.

quotes.quote: I cry, but not for myself. There’s too much sadness in this world to waste a moment with self-pity, when making others smile will also make me smile.

quotes.quote: Things don't matter, people do

quotes.quote: Flowers are aromatic and romantic, and they grow exactly the way love does—with plenty of light, and watered with affection.

quotes.quote: The more you seek security, the less of it you have. But the more you seek opportunity, the more likely it is that you will achieve the security that you desire.

quotes.quote: Clutching to your fading youth is like trying to hang on to a handful of smoke. Just breathe deeply and you’ll be OK.

quotes.quote: My love has a flow like a flower, so it’s best if you water it with the fragrance of romance, which has the aroma of loyalty.

quotes.quote: The only problem with dreaming is it's a solo activity. Imagine how glorious life would be if we could share dreams and create in unison.

quotes.quote: The heart pumps blood, a fluid, but it also pulses love, which is as liquid as a wave, and everyone wants a refill. My goal is to be a server.

quotes.quote: The future doesn't belong to the light-hearted. It belongs to the brave.
quotes.author: Ronald Reagan

quotes.quote: Books didn’t make me wallow in darkness, darkness made me wallow in books.

quotes.quote: Every time I thought I was being rejected from something good, I was actually being re-directed to something better.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Everyone is different from each other, but that doesn’t mean everyone should be indifferent to each other.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: , the rest of the girls pretended not to notice. That's just what best friends do.
quotes.author: Sara Shepard

quotes.quote: Laughter is a sunbeam of the soul.
quotes.author: Thomas Mann

quotes.quote: Sweet are the thoughts that savour of content, The quiet mind is richer than a crown...
quotes.author: Robert Greene

quotes.quote: Cultivate an optimistic mind, use your imagination, always consider alternatives, and dare to believe that you can make possible what others think is impossible.
quotes.author: Rodolfo Costa

quotes.quote: I am not the moon orbiting around your planet; I am the sun that will burn through your frozen mind.

quotes.quote: Wishing to be friends is quick work, but friendship is a slow ripening fruit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.quote: People won't buy study guides for a dollar, but they will pay 100 dollars for test answers. A ‪#startup‬‬‬‬ should keep this mentality in mind.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A writer used to live life like Julius Seizure: I came, I saw, I queried. Now you can take control of your consciousness and self-publish.

quotes.quote: In a well-ordered universe...

quotes.quote: The dead do not hurt you; only the living do.
quotes.author: Tess Gerritsen

quotes.quote: If her enemies were Brigan's friends and her friends were Brigan's enemies, then the two of them could walk through the world arm in arm and never be hit by arrows again.
quotes.author: Kristin Cashore

quotes.quote: You don't win races by wishing, you win them by running faster than everyone else does.
quotes.author: Philip Pullman

quotes.quote: Love so joyfully and freely given can never be taken away. It is never truly gone.
quotes.author: Cameron Dokey

quotes.quote: Everyones greatest fantasy is to walk away from the life (they think)you lead
quotes.author: Pete Wentz

quotes.quote: Quit being so hard on yourself. We are what we are; we love what we love. We don't need to justify it to anyone... not even to ourselves.
quotes.author: Scott Lynch

quotes.quote: Do you train for passing tests or do you train for creative inquiry?
quotes.author: Noam Chomsky

quotes.quote: I would not sit waiting for some vague tomorrow, nor for something to happen. One could wait a lifetime, and find nothing at the end of the waiting. I would begin here, I would make something happen.

quotes.quote: I would rather carry around a plastic bag with five thousand Euro inside, than carry around a Louis Vuitton/Gucci/Prada bag with only one hundred Euro inside!
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: There are many goals but one path - the path of compassion.

quotes.quote: When we are unhurried and wise, we perceive that only great and worthy things have any permanent and absolute existence, that petty fears and petty pleasures are but the shadow of the reality.

quotes.quote: I think of myself as a bad writer with big ideas, but I'd rather be that than a big writer with bad ideas.
quotes.author: Michael Moorcock

quotes.quote: A challenge only becomes an obstacle when you bow to it.

quotes.quote: Only the person who has experienced light and darkness, war and peace, rise and fall, only that person has truly experienced life.
