quotes.quote: If you pursue happiness, you are an ordinary person. If happiness pursues you, you are an extraordinary person. Do not chase happiness; let it chase you.
quotes.author: Peter Deunov

quotes.quote: Don't wait for other people to be loving, giving, compassionate, grateful, forgiving, generous, or friendly... lead the way!
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: To like many people spontaneously and without effort is perhaps the greatest of all sources of personal happiness.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russell

quotes.quote: The more you know, the less you need.
quotes.author: Yvon Chouinard

quotes.quote: And, as always happens, and happens far too soon, the strange and wonderful becomes a memory and a memory becomes a dream. Tomorrow it's gone.
quotes.author: Terry Pratchett

quotes.quote: What good is money if it can't buy happiness?
quotes.author: Agatha Christie

quotes.quote: There’s something really cool about knowing that your destiny is SO big that you’re not meant to share it with anyone. At least not yet.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: Hope will lie to you, but lust is what it is; it never lies.
quotes.author: Laurell K. Hamilton

quotes.quote: The deep roots never doubt spring will come.
quotes.author: Marty Rubin

quotes.quote: Whatever the mind of man can conceive and believe, it can achieve
quotes.author: W. Clement Stone

quotes.quote: He who is best prepared can best serve his moment of inspiration.
quotes.author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge

quotes.quote: If you don’t know exactly where you’re going, how will you know when you get there?
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: When we feel, a kind of lyric is sung in our heart. When we think, a kind of music is played in our mind. In harmony, both create a beautiful symphony of life.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: You can have regret from yesterday, fear tomorrow, but peace today by sharing your heart’s deepest feelings. A life spent being fearful of showing your soul is a life not worth living.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: Don't be trapped by dogma — which is living with the results of other people's thinking.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: I wonder if being sane means disregarding the chaos that is life, pretending only an infinitesimal segment of it is reality.
quotes.author: Rabih Alameddine

quotes.quote: There's so much destruction all over the world - and all you can do is complain about ME!
quotes.author: Morrissey

quotes.quote: Orang yang tidak pernah dibakar panas mentari, mustahil menghargai rimbun berteduh - peribahasa Turki.
quotes.author: Hasrizal Abdul Jamil

quotes.quote: You are a wonderful creation. You know more than you think you know, just as you know less than you want to know.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: My advice to you is get married: if you find a good wife you'll be happy; if not, you'll become a philosopher.
quotes.author: Socrates

quotes.quote: The only way to avoid being miserable is not to have enough leisure to wonder whether you are happy or not.
quotes.author: George Bernard Shaw

quotes.quote: I want him to be happy. And I want you to be happy, too. Even if you can only find that happiness without me.
quotes.author: S.J. Watson

quotes.quote: The most important thing is this: to sacrifice what you are now for what you can become tomorrow.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: I don't think two people could have been happier than we have been.
quotes.author: Michael Cunningham

quotes.quote: And when all your faith is gone let it be me, if it's a friend you need let it be me
quotes.author: Ray Lamontagne

quotes.quote: Because hope comes from in you, and wishes are just magic.
quotes.author: Laini Taylor

quotes.quote: There is a certain right by which we many deprive a man of life, but none by which we may deprive him of death; this is mere cruelty.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: Relax. They're not going to kill us. They're going to TRY and kill us. And that is a very different thing.
quotes.author: Steve Voake

quotes.quote: IT IS BY CHOICE AND NOT BY CHANCES THAT WE CHANGE OUR CIRCUMSTANCES.
quotes.author: Nadia Sahari

quotes.quote: Appreciate every little beautiful moment in every day of your life. Give it a try and you'll see the world from another perspective.
quotes.author: Thea Kristine May

quotes.quote: For success, attitude is equally as important as ability.
quotes.author: Walter Scott

quotes.quote: A work of art is the unique result of a unique temperament.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: There are some places in life where you can only go alone. Embrace the beauty of your solo journey.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: My name is a half an hour early, but my body is on time.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Everyday it gets easier to connect with an electronic device that it is to connect with real people.
quotes.author: Pablo

quotes.quote: You said you want to became Hokage. I have become the Kazekage. If you are willing to bear the name Kage, you have to do what you must do.
quotes.author: Masashi Kishimoto

quotes.quote: We Greeks believe that a man who takes no part in public affairs is not merely lazy, but good for nothing
quotes.author: Thucydides

quotes.quote: There are few sources of energy so powerful as a procrastinating college student.
quotes.author: Paul Graham

quotes.quote: I believe that being happy is the only important thing. Happiness. Simple as a glass of chocolate or torturous as the heart. Bitter. Sweet. Alive.
quotes.author: Joanne Harris

quotes.quote: Take responsibility for your own happiness, do not expect people or things to bring you happiness, or you could be disappointed.
quotes.author: Rodolfo Costa

quotes.quote: Stand up for what is right, regardless of who is committing the wrong.
quotes.author: Suzy Kassem

quotes.quote: I came to the conclusion that unrealized hopes, even small ones, were always wrenching.
quotes.author: Nicholas Sparks

quotes.quote: To be running breathlessly, but not yet arrived, is itself delightful, a suspended moment of living hope.
quotes.author: Anne Carson

quotes.quote: Love without hope will not survive. Love without faith changes nothing. Love gives power to hope and faith.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: It isn't for the moment you are struck that you need courage, but for that long uphill climb back to sanity and faith and security.
quotes.author: Anne Morrow Lindbergh

quotes.quote: Don't wish...DO! Don't try...BE! Don't think...KNOW! And above all: Bless a stranger with a small, yet powerful, random act of kindness. You feel me?
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: Make your lives a masterpiece, you only get one canvas.
quotes.author: E.A. Bucchianeri

quotes.quote: It is easier to change a man's religion than to change his diet.
quotes.author: Margaret Mead

quotes.quote: Bird by bird, buddy. Just take it bird by bird.
quotes.author: Anne Lamott

quotes.quote: If you have not done things worthy of being written about, at least write things worthy of being read.
quotes.author: Giacomo Casanova

quotes.quote: I am the lover's gift; I am the wedding wreath;I am the memory of a moment of happiness;I am the last gift of the living to the dead;I am a part of joy and a part of sorrow.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: There is absolutely no greater high than challenging the power structure as a nobody, giving it your all, and winning!
quotes.author: Abbie Hoffman

quotes.quote: Segregation shaped me; education liberated me.
quotes.author: Maya Angelou

quotes.quote: With one day's reading a man may have the key in his hands.
quotes.author: Ezra Pound

quotes.quote: Nothing is too wonderful to be true if it be consistent with the laws of nature.
quotes.author: Michael Faraday

quotes.quote: Literature is the safe and traditional vehicle through which we learn about the world and pass on values from on generation to the next. Books save lives.
quotes.author: Laurie Anderson

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night. The best day of my life was when I taught you how to juggle, but the best day of yours was when you taught someone else.
quotes.author: Michael Summers

quotes.quote: Remember to breathe. It is after all, the secret of life.
quotes.author: Gregory Maguire

quotes.quote: What was the point of trying to run away if people were going to insist on reminding you of what you were running from?
quotes.author: Morgan Matson

quotes.quote: Lo esperado no sucede. Es lo inesperado lo que acontece.
quotes.author: Ernesto Sabato

quotes.quote: Sin sorpresas, aunque sean disagredables, nadie estaria dispuesto a vivir.
quotes.author: David Olguín

quotes.quote: There is something good in all seeming failures. You are not to see that now. Time will reveal it. Be patient.
quotes.author: Sivananda Saraswati

quotes.quote: Beauty is not who you are on the outside, it is the wisdom and time you gave away to save another struggling soul, like you.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: Today, just take time to smell the roses, enjoy those little things about your life, your family, spouse, friends, job. Forget about the thorns -the pains and problems they cause you - and enjoy life
quotes.author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

quotes.quote: If you only write when inspired, you may be a fairly decent poet, but you'll never be a novelist.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: Love doesn't come with an on-off switch. It's made of too many threads of memory and hope and heartache that weave themselves into the very core of who you are.
quotes.author: Martina Boone

quotes.quote: I arise from dreams of thee, And a spirit in my feetHas led me- who knows how?To thy chamber-window, Sweet!
quotes.author: Percy Bysshe Shelley

quotes.quote: I made a cauldron of coffee, and I was thinking we could chug it and then teach each other how to dance by using the bottom of a floating canoe as a ballroom.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: There are people who think that things that happen in fiction do not really happen. These people are wrong.
quotes.author: Neil Gaiman

quotes.quote: Live your vision and demand your success.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: So, I must be taken as I have been made. The success is not mine, the failure is not mine, but the two together make me.
quotes.author: Charles Dickens

quotes.quote: Sorry... my mind was wandering... one time it went all the way to Venus and ordered a meal I couldn’t pay for.
quotes.author: Steven Wright

quotes.quote: Wasn’t hitting bottom the thing you had to do to knock some sense into yourself? Wasn’t hitting bottom the thing that showed you which way was up?
quotes.author: Rainbow Rowell

quotes.quote: Every man should believe in something. If not..he would doubt everything, even himself.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: To live is to be haunted.
quotes.author: Philip K. Dick

quotes.quote: I don't trust men everybody likes. Being nice isn't the same as being good.
quotes.author: Sarah Rees Brennan

quotes.quote: A real scientist solves problems, not wails that they are unsolvable.
quotes.author: Anne McCaffrey

quotes.quote: No one invites you to the top - you have to claw your way up. When you get there, you will sit with the others who were also uninvited - giggling.
quotes.author: Staness Jonekos

quotes.quote: In order to know who you are you need to know God is.
quotes.author: Annette Hoggs-Jackson

quotes.quote: If you really want the key to success, start by doing the opposite of what everyone else is doing.
quotes.author: Brad Szollose

quotes.quote: If it ever occurs to people to value the honour of the mind equally with the honour of the body, we shall get a social revolution of a quite unparalleled sort.
quotes.author: Dorothy L. Sayers

quotes.quote: A weak but steady throb lay beneath Kev's searching fingertips. Win's heartbeat...the pulse that sustained his universe.
quotes.author: Lisa Kleypas

quotes.quote: That's all you can do in this world, no matter how strong the current beats against you, or how heavy your burden, or how tragic your love story. You keep going.
quotes.author: Robyn Schneider

quotes.quote: Without inspiration, we’re all like a box of matches that will never be lit.
quotes.author: David Archuleta

quotes.quote: The purpose of life is a life of purpose.
quotes.author: Robert Bryne

quotes.quote: Never question the power of one! Throughout history it has been the actions of only one person who has in inspired the movement of change.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: If you want to find happiness, find gratitude.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The overman...Who has organized the chaos of his passions, given style to his character, and become creative. Aware of life's terrors, he affirms life without resentment.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: Music is the only language in which you cannot say a mean or sarcastic thing.
quotes.author: John Erskine

quotes.quote: To oppose something is to maintain it... You must go somewhere else; you must have another goal; then you walk a different road.
quotes.author: Ursula K. Le Guin

quotes.quote: Adversity, if for no other reason, is of benefit, since it is sure to bring a season of sober reflection. People see clearer at such times. Storms purify the atmosphere.
quotes.author: Henry Ward Beecher

quotes.quote: Neither the sun nor death can be looked at steadily.
quotes.author: François de La Rochefoucauld

quotes.quote: Men talk of killing time, while time quietly kills them.
quotes.author: Dion Boucicault

quotes.quote: How many people you bless is how you measure success
quotes.author: Rick Ross

quotes.quote: Life shouldn't be about the either/or. We're capable of more than that, you know?
quotes.author: Sarah Dessen

quotes.quote: If everyone helps to hold up the sky, then one person does not become tired.
quotes.author: Askhari Johnson Hodari

quotes.quote: Write it on your heart you are the most beautiful soul of the Universe. Realize it, honor it and celebrate the life.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Oh what a wonderful soul so bright inside you. Got power to heal the sun’s broken heart, power to restore the moon’s vision too.
quotes.author: Aberjhani

quotes.quote: How unhappy does one have to be before living seems worse than dying?
quotes.author: Deborah Curtis

quotes.quote: Life is better than death, I believe, if only because it is less boring, and because it has fresh peaches in it.
quotes.author: Alice Walker

quotes.quote: Knowledge kills action; action requires the veils of illusion.
quotes.author: Friedrich Nietzsche

quotes.quote: Life had sure been simpler when I hadn't dated.
quotes.author: Charlaine Harris

quotes.quote: Stop just cheering for others who are living their visions. Commit yourself to your own success and follow the steps required to achieve it.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Stop pointing fingers and placing blame on others. Your life can only change to the degree that you accept responsibility for it.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: We shall never achieve harmony with the land, anymore than we shall achieve absolute justice or liberty for people. In these higher aspirations the important thing is not to achieve but to strive.
quotes.author: Aldo Leopold

quotes.quote: Positive belief in yourself will give you the energy needed to conquer the world and this belief is the power behind all creation.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: A thought is a Cosmic Order waiting to happen.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: It takes a long time to grow an old friend.
quotes.author: John Leonard

quotes.quote: The worst thing that can happen in a democracy - as well as in an individual's life - is to become cynical about the future and lose hope.
quotes.author: Hillary Clinton

quotes.quote: That's what I do. Watch movies and read. Sometimes I even pretend to write, but I'm not fooling anyone. Oh, and I go to the mailbox.
quotes.author: Nicole Krauss

quotes.quote: Feeling lost, crazy and desperate belongs to a good life as much as optimism, certainty and reason.
quotes.author: Alain de Botton

quotes.quote: Tell me that the purpose of life is to have fun, and without a care in the world I'll begin wreaking havoc on everything I pass. Now that's what I call pure, honest fun.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: And each book has to receive your best effort every single time. No slacking.
quotes.author: Nora Roberts

quotes.quote: You can never know everything. Part of what you know is always wrong. Perhaps the most important part. A portion of wisdom lies in knowing that. A portion of knowledge lies in going on anyway.
quotes.author: Robert Jordan

quotes.quote: Be Sure To Notice When You're Happy
quotes.author: Brenda Farrar-ejemai

quotes.quote: Suffering is due to our disconnection with the inner soul. Meditation is establishing that connection.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: After all, is not a real Hell better than a manufactured Heaven?
quotes.author: E.M. Forster

quotes.quote: Live Today! Do not allow your spirit to be softened of your happiness to be limited by a day you cannot have back or a day that does not yet exist.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Stop waiting for the perfect day or the perfect moment... Take THIS day, THIS moment and lead it to perfection.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: What is given to you is what is needed; what you want, requires giving up what you don't need.
quotes.author: George Alexiou

quotes.quote: Cheerfulness and contentment are great beautifiers.
quotes.author: Jennifer E. Smith

quotes.quote: Maybe if we stopped trying to achieve movie standards of greatness, we'd be happy with what we have.
quotes.author: Amber L. Johnson

quotes.quote: History says, Don’t hopeOn this side of the grave, But then, once in a lifetimeThe longed-for tidal waveOf justice can rise up, And hope and history rhyme
quotes.author: Seamus Heaney

quotes.quote: Religion, n. A daughter of Hope and Fear, explaining to Ignorance the nature of the Unknowable.
quotes.author: Ambrose Bierce

quotes.quote: I hide how I feel, and I hide the fact that I hide how I feel, but I can't bury the past without having a funeral of the heart.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The wind may be invisible, but it’s colored by memories of you, as you gently blew into my life, adding motion and emotion to my still-beating heart.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Music is pleasing not only because of the sound but because of the silence that is in it: without the alternation of sound and silence there would be no rhythm.
quotes.author: Thomas Merton

quotes.quote: If you think you can then you can.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Create with the heart; build with the mind.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Go as far as you can see and you will see further.
quotes.author: Zig Ziglar

quotes.quote: A life is not important except in the impact it has on other lives.
quotes.author: Jackie Robinson

quotes.quote: Full many a gem of purest ray sereneThe dark unfathom'd caves of ocean bear:Full many a flower is born to blush unseen, And waste its sweetness on the desert air.
quotes.author: Thomas Gray

quotes.quote: Waking At NightThe blue river is grey at morningand evening. There is twilightat dawn and dusk. I lie in the darkwondering if this quiet in me nowis a beginning or an end.
quotes.author: Jack Gilbert

quotes.quote: [The decay of Logic results from an] untroubled assumption that the particular is real and the universal is not.
quotes.author: C.S. Lewis

quotes.quote: It is not the possession of truth, but the success which attends the seeking after it, that enriches the seeker and brings happiness to him.
quotes.author: Max Planck

quotes.quote: You shouldn't throw stones if you live in a glass house and if you got a glass jaw, you should watch yo mouth: cause I'll break yo face.
quotes.author: 50 Cent

quotes.quote: The thinnest slice would be teeming with memories of a love so strong it turned you inside out and left you gasping, and would be an identical match to a slice stored in the heart of a soul mate.
quotes.author: Jodi Picoult

quotes.quote: Yoga is not just repetation of few postures - it is more about the exploration and discovery of the subtle energies of life.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Perception is strong and sight weak. In strategy it is important to see distant things as if they were close and to take a distanced view of close things.
quotes.author: Miyamoto Musashi

quotes.quote: Don't live by my words, don't die by them, chew them slowly digest them, and smile if they give nourishment to your soul.
quotes.author: Stanley Victor Paskavich

quotes.quote: The secret of a happy life is respect. Respect for yourself and respect for others.
quotes.author: Ayad Akhtar

quotes.quote: Without courage, wisdom bears no fruit.
quotes.author: Baltasar Gracián

quotes.quote: Fashion and music are the same, because music express its period too.
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: [O]ur honeymoon will shine our life long: its beams will only fade over your grave or mine.
quotes.author: Charlotte Brontë

quotes.quote: A white wedding dress, once worn, is like the ghost of a moment, trapping feelings of forever into fabric that’s never to be tried on again.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Every night I sleep like a log. In a lit fireplace. If you bring the marshmallows, I’ll bring the burning desire for you.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Her beauty took my breath away, and allowed the spring breeze to fill my lungs with honeysuckle, jasmine, and desire.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I love kiss whispers—kisspers. Loose lips are full of passionate secrets.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: People often belittle the place where they were born but heaven can be found in the most unlikely places.
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: Life is painful and disappointing. It is useless, therefore, to write new realistic novels. We generally know where we stand in relation to reality and don’t care to know any more.
quotes.author: Michel Houellebecq

quotes.quote: Inaction creates nothing. Action creates success.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Without continual growth and progress, such words as improvement, achievement, and success have no meaning.
quotes.author: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: A new day: Be open enough to see opportunities. Be wise enough to be grateful. Be courageous enough to be happy.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: To an untrained eye, need and love were as easily mistaken for each other as the real master's painting and a forgery.
quotes.author: Deb Caletti

quotes.quote: The power to change your life lies in the simplest of steps.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Writing means not just staring ugliness in the face, but finding a way to embrace it.
quotes.author: Veronica Roth

quotes.quote: Bending beats breaking.
quotes.author: Betty Greene

quotes.quote: The longing for Paradise is man's longing not to be man.
quotes.author: Milan Kundera

quotes.quote: I would rather be damned by my honesty, than caged by my lies.
quotes.author: Omega Maverick

quotes.quote: There were many terrible things in my life and most of them never happened.
quotes.author: Michel de Montaigne

quotes.quote: A clear vision, backed by definite plans, gives you a tremendous feeling of confidence and personal power.
quotes.author: Brian Tracy

quotes.quote: Happiness is not only a hope, but also in some strange manner a memory ... we are all kings in exile.
quotes.author: G.K. Chesterton

quotes.quote: Who’s happy? Happy is just what people think they are when they can’t find anything to bitch about.
quotes.author: Rasmenia Massoud

quotes.quote: Let my body dwell in poverty, and my hands be as the hands of the toiler; but let my soul be as a temple of remembrance where the treasures of knowledge enter and the inner sanctuary is hope.
quotes.author: George Eliot

quotes.quote: We must pass through the darkness, to reach the light.
quotes.author: Albert Pike

quotes.quote: But a kingdom that has once been destroyed can never come again into being; nor can the dead ever be brought back to life.
quotes.author: Sun Tzu

quotes.quote: If I die with a zillion dollars and you die with zero, our net worth is worthless. All that matters is the love we level across our lives.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I wish every envelope enclosed a love letter. It’s this hope that leads me to open strangers’ mail. So you see, I’m a romantic, not an NSA employee.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I regret to say I'munable to reply to your unexpressed desires.
quotes.author: Harryette Mullen

quotes.quote: It is the same way with dating. The time you are most prepared for dating is when you don't need anyone to complete you, fulfill you, or instill in you a sense of worth or purpose.
quotes.author: Myles Munroe

quotes.quote: Why are you going to choose failure when success is an option?
quotes.author: Jillian Michaels

quotes.quote: She didn't know how to love, to give herself to someone, to out herself in someone else's keeping and take him into hers. She didn't trust anyone with her heart - or the darker places of her soul.
quotes.author: Christine Feehan

quotes.quote: When you experience a negative circumstance or event, do not dwell on it. Be proactive — put your attention on what you need to do to bring the situation to a positive result.
quotes.author: Rodolfo Costa

quotes.quote: What we perceive about ourselves is greatly a reflection of how we will end up living our lives.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night. We watched pornography together, but purely for the storyline.
quotes.author: Michael Summers

quotes.quote: Love, I think, is a gateway to the world, not an escape from it.
quotes.author: Mark Doty

quotes.quote: Concentration attracts luck factor.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: And life is what we make it. Always has been, always will be.
quotes.author: Grandma Moses

quotes.quote: Because I was more often happy for other people, I got to spend more time being happy. And as I saw more light in everybody else, I seemed to have more myself. (250)
quotes.author: Victoria Moran

quotes.quote: It is because of its emptiness that the cup is useful.
quotes.author: Carole Wilkinson

quotes.quote: Happiness simply cannot be relied upon as a measure of success.
quotes.author: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: The devil's happy when the critics run you off.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: The universe doesn't give you what you want in your mind; it gives you what you demand with your actions.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: You never know what is enough unless you know what is more than enough.
quotes.author: Andrew Davidson

quotes.quote: Man can live about forty days without food, about three days without water, about eight minutes without air...but only for one second without hope.
quotes.author: Hal Lindsey

quotes.quote: Hope was tricky like water. Somehow it always found a way in.
quotes.author: Leigh Bardugo

quotes.quote: My life was going to flash before my eyes, but it decided to hide behind my eyes and quake with terror instead.
quotes.author: Sarah Rees Brennan

quotes.quote: I had to learn to live without you and I couldn't make sense of it, because I left so much of me inside of you.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: I am the happiest man alive. I have that in me that can convert poverty to riches, adversity to prosperity, and I am more invulnerable than Archilles; Fortune hath not one place to hit me.
quotes.author: Thomas Browne

quotes.quote: Your beliefs will be the light by which you see, but they will not be what you see and they will not be a substitute for seeing.
quotes.author: Flannery O'Connor

quotes.quote: Most of us go through each day looking for what we saw yesterday And, not surprisingly, that is what we find.
quotes.author: James A. Kitchens

quotes.quote: Each new friend gives rise to the possibility of anything!
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Even though your thinking might not be right for others, just so long as it's right for you then that's all what matters.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: If we accept time for what it is, how it flows and how we flow with it, I doubt very much that would continue wasting loads of it by constantly checking our watches.
quotes.author: Samantha Sotto

quotes.quote: I never wanted to go away, and the hard part now is the leaving you all. I'm not afraid, but it seems as if I should be homesick for you even in heaven.
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night.. You were playing with chicken livers and told me everyone was in quarantine.
quotes.author: Amy Summers

quotes.quote: Sometimes change was good. Sometimes it was even exactly what you needed.
quotes.author: Jenny O'Connell

quotes.quote: Stop in somebody's shadow to rest and cool down, and you are lost. No one can make anyone else happy.
quotes.author: Peter Deunov

quotes.quote: He who is more mindful of one, loses the love and the faith of both.
quotes.author: Kahlil Gibran

quotes.quote: Boggle with sex addicts is up there with go-kart racing with junkies.
quotes.author: Russell Brand

quotes.quote: Heaven help the roses if the bombs begin to fall
quotes.author: Stevie Wonder

quotes.quote: I don’t need any plastic in my body to validate me as a woman.
quotes.author: Courtney Love

quotes.quote: The First Splendid Truth: To be happy, I need to think about feeling good, feeling bad, and feeling right, in an atmosphere of growth.
quotes.author: Gretchen Rubin

quotes.quote: If you could have one wish, what would it be? We all have hopes and dreams that we do almost anything to make real. And if we get lucky, and our wish is granted, maybe that's what we call happiness.
quotes.author: I Am An Idiot Spammer

quotes.quote: One could be happy not only without love, but despite it.
quotes.author: Gabriel Garcí­a Márquez

quotes.quote: Yoga is the cessation of the movements of the mind. Then there is abiding in the Seer's own form.
quotes.author: Patañjali

quotes.quote: Soldiers live. He dies and not you, and you feel guilty, because you're glad he died, and not you. Soldiers live, and wonder why.
quotes.author: Glen Cook

quotes.quote: Your words will either give you joy or give you sorrow, but if they were spoken without regret, they give you peace.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: It was not curiosity that killed the goose who laid the golden egg, but an insatiable greed that devoured common sense.
quotes.author: E.A. Bucchianeri

quotes.quote: Let today be the day you finally release yourself from the imprisonment of past grudges and anger. Simplify your life. Let go of the poisonous past and live the abundantly beautiful present... today.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Unforgiveness denies the victim the possibility of parole and leaves them stuck in the prison of what was, incarcerating them in their trauma and relinquishing the chance to escape beyond the pain.
quotes.author: T.D. Jakes

quotes.quote: I felt a Cleaving in my Mind—As if my Brain had split—I tried to match it—Seam by Seam—But could not make it fit.
quotes.author: Emily Dickinson

quotes.quote: Play around. Dive into absurdity and write. Take chances. You will succeed if you are fearless of failure.
quotes.author: Natalie Goldberg

quotes.quote: We can become inspired to shape a higher, more ideal future, and when we do, miracles happen.
quotes.author: James Redfield

quotes.quote: Inspiration is the windfall from hard work and focus. Muses are too unreliable to keep on the payroll.
quotes.author: Helen Hanson

quotes.quote: Whether I fail or succeed shall be no man's doing but my own. I am the force.
quotes.author: Elaine Maxwell

quotes.quote: He believed that lack of education was the root of all of Pakistan’s problems. Ignorance allowed politicians to fool people and bad administrators to be re-elected.
quotes.author: Malala Yousafzai

quotes.quote: Although goals are important, having a plan of action is vital to the success of those goals. Having a goal with no plan of action is like wanting to travel to a new destination without having a map.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Following all the rules leaves a completed checklist. Following your heart achieves a completed you.
quotes.author: Ray A. Davis

quotes.quote: The bird dares to break the shell, then the shell breaks open and the bird can fly openly. This is the simplest principle of success. You dream, you dare and and you fly.
quotes.author: Israelmore Ayivor

quotes.quote: Sometimes not getting what you want is a brilliant stroke of luck.
quotes.author: Lorii Myers

quotes.quote: It's all right letting yourself go, as long as you can get yourself back.
quotes.author: Mick Jagger

quotes.quote: Lucu, terkadang manusia tidak menyadari apa yang sesungguhnya mereka inginkan sebelum benar-benar kehilangan.
quotes.author: Windry Ramadhina

quotes.quote: He'd always been a man who followed his head and not his heart. The heart was just a bloody motor. The head was meant to drive
quotes.author: Mario Puzo

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night.. you were trying to give coordinates to an apple
quotes.author: Nicole McKay

quotes.quote: I was wasting my life, always thinking about myself.
quotes.author: Morrissey

quotes.quote: True philosophy must start from the most immediate and comprehensive fact of consciousness: 'I am life that wants to live, in the midst of life that wants to live
quotes.author: Albert Schweitzer

quotes.quote: First you find out what you have , Dad would say. Then you figure out how to make it work for what you need, 'cause you don't get what you want. You get just what you have and no more.
quotes.author: Lilith Saintcrow

quotes.quote: Everyone creates realities based on their own personal beliefs. These beliefs are so powerful that they can create [expansive or entrapping] realities over and over.~Kuan Yin
quotes.author: Hope Bradford

quotes.quote: I don’t want to be a supermodel; I want to be a role model.
quotes.author: Queen Latifah

quotes.quote: Wise men talk because they have something to say; Fools, because they have to say something.
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: The value of a moment is immeasurable. The power of just ONE moment can propel you to success and happiness or chain you to failure and misery.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: You need to figure out what you want, Josh. If that means you need to swim against the tide to get it, at least youre aiming for something that could make you very happy.
quotes.author: Jay Asher

quotes.quote: But she loves me. Me. Just the way I am.
quotes.author: P.C. Cast

quotes.quote: I hope I make people feel better. I hope I take people out of their situations a little bit and make them happier. That's really why I do what I do.
quotes.author: Ellen DeGeneres

quotes.quote: If I lived a million lives, I would've felt a million feelings and I still would've fallen a million times for you.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: I love the name of honor more than I fear death.
quotes.author: Gaius Iulius Caesar

quotes.quote: It will get easier each time, I think. I hope. I just have to keep trying.
quotes.author: Jenny Han

quotes.quote: Poetic inspiration is all around us, and it surrounds us like silent music that makes our hearts vibrate. Any time you give or receive love, you are a part of a living poem.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Opportunity may knock only once but temptation leans on the door bell
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: The lungs are fishing nets for smoke, and I inhaled her essence like she was marijuana grown just for me.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To become successful, one must put themselves in the paths of giants!
quotes.author: Lillian Cauldwell

quotes.quote: Almost anyone can be an author; the business is to collect money and fame from this state of being.
quotes.author: A.A. Milne

quotes.quote: Sometimes success demands a certain refined insanity.
quotes.author: Isobelle Carmody

quotes.quote: Never feel shame for trying and failing for he who has never failed is he who has never tried.
quotes.author: Og Mandino

quotes.quote: Maybe it’s NOT Maybelline. Maybe you were just born with it.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: It's much easier on the emotions when one sees life as an experiment rather than a struggle for popularity.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Something deeply hidden had to be behind things.

quotes.quote: Character cannot be developed in ease and quiet. Only through experience of trial and suffering can the soul be strengthened, ambition inspired, and success achieved.
quotes.author: Helen Keller

quotes.quote: Friendship is held to be the severest test of character. It is easy, we think, to be loyal to a family and clan, whose blood is in your own veins.
quotes.author: Charles Eastman

quotes.quote: Wit and playfulness represent a desperately serious transcendence of evil. Humor is both a form of wisdom and a means of survival.
quotes.author: Tom Robbins

quotes.quote: Life is a barter of choice and consequences.
quotes.author: Samantha Sotto

quotes.quote: An apology is the superglue of life! It can repair just about anything!!
quotes.author: Lynn Johnston

quotes.quote: Had we but world enough and time, This coyness, lady, were no crime. We would sit down, and think which way To walk, and pass our long love’s day.
quotes.author: Andrew Marvell

quotes.quote: In the end, it is our defiance that redeems us. If wolves had a religion – if there was a religion of the wolf – that it is what it would tell us.
quotes.author: Mark Rowlands

quotes.quote: Self-respect. It would make me lovable. And it's the secret to good sex.
quotes.author: Susan Sontag

quotes.quote: My dream, is to dream, a dream.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Love doesn't erase the past, but it makes the future different.
quotes.author: Gary Chapman

quotes.quote: Relish love in your old age! Aged love is like aged wine; it becomes more satisfying, more refreshing, more valuable, more appreciated and more intoxicating!
quotes.author: Leo Buscaglia

quotes.quote: Don't let it end like this. Tell them I said something.
quotes.author: Pancho Villa

quotes.quote: A woman's happiness is in throwing everything away to live for love.
quotes.author: Ai Yazawa

quotes.quote: The truth about life and lie about life is not measured by others but by your intuition, which never lies.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Flowers always make people better, happier, and more helpful; they are sunshine, food and medicine to the mind.
quotes.author: Luther Burbank

quotes.quote: The dead don't desire revenge, but the happiness of the livng. To dirty your small hands would bring joy to no one.-Kenshin to Eiji
quotes.author: Nobuhiro Watsuki

quotes.quote: May those who follow their fate be granted happiness; may those who defy it be granted glory
quotes.author: Mizuo Shinonome

quotes.quote: To be happy you must have taken the measure of your powers, tasted the fruits of your passion, and learned your place in the world.
quotes.author: George Santayana

quotes.quote: I don't own the sunset, but I have a free yearly membership to stream whenever it's on, and this is a life perk that makes me wealthy.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The truly revolutionary promise of our nation's founding document is the freedom to pursue happiness-with-a-capital-H.
quotes.author: Dan Savage

quotes.quote: You'll be okay. No matter what shape reality takes, you can handle it.
quotes.author: Shiro Amano

quotes.quote: Donde termina el arco iris, en tu alma o en el horizonte?Where does the rainbow end, in your soul or on the horizon?
quotes.author: Pablo Neruda

quotes.quote: War is not just the business of death, it is the antitheses of life.
quotes.author: Joss Whedon

quotes.quote: For every bad thing in life, there are more good things to tip the balance.
quotes.author: Richelle Mead

quotes.quote: She comforted him in his darkness and gave him hope. She seemed to cherish a sincere affection for him, despite his failings. 'She saved me'.
quotes.author: Sylvain Reynard

quotes.quote: If you treat every situation as a life and death matter, you'll die a lot of times.
quotes.author: Dean Smith

quotes.quote: I will come back to you, I swear I will;And you will know me still. I shall be only a little tallerThan when I went.
quotes.author: Edna St. Vincent Millay

quotes.quote: When a man plays with your heart it is for one of two reasons: He knows he can or he is undecided.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: I saw someone who so closely resembled you that my heart started beating like a hummingbird's wings, and my mind flew back to where we were when we were we’re.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I watered your memory every day to keep it alive, and after all this time it's like a tall cypress tree rooted deep in the St. John's River.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: A writer doesn’t solve problems. He allows them to emerge.
quotes.author: Friedrich Dürrenmatt

quotes.quote: Be a King. Dare to be Different, dare to manifest your greatness.
quotes.author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

quotes.quote: Do not speak about anyone who is not physically present.
quotes.author: Allan Lokos

quotes.quote: The greatest risk to man is not that he aims too high and misses, but that he aims too low and hits.
quotes.author: Michaelangelo

quotes.quote: Your agreement with reality defines your life.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Start shaping your own day. Start walking your own walk. This journey is yours, take charge of it. Stop giving other people the power to shape your life.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Give time, give space to sprout your potential. Awaken the beauty of your heart – the beauty of your spirit. There are infinite possibilities.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: The empowered woman is powerful beyond measure and beautiful beyond description.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Grateful souls focus on the happiness and abundance present in their lives and this in turn attracts more abundance and joy towards them.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: To live, to TRULY live, we must be willing to RISK. To be nothing in order to find everything. To leap before we look.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: If you can't hold on, hold on
quotes.author: The Killers

quotes.quote: No one is to blame because there is no one other than you. Nothing is to disrespect because there is nothing other than you.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Patience is the only way you can endure the gray periods.
quotes.author: Teri Hatcher

quotes.quote: Life is a bitter sweet journey my friend, a bitter sweet journey.
quotes.author: Luellen Hoffman

quotes.quote: Later on in life, you expect a bit of rest, don't you? You think you deserve it. I did, anyway. But then you begin to understand that the reward of merit is not life's business.
quotes.author: Julian Barnes

quotes.quote: And what greater might do we possess as human beings than our capacity to question and to learn?
quotes.author: Ann Druyan

quotes.quote: Do I attribute my success to hard work, or sunscreen? If you want the truth, maybe you should ask my new albino secretary.

quotes.quote: When we give up the chase, we give up our wishing.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Stop waiting for the right person to come into your life. Be the right person to come to someone’s life
quotes.author: Leo Babauta

quotes.quote: The happiness you feel is in direct proportion to the love you give.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: The pleasure of criticizing takes away from us the pleasure of being moved by some very fine things.
quotes.author: Jean de La Bruyère

quotes.quote: The human soul has still greater need of the ideal than of the real. It is by the real that we exist, it is by the ideal that we live.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: To be truly radical is to make hope possible rather than despair convincing
quotes.author: Raymond Williams

quotes.quote: There is no such thing as helplessness. It's just another word for giving up.
quotes.author: Jefferson Smith

quotes.quote: Lord, may the pain be ours, And the weakness that it brings, But at least give us the strength, Of not showing it to anyone!
quotes.author: Fernando Pessoa

quotes.quote: Exhaust the little moment. Soon it dies. And be it gash or gold it will not comeAgain in this identical disguise.
quotes.author: Gwendolyn Brooks

quotes.quote: If I were splat proof, I wouldn’t be afraid of heights. Also, I wish I had a bouncy ball for a heart, so I could love fearlessly.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I loved her, she loved him, and he loved himself. Now she loves me, he loves her, and I love myself as I am—without her in my life.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: I like my coffee like Colfax Avenue mixed with Atlantic Boulevard, and if you're buying then I'm driving. Let's sip this romance slowly.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Others may write from the head, but he writes from the heart, and the heart will always understand him.
quotes.author: Washington Irving

quotes.quote: Lahat ng mga salitang yan may dating sa'yo. Sabi kasi ng isip mo.
quotes.author: Bob Ong

quotes.quote: The direction in which education starts a man will determine his future life
quotes.author: Plato

quotes.quote: But my dreaming self refuses to be consoled. It continues to wander, aimless, homeless, alone. It cannot be convinced of its safety by any evidence drawn from my waking life.
quotes.author: Margaret Atwood

quotes.quote: ‎If heart filled with purity, then mind found the beauty.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: The road to success is not easy to navigate, but with hard work, drive and passion, it's possible to achieve the American dream.
quotes.author: Tommy Hilfiger

quotes.quote: The Gospel offers forgiveness for the past, new life for the present, and hope for the future.
quotes.author: John Sentamu

quotes.quote: Art is parasitic on life, just as criticism is parasitic on art.
quotes.author: Harry S Truman

quotes.quote: For what it’s worth: it’s never too late to be whoever you want to be. I hope you live a life you’re proud of, and if you find that you’re not, I hope you have the strength to start all over again.
quotes.author: Eric Roth

quotes.quote: Today is the only day in which we have any power.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: You teach people how to treat you.
quotes.author: Oprah Winfrey

quotes.quote: The easiest way to do anything is properly.
quotes.author: K.J. Parker

quotes.quote: Pray to God, but row towards shore.
quotes.author: Lee Ezell

quotes.quote: Even if you are alone you wage war with yourself.
quotes.author: Dejan Stojanovic

quotes.quote: Be happy for no reason, like a child. If you are happy for a reason, you’re in trouble, because that reason can be taken from you.
quotes.author: Deepak Chopra

quotes.quote: You are beautiful. Your beauty, just like your capacity for life, happiness, and success, is immeasurable.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: A woman who surrenders her freedom need not surrender her dignity.
quotes.author: Wally Lamb

quotes.quote: An ordinary man can surround himself with two thousand books and thenceforward have at least one place in the world in which it is always possible to be happy.
quotes.author: Augustine Birrell

quotes.quote: You are an ocean in a drop of dew, all the universes in a thin sack of blood. What are these pleasures then, these joys, these worldsthat you keep reaching for, hoping they will make you more alive?
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: What would it be like to look in the mirror and actually accept what you see? Not loathe the reflection, or despise it, or be resigned to it? But to like it?
quotes.author: Justina Chen

quotes.quote: The master of the garden is the one who waters it, trims the branches, plants the seeds, and pulls the weeds. If you merely stroll through the garden, you are but an acolyte.
quotes.author: Vera Nazarian

quotes.quote: Don't put off happiness you can have today. Tomorrow is a hope, not a promise
quotes.author: Debra Anastasia

quotes.quote: Chaos is more freedom; in fact, total freedom. But no meaning.
quotes.author: Audrey Niffenegger

quotes.quote: Don't despair: despair suggests you are in total control and know what is coming. You don't - surrender to events with hope.
quotes.author: Alain de Botton

quotes.quote: I have nothing now but praise for my life. I'm not unhappy. I cry a lot because I miss people. They die and I can't stop them. They leave me and I love them more...
quotes.author: Maurice Sendak

quotes.quote: My pride shut me up, my hurt shut me down, and together they ganged up on my hope and let her get away.
quotes.author: David Levithan

quotes.quote: Sure, I had hopes and dreams before working at @McDonalds. I used to want to be a dancer and a gardener and grow movement on a farm in Iowa.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Stuff your brain with knowledge.
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: Think of what starlight And lamplight would lack Diamonds and fireflies If they couldn’t lean against Black. . . .
quotes.author: Mary O'Neill

quotes.quote: Moods can be contagious. Don't catch or spread a bad mood.
quotes.author: Marilyn Suttle

quotes.quote: They may try to stop you by their words and deeds, but like air you will rise above it all. You are unstoppable
quotes.author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

quotes.quote: I've come to realize that sometimes, what you love most is what you have to fight the hardest to keep.
quotes.author: Kirsten Hubbard

quotes.quote: Everything you need is already within you. The beauty of life is that your DESTINY lies always in your hands. The time has come for you to STEP UP and BE GREAT
quotes.author: Pablo

quotes.quote: The recipe for great art has always been misery and a good bowel movement.
quotes.author: Don Roff

quotes.quote: If football players wanted to protect their brains from injury they’d wear astronaut helmets. After all, astronauts have massive IQ’s, so wearing their protective headgear seems like a smart choice.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My skull needs a tornado inside, to clean out my thoughts. I’ll call Kansas tomorrow to see if I can rent one for the day.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: You have to wait for your mind to catch up with whatever it is it’s working on; then you can write a novel.
quotes.author: James M. Cain

quotes.quote: If you want to give yourself a fair chance to succeed, never expect too much too soon
quotes.author: Po Bronson

quotes.quote: One learns from books and example only that certain things can be done. Actual learning requires that you do those things.
quotes.author: Frank Herbert

quotes.quote: If you do not have persistence then no amount of education, talent or genius can make up for it.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Always have an air of expectancy.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Leave me with my leftover meatloaf and my Yesterday Sandwich. I’ll be in love tomorrow, if you come back with the ketchup.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: My body is an ugly masterpiece that lives off the beauty of sound.
quotes.author: Chad Sugg

quotes.quote: To pursue wisdom is to live in such a way that one is prepared to face death when it comes. (247)
quotes.author: Gregory Bassham

quotes.quote: Only by examining our personal biases can we truly grow as artists; only by cultivating empathy can we truly grow as people.
quotes.author: Jen Knox

quotes.quote: It's only natural to feel lonely after the enjoyable moments pass. But as you experience new joys those feelings of sorrow will start to fade.
quotes.author: Mizu Sahara

quotes.quote: If someone tells you you're not beautiful, turn around and walk away so they canhave a great view of your fabulous ass.
quotes.author: Miley Cyrus

quotes.quote: I don't ask for the meaning of the song of a bird or the rising of the sun on a misty morning. There they are, and they are beautiful.
quotes.author: Pete Hamill

quotes.quote: Because each of you has his or her own death, you carry it with you in a secret place from the moment you're born, it belongs to you and you belong to it.
quotes.author: José Saramago

quotes.quote: Life is so short. The only person you hurt when you stay angry or hold grudges is you. Forgive everyone, including yourself.
quotes.author: Tom Giaquinto

quotes.quote: And hard times are good in their own way, too. Because the only way you can achieve true happiness is if you experience true sadness as well. It's all about light and shade. Balance.
quotes.author: Gabrielle Williams

quotes.quote: She cannot chain my soul. Yes, she could hurt me. She'd already done so...I would bleed, or not. Scar, or not. Live, or not. But she could not hurt my soul, not unless I gave it to her.
quotes.author: Laurie Halse Anderson

quotes.quote: Hope in the beginning feels like such a violation of the loss, and yet without it we couldn't survive.
quotes.author: Gail Caldwell

quotes.quote: Everywhere we shine death and life burn into something new…
quotes.author: Aberjhani

quotes.quote: You call it hope — that fire of fire!It is but agony of desire.
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.quote: When you get ill do not get nervous about it and try as much as possible to be hopeful.
quotes.author: Hazrat Ali Ibn Abu-Talib A.S

quotes.quote: Picnics are very dear to those who are in the first stage of the tender passion.
quotes.author: Arthur Conan Doyle

quotes.quote: When I type a title page, I hold it and I look at it and I think, I just need four thousand sentences to go with this and I’ll have a book.
quotes.author: Betsy Byars

quotes.quote: I haven’t spent my time trying to duplicate my success. But only because I haven’t had any yet.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Throwing herself into learning helped Miri ignore the painful chill of solitude around her.
quotes.author: Shannon Hale

quotes.quote: Rise above the deceptions and temptations of the mind. This is your duty. You are born for this only; all other duties are self-created and self-imposed owing to ignorance.
quotes.author: Sivananda Saraswati

quotes.quote: Participate in your own dreams, don’t just say what you want or complain about what you don’t have.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Manifesting is a lot like making a cake. The things needed are supplied by you, the mixing is done by your mind and the baking is done in the oven of the universe.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Never allow your mind to wander untamed like a wild animal that exists on the basis of survival of the fittest. Tame your mind with consistent focus on your goals and desires.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: I grew up in a very spiritual home in a Liberty City neighborhood of Miami, FL. I was raised in the church, and my mother was a very inspirational person in my life.
quotes.author: Robert Battle

quotes.quote: Long week. Long month. Long life.
quotes.author: John Green

quotes.quote: We were exiles from reality that summer. We were refugees from ourselves.
quotes.author: Chris Cleave

quotes.quote: If you have love in your life it can make up for a great many things you lack. If you don't have it, no matter what else there is, it's not enough.
quotes.author: Ann Landers

quotes.quote: Time is cruel like life. It slows down so that you can truly experience the worst moments of it. Only if you make it through them do you get to say ‘It all happened so fast.
quotes.author: J.A. Redmerski

quotes.quote: We feel most alive when we are closest to death.
quotes.author: Nenia Campbell

quotes.quote: Music is everywhere. It’s in the air between us, waiting to be sung.
quotes.author: David Levithan

quotes.quote: Life is a balanced system of learning and evolution. Whether pleasure or pain; every situation in your life serves a purpose. It is up to us to recognize what that purpose could be.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Quote words that affirmall men and women are yourbrothers and sisters.
quotes.author: Aberjhani

quotes.quote: Do not accept whatever comes. Do not accept whatever goes. You have infinite power. Exercise your choice.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Everything that happens to you is your teacher. The secret is to learn to sit at the feet of your own life and be taught by it. Polly B. Berends
quotes.author: Polly Berrien Berends

quotes.quote: It was time to let go of the mad desire to remember. It was time to start living whatever life would come. In the present, not the past.
quotes.author: Adi Alsaid

quotes.quote: Friendship, as has been said, consists in a full commitment of the will to another person with a view to that person's good.
quotes.author: Pope John Paul II

quotes.quote: Michael: There's nothing here to fear. Lucifer: Well, there's always the truth.
quotes.author: Mike Carey

quotes.quote: He who has truth at his heart need never fear the want of persuasion on his tongue.
quotes.author: John Ruskin

quotes.quote: To risk life to save a smile on a face of a woman or a child is the secret of chivalry.
quotes.author: Dejan Stojanovic

quotes.quote: When it is dark enough, you can see the stars.
quotes.author: Chris Bradford

quotes.quote: What we are waiting for is not as important as what happens to us while we are waiting. Trust the process.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: There is something simply beautiful and simply innocent, in being human. It is just so innocent and beautiful. I love it.
quotes.author: C. JoyBell C.

quotes.quote: Don't you know no one can escapethe power of creatures reaching outwith breath alone?
quotes.author: Marina Tsvetaeva

quotes.quote: I smell blood and an era of prominent madmen.
quotes.author: W.H. Auden

quotes.quote: What is important is the story. Because when we are all dust and teeth and kicked-up bits of skin - when we're dancing with our own skeletons - our words might be all that's left of us.
quotes.author: Alexandra Fuller

quotes.quote: Forgiveness means letting go of the hope for a better past.
quotes.author: Lama Surya Das

quotes.quote: All of us need to be in touch with a mysterious, tantalizing source of inspiration that teases our sense of wonder and goads us on to life’s next adventure.
quotes.author: Rob Brezsny

quotes.quote: Bravado may stir the crowd, but courage needs no audience.
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: To witness miracles unfold in your experience, count your blessings and be thankful. Perceived small blessings accumulate to be the most powerful.

quotes.quote: They say religion is about love, but you wonder how much of it really is about fear.

quotes.quote: There's no better way to inform and expand you mind on a regular basis than to get into the habit of reading good literature.

quotes.quote: Don't live to be judged for what you haven't done. Live to be judged for what you have done.

quotes.quote: What good has impatience ever brought? It has only served as the mother of mistakes and the father of irritation.

quotes.quote: I read in self-defense.

quotes.quote: The greatest gift of life is friendship, and I have received it.

quotes.quote: You know, one of my biggest dreams in life is to play a Disney princess.

quotes.quote: Learn as if you were not reaching your goal and as though you were scared of missing it

quotes.quote: What we instill in our children will be the foundation upon which they build their future.

quotes.quote: Ideas are the source of all things

quotes.quote: Let the revolution begin.

quotes.quote: The crowning fortune of a man is to be born to some pursuit which finds him employment and happiness, whether it be to make baskets, or broadswords, or canals, or statues, or songs.

quotes.quote: Free yourself from the complexities of your life! A life of simplicity and happiness awaits you.

quotes.quote: Why do you so earnestly seek the truth in distant places?Look for delusion and truth in thebottom of your own heart.

quotes.quote: Death ends a life, not a relationship.

quotes.quote: When she fucked up all those years ago, just a little girl terrified into paralysis, she fell onto the enigma of herself.

quotes.quote: On every level of life, from housework to heights of prayer, in all judgment and efforts to get things done, hurry and impatience are sure marks of the amateur.

quotes.quote: It is not needful for our dreams to be very grand nor very big. It is only needful for our dreams to be very shiny.

quotes.quote: I imagine what would happen if everyone turned their regrets into wishes, went around shouting them.

quotes.quote: There is no try. There is only do.

quotes.quote: As every divided kingdom falls, so every mind divided between many studies confounds and saps itself.

quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: Ah, if everyone was as sensitive as you! There's no girl who hasn't gone through that. And it's all so unimportant!

quotes.quote: You will find, that when you have someone to love, that the face is less important than the brain, and the body is less important than the heart.

quotes.quote: If you write it down, you can make it happen.

quotes.quote: Call no man happy until he is dead.

quotes.quote: It's not about what you've done; it's how you've experienced whatever has happened to you. Matt Lawrence in The Overachievers

quotes.quote: Each person you meetis an aspect of yourself, clamoring for love.

quotes.quote: To buy a cake... to howl at the moon... to know true happiness... I am happy.

quotes.quote: Education is beautification of the inner world and the outer world.

quotes.quote: You don't have to be part of a couple to be happy, you know.

quotes.quote: We can't be so desperate for love that we forget where we can always find it; within.

quotes.quote: Now comes the mystery! (last words)

quotes.quote: Nothing is predestined. The obstacles of your past can become the gateways that lead to new beginnings.

quotes.quote: Miscommunication is endless.

quotes.quote: On the left side of a strong woman, stands a strong man; he is strengthened by her character.

quotes.quote: The stars up there at night are closer than you think.

quotes.quote: All words are masks and the lovelier they are, the more they are meant to conceal.

quotes.quote: Start with big dreams and make life worth living.

quotes.quote: Find the thing you want to do most intensely, make sure that’s it, and do it with all your might. If you live, well and good. If you die, well and good. Your purpose is done

quotes.quote: Auction houses run a rigged game. They know exactly how many people will be bidding on a work and exactly who they are. In a gallery, works of art need only one person who wants to pay for them.

quotes.quote: Everything changes except the love.

quotes.quote: You make mistakes, mistakes don't make you

quotes.quote: You see, the deaf have an intimacy with silence. It’s there in their dreams.

quotes.quote: If it’s going to be a world with no time for sentiment, it’s not a world that I want to live in.

quotes.quote: The one who would be constant in happiness must frequently change.

quotes.quote: Stop lying to yourself. When we deny our own truth, we deny our own potential.

quotes.quote: It's impossible to be unhappy while wearing a poncho!

quotes.quote: Sometimes, the simple things are more fun and meaningful than all the banquets in the world ...

quotes.quote: But as long as something is never even started, you never have to worry about it ending. It has endless potential.

quotes.quote: Doing the tough things sets winners apart from losers.

quotes.quote: Yes, the brutalities of progress are called revolutions. When they are over, this is recognised: that the human race has been harshly treated, but that it has advanced.

quotes.quote: I believe there is a kind of happiness to be found in every thing in life, in all that is good and pleasing, as well as in that which is sad or poignant.

quotes.quote: Maybe I hope too much. Maybe I dream too much or maybe I love too much to just give up on you.

quotes.quote: Stop trying to be less of who you are. Let this time in your life cut you open and drain all of the things that are holding you back.

quotes.quote: Thank goodness for the first snow, it was a reminder--no matter how old you became and how much you'd seen, things could still be new if you were willing to believe they still mattered.

quotes.quote: We must be careful more than ever what we let our hearts believe in.

quotes.quote: Think big thoughts but relish small pleasures.

quotes.quote: Life is about moving, it’s about change. And when things stop doing that they’re dead.

quotes.quote: Sleep is a little death, dreams the whisperings of the Other, who would drag us all into his eternal night.

quotes.quote: Still, they have one thing I envy. Humans, if nothing else, have the good sense to die.

quotes.quote: With six pieces of wood, I’m building a life, and my coffin.

quotes.quote: To reap a return in ten years, plant trees. To reap a return in 100, cultivate the people.

quotes.quote: Success is a poor teacher
quotes.author: Robert T. Kiyosaki

quotes.quote: Success is something you experience when you act accordingly. Success is not something you have, it's something you do.

quotes.quote: Most people tend to think the best of those who are blessed with beauty; we have difficulty imagining that physical perfection can conceal twisted emotions or a damaged mind.

quotes.quote: Do you love yourself enough to BE what you love yourself enough to WANT?

quotes.quote: The love of money is the root of all evil, therefore selfishness must be the seed.

quotes.quote: People inspire you, or they drain you. PICK THEM WISELY.

quotes.quote: You don't destroy what you want toacquire in the future.

quotes.quote: A moment of consideration often prevents a thousand apologies

quotes.quote: The greatest wisdom consists in knowing one's own follies.

quotes.quote: A person is wise if he listens to millions of advice and doesn't implement any of it.

quotes.quote: Remember, young man, experience is not the best teacher. Other people's experience is the best teacher. By reading about the lives of great people, you can unlock the secrets to what made them great.

quotes.quote: All that you are is all around you.

quotes.quote: One of the most healing things you can do is recognize where in your life you are your own poison.

quotes.quote: The speed of your success is limited only by your dedication and what you're willing to sacrifice

quotes.quote: The artist lives to have stories to tell and to learn to tell them well.

quotes.quote: The concept of dreaming is known to the waking mind but to the dreamer there is no waking, no real world, no sanity; there is only the screaming bedlam of sleep.

quotes.quote: Don't you know how sweet and wonderful life can be?

quotes.quote: Words rich in meaning can be cheap in sound effects.

quotes.quote: Wit seduces by signaling intelligence without nerdiness.

quotes.quote: You’ve got to be sure of yourself beforeYou can ever win a prize.

quotes.quote: A lack of clarity could put the brakes on any journey to success.

quotes.quote: Temptation is stronger in the minds of people who are in doubt. Prayer makes it weaker.

quotes.quote: Juggling is sometimes called the art of controlling patterns, controlling patterns in time and space.

quotes.quote: Answered prayer is the interchange of love between the Father and His child.

quotes.quote: After all Death is a Symbol that there was Life.

quotes.quote: What do we any of us have but our illusions? And what do we ask of others but that we be allowed to keep them?
quotes.author: W. Somerset Maugham

quotes.quote: The truth is revealed when you are ready to receive it when you need it in order to move forward to take the next step in your journey. to move on toward your destiny.
quotes.author: Alyson Noel

quotes.quote: And the truth must finally lie in that which every oppressed individual feels within himself but hasn't the courage to express
quotes.author: Wilhelm Reich

quotes.quote: No one knows for sure that that tomorrow won't come, but most people assume that tomorrow will still exist as usual. This is Toba's Paradox, which means, hope overcomes doubt.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: True hope is swift, and flies with swallow's wings.

quotes.quote: The path i walk lights up in flames
quotes.author: Roberta Karim

quotes.quote: If you hit bottom, there's a whole lot of people here to help you up
quotes.author: Suzanne Collins

quotes.quote: I love him in ways that I can’t explain to other people. They don’t understand… it’s not their fault.
quotes.author: Jennifer Elisabeth

quotes.quote: Someone once said that death is not the greatest loss in life. The greatest loss is what dies inside of us while we live. I could tell you who said it, but who the hell really cares.
quotes.author: One tree hill haley james scott

quotes.quote: Embrace the probability of your imminent death....and know there is nothing i can do to save you.
quotes.author: Suzanne Collins

quotes.quote: It is difficult to say what is impossible, for the dream of yesterday is the hope of today and the reality of tomorrow.

quotes.quote: I melted into the dream as if I had always been there. I knew where I had come from; I knew where I was going.

quotes.quote: Don’t waste time waiting for inspiration. Begin, and inspiration will find you.
quotes.author: H. Jackson Brown Jr.

quotes.quote: Every day is a journey filled with twists and turns. Every day, if you smile, you will feel alive, my son.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Anyone can smile on their best day. I like to meet a man who can smile on his WORST.

quotes.quote: The really magical things are the ones that happen right in front of you. A lot of the time you keep looking for beauty, but it is already there. And if you look with a bit more intention, you see it.

quotes.quote: I want you to embark on the truth of loving yourself because when you love yourself and when you appreciate yourself, you will make healthy changes in your life for healthy reasons.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Quiet people have the loudest minds.
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: We were all born equal, but where we are in life now is of our own making.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Pride makes us long for a solution to things – a solution, a purpose, a final cause; but the better telescopes become, the more stars appear.
quotes.author: Julian Barnes

quotes.quote: You are a placebo responder. Your body plays tricks on your mind. You cannot be trusted.
quotes.author: Ben Goldacre

quotes.quote: You can have it all, just not all at the same time.
quotes.author: Betty Friedan

quotes.quote: The road to success is always under construction.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: If you want to lead an extraordinary life, find out what the ordinary do–and don't do it.
quotes.author: Tommy Newberry

quotes.quote: The French say you get hungry when you’re eating, and I get inspired when I’m working. It’s my engine
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: A mind is like a puzzle; you must unlock it to read its hidden secrets.
quotes.author: Melissa de la Cruz

quotes.quote: One moment several things are possible, the next moment only one happens, and the rest don't exist. Except that other worlds have sprung into being, on which the did happen.
quotes.author: Philip Pullman

quotes.quote: The world belongs to those who read.
quotes.author: Rick Holland

quotes.quote: Sometimes it takes falling apart to ever have a chance of being fully whole.
quotes.author: Amanda Rose

quotes.quote: YOU. ARE. PERFECT. You are. Im talking to YOU. and dont you dare think otherwise...embrace the entity of yourself...you are a puzzle piece and you are meant to be puzzling.
quotes.author: Kaiden Blake

quotes.quote: Pleasure is the only thing one should live for, nothing ages like happiness.
quotes.author: Oscar Wilde

quotes.quote: I must die. Must I then die lamenting? I must be put in chains. Must I then also lament? I must go into exile. Does any man then hinder me from going with smiles and cheerfulness and contentment?
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: The future will be what it will, and fretting about it will only make your fears more likely to come true.
quotes.author: Christopher Paolini

quotes.quote: Associate with the noblest people you can find; read the best books; live with the mighty; but learn to be happy alone.
quotes.author: Saul Bellow

quotes.quote: People were always the limiters of happiness except for the very few that were as good as spring itself.
quotes.author: Ernest Hemingway

quotes.quote: When you know love then that is the time you forget hate.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Trust is always a good idea. For someone else.
quotes.author: Sherrilyn Kenyon

quotes.quote: We all look for happiness, but without knowing where to find it: like drunkards who look for their house, knowing dimly that they have one
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.quote: If humor and rumor are needed more than faith and truth, then it tells me something about the kind of world we live today.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: She wildly burned for the one she loved and he stood there watching, hoping he too would catch a blaze from the violence stirring in her heart.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: There is life, and there is death, and in between there is me. Please don’t wake me up.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: Love is the most precious gift you could ever possibly hope to steal. Some women foolishly do not leave their rib cages locked at night.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: The visions we offer our children shape the future. It _matters_ what those visions are. Often they become self-fulfilling prophecies. Dreams are maps.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.quote: Maybe that's why life is so precious. No rewind or fast forward...just patience and faith.
quotes.author: Cristina Marrero

quotes.quote: If two people are meant for one another, that doesn't mean that they have to rush and be together right away. Real love takes time to grow, just like how it takes time to grow from children to adults.
quotes.author: Jonathan Anthony Burkett

quotes.quote: When you walk a life of honesty, you live a life of truth.
quotes.author: Therese Benedict

quotes.quote: I am sore wounded but not slainI will lay me down and bleed a whileAnd then rise up to fight again
quotes.author: John Dryden

quotes.quote: Soul receives from soul that knowledge, therefore not by book nor from tongue. If knowledge of mysteries come after emptiness of mind, that is illumination of heart.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: It's amazing how close I have been, all this time, to my old life. And yet the distance that divides me from it is vast.
quotes.author: Lauren Oliver

quotes.quote: The philosophy of the schoolroom in one generation is the philosophy of government in the next.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.quote: Make a pact with yourself today to not be defined by your past. Instead, shake things up today! Live through today. Don’t just exist through it - LIVE through it!
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Passion can transform the mind, body and spirit...Passion can align you with the wisdom of nature and the power of what is in your heart.
quotes.author: JoLynne Valerie

quotes.quote: The mind picks some very bad times to take a walk doesn't it?
quotes.author: Jeff Lindsay

quotes.quote: Success doesn't come to you; you go to it.
quotes.author: T. Scott McLeod

quotes.quote: Too much action with too little intent makes for wasteful exertion of energy and the confusion between movement and progress.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The mind is left bereft when it is nothing more than a tool of regurgitation.
quotes.author: Corey Taylor

quotes.quote: Hard work is what you do to make ends meet, easy work is getting others to do the hard work for you.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: The difference between being mediocre and achieving excellence is you.

quotes.quote: If the self-help books worked, it would be a shrinking industry not a growing one.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The glory of science is, that it is freeing the soul -- breaking the mental manacles -- getting the brain out of bondage -- giving courage to thought -- filling the world with mercy, justice, and joy.

quotes.quote: If you set your goals ridiculously high and it's a failure, you will fail above everyone else's success.
quotes.author: James Cameron

quotes.quote: It seems as if life and hope must cease together.
quotes.author: Anne Bronte

quotes.quote: What if nobody showed up at Armageddon?
quotes.author: C.R. Strahan

quotes.quote: You don't know what you can get away with until you try.
quotes.author: Colin Powell

quotes.quote: Suffering teaches joy.
quotes.author: Sonia Rumzi

quotes.quote: Why did you look at the sunset?'Philip answered with his mouth full:Because I was happy.
quotes.author: W. Somerset Maugham

quotes.quote: I wanted to hold happiness in reserve, like a bottle of champagne. I postponed it because I was afraid, because I overvalued it, and then I didn't want to use it up, because what do you wish for then?

quotes.quote: There is nothing worse for the lying soul than the mirror of reality.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The negation of severe suffering was the nearest approach to happiness I expected to know. Besides, I seemed to hold two lives - the life of thought, and that of reality.

quotes.quote: If you feel obsessed to prove something to the world, then you'd need world attention to be able to prove it.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: Grown people know that they do not always know the way of things, and even if they think they know, they do not know where and how they got the proof.
quotes.author: Zora Neale Hurston

quotes.quote: In life, the hardest decisions often have to be made more than once. But each time, it gets easier.

quotes.quote: Those who are enslaved to their sects are not merely devoid of all sound knowledge, but they will not even stop to learn!

quotes.quote: Live in this moment ... for it is the only moment we have!
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: I’d never seen anything like it. First a trial, then a few murders, then dancing. Life goes on. Or, in this case, death continues.
quotes.author: Charlaine Harris

quotes.quote: Things go away to return, brightened for the passage
quotes.author: A.R. Ammons

quotes.quote: I feel a resurgence of my 6-year-old self… that little warrior, goddess of a girl reminding me of who I was when I was little, before the world got its hands on me.
