quotes.quote: Life isn't just about darkness or light, rather it's about finding light within the darkness.
quotes.author: Landon Parham

quotes.quote: If ever I was running, it was towards you.
quotes.author: Jennifer Elisabeth

quotes.quote: The point is, you have family and friends who love you. You have a world out there just waiting for you to conquer it. You have a life that will be anything you make it. That's the point.

quotes.quote: I look in the mirror through the eyes of the child that was me.
quotes.author: Judy Collins

quotes.quote: Go make your mark on the world. Be a world changer! Live bold for Christ no matter the cost.
quotes.author: Crystal Woodman Miller

quotes.quote: Surplus meant unnecessary. Not required. You couldn’t be a Surplus if you were needed by someone else. You couldn’t be a Surplus if you were loved.
quotes.author: Gemma Malley

quotes.quote: Take what comes and live life without complaint. What will be, will be. Life is a woman's gift; death is God's.
quotes.author: Nancy McKenzie

quotes.quote: We didn't start the fireIt was always burningSince the world's been turningWe didn't start the fireNo we didn't light itBut we tried to fight it
quotes.author: Billy Joel

quotes.quote: Just pick a goal and stick to it―no big complicated secret.
quotes.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

quotes.quote: I didn't dream about you last night. I woke up in fear.
quotes.author: Michael Summers

quotes.quote: Follow your bliss and doors will open where there were no doors before.
quotes.author: Joseph Campbell

quotes.quote: If you really want to be a writer, nobody can stop you -- and if you don't, nobody can help you.

quotes.quote: I was kind of excited to go to jail for the first time and I learnt some great dialogue.
quotes.author: Quentin Tarantino

quotes.quote: Amendment to live by-J.O.Y.Jesus first, Others second, Yourself last.
quotes.author: Michelle Duggar

quotes.quote: Combinatory play seems to be the essential feature in productive thought.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: It is a profound and necessary truth that the deep things in science are not found because they are useful; they are found because it was possible to find them.
quotes.author: J. Robert Oppenheimer

quotes.quote: Poverty: a temporary financial low, curable by money.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Loving means sharing what you have however big or small it may be!
quotes.author: Geronimo Stilton

quotes.quote: Few among men are they who cross to the further shore. The others merely run up and down the bank on this side.
quotes.author: Gautama Buddha

quotes.quote: A photograph shouldn't be just a picture, it should be a philosophy.

quotes.quote: The quickest way to experiencing the peace inside, is to learn to recognize when I am not at peace.
quotes.author: James Patrick McDonald

quotes.quote: And just when I though things were starting to get better, everything had gone wrong again.
quotes.author: Rachel Ward

quotes.quote: One should cultivate good habits of memory, for it is capable of making existence a Paradise or an Inferno.
quotes.author: Baltasar Gracián

quotes.quote: Don't be afraid to be who you are bacause you are the only person who knows you best.
quotes.author: Saredo Ali

quotes.quote: Do not think that one has to be sad in order to be militant, even though the thing one is fighting is abominable.

quotes.quote: The closer you come to knowing that you alone create the world of your experience, the more vital it becomes for you to discover just who is doing the creating.

quotes.quote: A women can run, hide, play and have fun but she will shine far better when she just smiles without none.

quotes.quote: Sooner or later in life everyone discovers that perfect happiness is unrealizable, but there are few who stop to consider the antithesis; that perfect unhappiness is equally unattainable.

quotes.quote: One of the few things in life that cannot possibly do harm in the end is the honest pursuit of the truth.

quotes.quote: She needed the chaos within her in order to discover the extraordinary no man could ever reach.

quotes.quote: When you know that everything matters—that every move counts as much as any other—you will begin living a life of permanent purpose.

quotes.quote: The Bible makes it clear that every time that there is a story of faith, it is completely original. God's creative genius is endless.

quotes.quote: Souls reconstructed with faith transform agony into peace.

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night. We stopped telling each other about our dreams when we realized we were still inside them.

quotes.quote: Reading is like travel, allowing you to exit your own life for a bit, and to come back with a renewed, even inspired, perspective.

quotes.quote: Don't die without fulfilling your purpose.

quotes.quote: May you live in such a way that your death is just the beginning of your life.
quotes.author: Max Lucado

quotes.quote: Why are there trees I never walk under but large and melodious thoughts descend upon me?
quotes.author: Walt Whitman

quotes.quote: Come to the edge. We might fall. Come to the edge. It's too high!COME TO THE EDGE!And they cameAnd he pushedAnd they flew.
quotes.author: Christopher Logue

quotes.quote: …it’s not just learning that’s important. It’s learning what to do with what you learn and learning why you learn things that matters.
quotes.author: Norton Juster

quotes.quote: Success teaches us nothing; only failure teaches.

quotes.quote: When you truly embrace your human impermanence you connect with the power you have, and influence you have, over the time you have.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Free curiosity has greater power to stimulate learning than rigorous coercion. Nevertheless, the free ranging flux of curiosity is channeled by discipline under Your Law.
quotes.author: Augustine of Hippo

quotes.quote: But we are strong, each in our purpose, and we are all more strong together.
quotes.author: Bram Stoker

quotes.quote: Unless you know where you are going then you will not know how to get there.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: With no reason to hide these words I feel, and no reason to talk about the books I read, but still, I do.
quotes.author: Morrissey

quotes.quote: I cannot even imagine where I would be today were it not for that handful of friends who have given me a heart full of joy. Let's face it, friends make life a lot more fun.

quotes.quote: To fear love is to fear life, and those who fear life are already three parts dead.

quotes.quote: It's continuously humbling to work hard, you know? As long as you've got a good work ethic and a sense of humor, I don't think anybody can become too much of an egoist under those circumstances.

quotes.quote: I had to philosophize. Otherwise, I could not live in this world.
quotes.author: Edmund Husserl

quotes.quote: People will not remember what you did for living, they will remember how you touched them with kindness and loving.

quotes.quote: Live like a tree, giving, forgiving and free.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: AUM or Om is not related to any religion because Om was practiced before the birth of all the religions of the world.

quotes.quote: If an apology is followed by an excuse or a reason, it means they are going to commit same mistake again they just apologized for.

quotes.quote: Don't fear the gods, Don't worry about death;What is good is easy to get, andWhat is terrible is easy to endure.

quotes.quote: Just because you're in a situation, doesn't mean you have to be that situation. You're not the situation you're in!

quotes.quote: Science of happiness lies in our understanding. The secrets of happiness lie in our capacity to expand our heart.

quotes.quote: It's what's in *yourself* that makes you happy or unhappy.

quotes.quote: Writing is not a matter of time, but a matter or of space. If you don't keep space in your head for writing, you won't write even if you have the time.

quotes.quote: I felt like poisoning a monk.

quotes.quote: If you seek creative ideas go walking. Angels whisper to a man when he goes fora walk.

quotes.quote: I do my job like I breathe — so if I can’t breathe I’m in trouble.

quotes.quote: In the times of trouble, be like the strong wall. In the times of joy, be like the smiling sun.

quotes.quote: What you perceive as a failure today may actually be a crucial step towards the success you seek. Never give up.

quotes.quote: Free yourself from the inauthenticity and disempowerment of your story.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Thoughts are as simple as the process…a message from the soul; conveyed through the heart; received in the mind

quotes.quote: Those who look behind will never see beyond.

quotes.quote: If at first you don’t succeed, you’re doing it wrong. Learn from the experience. Try again, but with a different approach.

quotes.quote: There are words in the soul of a newborn baby, wanting and waiting to be written.

quotes.quote: Under heaven all can see beauty as beauty only because there is ugliness. All can know good as good only because there is evil.

quotes.quote: Develop the winning edge; small differences in your performance can lead to large differences in your results.

quotes.quote: A life of happiness, peace, and love is all within our grasp.

quotes.quote: The greatest enemy to fear is truth.

quotes.quote: No boundary or barrier surrounds the heart of a person that loves their self and others.

quotes.quote: One of the biggest favors that you can do for yourself is to accept your loved ones for who they are, and not be constantly disappointed because they are not who you think they should be.

quotes.quote: In pursuit of happiness, smart people often end up dumbing down themselves.

quotes.quote: We are young, but We already know that in life's great game those who are most unhappy are those who haven't taken the risk to be happy. And I don't want to be one of those
quotes.author: Guillaume Musso

quotes.quote: If you are driven by fear, anger or pride nature will force you to compete. If you are guided by courage, awareness, tranquility and peace nature will serve you.

quotes.quote: For while directly we say that it [the length of human life] is ages long, we are reminded that it is briefer than the fall of a rose leaf to the ground.

quotes.quote: Always it’s Spring)and everyone’s in love and flowers pick themselves.

quotes.quote: Just start the sentence...and see what happens. This is how we write.

quotes.quote: Everything in creation has its appointed painter or poet and remains in bondage like the princess in the fairy tale 'til its appropriate liberator comes to set it free.

quotes.quote: They say what doesn't kill the soul will make you stronger, but you can't be a stone-hearted man.

quotes.quote: (W)hat I write when I force myself is generally just as good as what I write when I'm feeling inspired. It's mainly a matter of forcing yourself to write.

quotes.quote: Any ideas, plan, or purpose may be placed in the mind through repetition of thought

quotes.quote: O for a Muse of fire, that would ascendThe brightest heaven of invention!
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: Fashion is about going ahead, not about memory.
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: I can’t think of anything more disheartening than living a life without a clear purpose.
quotes.author: Daniel Willey

quotes.quote: For some unknown reason, success usually occurs in private, while failure occurs infull view.

quotes.quote: By all evidence we are in the world to do nothing.
quotes.author: Emil Cioran

quotes.quote: The only thing limiting your aspiration is your imagination.

quotes.quote: The enduring attraction of war is this: Even with its destruction and carnage it can give us what we long for in life. It can give us purpose, meaning, a reason for living.

quotes.quote: There is no royal road to science, and only those who do not dread the fatiguing climb of its steep paths have a chance of gaining its luminous summits.

quotes.quote: In reality there are no separate events. Life moves along like water, it's all connected to the source of the river is connected to the mouth and the ocean.

quotes.quote: It's hard not to be a fighter when you're constantly under siege.

quotes.quote: To assess the quality of thoughts of people, don't listen to their words, but watch their actions.

quotes.quote: Our lives are the only meaningful expression of what we believe and in Whom we believe. And the only real wealth, for any of us, lies in our faith.

quotes.quote: When every situation which life can offer is turned to the profit of spiritual growth, no situation can really be a bad one.

quotes.quote: But just because you love something, I added to myself, doesn't mean you'll ever be great. Not if you don't work. Most people stink at the things they love.
quotes.author: Amy Chua

quotes.quote: I knew that I had been partially right in the storeroom above the bar on Christmas Day. Whoever I had become had to die.

quotes.quote: I was tired of being me.
quotes.author: Rachel Ward

quotes.quote: Only happy people have nightmares, from overeating. For those who live a nightmare reality, sleep is a black hole, lost in time, like death.
quotes.author: Guy Sajer

quotes.quote: Time works so hard for us, if only we can let it.
quotes.author: Tana French

quotes.quote: We were as Hansel and Gretel and we ventured out into the black forest of the world.
quotes.author: Patti Smith

quotes.quote: He’d used the amulet to read my thoughts again. I pictured smacking him in the face.
quotes.author: Priya Ardis

quotes.quote: Read to escape reality . . . Write to embrace it.
quotes.author: Stephanie Connolly

quotes.quote: Untilled ground, however rich, will bring forth thistles and thorns; so also the mind of man.
quotes.author: Teresa of Ávila

quotes.quote: When love dies, the heart's ashes do not leave on the wind—they rest on the mantelpiece of the soul, darkening the sunrise we once saw to be beautiful.
quotes.author: A.M. Hudson

quotes.quote: [A young adult novel] ends not with happily ever after, but at a new beginning, with the sense of a lot of life yet to be lived.
quotes.author: Richard Peck

quotes.quote: Read deeply. Stay open. Continue to wonder.
quotes.author: Austin Kleon

quotes.quote: All men who have achieved great things have been great dreamers.
quotes.author: Orison Swett Marden

quotes.quote: Infinite is a meaningless word: except – it states / The mind is capable of performing / an endless process of addition.
quotes.author: Louis Zukofsky

quotes.quote: The mind is the strongest tool we have to help us secure the riches within the universe.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: A failure is always in the passenger seat in his or her life.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: We create success or failure on the course primarily by our thoughts.
quotes.author: Gary Player

quotes.quote: There is no man, and no place, without war. The only thing we can do is choose a side, and fight. That is the only choice we get - who we fight for, who we fight against. That is life.
quotes.author: Gregory David Roberts

quotes.quote: Here at last is her smile: burn it into your memory; you won't see it often.
quotes.author: Junot Díaz

quotes.quote: It's all about the smiles!
quotes.author: Emmy Swain

quotes.quote: There is no duty we so much underrate as the duty of being happy.
quotes.author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quotes.quote: Everything is true,' he said. 'Everything anybody has ever thought.''Will you be all right?''I'll be all right,' he said, and thought, And I'm going to die. Both those are true, too.
quotes.author: Philip K. Dick

quotes.quote: Happiness is a strange thing. It is something I tend to recognize only after it has passed, when I realize I miss it.
quotes.author: Claire Holden Rothman

quotes.quote: The person you hurt the most in this world was the person that brought you into it.
quotes.author: Vannary Rang

quotes.quote: Berhentilah mencari laki-laki untuk membuatmu baagia. Mulailah menjadi perempuan bahagia yang dicari laki-laki.
quotes.author: Christian Simamora

quotes.quote: The road is long, we carry on, try to have fun in the meantime.
quotes.author: Lana Del Rey

quotes.quote: Like it or not, there are people who are capable to love genuinely and kill brutally. The amazing thing about that, few of those could even sleep well like babies in the night.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: Today is Your Day to Dance Lightly with Life. It Really Is.
quotes.author: Jonathan Lockwood Huie

quotes.quote: If you argue and rankle and contradict, you may achieve a victory sometimes; but it will be an empty victory because you will never get your opponent's good will.
quotes.author: Dale Carnegie

quotes.quote: Reproduction is more pleasurable than death.
quotes.author: Herman E. Daly

quotes.quote: Its dark and I’m reading my scars because our moments remind me of where I should be.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: You can break a man with hope.
quotes.author: Kate Morgenroth

quotes.quote: Dead my old fine hopesAnd dry my dreaming but still...Iris, blue each spring
quotes.author: Shushiki

quotes.quote: There are no limitations to the mind except those that we acknowledge.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.quote: Sometimes the hardest one to see . . .is the one standing right before you.
quotes.author: Lenore Wolfe

quotes.quote: All days are nights to see till I see thee, And nights bright days when dreams do show thee me.
quotes.author: William Shakespeare

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night... you were there.
quotes.author: Nicole McKay

quotes.quote: Inspirations never go in for long engagements; they demand immediate marriage to action.
quotes.author: Brendan Francis Brown

quotes.quote: You cannot build a dream on a foundation of sand. To weather the test of storms, it must be cemented in the heart with uncompromising conviction.
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: My life looked good on paper - where, in fact, almost all of it was being lived.
quotes.author: Martin Amis

quotes.quote: Without friends you have nothing!
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: The true test of one's mettle is how many times you will try before you give up.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: The tragedy is that what you disapprove of in others is the very thing you disapprove of in yourself.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Even if you're on the right track, you'll get run over if you just sit there.
quotes.author: Will Rodgers

quotes.quote: When you are just EXISTING, life happens to you… and you manage; when you are truly LIVING, you happen to life… and you lead.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: We make our purpose.
quotes.author: Carl Sagan

quotes.quote: I am a fugitive and a vagabond, a sojourner seeking signs.
quotes.author: Annie Dillard

quotes.quote: I will always find a way and a way will always find me.
quotes.author: Charles F. Glassman

quotes.quote: Art is eternal, but life is short.
quotes.author: Evelyn de Morgan

quotes.quote: You not only are hunted by others, you unknowingly hunt yourself.
quotes.author: Dejan Stojanovic

quotes.quote: Flexibility makes buildings to be stronger, imagine what it can do to your soul.
quotes.author: Carlos Barrios

quotes.quote: We never realize just how many other lives we can help when their paths cross our own.
quotes.author: Wil Zeus

quotes.quote: There are times when wisdom cannot be found in the chambers of parliament or the halls of academia but at the unpretentious setting of the kitchen table.
quotes.author: E.A. Bucchianeri

quotes.quote: I would rather be a devil in alliance with truth, than an angel in alliance with falsehood.
quotes.author: Ludwig Feuerbach

quotes.quote: And where love ends, hate begins
quotes.author: Leo Tolstoy

quotes.quote: I think my quarry is illusion. I war against magic. I believe that, though illusion often cheers and comforts, it ultimately and invariably weakens and constricts the spirit.
quotes.author: Irvin D. Yalom

quotes.quote: I don't think I could ever work in such a blatantly hierarchical corporate setting. I know that everyone in this world is not equal, but I can't bear environments that make this truth so obvious.
quotes.author: Peter Cameron

quotes.quote: Always try to be joyful and proactively benign to the people. By doing so everyday, people have no control at all over my mood.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: Stop wasting your time looking for the key to happiness… the door is open and unlocked… just walk through it.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: That wasn't love; that was stupidity.
quotes.author: Sherrilyn Kenyon

quotes.quote: Never run from the truth. It is always there; it never changes – save your energy.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The more you look into and understand yourself, the less judgmental you become towards others.
quotes.author: Tariq Ramadan

quotes.quote: It is born in mind that the tragedy of life does not lie in not reaching the goal. The tragedy of life lies in having no goal to reach.
quotes.author: Benjamin E. Mays

quotes.quote: You’re not a bad person, you’re just a little bit different and I’m a sucker for that.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: But everything I have to give, I'll give to you
quotes.author: Ray Lamontagne

quotes.quote: Focus on faith and grow your roots strong and deep so no one can make you believe in something that is not good for your soul.
quotes.author: Molly Friedenfeld

quotes.quote: A life is not a waste of time
quotes.author: Nalini Singh

quotes.quote: There are 6 reasons that a person does anything: Love, faith, greed, boredom, fear... revenge.
quotes.author: Ally Carter

quotes.quote: Since there is no real silence, Silence will contain all the sounds, All the words, all the languages, All knowledge, all memory.
quotes.author: Dejan Stojanovic

quotes.quote: Faithfulness in small things leads to faithfulness in great things, and never the other way around.
quotes.author: Jerry L. Lewis

quotes.quote: Wisdom is nothing more than confirmed imagination: just because one did not study for his exam does not mean that he should leave it blank.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: As with all other aspects of the narrative art, you will improve with practice, but practice will never make you perfect. Why should it? What fun would that be?
quotes.author: Stephen King

quotes.quote: YOU are your love of a lifetime.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: If you want to be successful, it's just this simple. Know what you are doing. Love what you are doing. And believe in what you are doing.
quotes.author: Will Rogers

quotes.quote: There is a difference between talented people and gifted people. Talented people are good AT something; Gifted people ARE that something.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: People can change anything they want to, and that means everything in the world.
quotes.author: Joe Strummer

quotes.quote: Live life with a purpose and live it full out.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: My survival was up to me. I had nothing and I had no one. What I did have, I told myself, was my mind, my imagination, my memory, my feelings, my spirit. These were important and powerful things.
quotes.author: John Marsden

quotes.quote: Have you found someone to share your heart with? Are you giving to your community? Are you at peace with yourself? Are you trying to be as human as you can be?
quotes.author: Mitch Albom

quotes.quote: To change the world takes time; to change yourself takes courage.
quotes.author: R.S. Lowel

quotes.quote: Science is the most reliable guide in life.
quotes.author: Mustafa Kemal Atatürk

quotes.quote: Man moves in a world that is nothing more or less than his consciousness objectified.–Neville Goddard
quotes.author: Neville Goddard

quotes.quote: Whatever I learned, Whatever I knew, Seems like those faded years of childhood that flew, Away in some dilemma, Always in some confusion, The purpose of this life, Seems like an illusion!
quotes.author: Mehek Bassi

quotes.quote: If it is bread that you seek, you will have bread. If it is the soul you seek, you will find the soul. If you understand this secret, you know you are that which you seek.
quotes.author: Rumi

quotes.quote: In a dark time, the eye begins to see.
quotes.author: Theodore Roethke

quotes.quote: Compassion is all inclusive. Compassion knows no boundaries. Compassion comes with awareness, and awareness breaks all narrow territories.
quotes.author: Amit Ray

quotes.quote: It is only possible to live happily ever after on a daily basis.
quotes.author: Margaret Wander Bonanno

quotes.quote: You will realize one day that all the money in the world cannot buy you happiness. Nor can it make you a person of good character.
quotes.author: Richelle E. Goodrich

quotes.quote: I do not care about happiness simply because I believe that joy is something worth fighting for.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Pure joy is rare. That’s why for every meal I eat a really bloody steak.
quotes.author: Bauvard

quotes.quote: There is no happiness in love, except at the end of an English novel.
quotes.author: Anthony Trollope

quotes.quote: We can be friends. We can be anything we want to be.
quotes.author: Muriel Barbery

quotes.quote: For what it's worth: it's never too late to be whoever you want to be. I hope you live a life you're proud of, and if you find you're not, I hope you have the strength to start over again.
quotes.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald

quotes.quote: In some not too distant tomorrow the radiant stars of love and brotherhood will shine over our great nation with all their scintillating beauty.
quotes.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

quotes.quote: Maybe love was meant to save us from ourselves.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: Bushido is realized in the presence of death. This means choosing death whenever there is a choice between life and death. There is no other reasoning.
quotes.author: Tsunetomo Yamamoto

quotes.quote: There is a certain seductiveness about dead things. You can ill treat, alter and recolour what's dead. It won’t complain.
quotes.author: Jeanette Winterson

quotes.quote: Tous mes anciens amours vont me revenir.'- All my old loves will be returned to me
quotes.author: Carolyn Turgeon

quotes.quote: In joined hands there is still some token of hope, in the clinched fist none.
quotes.author: Victor Hugo

quotes.quote: The truth is that I feel totally helpless, or totally inconsolable, to be more honest. I’m not trying to hide it, but it’s something you’re not to worry about.
quotes.author: Jostein Gaarder

quotes.quote: Our knowledge of life is limited to death
quotes.author: Erich Maria Remarque

quotes.quote: Love is photogenic, it develops in the dark.
quotes.author: Lorraine Gokul

quotes.quote: Uniqueness is what makes you the most beautiful.
quotes.author: Lea Michele

quotes.quote: When we feel unsafe with someone and still stay with him, we damage our ability to discern trustworthiness in those we will meet in the future.
quotes.author: David Richo

quotes.quote: If the town were a black hole, I was the helpless star being sucked into oblivion. It was an oblivion I craved.
quotes.author: J.D. Stroube

quotes.quote: Man is nothing else but what he purposes, he exists only in so far as he realizes himself, he is therefore nothing else but the sum of his actions, nothing else but what his life is.
quotes.author: Jean-Paul Sartre

quotes.quote: Mirrors are perpetually deceitful. They lie and steal your true self. They reveal only what your mind believes it sees
quotes.author: Dee Remy

quotes.quote: Some say if you want success surround yourself with successful people. I say if you want true and lasting success surround yourself with people of integrity.

quotes.quote: As you can see, there are quite a number of things taught in school that one has to unlearn or at least correct.
quotes.author: Ambeth R. Ocampo

quotes.quote: We are given to the great, for great purpose, to great ends. We are given to the grave, for grave purposes, to grave ends.
quotes.author: Kami Garcia

quotes.quote: To think what is true, to sense what is beautiful and to want what is good, hereby the spirit finds purpose of a life in reason.
quotes.author: Johann Gottfried Herder

quotes.quote: You may die a hundred deaths without a break in the mental turmoil. Or, you may keep your body and die only in the mind. The death of the mind is the birth of wisdom.
quotes.author: Nisargadatta Maharaj

quotes.quote: Just about a month from now I'm set adrift, with a diploma for a sail and lots of nerve for oars.
quotes.author: Richard Halliburton

quotes.quote: But if one observes, one will see that the body has its own intelligence; it requires a great deal of intelligence to observe the intelligence of the body.
quotes.author: Jiddu Krishnamurti

quotes.quote: How we relate with other people is dependent on how we rate ourselves and what we think about ourselves.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Each person has got a voice inside them. Communicate with it and take hold of it. Do not let it push and shove you around – you are its master!
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Flexibility requires an open mind and a welcoming of new alternatives.
quotes.author: Deborah Day

quotes.quote: Though money cannot acquire you happiness, it does not mean that both money and happiness cannot exist together.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: In your hands winteris a book with cloud pagesthat snow pearls of love.
quotes.author: Aberjhani

quotes.quote: Pitching is the art of instilling fear.
quotes.author: Sandy Koufax

quotes.quote: Beauty as we feel it is something indescribable; what it is or what it means can never be said.
quotes.author: George Santayana

quotes.quote: We are citizens of the world. The tragedy of our times is that we do not know this.
quotes.author: Woodrow Wilson

quotes.quote: Love isn't always a physical emotion. Sometimes it's the ones who never got to actually hold you in their arms that appreciate you for who you are
quotes.author: Sarah Sprague

quotes.quote: I refuse to let the standards of evil people chip away at my capacity for integrity.
quotes.author: Stefan Molyneux

quotes.quote: I want that. I want that awful intense and serious unhappiness, cos then I might feel better, and then I might be happy.
quotes.author: David Thewlis

quotes.quote: She still cared for me, and the best way I could make amends to her was to be happy. I do have a knack for finding great women.
quotes.author: Craig Ferguson

quotes.quote: Our purest form of joy comes when people we envy get hurt. That most genuine form of joy.
quotes.author: Chuck Palahniuk

quotes.quote: If you're not getting happier as you get older, then you're fuckin' up
quotes.author: Ani DiFranco

quotes.quote: This, the language of deception, we both understand. We were born to it, along with the curses.
quotes.author: Holly Black

quotes.quote: Everyone's allowed to be in love with the wrong person at some point. In fact, it's a mistake not to be.
quotes.author: Harriet Evans

quotes.quote: Only those few who are able to surpass their fear of death completely can fully experience the highest forms of life; not the mundane life of the mortal, but the godly life of the resurrected.
quotes.author: Zeena Schreck

quotes.quote: Summertime. It was a song. It was a season. I wondered if that season would ever live inside of me.
quotes.author: Benjamin Alire Sáenz

quotes.quote: Any fool can hope when success lies plainly in view. It wants genuine strength to hope when matters are hopeless.
quotes.author: Michael Flynn

quotes.quote: One who has hope lives differently.
quotes.author: Pope Benedict XVI

quotes.quote: I watched the spinning stars, grateful, sad and proud, as only a man who has outlived his destiny and realizes he might yet forge himself another, can be.
quotes.author: Roger Zelazny

quotes.quote: Inspiration fires you up; motivation keeps you burning.
quotes.author: Stuart Aken

quotes.quote: Men love women who are courageous for it means they can go all the way with him in his pursuit of his good dreams and intentions.
quotes.author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

quotes.quote: Then that's what the Northern Lights are. All the lives that we're not living.
quotes.author: Adi Alsaid

quotes.quote: Listen for the call of your destiny, and when it comes, release your plans and follow.
quotes.author: Mollie Marti

quotes.quote: INTENT reveals desire; ACTION reveals commitment.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: The people we consider successful in our society are all people that seize every moment and make the best of each situation.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Success can be defined in many ways but failure in only one ... quitting!
quotes.author: Gerard de Marigny

quotes.quote: The mind knows the truth when your heart denies what it feels. When you don't feel safe to let people in, it is because you're not ready to deal with the pain of honesty.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: It is of great importance, when we begin to practise prayer, not to let ourselves be frightened by our own thoughts.
quotes.author: Teresa of Ávila

quotes.quote: Just let go of the need to care about whether it happens or not, then you are free from fear and can then concentrate on focusing.

quotes.quote: A barrier is a limitation only when you perceive it as one.

quotes.quote: Affirmations are our mental vitamins, providing the supplementary positive thoughts we need to balance the barrage of negative events and thoughts we experience daily.
quotes.author: Tia Walker

quotes.quote: Every time you step on the football field in between those lines you're putting your life, your career, every single ligament in your body in jeopardy.
quotes.author: Robert Griffin III

quotes.quote: In the whole history of the world there is but one thing that money cannot buy...to wit--the wag of a dog's tail.
quotes.author: Josh Billings

quotes.quote: It was hard to live normally when you were constantly pretending you didn't see what was going on in front of your face.

quotes.quote: We try to fix the outside so much, but our control of the outer world is limited, temporary, and often, illusory.

quotes.quote: Suffering just means you’re having a bad dream. Happiness means you’re having a good dream. Enlightenment means getting out of the dream altogether.

quotes.quote: What is your idea of earthly happiness? To be vindicated in my own lifetime.
quotes.author: Christopher Hitchens

quotes.quote: Fair as the moon and joyful as the light;Tot wan with waiting, not with sorrow dim; Not as she is, but was when hope shone bright;Not as she is, but as she fills his dreams.
quotes.author: Christina Rossetti

quotes.quote: The fear of God reigning in the heart is the beauty of the soul.
quotes.author: Matthew Henry

quotes.quote: Being a cheerful hobbit, he had not needed hope, as long as despair could be postponed.
quotes.author: J.R.R. Tolkien

quotes.quote: I met a boy whose eyes showed me that the past, present and future were all the same thing.
quotes.author: Jennifer Elisabeth

quotes.quote: Your guardian angel never, ever stops communicating with you. I feel that at times they should be frustrated with us but they seem to have endless patience and they never ever give up on us.
quotes.author: Lorna Byrne

quotes.quote: Romantic haste in drama bringstears and sighs when the hero diesbut the curtain fall is finalwhen in life we take the tragic wayThe sunset too is a glorious thingbut with it ends the day.
quotes.author: C. P. Klapper

quotes.quote: Money is like gasoline during a road trip. You don’t want to run out of gas on your trip, but you’re not doing a tour of gas stations.

quotes.quote: Man is a slow, sloppy, and brilliant thinker; computers are fast, accurate, and stupid.
quotes.author: John Pfeiffer

quotes.quote: To realize one's destiny is a person's only real obligation and when you want something, all the universe conspires in helping you to achieve it.
quotes.author: Paulo Coelho

quotes.quote: I’m not out to compete with any one, I’m here to complete, by encouraging and inspiring souls through a text at a time
quotes.author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

quotes.quote: Do you wait for things to happen, or do you make them happen yourself? I believe in writing your own story.

quotes.quote: To turn your dreams into reality, all your resources, efforts and concentration should be aligned in the same direction.
quotes.author: Roopleen

quotes.quote: Effort within the mind further limits the mind, because effort implies struggle towards a goal and when you have a goal, a purpose, an end in view, you have placed a limit on the mind.

quotes.quote: The difference between Success and failure is not giving up.

quotes.quote: You have to appreciate where you have come from to know who you are in the present and whom you would like to be in the future.

quotes.quote: Whenever we want to combat our enemies, first and foremost we must start by understanding them rather than exaggerating their motives.

quotes.quote: If you have to ask if you’ve done enough, you haven’t. Each day brings with it the opportunity to do more than you did yesterday.

quotes.quote: There are no environments where you're only going to win, because life just isn't like that.
quotes.author: Bobby Orr

quotes.quote: Luck is a word the bitter teach to the ignorant.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: When you have faults, do not fear to abandon them.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.quote: Consciousness does not just passively reflect the objective material world; it plays an active role in creating realityitself.
quotes.author: Stanislav Grof

quotes.quote: Positive energy is attracted to positive energy.

quotes.quote: I'm no longer quite sure what the question is, but I do know that the answer is Yes.

quotes.quote: A friend is what the heart needs all the time.
quotes.author: Henry Van Dyke

quotes.quote: Don't appreciate me, I'm not up to it. Don't criticize me, I don't deserve it. Just be my friend and forgive me, because I am craving for it.

quotes.quote: The free mind, unafraid of labor, presses on to attain the good.
quotes.author: Laura Cereta

quotes.quote: Every life is different because you passed this way and touched history.

quotes.quote: After your death, you will be what you were before your birth.

quotes.quote: This time, there was no escape, I could not turn away, could not leave without accepting what I had done. There was only one way to the other side, and that was through the pain.

quotes.quote: But what minutes! Count them by sensation, and not by calendars, and each moment is a day.

quotes.quote: You will be your best self when you take time to understand what you really need, feel and want.

quotes.quote: Happiness doesn't have to be chased...it merely has to be chosen.
quotes.author: Mandy Hale

quotes.quote: Learning isn't acquiring knowledge so much as it is trimming information that has already been acquired.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: Your life is always under construction. It is your job to learn howto untangle the threads and weave a tapestry that matches your desires.
quotes.author: Dannye Williamsen

quotes.quote: Sometimes you just have to jump in a mud puddle because it's there. Never get so old that you forget about having fun.

quotes.quote: O Diabo, invejoso, fez o homem confundir fé com religião e amor com casamento.

quotes.quote: Faith is the flame that eliminates fear.

quotes.quote: Life is too fleet for onomatopoeia.

quotes.quote: It is good that a man's enemies want him dead, for it proves he has lived a life of worth.

quotes.quote: We must be content to grow slowly. Most of us will still barely be at the beginning of our recovery by the time we die. But that is better than killing ourselves pretending to be healthy.

quotes.quote: Believe something and the Universe is on its way to being changed. Because you've changed, by believing. Once you've changed, other things start to follow. Isn't that the way it works?

quotes.quote: I don't buy idea of second chance. With hope we make a lot of chances.

quotes.quote: Stability was overrated. Crises and adventures, on the other hand, could actually teach you something.
quotes.author: Sarah Addison Allen

quotes.quote: Love for yourself is the key to loving other. Love begins with you.
quotes.author: Miguel Ruiz

quotes.quote: I have been happy, though in a dream. I have been happy-and I love the theme:Dreams! in their vivid colouring of lifeAs in that fleeting, shadowy, misty strife
quotes.author: Edgar Allan Poe

quotes.quote: Love is supposed to be based on trust, and trust on love, it's something rare and beautiful when people can confide in each other without fearing what the other person will think.
quotes.author: E.A. Bucchianeri

quotes.quote: Dare to be different. Represent your maker well and you will forever abide in the beautiful embrace of his loving arms.
quotes.author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

quotes.quote: God is never tired of bringing the sun out every morning, taking it in the evenings and bringing out the moon.
quotes.author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

quotes.quote: When the last dime is gone, I'll sit on the curb outside with a pencil and a ten cent notebook and start the whole thing over again.
quotes.author: Preston Sturges

quotes.quote: When you give appreciation IN ORDER TO get something– it's manipulation and people can sense it. Appreciate genuinely.
quotes.author: Marilyn Suttle

quotes.quote: Notice the difference between being in control and needing control.
quotes.author: Marilyn Suttle

quotes.quote: Fully inhale your dream and completely exhale manifestation of it.
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: The fishing is best where the fewest go and the collective insecurity of the world makes it easy for people to hit home runs while everyone is aiming for base hits.
quotes.author: Timothy Ferriss

quotes.quote: With ordinary talent and extraordinary perseverance, all things are attainable
quotes.author: Thomas Fowell Buxton

quotes.quote: Success goes to the ones who do. Get up. Show up. Throw up if you have to. Do it afraid, but do it no matter.
quotes.author: Toni Sorenson

quotes.quote: God has mercifully ordered that the human brain works slowly; first the blow, hours afterwards the bruise.
quotes.author: Walter de la Mare

quotes.quote: Action is the universal language of success.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: I want to be as idle as I can, so that my soul may have time to grow.
quotes.author: Elizabeth von Arnim

quotes.quote: I would not bend. They could not make me Pliable. My mind was strong. My mind was mine.
quotes.author: Janice Hardy

quotes.quote: We move between two darknesses.
quotes.author: E.M. Forster

quotes.quote: If you take any step, no matter how small it is, towards achieving your dreams then you will surely find the right path and reach the abundance that lies in store for you.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Temporis filia veritas; cui me obstetricari non pudet. Truth is the daughter of time, and I feel no shame in being her midwife.
quotes.author: Johannes Kepler

quotes.quote: The first door in the hall leads to youth, the second door leads to middle age, and the third door leads to the bathroom. But knock first, because I think grandpa’s in there.
quotes.author: Jarod Kintz

quotes.quote: To be a philosopher, just reverse everything you have ever been told...and have a sense of humor doing it.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: When you are lonely for a while don't get restless, if you had born alone, you are going to die alone then for sometime you can certainly live alone.
quotes.author: Amit Kalantri

quotes.quote: My teacher asked my favorite color. ... I said ‘Rainbow’.... and I was punished to stand out of my class.
quotes.author: Saket Assertive

quotes.quote: Challenges in life can either enrich you or poison you. You are the one who decides.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: Why did I hope we would be happy abroad? A change of environment is that traditional fallacy upon which doomed loves, and lungs, rely.
quotes.author: Vladimir Nabokov

quotes.quote: You can be happy with money and you can be wretched with it. It depends on what kind of person you are. -- A Prologue to Love
quotes.author: Taylor Caldwell

quotes.quote: Happiness is spiritual, born of truth and love. It is unselfish; therefore it cannot exist alone, but requires all mankind to share it.
quotes.author: Mary Baker Eddy

quotes.quote: It is not what he has, nor even what he does, which directly expresses the worth of a man, but what he is.
quotes.author: Henri-Frédéric Amiel

quotes.quote: Dear me! how happy and good we'd be, if we had no worries!
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: The British do not expect happiness. I had the impression, all the time that I lived there, that they do not want to be happy; they want to be right.
quotes.author: Quentin Crisp

quotes.quote: Taking a risk to survive isn’t that impressive. Taking a risk to be happy, that takes guts.
quotes.author: Sarah Noffke

quotes.quote: Kehidupan lebih nyata daripada pendapat siapapun tentang kenyataan.
quotes.author: Pramoedya Ananta Toer

quotes.quote: The past cannot be changed. The future is yet in your power.
quotes.author: Mary Pickford

quotes.quote: Your fear of the truth does not hide or dilute it.
quotes.author: Steve Maraboli

quotes.quote: People who say that money can't buy happiness just don't know where to shop.
quotes.author: Kathy Lette

quotes.quote: Human happiness is defined by the hardships and conflicts you have been through. The greater they are, the greater is your happiness.
quotes.author: Peter Deunov

quotes.quote: Happiness is a big joke; let us laugh at it loud.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: God, there must be a meaning. Fiercely he was certain that there must be a meaning. Surely, while we live we are not lost. Oh Janos, Janos my brother!Surely we are not lost--while we live.
quotes.author: John Hepworth

quotes.quote: Nevertheless, in this sea of human wretchedness and malice there bloomed at times compassion, as a pale flower blooms in a putrid marsh.
quotes.author: Henryk Sienkiewicz

quotes.quote: We are all resigned to death: it's life we aren't resigned to.
quotes.author: Graham Greene

quotes.quote: You are only a prisoner when you surrender.
quotes.author: Tad Williams

quotes.quote: I felt as if I were riding a pendulum. Just as I would swing into the abyss of hopelessness, the pendulum would swing back with some small goodness.
quotes.author: Ruta Sepetys

quotes.quote: If you had hope, maybe you could find a way to make things change,. Because if you thought about it, there were so many reasons to try.
quotes.author: Suzanne Collins

quotes.quote: When you tire of living, change itself seems evil, does it not? for then any change at all disturbs the deathlike peace of the life-weary.
quotes.author: Walter M. Miller Jr.

quotes.quote: You need to trustTo surrenderTo ask for guidanceGo within for the answersThey're within youYou have the answersAll you need do is ask
quotes.author: Karen Hackel

quotes.quote: The world is before you, and you need not take it or leave it as it was when you came in.
quotes.author: James Baldwin

quotes.quote: What we can change is our perceptions, which have the effect of changing everything.
quotes.author: Donna Quesada

quotes.quote: Any serious social, political, and economic change must include veganism.
quotes.author: Gary L. Francione

quotes.quote: Life is a mystery to be lived not a problem to be solved
quotes.author: Clive Ollies

quotes.quote: Times change, as do our wills, What we are - is ever changing; All the world is made of change, And forever attaining new qualities.
quotes.author: Luís Vaz de Camões

quotes.quote: You wouldn't believe that so much could change just because a relationship ended.
quotes.author: Nick Hornby

quotes.quote: Someone is always going to try to knock you down and take your place. It is up to you to fight for what you want.
quotes.author: Teresa Mummert

quotes.quote: When we are aware of our weaknesses or negative tendencies, we open the opportunity to work on them.
quotes.author: Allan Lokos

quotes.quote: Have you realized that today is the tomorrow you talked about yesterday? It is your responsibility to change your life for the better.
quotes.author: Jaachynma N.E. Agu

quotes.quote: Life is short only if you are not living your purpose.
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: The Motto of Champions: If you are hurt, you can suck it up and press on. If injured, you can rebound and return bigger and better...and continue to inspire!
quotes.author: T.F. Hodge

quotes.quote: Every game is winnable if you change your mind about what the prize should be and your perspective about the players at the table.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: Even when in the midst of disturbance, the stillness of the mind can offer sanctuary.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Chanel is an institution, and you have to treat an institution like a whore – and then you get something out of her
quotes.author: Karl Lagerfeld

quotes.quote: You are the ruler of my heart. There is no measure greater than this.
quotes.author: Truth Devour

quotes.quote: Dreams won't always take you on a straight path to destiny, but they're usually related to what your soul wants for you.
quotes.author: Kelly Cutrone

quotes.quote: Eye can only see something ifidea about it has been in mind.
quotes.author: Toba Beta

quotes.quote: You never know what lurks just beneath the surface of my fragile sanity.
quotes.author: Ashly Lorenzana

quotes.quote: A brain is only capable of what it could conceive, andit couldnt concieve what it hasnt experienced
quotes.author: Graham Greene

quotes.quote: Before it is science and career, before it is livelihood, before even it is family or love, freedom is sound sleep and safety to notice the play of morning sun.
quotes.author: Richard Rhodes

quotes.quote: The whole secret to our success is being able to con ourselves into believing that we're going to change the world because statistically we are unlikely to do it.
quotes.author: Tom Peters

quotes.quote: Peace is what enables development and is critical in providing opportunities to young people. Efforts to preserve peace are absolutely vital in bringing prosperity and hope for the future.
quotes.author: Kim Yuna

quotes.quote: I only seem negative to the fortunate. That's because I show the less fortunate that they aren't less fortunate after all.

quotes.author: Temitope Owosela

quotes.author: Robert Ludlum

quotes.quote: To travel hopefully is better than to have arrived.
quotes.author: Robert Louis Stevenson

quotes.quote: May be its mine bad-luck Or yours not to get me But I still have hope Of being yours
quotes.author: Hasil Paudyal

quotes.quote: All beautiful distractions, ignites from you.
quotes.author: V.S. Atbay

quotes.quote: I know now, just quite howMy life and love might still go onIn your heart, in your mindI'll stay with you for all of time.
quotes.author: The Calling

quotes.quote: I’ve learned that no matter how inspired, fired up and motivated you might be, the dark clouds will always set in
quotes.author: Bernard Kelvin Clive

quotes.author: Roman Payne

quotes.quote: With all honesty, somewhere between the hello and the dreams I saw you in I fell in love.

quotes.quote: She wasn't broken. She was just bent, over the chance of being ignored by the one she loved.

quotes.quote: Your environment will eat your goals and plans for breakfast.

quotes.quote: There will be haters, there will be doubters, there will be non-believers, and then there will be you proving them wrong.

quotes.quote: Learning is not the accumulation of knowledge, but rather, one thing only: understanding

quotes.quote: Science is only a Latin word for knowledge

quotes.quote: Those who don't know must learn from those who do.

quotes.quote: A tough life needs a tough language—and that is what poetry is. That is what literature offers—a language powerful enough to say how it is.
quotes.author: Jeanette Winterson

quotes.quote: The girl I used to love is no longer a girl, and this saddens me more than our separation. It puts my own mortality vividly on display, in contrast to my eternally youthful memories.

quotes.quote: Coincidences give you opportunities to look more deeply into your existence.
quotes.author: Doug Dillon

quotes.quote: I make music for ears, not eyes
quotes.author: Adele

quotes.quote: All you have to do is put one word after another, and remember how great it feels to be a writer.
quotes.author: Stephanie Lennox

quotes.quote: Binatang itu bicara, makan -- tapi tak mengerti dirinya sendiri. Dan aku begitu juga.
quotes.author: Pramoedya Ananta Toer

quotes.quote: To recognize that the greatest error is not to have tried and failed, but that in trying, we did not give it our best effort

quotes.quote: Real life seeks the gentle slopes at the back of Mount Improbable, while creationists are blind to all but the daunting precipice at the front.
quotes.author: Richard Dawkins

quotes.quote: The curious mind embraces science; the gifted and sensitive, the arts; the practical, business; the leftover becomes an economist

quotes.quote: I've come to the point where I never feel the need to stop and evaluate whether or not I am happy. I'm just 'being', and without question, by default, it works.

quotes.quote: Today I am even richer.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: You measure the size of the accomplishment by the obstacles you have to overcome to reach your goals.
quotes.author: Booker T. Washington

quotes.quote: It is in doing things and not reading about them that results come about.

quotes.quote: It is true that success is the most boring thing, it is tinny and brittle, failure runs deeper. Success is dangerous. I have a very complicated relationship with that word.

quotes.quote: When you accomplish the impossible then you can achieve anything.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: All creation necessarily ends in this: Creators, powerless, fleeing from the things they have wrought.
quotes.author: David Eagleman

quotes.quote: Have faith in the universe and its capability to lead you to the path of abundance.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: Happiness is a very pretty thing to feel, but very dry to talk about.
quotes.author: Jeremy Bentham

quotes.quote: Wisdom cannot be stolen - it can only be shared.
quotes.author: Jefferson Smith

quotes.quote: I silently smiled at my incessant good fortune.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.quote: Nourishing yourself in a way that helps you blossom in the direction you want to go is attainable, and you are worth the effort.

quotes.quote: Well, I am happy, and I won't fret, but it does seem as if the more one gets the more one wants…
quotes.author: Louisa May Alcott

quotes.quote: Live your life, sing your song. Not full of expectations. Not for the ovations. But for the joy of it.

quotes.quote: The best kind of happiness is a habit you're passionate about.

quotes.quote: Children must early learn the the beauty of generosity. They are taught to give what they prize most, that they may taste the happiness of giving.

quotes.quote: It's not strength, it's PERCEPTION that makes you stronger. If you change how you SEE it, you'll change how you FEEL about it.

quotes.quote: They say you should know your limits and work within them. But how can you really know your limits unless you try to expand them?

quotes.quote: Tomorrow, you promise yourself, things will be different, yet, tomorrow is too often a repetition of today. And you disappoint yourself again and again.

quotes.quote: When your family dies, that’s a bummer, but that’s life. When my family dies, it’s a tragedy and the world is unbalanced and biased.

quotes.quote: And I sometimes think that a moment of touching is the difference between complete utter despair and the ability to carry on.
quotes.author: Eleanor Cameron

quotes.quote: We can follow a steady upward course in a world of change without fear, welcoming opportunities
quotes.author: Henry B. Eyring

quotes.quote: Children are the world's most valuable resource and its best hope for the future.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.quote: I hope suffering don't exist.
quotes.author: David Levithan

quotes.quote: Pride and power fall when the person falls, but discoveries of truth form legacies that can be built upon for generations.

quotes.quote: Before this generation lose the wisdom, one advice - read books.

quotes.quote: Darkness cannot survive in light, but a light can shine in the dark!
quotes.author: Odille Rault

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night.. You thought you were a candy vampire, you were standing in the sun screaming 'I'm melting.

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night... I was a brick and you were a blanket. Damn that improbability drive.
quotes.author: Nicole McKay

quotes.quote: I had a dream about you last night. We went to the store cupboard to make out, but we ended up sharing our pain and then crying together. We wasn't prepared for this level of intimacy.

quotes.quote: As Dostoevski said: 'Love in action is a harsh and dreadful thing compared with love in dreams.

quotes.quote: Mindfulness, also called wise attention, helps us see what we’re adding to our experiences, not only during meditation sessions but also elsewhere.
quotes.author: Sharon Salzberg

quotes.quote: You become what you think about

quotes.quote: I could taste the salt on her lips, each kiss like a summer wave breaking on an empty beach.
quotes.author: Michael Faudet

quotes.quote: When you depersonalize abrasive behavior and see it as a call for help you become a catalyst for the best kind of change.

quotes.quote: Support and encouragement are found in the most unlikely places.

quotes.quote: If life didn’t give you at least one person not wanting you to succeed then half of us would lose are motivation to climb that cliff, in order to prove them wrong.

quotes.quote: If you really want to eat, keep climbing. The fruits are on the top of the tree. Stretch your hands and keep stretching them. Success is on the top, keep going.

quotes.quote: The only limitation is that which one sets up in one's own mind.

quotes.quote: Our children are only as brilliant as we allow them to be.
quotes.author: Eric Micha'el Leventhal

quotes.quote: Having a body is in itself the greatest threat to the mind... The body encloses the mind in a fortress; before long the mind is besieged on all sides, and in the end the mind has to give itself up.

quotes.quote: Would you mind if I used your kitchen sink to take a bath? I have the hygiene of a midget.

quotes.quote: We do not live to think, but, on the contrary, we think in order that we may succeed in surviving.

quotes.quote: There is a looming chasm between what your brain knows and what your mind is capable of accessing.

quotes.quote: Art has always been the raft onto which we climb to save our sanity. I don't see a different purpose for it now.

quotes.quote: But people of the deepest understanding look within, distracted by nothing. Since a clear mind is the Buddha, they attain the understanding of a Buddha without using the mind.

quotes.quote: The universe doesn’t give you what you ask for with your thoughts; it gives you what you demand with your actions. In essence, you don't get what you WANT, you get what you ARE.

quotes.quote: Books are those faithful mirrors that reflect to our mind the minds of sages and heroes.

quotes.quote: Mattie sat at the table, obsessing, orbiting around herself. She was sick of her worried, hostile mind. It would have killed her long before, she felt, if it hadn't needed the transportation.

quotes.quote: A real decision is measured by the fact that you've taken a new action. If there's no action, you haven't truly decided.
quotes.author: Anthony Robbins

quotes.quote: Once you can write an alphabet, you can write a book of 100 million pages. It's just a matter of believing it as possible, and taking the cross millimetre by millimetre.
quotes.author: Israelmore Ayivor

quotes.quote: The History Of The Universe In Three WordsCHAPTER ONEBang!CHAPTER TWOsssssCHAPTER THREEcrunch. THE END
quotes.author: Iain M. Banks

quotes.quote: There is nothing to prove to anyone, just concentrate on your own needs.

quotes.quote: Feeling indifferent or reserved about doing something is a signal that it is probably not correct after all.

quotes.quote: If someone does not consider those around them to be valuable and hold only themselves in high regard, they too have a very bad self-esteem.

quotes.quote: Science is my territory, but science fiction is the landscape of my dreams.

quotes.quote: I just like art. I get pure pleasure from it. I have a lot of wonderful paintings, and every time I look at them I see something different.

quotes.quote: The truth is helpless when up against perception
quotes.author: Zack W. Van

quotes.quote: A lie never grows old.
quotes.author: Sophocles

quotes.quote: Vivo sin vivir en mí... muero porque no muero. (I live without really being alive... I die because I am not dying.)

quotes.quote: In presence of the Moon nobody sees stars.

quotes.quote: İnsanoğlu nedense anlayamadığı şeylere kötülemeye meyilli.

quotes.quote: All men have their frailties; and whoever looks for a friend without imperfections, will never find what he seeks.

quotes.quote: I think to think. Not to be thought-full, or to reach a point of wisdom or acquire a grace of knowledge. I think for the sensuality of thought.

quotes.quote: And he, like many jaded people, had few pleasures left in life save good food and drink.

quotes.quote: When it comes down to it, even on the natural plane, it is much happier and more enlivening to love than to be loved.

quotes.quote: I think instead [of happiness] we should be working for contentment... an inner sense of fulfillment that's relatively independent of external circumstances.

quotes.quote: Everything is easier said than done. Wanting something is easy. Saying something is easy. The challenge and the reward are in the doing.

quotes.quote: Frugality, I've learned, has its own cost, one that sometimes lasts forever.

quotes.quote: Boy, the solid things you can hold in your hands are never all you've got. They're the least of what belong to you. The qualities inside you, those are what you've really got to defend yourself with.

quotes.quote: Mother earth cried so much that she has pool of tears more than the land of happiness.
quotes.author: Santosh Kalwar

quotes.quote: Para ser grande, sê inteiro: nadaTeu exagera ou exclui. Sê todo em cada coisa. Põe quanto ésNo mínimo que fazes. Assim em cada coisa a Lua todaBrilha, porque alta vive.
quotes.author: Ricardo Reis

quotes.quote: Helping others is the secret sauce to a happy life.
quotes.author: Todd Stocker

quotes.quote: If you want good luck; you must go out there and search for that luck!! Because luck is waiting for you to look for it.
quotes.author: Temitope Owosela

quotes.quote: That was courage, Keller thought. Not doing something without being afraid, but doing something even though you were afraid.

quotes.quote: I'm beginning to think that to hope isn't the same as to expect something. To hope is to believe that life is an acceptable chaos.

quotes.quote: This world’s anguish is no different from the love we insist on holding back.

quotes.quote: Everything hurts right now and nothing is helping because as the pain is getting worse — so is the love.

quotes.quote: Does our purpose on Earth directly link to the people whom we end up meeting? Are our relationships and experiences actually the required dots that connect and then lead us to our ultimate destinies?

quotes.quote: Tell me not in mournful numbers, Life is but an empty dream!For the soul is dead that slumbers, And things are not what they seem.

quotes.quote: Maybe what this is. What we have, is something that will save us from ourselves.
quotes.author: Robert M. Drake

quotes.quote: And hope is like love...a ridiculous, wonderful, powerful thing.

quotes.quote: The door', replied Maimie, 'will always, always be open, and mother will always be waiting at it for me.

quotes.quote: I fantasize the night sky to be like a cosmic blue print of my life as I close my eyes and unbutton my heart…. just in case anyone up there is listening.

quotes.quote: Mother can beat me all she wants, but I haven’t let her take away my will to somehow survive.

quotes.quote: Your hope is the most beautiful and the saddest in the world.

quotes.quote: ***A KEY WORD*** Imagined

quotes.quote: Knowledge without courage is sterile.

quotes.quote: Man wants three things; life, knowledge, and love.

quotes.quote: I am a student of life, and don't want to miss any experience. There's poetry in this sort of thing, you know--or perhaps you don't know, but it's all the same.

quotes.quote: God, come down, if you're really there -Well, you're the one who claims to care!

quotes.quote: What are you prepared to give for your dream? If it is not everything...stop pipe dreaming.

quotes.quote: No sooner have you feasted on beauty with your eyes than your mind tells you that beauty is vain and beauty passes

quotes.quote: Success and failure are two edges of the same blade, two sides of the same coin. To fear one is to forever deny the possibility of the other.

quotes.quote: Don't call yourself discouraged anymore;it's no longer your name.

quotes.quote: Human is a suffered mind but an enlightened soul.

quotes.quote: Failures can be called ‘strengtheners’ as they make you determined to reach your goal with the lessons they teach.

quotes.quote: The goal is to learn to be nurturing with yourself so you can feel free.

quotes.quote: A person today who seems to have a great sense of self-esteem has his or her childhood days to thank for it.

quotes.quote: I think I got a lot of life skills; I got a lot of wisdom; I've seen a lot of bad things happen to a lot of good people.

quotes.quote: You can be diagnosed and treated early. And there is hope for the future.

quotes.quote: The present convergence of crises––in money, energy, education, health, water, soil, climate, politics, the environment, and more––is a birth crisis, expelling us from the old world into a new.

quotes.quote: Who we are now is all that really matters.
quotes.author: Amy Joy

quotes.quote: Charity is no substitute for justice withheld.
quotes.author: Augustine of Hippo

quotes.quote: One word can change your life forever. I love youI hate youThink about it
quotes.author: Alan Macmillan Orr

quotes.quote: I have learned to be a friend to myself Great improvement this indeed Such a one can never be said to be alone for know that he who is a friend to himself is a friend to all mankind
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.quote: Happiness is never there to stay [...] Happiness is merely a respite offered by inquietude.

quotes.quote: She was not too young to be wise, but she was too young to know that wisdom shouldn't be spoken aloud when you are happy.

quotes.quote: It is more important to be free than to be happy.

quotes.quote: You are the point of origin for everything in your world: you set the standard for yourself.

quotes.quote: You see, nothing matters except pleasure - which is the opposite of happiness, its tragic part, I expect.

quotes.quote: Superficiality is the curse of the modern world.

quotes.quote: We live in a community of people not so that we can suppress and dominate eachother or make each other miserable but so that we can better and more reliably satisfy all life's healthy needs.

quotes.quote: There is no happily-ever-after to run to. We have to work for happiness.

quotes.quote: A King and Queen cannot support a crown with eyes looking down. Their universe expands as far as you can see.

quotes.quote: This is what it means to live on. When granted hope, a person uses it as fuel, as a guidepost to life. It is impossible to live without hope.
quotes.author: Haruki Murakami

quotes.quote: May the sun come, it's a new day; In the pure land of fantasy; That our darkness enlightened
quotes.author: Miguel Torga

quotes.quote: But that's just it; I can either focus on what I have lost, or what I have gained, and I choose the latter.
quotes.author: Angie Smith

quotes.quote: I like the immaterial world. I like to live among thoughts and images of the past and the possible, and even of the impossible, now and then.
quotes.author: Thomas Love Peacock

quotes.quote: I’ve grown up defined by this desperate, undeniable, ‘can’t breathe’ kind of space inside of myself and I’m afraid that the diagnosis is fatal.

quotes.quote: We are mosaics - pieces of light, love, history, stars -- glued together with magic and music and words.
quotes.author: Anita Krishan

quotes.quote: Be a craftsman in speech that thou mayest be strong, for the strength of one is the tongue, and speech is mightier than all fighting.

quotes.quote: Just do it! First you make your habits, then your habits make you!
quotes.author: Lucas Remmerswaal

quotes.quote: If everyone could be a successful and rich author, there would be no point in working so hard. Where is the fun in that?
quotes.author: L.A. Jones

quotes.quote: Like as the waves make towards the pebbled shore, So do our minutes hasten to their end;Each changing place with that which goes before, In sequent toil all forwards do contend.

quotes.quote: When you optimize your talents very well, you can pick money from people's pockets and nobody will ever get the guts to call you a thief.
quotes.author: Israelmore Ayivor

quotes.quote: If you're silent for a long time, people just arrive in your mind.
quotes.author: Alice Walker

quotes.quote: Inhale when I inhale. Exhale when I exhale. Breathe with me, for two beating hearts breathing one breath together become one.
quotes.author: Christina Westover

quotes.quote: My circumstances of unrelieved responsibility and permanent distraction necessitated the short story form.
quotes.author: Raymond Carver

quotes.quote: If you find yourself drawn to an event against all logic, go. The universe is telling you something.
quotes.author: Gloria Steinem

quotes.quote: The truth is that you are innately good, wise, and powerful. You were created in and for good.
quotes.author: Deborah Day

quotes.quote: Busy with the ugliness of the expensive success We forget the easiness of free beautyLying sad right around the corner, Only an instant removed, Unnoticed and squandered.
quotes.author: Dejan Stojanovic

quotes.quote: We think a wise person is someone who solves problems. Truth is, a wise person is someone who avoids problems.
quotes.author: Prem Rawat

quotes.quote: What we believe is heavily influenced by what we think others believe
quotes.author: Thomas Gilovich

quotes.quote: The universe is full of men going through the same motions in the same surroundings, but carrying within themselves, and projecting around them, universes as mutually remote as the constellations.
quotes.author: Emmanuel Mounier

quotes.quote: Life is real! Life is earnest!And the grave is not its goal;Dust thou are, to dust thou returnest, Was not spoken of the soul.
quotes.author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow

quotes.quote: If you are unclear about what attitudes you adhere to, you will have a difficult time evaluation which ones are not serving your highest good.
quotes.author: Deborah Day

quotes.quote: When we fulfill our function, which is to truly love ourselves and share love with others, then true happiness sets in.
quotes.author: Gabrielle Bernstein

quotes.quote: A timid mind is apt to mistake every scratch for a mortal wound.
quotes.author: George Gordon Byron

quotes.quote: Should-haves solve nothing. It's the next thing to happen that needs thinking about.
quotes.author: Alexandra Ripley

quotes.quote: No one can take the shot for you.
quotes.author: Lorii Myers

quotes.quote: View life through a wide angle lens attitude and see your horizons broaden.
quotes.author: Stephen Richards

quotes.quote: I'm lucky to be part of a team who help to make me look good, and they deserve as much of the credit for my success as I do for the hard work we have all put in on the training ground.
quotes.author: Lionel Messi

quotes.quote: I don't need the money, dear. I work for art.
quotes.author: Maria Callas

quotes.quote: With a philosophy education, one can infuriate his peers, intimidate his date, think of obscure, unreliable ways to make money, and never regret a thing.
quotes.author: Criss Jami

quotes.quote: It is our attitude toward events, not events themselves, which we can control. Nothing is by its own nature calamitous -- even death is terrible only if we fear it.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.quote: The only value of wasted time is knowledge.
quotes.author: Monica Drake

quotes.quote: If you think life is magical or life is hard, either way you are right. Your thoughts are the source of reality.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I grew up once, I decided never to do it again
quotes.author: Benny Bellamacina

quotes.quote: The most dangerous irony is, people are angry with others because of their own incompetence.
quotes.author: Amit Kalantri

quotes.quote: Knowledge is like an endless resource; a well of water that satisfies the innate thirst of the growing human soul. Therefore never stop learning... because the day you do, you will also stop maturing.
quotes.author: Chidi Okonkwo

quotes.quote: Gratitude always comes into play; research shows that people are happier if they are grateful for the positive things in their lives, rather than worrying about what might be missing.
quotes.author: Dan Buettner

quotes.quote: The most important thing in life is to dare. The most complicated thing in life is to be afraid. The smartest thing in the world is to try to be a moral person.
quotes.author: Shimon Peres

quotes.quote: Trust to some was placing all your insecurities and beliefs in one single person, and hoping he or she wouldn’t squash them.
quotes.author: Holly Hood

quotes.quote: Deep down under where his heart resided, strangled up in thorny vines of guilt, anger, fear and longing, there lay something deeper in him, something that he couldn’t see but she could.
quotes.author: Carol Oates

quotes.quote: I’m going to follow this invisible red thread until I find myself again… until I finally figure out… who I’m meant to be.
quotes.author: Jennifer Elisabeth

quotes.quote: You can tell people of the need to struggle, but when the powerless start to see that they really can make a difference, nothing can quench the fire.

quotes.quote: When you let go of past pain, believe in yourself, and follow your dreams—you can find true happiness!

quotes.quote: Please do not ever think I am without you or you are without me, I live with you all the time.

quotes.quote: All have dreams, live for them, They add meaning to LIFE.The only thing that differentiates us from other beings is the fact that us can DREAM!!!

quotes.quote: If you want the answer—ask the question.

quotes.quote: Dreaming is the poetry of Life, and we must be forgiven if we indulge in it a little.

quotes.quote: We all have issues & we have usually come by them honestly.

quotes.quote: What have you gained since you haven't prayed? What will you lose if you pray?

quotes.quote: Trying to live up to yourself is the most trying thing.

quotes.quote: Emotions are like muscles. Most of them go highly unattended, it's usually the weaker, undefined ones that cause injury to the rest, and there is most certainly memory response in play.

quotes.quote: You never know what will save you.

quotes.quote: You're the only one that can put pressure on yourself... No one else can put pressure on you. It's self-inflicted. For me, I just want to go out and play football.

quotes.quote: Perhaps just to have loved was enough - just to have seen this world, and known it, through the eyes of love.

quotes.quote: Don't try to follow trends. Create them.

quotes.quote: Motivation gets you going; Inspiration keeps you going.

quotes.quote: The positive vibrations of unregulated joy, peace, happiness and tranquility is freedom.

quotes.quote: Be the winner in your life!

quotes.quote: I would like to be a one-man multinational fashion phenomenon.

quotes.quote: And the thing is, we can’t fail. We’ve already hit the bottom and come out of it. From here on out, if we just love and listen, we can’t go wrong, babe.

quotes.quote: You can start to change your luck today. Begin believing that you can have what you desire and superior things will arrive.

quotes.quote: Do not let your good ideas to spend your brain energy, do it with all the effort because the shadow of the success can become a reality only with hard work.

quotes.quote: The measure of a society is not only what it does but the quality of its aspirations.
quotes.author: Wade Davis

quotes.quote: Your greatest responsibility in your life is to be the best version of yourself. When you feel for what the soul believes that is who you become.
quotes.author: Shannon L. Alder

quotes.quote: Being aware is being aware of one's own mind and the games it plays on itself.

quotes.quote: A failure establishes only this, that our determination to succeed was not strong enough.

quotes.quote: I've always believed that one woman's success can only help another woman's success.

quotes.quote: Act like a champion, and then become one.

quotes.quote: Money. The ultimate motivation. The ultimate way of keeping score.

quotes.author: Thomas Gilovich

quotes.quote: Be kind to him who does not deserve your kindness.
