quotes.quote: Love with passion. Love for no reason.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Find an opportunity to serve and success will be yours.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You may not find the opportunity to succeed, but you can always find the opportunity to serve. Then serve to succeed.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is a magical power. If love is not a living magic, then what is?
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life is a magical melody.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Only from the soul can you see the magic.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life is magical for a lover.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Forget yourself. Live for others. You will find your bliss.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Your love is the light that will drive away all the darkness that surrounds you.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Time is standing still; we are moving with the waves of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: A hug is a priceless gift of love and kindness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Your love is my diamond that I want to wear near my heart. Your hug is my heaven where I want to belong always.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: In my imagination, I can feel your presence. I can feel the warmth of your passionate hug. I can hear your sweet voice. I can hear the song of your beating heart.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Blindly believing something often comes from societal conformity which is a sign of a lack of deep knowledge and imaginative consciousness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: It may be inevitable that mankind has to suffer so that it may gain experience to transcend and transform her collective consciousness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Mankind is nothing but a playground of consciousness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We often participate in a war only to lose our hearts and to gain a few pieces of land.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: It is very difficult to break free from the prison of conformity and fixed false beliefs without changing our level of consciousness and awareness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I will not pray for health or wealth or splendor; I will pray for a higher consciousness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We are barely conscious. With a higher consciousness we can open the door between infinite possibilities.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: With an open mind, you are the imagination of universal consciousness and the creation of the subconscious mind that wanders throughout the universe.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Consciousness resides in the gap between electrons, protons, and neutrons.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Your state of consciousness defines your state of mind and your state of happiness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: In order to achieve a higher consciousness, one must get lost in love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you are in love nothing matters except the bliss of love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Learning how to transcend consciousness to a higher consciousness is a blissful journey and the ultimate essence of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We fill our lives with meaning by serving endlessly and by learning to transcend our consciousness to a higher consciousness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: A kiss is a flower of love, a sweet song of two hearts, and a memory of eternal desires.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Don’t feel shy—kiss. Kiss just to feel the joy of life and to get lost in the beauty of love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Kiss me with love like a butterfly kisses flowers to find and taste the nectar of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: My kiss is my promise written in my heart with color of your love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I promise you that I will steal your heart and keep it in the prison of my love forever.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is for life; life is for love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: A flower is a gift of love from the universe given to you. So cherish it, enjoy it with a full blissful heart.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you anxiously await to emerge from deep darkness, you will realize the beauty of light.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Don’t wait for opportunity in front of a closed door—wander until you find the open one.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: In life, love is not everything, but without love, life is nothing.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love makes the journey we call life worthwhile.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You become what you focus on and dream about.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Your past karma is what you found difficult or challenging in this life. To heal your past karma you would need to learn your life lessons for this life.
quotes.author: Avis J. Williams

quotes.quote: The time you spend loving is the most valuable time of your life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You must love when your eyes are closed and love when your eyes are open. Love endlessly.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love the dream to live the dream.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Wherever you are, be there with love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are the creator of your world.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life is what you think about it.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I failed many times, but I always found myself stronger and wiser.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Every rose is longing for joy and love; every rose know the language of the heart.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The smile of roses expresses the beauty of the heart.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are the love, the lover, and the beloved.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are the seer, you are the scenery, and you are the poetry.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When I am longing for love, every rose is the expression of my soul.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Every rose has poetry in her heart and is eager to tell you when you are in love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To be infinite, lose yourself in infinite love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You came from love, to live in love, to give away love, and to become love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are a child of love that has come here to live in love and to give away love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you do things with love, flowers bloom inside you.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You can never deplete your love by giving it away. Why not give yourself to love?
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Music is the language of the heart. It can only sing songs of love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Forgive the past to welcome the future.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Your love is the best tincture; it can heal my soul.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Touch your enemies’ heart with love. It will bloom flowers of gratitude and joy.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you love yourself, then you are at peace. Wants or needs cannot destroy it
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Like nature, we must grow with tranquility, beauty, harmony, and love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Attachment is the source of pain, but detachment is the source of joy.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Let love bloom like a flower with the fragrance of the garden of your heart filled with beauty, joy, and happiness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Whatever fills your heart with joy and fills your mind with love--that is your truth of love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Every heart has a unique story to tell. We just need a mind to listen.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Don't just talk, act.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Dream the life you desire. Then live it with passion and love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: All good that we do is just for you.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is as abundant and powerful as sunlight. It can enlighten the whole world. Clouds of doubt can hide it temporarily, but it is always there. It can heal you as sunlight, but it can also burn you.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Never pray for life to be easier, but pray for courage to go on and still enjoy every moment of beauty.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Music fills the void between the heart and soul and connects them in heavenly delights.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: This universe belongs to those who know how to see, feel, and love the beauty of life and the universe.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Success is not an activity but a process.
quotes.author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

quotes.quote: With every sunrise, I rise with joy. My heart dances with love. I begin a new life fresh like a flower.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is the essence, fragrance, and beauty of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Watching TV at my own time. Its beneficiary, but watching TV at its own time . Its time wasting.
quotes.author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

quotes.quote: I am in love when I feel that my soul belongs to the universe.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We often focus on what is wrong and complain that nothing is beautiful.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is the magic, mystery, and the beauty of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We came to this world to enjoy the magic of love, the beauty of existence, and the joy of life. We did not come to this world to look for money and fame.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life is magical and blissful when we live to love the beauty of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Stagnation is death. With love, accept and welcome changes.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Biggest mistake that people make is. That they forget that there is always next time. For any event, any situation and any circumstances.
quotes.author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

quotes.quote: I will try it until i get it right. I will try it until i am no longer trying but doing it.
quotes.author: De philosopher Dj Kyos

quotes.quote: Wonderment shared is doubled. Love shared is infinite.
quotes.author: Kamand Kojouri

quotes.quote: Flowers bloom in the tranquility of love with a beautiful desire for the well-being of the earth.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I want to be born and reborn as a cherry tree so that I may beautify this world with my blossoms, feed everyone with my nectar of love fruits, and purify the air with my calmly dancing leaves.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The greatest lesson we should learn is that from the moment we are born we already have everything we need within ourselves.
quotes.author: George Pornaris

quotes.quote: When you don't fit in anymore, eat less.
quotes.author: Benny Bellamacina

quotes.quote: We are born and reborn again and again. We are changing with the waves of time.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Closed eyes cannot see the light
quotes.author: Andrea L'Artiste

quotes.quote: Dance on the stage of life with love in your heart, a smile on your face, and a great vision in your mind.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The smile is the most beautiful ornament that you can wear.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You can never go further than your own thoughts.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The world is a dangerous place, but there is no better world. Remember every one of us is responsible to make the world a joyful place.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We often concentrate on the negative side of humanity. However, humanity is growing and maturing everyday and showing signs of a better future.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To help humanity, live with kindness and harmony.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When I see that humanity is suffering, it tears my heart. I cry, and then I extend my hand to help heal my heart.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We must not forget the beauty of humanity. At the core of our being, we must love humanity.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We are prisoners of our thoughts. We like to imprison everyone in the same prison and think that it will solve the problems of humanity. Yet everyone is unique; let them live freely and with harmony.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I am longing for you in life and in deathAs the moon is longing for night and life is longing for breath
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We appreciate things not for their beauty but for how they kindle our minds’ generosity.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To dream your wildest dream, find your deepest desire.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you desire to help, you will find a way to do it.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Measure your life not by the dimension of your bank account but by the expansion of your kindness and love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Be a great artist especially when you draw your life’s picture.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Be a great writer when you write your life's song.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life always begins with triumph but tends to end with tragedy.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Poetry happens when there is nothing to say but you have a volcano hidden inside you waiting to erupt.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Your ocean of joy in not out there. Find it inside of you and swim there forever.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To expand your world, love everyone even when no one is perfect.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Do your actions define who you are, or does your purpose define why you are?
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I want to rekindle the inner fire that is burning in you. I want it to come out to take away the darkness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To grow unique beauty, be wild and live in the wilderness of your mind.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Trust in God, but trust yourself first.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you write from the heart, it is always beautiful.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: With love, accept everything that life has to offer you. Life will be easy, kind, magnificent, and magical to you.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Never hate an enemy; love them and transform them into a friend.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Inspiration works well at boiling point.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: No one will love you more than you do. So love your self first.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you are able to understand the language of silence, you will be able to see the beauty of the invisible.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are magnetic, and your magnet is your love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are a bubble in the ocean of life that has come to enjoy the glints of the morning light.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Next to love, kindness is the most beautiful thing.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Creativity is a flower of love and a light that is eager to enlighten others.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Reality is a perceptual illusion we have accepted as truth.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: He who knows how to use the power of love is the most powerful.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The more I love, the more I get lost in love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Never get angry. If you have to get angry, get angry at yourself and not at others.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Don’t fear challenges. They often give us the opportunity to strengthen our courage, faith, and inner strength.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: A friend is someone who accepts you no matter where you are.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: It is easy to hold on, but it is difficult to let it go.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: True love perceives no impossibilities.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You fail because you fear. Be bold. Be fearless.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Don’t try to smell the flowers without planting them.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Invest in yourself to get the best interest.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Longing for love makes a woman beautiful and beloved.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I believe that life is a beautiful journey to find out the beauty of life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Kindness is the beauty of the heart and the smiles of the mind.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: More people die from the hunger of love than from the lack of food.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: All I wanted to do, ever, was be myself.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: A pen, a piece of white paper, and an idea can create a new you.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You have an obligation to this world. That is to love it and make it more joyful.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Marriage is nothing but a commitment to care and share.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is a hidden treasure. You never know you have it until someone special reveals it.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The more I love, the more I find that life is magical.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Be bold. Don’t wait. Go ahead.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Give away love to be loved.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You were never born to make money. You were born to enjoy life and be happy. Instead you learned to make money and forgot how to be happy.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: She is like a flower. Her smile illuminates the whole world.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Without judging anyone, let us love everyone like a flower.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Her smiles are like the morning sun that illuminates my world.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The sun can shine, and it can burn. You can shine your love with a softer power than the sun.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Explanations can’t explain love--only deep perception can do that.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The essence of life is love, and that is my wealth and influence.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I am a farmer of kindness and compassion; I plant the seeds of love in my garden.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To see the unseen, you must see through the beauty of love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To see the magic of life look through the wondrous eyes of a child.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Kindness is the greatest medicine that can heal all ills.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When I am searching for something, it is always waiting for me with open arms.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Feelings are the language of the heart. Everything else is static noise.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I don’t want fame, money, or duty. I want to close my eyes and see your loving beauty.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Follow your heart. It will lead you to where you need to be.
quotes.author: Avis J. Williams

quotes.quote: When pain is intense, you are at a climax. You can then see the light of transcendence.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Failures and mistakes are lessons to be learned from. They are opportunities for growth.
quotes.author: Avis J. Williams

quotes.quote: Close your eyes to feel deeply the tranquility and serenity of the mind.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Stop searching and start revealing the treasures that reside inside of your heart.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Failure results from lack of focus and half trust. Success results from complete devotion and utmost trust.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you believe and act on your dreams, your dreams will become a reality.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We are all teachers, we all have knowledge and experiences that can teach others.
quotes.author: Avis J. Williams

quotes.quote: If you can think it, you can become it.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Measure your life not by years but by adventures.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life happened in the past. Life will happen in the future, but life is happening at this moment. Live in this moment. Seize this moment!
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You can never achieve greatness until you can leave bitterness behind.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To realize your imagination, go with trust in the direction of your destination.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are the creator of your universe, and you are the destroyer of it too.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To enjoy the beauty of love, be a big person in this small world.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We are here to enjoy the breathtaking views of life with love.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life is a land of opportunity to love, live, and enjoy beauty.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To enjoy the beauty and abundance of life, revitalize your life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Be bold! Be a success and change the world.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: A goal is important, but what you become to achieve that goal is much more important.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: With every moment and every heartbeat, we change even though we still fear change.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I am not pretty; I am not ugly. I am not true, and I am not false. I am just me—a reality, a conception, and not a misinterpretation.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You have to let go better to embrace the best.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Follow your heart; don’t fear changes. With love, the heart changes its content.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: She is like a dancing flower; her smiles are spreading love for the whole world.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I define my journey, I enjoy it too.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: First I dream my life. Then I live in that dream with love and joy.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: There is no stress. It is a misinterpretation of a situation. Just change your perception and stress will melt away.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are not what you think, but you are the reflection of what you think.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: To be as pure and perfect as a flower, you must think and dream like a flower.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Nature is always talking to you, smiling to you, and singing to you. To understand, you just have to be open to listen with your heart and soul.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Our eyes see only that which language can explain, but our hearts see that which is invisible and unexplainable.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I find joy and magic in every drop of moonlight. I hear songs of love in every glint of a star.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Oh my love, I like to vanish in you like a ripple vanishes in an ocean—slowly, silently, and endlessly.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Open your wings, fly toward the sky To live in your dream, even if it is high
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The sun gave us our eyes to see the beauty of nature, his creation, through his light.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Be persistent. Success is not far away.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are a whole lot better today than yesterday.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The principle virtue of anyone who made an important invention is curious persistence.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: If I dream under a moonlit night, should it vanish with the brightness of the morning sun?
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I dream like a dew drop in the nightThen glitter in the morning sunlightThen it evaporates to embrace the sky
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We are all unique, but we are also a part of the common body of humanity. With harmony, love, kindness, and compassion we can live together in joy and happiness.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Power is not found in muscles; power is found in the mind.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: We travel to see the reflection of our minds on the mirror of changes so that we may enrich ourselves.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Hope is the boat we ride to reach the shore of our desires.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Love is the most potent drug used to seduce anyone.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Trust the perception not the presentation.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Life is nothing but a few ecstatic dancing atoms.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Before hurting anyone, especially those who cannot protect themselves, feel their pain with your heart. Take care of them as your little child.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: I may not know you, but I don’t see any difference between you and me. I see myself in you; we are one.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: Hope opens the door of opportunity and shines the way to possibilities.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You may be born thousands of years from now, but over the boundaries of time I am sending you my love and wishing you a joyful and wonderful life.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: The secret to living is loving.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: You are an infinite being with infinite love and infinite thoughts.

quotes.quote: The key to opening the secret of humanity is to love and understand the beauty of it.
quotes.author: Debasish Mridha

quotes.quote: When you gain higher consciousness, your consciousness becomes universal and you become ageless, endless, and universal.

quotes.quote: Your subconscious mind is the universal mind with a universal consciousness.

quotes.quote: You were born to unlock your consciousness and be universal and infinite.

quotes.quote: The true understanding of life and its purposes comes from an understanding of consciousness.

quotes.quote: Our levels of consciousness and awareness define our wants and needs. When we achieve higher levels of consciousness, our wants cease to exist.

quotes.quote: Higher consciousness means your self consciousness ceases to exist; you become the ocean of life and a part of the universe.

quotes.quote: You are the byproduct of your level of consciousness, thoughts, and actions.

quotes.quote: There is no true reality. It is just an interplay of your consciousness, awareness, thoughts, and actions.

quotes.quote: Choose to long for love, to live in love, and to be the love so that you can achieve higher consciousness.

quotes.quote: The level of consciousness defines the beauty of our lives.
